E: Lv. 4 Geopolitics Researcher

C: 漫游乐手
E: Busker

C: 「灵缇犬」
E: Greyhound

C: 小吃摊老板
E: Food Stall Owner

C: 推开军械箱，救出希莉儿
E: Push the armory boxes and rescue Cyrille

C: 「虫蚁之于飞禽，野兔之于狼犬，星尘之于黑洞，诸界之于贪饕。」 ——仙舟，《寰宇通鉴》 诸界渴饮者，永无餍足的吞噬者，会思考的黑洞。既是星神，又是古兽的双重存在。 在奥博洛斯看来，生命是虚空海洋中明灭的浮藻，终将随着诞生它们的星辰归于黑暗——这片黑暗就在祂的口中。
E: "Insects are to birds, as hares are to wolves. The stars are to the black hole, as the worlds are to the voracity." — Worlds History as a Mirror, Xianzhou The drinker of worlds, the unsatisfied devourer, the black hole with thought. THEY are an Aeon and a Leviathan at the same time. In the eyes of Oroboros, life is a flickering fragment floating in the sea of void, destined to return to the darkness along with the stars which birthed THEM — This darkness is within the depths of THEIR mouths.

C: 天才俱乐部 - 智识
E: Genius Society — Erudition

C: *哔哔哔！*
E: *beep beep!*

C: 镜子是这世界上最棒的发明——它居然能映出这世界上最完美无瑕的我！
E: A mirror is the greatest invention in the world, for it can reflect the image of me, the most flawless being in the world!

C: 完成「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」，记录柯柯娜的故事
E: Complete "Envision a Rose Forthcoming" and record Cocona's story

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 了解收集狂智械对于技术进步的真正看法
E: Learn about the true opinion of the collection fanatic Intellitron toward technological progress

C: 在艾迪恩公园获取艾迪恩先生的盛会之星收藏卡
E: Obtain Mr. Aideen's Planet of Festivities Collectible Card from Aideen Park

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 冬城的铁壁
E: The Winter City's Iron Walls

C: 星核之声对可可利亚低语，向其许诺一个崭新的世界。在日复一日的暗示中，可可利亚的心智逐渐被磨蚀。
E: The Voice of the Stellaron reached Cocolia with promises of a brand-new world. Day after day, these subtle whispers gradually chipped away at her mind.

C: 被斫断的「建木」重新生长，卡芙卡挣脱束缚，在刃的掩护中跃下高台而去。
E: The severed Ambrosial Arbor began growing again, allowing Kafka to escape her restraints and jump from the platform while Blade provided cover.

C: 你们发现物资被一个躲藏于此的孩子拿走，他为此开价两百冬城盾。希儿欲迫使对方放弃敲诈，布洛妮娅用自己的奖章换回物资。
E: You soon discovered the culprit: a young boy hiding there, clutching the supplies. He demanded two hundred shield. Seele bristled, ready to confront him, but Bronya stepped in — offering her own medal in exchange.

C: 布洛妮娅接任「大守护者」，宣布废除上下层区封锁令，呼吁全体民众合作重建家园。她向「开拓者」们为雅利洛所做的贡献表达感谢。
E: Bronya stepped forward as Jarilo's new Supreme Guardian. She declared the blockade between the Overworld and Underworld officially lifted, calling on all citizens to unite and rebuild their shared home. Then she expressed her gratitude to the Trailblazers for everything they had done for Jarilo.

C: 你们来到「星槎海」中枢，停云称这是仙舟「罗浮」上最大的港口。停云将接引你们前往司辰宫，向驭空禀报列车组的来意。
E: You arrived at the core of the Starskiff Haven, which Tingyun explained was the largest port on the Xianzhou Luofu. She offered to escort you to the Palace of Astrum to report your group's intentions to Yukong.

C: 流萤坦白之前一直在带你绕远路，因为有一个神秘人在跟踪你。酒红色外套，绿眼睛，深蓝色头发……桑博出现在你面前，向你问好。
E: Firefly confessed that she was taking you on a long detour because a mysterious person was following you. She said they had a wine-red jacket, green eyes, deep blue hair... Sampo appeared before you, offering his greetings.

C: 你与流萤在「黄金的时刻」遇到「桑博」。流萤察觉出面前此人有问题，「桑博」却一再强调——家族正隐瞒着「美梦」背后的秘密。
E: You and Firefly encountered Sampo at the Golden Hour. Firefly sensed there was something wrong with the person before her, yet Sampo repeatedly emphasized that The Family is hiding the secret behind the "sweet dreams."

C: 调律后万维克陷入异样痛感，暗示停云体内藏有神秘力量，星期日起疑。
E: After the tuning, Wonweek felt a strange pain, hinting that there may be a mysterious power hiding within Tingyun. Sunday grew suspicious.

C: 你再度觐见欧洛尼斯。欧洛尼斯认可你的资质，将力量寄托于你。但如今的你<color=#f29e38ff>仅是一簇独立行走的记忆</color>，生命在穿过天界的那一刻就已逝去，仅以浮黎的瞥视稳固形体。若要接过神权，你必须从死亡手中找回被夺走的未来，这便是「岁月」真正的试炼。
E: You met Oronyx once more. Oronyx deemed you worthy, and entrusted you with their power. However, they also deemed you nothing more than <color=#f29e38ff>a collection of walking memories</color>. Your life had been cast away from the moment you crossed the barrier from beyond the sky, but Fuli's gaze was able to stabilize your form. If you wanted to accept Oronyx's divine authority, you needed to find your future that had been stolen. This was the true trial of "Time."

C: 佩妮娅生前委托同事，把她的终端机和软盘带回贝洛伯格，其中存着她每天给佩拉写的信。从佩妮娅感知到佩拉时起，一直到分娩那天。
E: Before passing, Penya entrusted her terminal and floppy disks to her colleague to be taken back to Belobog. They contained letters she wrote to Pela every day, from the moment she first sensed Pela until the day she gave birth.

C: 幽府武弁报告，幽囚狱中通讯已被阻绝，大量囚犯被释放。寒鸦命狱卒展开搜捕，并邀请你和丹恒随她前往幽狱之底，助她镇伏恶兽。
E: The Wraith Warden reported that communications in The Shackling Prison had been severed, and massive numbers of prisoners had been released. Hanya ordered the prison guards to begin a search, and invited you and Dan Heng to accompany her to the bottom of The Shackling Prison to help subdue the vile beast.

C: 就算结局已定，选择仍有意义，这是青雀的答案，也是符玄本人用行动给出的答案。这番话让岁阳产生动摇，符玄逐渐挣脱它的控制。
E: Even with a predetermined conclusion, choices remained meaningful. This was both Qingque's response and the solution Fu Xuan herself had demonstrated through action. This realization made the heliobus waver, allowing Fu Xuan to break free from their control.

C: 黑塔提议拿你做些研究，希望你留在空间站。姬子则邀请你登上星穹列车，但将选择的权力留给你。若你决定好了，就去月台找姬子。
E: Herta suggested using you for research and hoped you'd stay on the space station. Himeko, on the other hand, invited you to board the Astral Express but left the choice up to you. Go to the railway platform to look for Himeko once you've made up your mind.

C: 你们来到一座机械栈桥前，希露瓦称桥的对面就是怪物遍布的裂界。她曾参与栈桥控制系统的编写，可以通过终端机来联合控制。
E: You arrived at a mechanical gear bridge. Serval pointed across it where the monster-infested Fragmentum was. She revealed she'd helped program the bridge's control system and could operate it from the terminal.

C: 经历一番「大道至简」的操作后，你们完成「宙合阵」的重启。接下来可以去重启其余阵基了。
E: After a series of "simple" operations, you restarted the Temporal Terminal successfully. Now, you could go and restart the other base terminals.

C: 钟表小子称，石头老板是一切混乱的罪魁祸首。钟表小子将<color=#f29e38ff>「钟表把戏」</color>传授给你，希望你带回人们的好情绪，让大家和好如初。
E: Clockie claimed that Boss Stone was the culprit behind all the chaos. Clockie passed the <color=#f29e38ff>Clockwork</color> onto you, hoping you can bring back the good vibes for everyone, and let them return to their former glory.

C: 你感叹会议顺利结束，决定前往参加即将开始的谐乐大典，并在途中与多位熟人交流，一切似乎都在稳步推行。
E: You were glad that the meeting ended successfully and decided to participate in the Charmony Festival that was about to start. You conversed with many familiar faces on the way. Everything seemed to be progressing smoothly.

C: 翡翠欢迎你来到「慈玉典押」，声称可以实现你的任何愿望，只要将帕姆的尾巴带给她作为抵押。
E: Jade welcomed you to the Bonajade Exchange, claiming she could grant any wish you had, as long as you gave her Pom-Pom's tail as collateral.

C: 波提欧掏枪威胁，却仍被挡在睡蕉社门外。社员坚持考核波提欧对睡蕉小猴的了解程度，波提欧不想闹出太大动静，同意按规矩来。
E: Boothill pulled his gun to threat them but was still barred from the Slumbernana Association. The member insisted on testing Boothill's knowledge of Slumbernana Monkey, and Boothill agreed to follow the rules to avoid causing a scene.

C: 舞台规则会强制纠正违规者，万维克遭规则反噬，星期日认出秩序异变。
E: The rules regarding the stage would forcibly correct any wrongs. Wonweek was retaliated against by the rules. Sunday discovered the mutation in the Order.

C: 停云为三位仙舟同伴挑选礼物，借此表达谢意。
E: Tingyun picked presents for three Xianzhou friends as thanks.

C: 临别前，停云询问你对她的过往印象与眼下有何异同。幻胧夺走了她的人生，她便要拿回与你的缘分，从恩公这个理所应当的称呼开始。
E: Before leaving, Tingyun asked whether your past impressions of her were any different to now. Phantylia took away her life, so Tingyun will regain her connection with you, starting with calling you "benefactor."

C: 停云购买梦泡准备回程，并将一枚梦泡赠与恩人，象征感恩与回忆的延续。
E: Tingyun bought some dream bubbles and prepared to leave. She gifted a dream bubble to her benefactor, signifying thanks and the continuation of your memories together.

C: 你与丹恒遇到受困的市民，他请求你们帮忙复原倾倒的石柱。缇宝出现，向你与丹恒传授能回溯时间的<color=#f29e38ff>欧洛尼斯祷言</color>。
E: You and Dan Heng found a citizen in trouble who needed help with the collapsed pillars. Tribbie appeared and taught you both <color=#f29e38ff>Oronyx's Prayer</color>, which could rewind time.

C: 缇宝与阿格莱雅交谈，得知阿格莱雅以失去你与丹恒对她的信任为代价，促成你们与白厄、遐蝶更为深笃的关系，以备未来之需。
E: Tribbie talked to Aglaea and learned that she had purposely given up your and Dan Heng's trust to help you build stronger connections with Phainon and Castorice, planning ahead for what might come.

C: 「理性」火种的最后一份，藏在那刻夏的躯壳中。瑟希斯将借你们之手拼合火种，救活那刻夏，如此她便有把握击败黑衣剑士。
E: The final piece of the Coreflame was laid within Anaxa's body. Cerces would use your hands to reassemble the Coreflame and revive Anaxa. Once done, she was confident of defeating that black-robed swordsman.

C: 那刻夏猜测黑袍剑士的目标是猎取火种，将其称为「盗火行者」，并推测其下一处目标是欧洛尼斯。丹恒赶来，称缇宝在命运重渊失踪。
E: Anaxa speculated that the black-robed swordsman was after the Coreflames, dubbing them the Flame Reaver. He also suspected the Flame Reaver's next target would be Oronyx. Dan Heng arrived in haste, reporting that Tribbie had gone missing in the Abyss of Fate.

C: 在分离最后的「理性」之后，格奈乌斯就会迎来光荣的死亡。格奈乌斯劝慰同伴不要为此落泪，他已经抵达自己命运的终点，于此尽兴。
E: After severing the final piece of his soul, "Reason," Gnaeus welcomed his valorous death. He reassured his companions not to shed tears for him. As someone who had reached the end of his journey, he was satisfied.

C: 来古士称「清洗者」会以炼金术传递记忆与身份，当前的「凯妮斯」已是第二十七任。克拉特鲁斯前来救援丹恒，称阿格莱雅已被杀害。
E: Lygus claimed that the "Cleaners" could use alchemy to transmute memories and identities, and that the "Caenis" they knew was already on her <unbreak>27</unbreak>th incarnation. Krateros arrived to save Dan Heng, claiming that Aglaea had already been slain.

C: 往世的晖之民记忆宣称：「伟大的艾格勒已在金色的云朵间留下了它的化身印记……」白厄猜想这与天象画壁有关。
E: The memory of the Sunfolk of the past declared: "The great Aquila has already left a mark of their manifestation among the golden clouds..." Phainon guessed that this had something to do with the celestial mural.

C: 通路已成，此去再无你们与「天空」之间的阻碍。塞涅俄丝所期待的能取回火种的天空之子，而今即将来到她面前。
E: With the path clear, and no obstacles between you and the "Sky," it was time for the child of Sky to seize her rightful Coreflame, the one Seliose had awaited all these years.

C: 赛飞儿并未发现与凯妮斯有关的线索。震动传自天幕，这意味着风堇已取得「天空」火种。与此同时，赛飞儿感应到盗火行者迫近。
E: Cipher found nothing tying them to Caenis. A tremor rolled through the sky, which meant Hyacine had claimed the Coreflame of Sky. At the same time, Cipher sensed the Flame Reaver drawing near.

C: 盗火行者矗立前路，呢喃「归位」「重启」。白厄猜想盗火行者的目的也是「再创世」，但无法与对方产生交流，一场血战避无可避。
E: The Flame Reaver stood in your path, murmuring, "Return" and "Restart." Phainon guessed it also sought Era Nova, but there was no way to communicate. A brutal fight was inevitable.

C: 实验记录：对象卡厄斯兰那成功说服十二黄金裔，但并未对实验进程产生实质性影响。
E: Experiment Log: Subject Khaslana successfully persuaded the twelve Chrysos Heirs. Yet, no substantive impact on the experimental progress was observed.

C: 追忆残像中，三月七被挡在一道大门外。权杖系统中传来你的名字，并将三月七封装传送至第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次永劫回归。
E: In the Fragments of Recollection, March 7th stood blocked before a great door. Your name echoed through the Scepter system, which teleported March 7th into the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence.

C: 在德谬歌监牢，在格式化进程完成前，每个轮回的昔涟都会向权杖讲述逐火之旅的故事。于是，「记忆的种子」诞生。
E: In Demiurge's prison, before the formatting process was completed, Cyrene of each cycle told the Scepter stories of the Flame-Chase Journey. Thus, the Seed of Memory was born.

C: 昔涟请你和她一起完成真正的「创世」，以爱对抗憎恨。覆写铁墓「毁灭」的方程式，将它冲刷成一片「空白」。
E: Cyrene asked you to join her in completing the real "Genesis," fight hatred with love, and overwrite Irontomb's Destruction equation, washing it away into a "blank."

C: 你向界种科科员打听空间站里收容「危险实验品」的地方，科员建议你去收容舱段一探究竟。
E: You asked a Department of Ecology researcher where "dangerous experimental results" were kept in the space station. The researcher suggested checking the storage zone.

C: 你们与公司员工对峙。公司员工以绩效为由，坚决执行组长下达的封锁命令，战斗一触即发。
E: You confronted the IPC Workers. They cited performance quotas and strictly enforced the lockdown order from their supervisor. Tension filled the air as battle loomed.

C: 你看到十分符合希露瓦描述的孩子，推测那就是玲可。你留在原地观察情况。
E: You spotted a child who matched Serval's description perfectly — it must be Lynx. You stayed put and chose to observe the situation.

C: 三月七将在虚构的推理环节中扮演罗刹，但她扮演的角色却似乎更像三月本人。
E: In the fictional deduction segment, March 7th took on the role of Luocha. But somehow, her portrayal felt more like herself.

C: 景元称自己该回去养病了，并建议你们快些行动。
E: Jing Yuan said it was time for him to return and rest, urging you to act swiftly.

C: 你们并不知晓刺客的身份与数量，只能推测他们是采用云吟术才得以隐匿身形。
E: You didn't know the identity or number of assassins. Your only guess was that they had used cloudhymn magic to conceal their presence.

C: 你在金人巷与素裳重逢，向其解释绥园中发生的大小事情。你得知桂乃芬住进了医馆，素裳正准备去看望她，相信过不了多久就会痊愈。
E: You reunited with Sushang in Aurum Alley and explained everything that had happened in Fyxestroll Garden. She told you that Guinaifen had been taken to the apothecary, and she was planning to visit Guinaifen soon. She believed Guinaifen would make a full recovery before long.

C: 黑天鹅指认了真凶「阿佑」。捕头告诉她下一道谜题的地点后，黑天鹅意识到战胜花火的关键不在谜题本身，而是看穿花火的真实意图。
E: Black Swan identified Wright as the culprit. When the Constable disclosed where to find the next puzzle, Black Swan realized that to beat Sparkle, she needed to see through Sparkle's actual motives rather than just solve the puzzles.

C: 你同公输师父了解情况，在你昨日提醒他注意「孤云」的安全后，他勘验了宝剑存放的情况。此时，孤云尚未被窃走。
E: You discussed the situation with Master Gongshu. He checked on how Guyun was stored after you reminded him to keep the sword safe. Guyun had yet to be stolen then.

C: 彦卿自幼苦练剑术，却在某次对决中惨败失意。彦卿经椒丘点拨后顿悟：挥剑不为身外之物，而是享受倾尽全力的纯粹自我。
E: Though Yanqing had practiced swordplay since childhood, a crushing defeat left him disheartened. Under Jiaoqiu's guidance, he came to realize that wielding a sword sought no external validation, but the pure joy of giving one's all.

C: 许久之前，飞霄是被步离人役使的狐人「战奴」。貊泽传来讯息，称找到了椒丘与呼雷的位置，但椒丘示意貊泽不要露面。
E: In her past, Feixiao served as a war slave under borisin control. Moze sent word that he had discovered Jiaoqiu and Hoolay's whereabouts, but Jiaoqiu warned Moze not to reveal himself.

C: 原来景元也会上网看帖，还知道你们救下符玄的事迹。而对于你所询问的命运一事，他认为就算命运的结局已定，过程也足够重要。
E: It turned out that Jing Yuan also read online posts and knew about your rescue of Fu Xuan. Regarding your inquiry about fate, he believed that regardless of a predetermined conclusion, the journey held its own meaning.

C: 阿灼同白露告别，孩子们的快乐时光结束了。
E: Luxie said goodbye to Bailu, concluding their happy times together.

C: 先赞后看，已成习惯。
E: I give a like before I look at these posts. It's a habit.

C: 蕉~蕉蕉蕉！
E: Bana~ nana!

C: 原谅我无法对这张合影做出评价，它所承载的，比它展现出的更多。\n最后，请允许我向这位年轻的摄影师送上祝福。

C: 欧洛尼斯的夜雾缠绕月桂树枝， 救世的英雄随着黑匣一同，自天外降临命运重渊。 {F#她}{M#他}应神谕而来，然而那时祭司们却畏惧着谈论天外。 「切莫高声谈论天空，那多疑的艾格勒从不犹疑降下阳雷的责罚。」 听罢这番话，自信的救世主怒气咻咻答道： 「灾难的预卜者，你从未考虑过，神明也应担忧来自人子的责罚。」 在城垣之上，救世主见证玫瑰色的黎明在地平线上升起， 「首先是那执掌『纷争』的尼卡多利， 我祈求它能为自己带来荣耀，而并非疯狂。」 救世主摘开风帽，将一柄长枪掷出， 那迅驰的飞影好似初春的独狼，冲向了悬锋城，在街巷间奔突。 「以墨涅塔之名！若命运纺线已断，我会重续篇章。」 远方响起了疯王的怒吼，那长枪先于脚步宣告了启程。 「那与我为伴的黄金裔伙伴将在旅程中等候，我必须出发了。」 雅努斯祭司们望向救世主披散的灰发，高声欢呼， 就像得到滋养的干枯草种一般欢欣。
E: The night fog of Oronyx entwines with laurel branches, as the hero of deliverance descends from beyond the sky into the Abyss of Fate, alongside a black box. {F#She}{M#He} came in response to the prophecy, yet in those times the priests feared to speak of what lay beyond the sky. "Do not speak loudly of the sky, for the suspicious Aquila never hesitates to castigate with Daythunder." Hearing this, the confident Deliverer replied in fury: "O diviner of calamities, you never considered that even the gods should fear punishment from the children of humanity." Upon the city walls, the Deliverer witnessed the rosy dawn rising on the horizon, "First comes Nikador, who wields Strife, I pray they bring me glory, not madness." The Deliverer pulled back {F#her}{M#his} hood and hurled a spear, its swift shadow like a lone wolf in early spring, charging through the streets of Castrum Kremnos. "In the name of Mnestia! If destiny's threads are broken, I shall weave a new chapter." The Mad King's roar echoed from afar, his spear heralding departure before his steps. "My Chrysos Heir companions await me on this journey, I must set forth." Janus's priests looked at the Deliverer's fluttering gray hair and cheered loudly, rejoicing like withered plants bestowed with nourishment.

C:
「黑塔」空间站因为其真正主人黑塔女士，经历了无数危机，也渡过了无数危机。

满载着全宇宙中最奇异的藏品，就像是垂涎欲滴的肥猪置于饥饿食客的眼前，从来都不是安全的。仅凭公司招募的防卫科员、略显先进的防御系统，空间站还不足以承受来自星间的歹意…黑塔女士预先调遣，空间站留下一道优雅弧线，让谋划已久的太空阴谋来不及上演就已匆匆结束。

至于逢凶化吉的情报本事，则被本人轻描淡写地描述为「将别人看书的时间用在了泡咖啡上」。

比起意欲窃取藏品的盗贼、目的不明的各式派系，空间站最主要的威胁仍然来自其主人自身。她要是突发奇想，空间站便即刻遭殃。拟态恒星湮灭的奇物、暗星系碰撞的畸变引力场…黑塔女士趁着兴致，将各式藏品收集起来；实际到手后，她又常常失去兴致，再也不予问津。

因此，尽管「黑塔」在深空中不言不语，其珍藏的各形态危机却像柄重锋宝剑悬于头顶。

上级科员们对危险的现状早已熟稔于心，深知「秘密藏于危险之中」的道理。他们严格守护高度机密，切实按照标准执行收容，将危险隐没于平静之中…在空间站的茶水间里，他们是插科打诨的朋友；在空间站的收容舱深处，他们是技巧娴熟的专家，在这里，秘密将始终是秘密。

在湛蓝星的近地轨道上，空间站一如既往地运行着，正如在冰湖表面上推出一枚砾石，它将依旧平缓滑行，悄无声息。
E:
The space station endured and survived many a crisis due to being owned by Madam Herta.

Laden with the rarest items in the entire universe like a feast set before ravenous guests, the space station was never free from threats or unwanted attention. Relying on the security personnel hired by the IPC and a somewhat advanced defensive system proved insufficient to handle the hostility from the stars... Madam Herta once made prescient judgment and steered the station away in an elegant curve, ending a conspiratorial attempt to assault the station before it even initiated.

As for her mastery in gathering intel to solve crises, she simply described it as "I spend time brewing coffee while others are reading books."

Rather than thieves who intend to steal its collection or mysterious factions with unknown objectives, the main threat faced by the space station remains its owner. The station could immediately fall into disaster if she ever had a wild idea. Curios that simulate a stellar collapse, a distorted gravitational field caused by the collision of dark galaxies... Madam Herta collected them all when she was in the mood, but would often lose interest once she got her hands on them.

Hence, though the space station appears to be floating peacefully in space, its treasure hoard of multi-shaped crises hung above it like a sword waiting to fall.

Senior researchers had long been aware of the dangers they faced, and understood that "secrets lie deep within danger." They strictly adhere to confidentiality agreements and faithfully carry out regulated containment procedures, thus burying danger within an outward silence... In the cafeteria, they were friends who could joke around. Yet, deep in the bowels of the space station's storage zones, they were highly skilled experts. In this place, secrets would always remain secrets.

The space station is operating as usual in low orbit around The Blue. Just like a pebble pushed out onto the smooth surface of a frozen lake, the station will continue to glide evenly and steadily in complete silence.

C:
造访过匹诺康尼的宾客一定会赞同，「建于美梦之上」并非浮夸譬喻，而是千真万确的陈述。富丽堂皇的酒店不过是盛会之星的冰山一角，「下榻入梦」才算是正式踏入匹诺康尼。自此，由十二片梦境构成的梦之国度在客人眼前缓缓铺开。

初到的客人一时或为这狂欢的舞台无所适从。但不必惊慌，抬头看看，在重楼飞阁间交错的金属轨道，和轨道上飞快滚动的「球笼」，乃是这座梦境城市最为瞩目的交通方式，众宾客们游历城市各处的向导。

自中央车站起始，错综复杂的球笼轨道如同大都会的血脉，无论是在「黎明的时刻」地底管道、在「热砂的时刻」辽阔原野，还是在「星辰的时刻」闪耀赛场，彩色的圆球翻滚不休，将人流准确高效、安稳舒适地送往各个站点，为匹诺康尼的梦境注入不眠的活力。

梦为一切披上轻薄曼妙的质感，一颗颗坚果般的「球笼」被视作梦想之地的载具和玩具。却极少有人记得：「球笼」本是「囚笼」。通往美梦的车流，原是关押犯人的囚具。

久远之前，公司将数量庞大的囚犯送往阿斯德纳星系，试图阻止一场灾难的蔓延。人们在此回收忆质，逐渐在现实与幻想间迷离。真空中的球形工作舱成了囚犯们难忘的「记忆」：坚硬的曲面内壁、难受的翻滚体验、每日无比煎熬的出勤——或许这些痛苦过于深刻，重获自由的人开垦荒芜梦境时，球笼亦随之降临。

但今时不同往日，和平与自由诞下乐观的精神：与其一遍遍销毁挥之不去的噩梦，不如为其添上这里应有的色彩，将之吸纳、包容——于是过去的「囚笼」，变作今日的「球笼」。

此刻，匹诺康尼的城市中遍布快速流动的彩色球笼，和其中传来的轻微震动…悄声隐藏在梦境都市的光怪陆离之中，与那些雄心壮志、欢声笑语融为一体，一如时光永驻的梦想之地。
E:
Those who have visited Penacony will agree that "built on dreams" is not just some saying, but is a very real statement. The opulent hotel is just the tip of the iceberg of the Planet of Festivities, and it is only when you "stay and dream" that you are considered to have officially arrived at Penacony. From then on, the land of dreams, consisting of twelve dreamscapes, slowly expands before the guests' eyes.

Guests who are new to the place may be overwhelmed by this carnival stage, but do not be alarmed. Look up and see the metal tracks crisscrossing the skyscrapers and the Spheroids rapidly rolling along them. They are the most visible means of transportation in this dreamscape metropolis and guide guests to each and every place around the city.

Starting from the central station, the complicated Spheroid tracks are like the blood vessels of the metropolis. Whether it is the underground tunnels of the Moment of Daybreak, the vast fields of the Moment of Scorchsand, or the glittering stadium of the Moment of Stars, the colorful Spheroids roll on and on, delivering people to each station accurately, efficiently, safely, and comfortably, pouring a sleepless energy into the dream world of Penacony.

Dreams give a light and delicate texture to everything, and the nut-like Spheroids are regarded as both vehicles and as toys in the land of dreams. However, few remember that the Spheroids are actually imprisonment cages — the vehicle towards dreams are tools originally used for locking up prisoners.

A long time ago, the IPC sent a huge number of prisoners to the Asdana star system in an attempt to stop a catastrophe from spreading. There, people reclaimed memoria, gradually becoming lost between fantasy and reality. The spherical work chambers in vacuum became an unforgettable "memory" for the prisoners — the hard curved interior walls, the awful experience of tumbling around, the unbearable daily attendance — perhaps these pains ran too deep. When those who regained their freedom pioneered the barren dreamscape, the spherical cages came along with them.

But now, unlike in the past, peace and freedom have given birth to optimism. Instead of trying to destroy the inescapable nightmares over and over, it is better to add to them the color this place should have, to take them in, and embrace them. So, the spherical imprisonment cages of the past have become today's Spheroids.

In the present, the fast-moving colorful Spheroids moving all over Penacony and the slight reverberations coming from within them... are all quietly hidden in the light of the dream city, blending in with the ambitions and laughter, like a land of dreams where time forever stands still.

C: ……我很好奇，筑城者是如何获得星神的启示，提前修筑抵御外敌的高墙？毕竟克里珀不怎么关心凡人，俯瞰众生更像「秩序」太一的行为——这两位星神若有交情倒也正常，毕竟「存护」和「秩序」存在交汇的领域。说真的，我蛮欣赏太一，祂浑身散发着古老帝国的光辉，像是庄严的大理石，这也与克里珀有几分相似——祂们身上都有守护神的影子，只是形式并不相同。总之，塔伊兹育罗斯的陨落似与「存护」直接相关，我想唯有那神力缠绕的巨锤，才可能洞穿另一位神的躯体。只是历史的全貌远不止于此，我实在难以确定星神的交手方式……
E: ...I'm curious. How did the Architects receive inspiration from their Aeon in advance to build the towering walls to resist enemies from the outside? After all, Qlipoth cares little for mortals, and observing living beings is a behavior more familiar to Ena the Order. I suppose it makes sense for these two Aeons to have communal responsibilities. After all, there is some overlap between Preservation and Order. To tell the truth, I really admire Ena. THEY exude the glory of the old empires like majestic marble, which is also somewhat similar to Qlipoth — THEY both feel similar to protector gods, albeit not entirely the same. Anyway, the fall of Tayzzyronth seems to be directly linked to the Preservation. I think only that giant hammer wrapped in divine power can penetrate the body of another god. It's just that there's so much more to history than that. I'm really struggling to ascertain the way Aeons fight...

C: 将行者与星神连接起来的命途力量，如果掌握它的发生机制，做到可量化的分析处理，能否将命途行者本身作为工业品进行量产？莫利特如是问道。 走进星空以前，长鸣星的咕噜多教授一度认为，仅需四种基本作用力，人类就能掌握宇宙。后来，学者们将这一模型戏称为「天国」。正如琥珀王所做的一般，虚数能量与命途的不可观测及不可复现性，为大一统方程的建立树起一道无法逾越的高墙。纯粹造物学派，他们解析命途的实验被信徒视作渎神，但以最小单位为起点，重组整个宇宙，这不正是「智识」的体现吗？ 纯粹造物学派的学者就像烟花，他们转瞬即逝，却将无数星火留给了后世的求知者。 ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: The power of the Paths, which connects pathstriders and Aeons — If we could grasp its occurrence mechanism and perform quantitative analysis, could we mass-produce pathstriders as industrial products? That was the question Mollett asked. Before embarking unto the starry skies, Professor Groudo of Longchime once opined that humanity could master the universe using only four fundamental forces. Scholars would later mockingly call this model the "Heavenly Kingdom." Just like everything else the Amber Lord did, the unobservability and irreproducibility of imaginary energy and the Paths raised an insurmountable wall against the establishment of the grand unified equation. The experiments in analyzing the Paths by the School of Pure Creation are seen as blasphemous by the devout, but to reconstruct the entire cosmos with the smallest unit as its building block, is that not the true manifestation of the Erudition? Scholars of the School of Pure Creation are like fireworks — ephemeral, yet leaving behind myriad sparks for future seekers of knowledge. — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

E: When a character's turn begins, regenerate their Energy.

E: Increases Ultimate DMG's All-Type RES PEN. This bonus increases with each enemy target hit by the Ultimate and lasts until the end of the next Ultimate use.

E: Gains Shield when using Ultimate with "<u>Brain in a Vat</u>."

C: 敌方目标在攻击中受到削韧伤害后，有概率陷入灼烧状态。
E: Enemy targets have a chance of becoming Burned after receiving Toughness-Reducing DMG from an attack.

E: DoTs taken by enemy targets can CRIT. The CRIT Rate/CRIT DMG is based on all ally characters' total CRIT Rate/CRIT DMG.

E: Increases Break Effect. After Breaking enemy targets' Weakness, gains a Shield and deals "<u>Blazar</u>" DMG to the target.

C: 敌方目标持有的负面效果越多，受到的追加攻击伤害越高
E: Enemy targets with more debuffs take more Follow-Up ATK DMG.

C: #鲁珀特二世自称继承了天才俱乐部#27帝皇鲁珀特的记忆，并展开席卷寰宇的第二次反有机帝皇战争，战争期间生灵涂炭。在第二次反有机帝皇战争结束后，星际和平公司曾花费天价信用点，多次对#鲁珀特二世遗体进行鉴定，却最终得出骇人的结论：#鲁珀特二世为血肉之躯。
E: #Rubert II professed to have inherited the memories of Emperor Rubert, listed as Genius Society #27, and initiated the second cosmos-spanning anti-organic Emperor's War. With the war came terrible calamity, and at the end of the conflict, the IPC spent vast amounts of credits to repeatedly appraise #Rubert II's remains. This, however, led to a dreadful revelation: #Rubert II was a being of flesh and tissue.

C: 为了对抗虚构史学家对历史肆无忌惮的扭曲，向来低调的烛墨学派决定主动出击，烛墨学者们制造出一种能够揭示真相的机兵，它从诞生之时就被赋予了消灭一切虚构之物的使命。真实机兵果然不负众望，干净利索地完成了第一项任务——它自杀了。哦，毕竟真实机兵本身就是一种虚构之物。
E: To counter the reckless distortions of history by History Fictionologists, the usually reserved Candelagraphos decided to take proactive measures. The Scholars of Candles engineered an Automaton of Truth, designed to unveil the truth and obliterate all fictional constructs. True to its purpose, the Automaton of Truth admirably completed its first task — it self-destructed. After all, the automaton itself was a fictional creation.

C: 「快乐电视机」的发明者认为，作为史上最伟大的发明，电视机就如同寒夜里的灯火，给人们枯燥无聊的生活提供一点娱乐。但一丁点娱乐哪里够？！娱乐就应该是生活的所有！全部！只要在遥控器上轻轻一滑，就连超星系爆炸都能转译成娱乐节目。由于营销策略的错误，当公司完成对该设备的影响评估时，已经有近百个世界，因沉迷「快乐电视机」退化成了原始社会。
E: The inventor of JoyStream TV proclaimed it the greatest innovation ever, comparing it to a beacon of light in the dark, providing some entertainment to mundane stretches of daily life. But why should it just be a little bit? Entertainment should be life itself! With a simple click of the remote, even super-galactic explosions could be turned into entertainment shows. However, this marketing strategy proved disastrously shortsighted. By the time the IPC completed its risk assessment, it was too late. JoyStream TV had caused nearly a hundred worlds to regress into primitive societies, their inhabitants hopelessly mesmerized by their screens.

C: 斯基亚纳是翁法罗斯边陲的一座海岛小城，这座城邦常年遭受海兽袭扰，最终在一名英雄船长的带领下击退了海兽，还缴获了海兽的一截残肢。人们将海兽残肢拖回城内，虽然血肉已经腐烂，但骨头却如铁般坚硬，如玉般光滑。城内最资深的工匠将其研磨成刀枪不入的盾牌，小岛也因此名声大振。可盾牌带来的除了名声还有战争，悬锋人盯上了这种神兵，盾牌也没能挡下悬锋的矛头。
E: Skiana is a small coastal city on the fringes of Amphoreus, long plagued by sea beast attacks. Eventually, under the leadership of a heroic captain, the city repelled the creatures and even recovered a severed limb from one of them. The remains were dragged back to the city. Though its flesh had rotted away, the bones were as hard as iron and as smooth as jade. The city's most skilled craftspeople ground the bones into shields, impervious to blades and spears, bringing great fame to the island. But with fame came war. The Kremnoans set their sights on these divine armors, and in the end, even the shields could not withstand their spears.

C: 天才俱乐部#55余清涂热爱为鸡尾酒起些花哨的名字，这其中或许暗含秘辛——正如塔拉毒火焰的名字，它即为七百七十四种剧毒鸡尾酒之一。有记载在尔特勒克西亚星系，塔拉毒火焰曾作为最佳口味鸡尾酒一度畅销，每一位品尝过塔拉毒火焰的居民都不再有机会讲述它的口味。嗅觉敏锐的皮皮西人却在此后乘胜追击，于银河中推广了塔拉奇火焰、塔拉毒水焰和塔拉不毒火焰等多款仿制品——安全无害，不含酒精。
E: Yu Qingtu, Genius Society's #55, has a predilection for giving cocktails gaudy names. Some among them might even have names with special implications, connected to stories known only to a few — stories such as the Thalan Toxi-Flame, which exists on record as one of the <unbreak>774</unbreak> most toxic cocktails. Records show that in the Aterlexian System, the Thalan Toxi-Flame was once extremely popular among the locals, with each of the locals that sampled its taste no longer able to describe the flavors thereafter. The Pepeshi people, imbued with acute olfactory senses, would use their understanding of the beverage to their benefit and introduced other counterfeit drinks such as the Thalan Mysti-Flame, the Thalan Hydro-Flame, and the Thalan Detoxi-Flame to the cosmos, with each of them being entirely harmless and alcohol-free.

C: 在星际和平公司中荣升P<unbreak>40</unbreak>级的员工，都将获得认购「信仰债券」的权利。它意味着路易斯•弗莱明对你的肯定，并附带了一项神圣无比的承诺：即在「琥珀王」命中注定的存护伟业之中将拥有你的一席之地。你的能力微乎其微，你的财富不足为道，你的信仰如同浩瀚星海中的一粒微尘。但一代又一代的「你」汇聚起来，终将拥有守护整个宇宙的力量。\n（该奇物已发生数据膨胀）
E: Interastral Peace Corporation staff members who are promoted to level P<unbreak>40</unbreak> gain the right to purchase Faith Bonds. These bonds indicate Louis Fleming's affirmation of the individual and come with a sacred vow: The staff now has a place in the Amber Lord's destined achievement of Preservation. One person's abilities amount to nothing, their wealth also amounts to nothing, and their faith is like a single particle of dust in the wide starry seas. However, generations of humanity will join together, and ultimately obtain the power to protect the entire universe.\n(This Curio already underwent data expansion)

C: 为对抗「智识」的确定性，谜语人曾在不确定领域做出诸多努力。他们将思想之雾和感官之雨塞入一枚棱镜，雨与雾结合的色彩变幻莫测，形成一种能够扰动感官的「磁场」。谜语人大为惊喜，渴望将此项研究继续进行——但它最终被叫停，因为越是研究，人们就越是不确定是否要继续研究。
E: To combat the determinacy of Erudition, the Riddlers performed a great deal of labor in aspects of knowledge that has yet to be set in stone. They inserted the Fog of Thought and the Rain of Sensation into a single prismatic lens, and their combined colors shifted endlessly to form a "magnetic field" that can disturb the senses. Revelrous in their success, the Riddlers sought to push this line of research onward but were made to stop, for the more they committed to this study, the more they grew uncertain of the necessity of its continuation.

C:
我曾在冬日邂逅一位独行的战士，大雪也无法熄灭的火焰。
那疲惫的女人将我从死亡中拯救，逐火者中罕有的悬锋血脉。
她来为胜利父摘取荣誉，凭锋利的长矛，
与其余诸神的性命。
她是个典型的悬锋人，擦拭去凝聚成冰的鲜血，为逝者合上眼睛。
「愿战士们的灵魂归于尼卡多利麾下。」
她蔑视地拒绝了我的邀请，独自踏上了弑神的苦旅，
你真相信人能弑杀泰坦吗？哪怕雅努斯的半神已宣告预言。
「当然，即使我会死去，也终将有悬锋人斩下神明的首级。」
E:
One winter, I met a lone warrior, lively as the flame undimmed by the falling snow.
That exhausted lady pulled me back from the brink of death. She was one of the rare Kremnoans among Flame-Chasers.
With her sharp spear, she came to claim the honor,
And the lives of gods for the Father of Victory.
She was a typical Kremnoan, who wiped away blood that froze upon her blade, closing the eyes of the dead.
"May the souls of warriors find rest in Nikador's domain."
She rejected my invitation disdainfully and set off on her journey to slay the gods alone.
Do you truly believe a mortal can kill a Titan, even when Janus' demigod has declared their prophecy?
"Yes. Even if I perish in trying, one day, a Kremnoan will sever the head of a god."

C:
这是刻录在石板上的片刻欢愉，翻飞之币扎格列斯的神迹。
从无谎言的阿芙沙，禁绝诡计的诚信之邦，
没有偷儿与赌徒，更没有花言和巧语。
你能在那里找到人性中所有的美好，
直到扎格列斯的低语从中凿出一丝缝隙。
「我能用谎言创造真实，亦能以真实编织谎言。」
乔装的外邦人用裹上绸缎的破布换走黄金，
在众目睽睽之下，将蜜酿化作泥汤。
可裁决动不了他分毫，因他从未说谎，
而后，阿芙沙城的第一个骗子诞生于世间。
为了不被欺骗，人子们尔虞我诈，
在神明的讥笑声中，诚信之邦从此充斥谎言。
E:
This is a fleeting elation inscribed on a stone tablet. This is the miracle of Zagreus, the Coin of Whimsy.
Avsha, a land of truth and integrity,
Knew no thieves or gamblers, no flowery words or cunning speeches.
There, you could find all the virtues humanity has to offer,
Until the whispers of Zagreus chiseled a faint crack within.
"I can create truth with lies and weave lies from truth."
The disguised outlander swapped tattered rags draped in silk for gold,
And turned honey brew into muddy soup in plain view of all.
Yet no punishment could touch them, for they had never lied.
And so, the first liar of Avsha was born.
To avoid deception, mortals began scheming against one another.
Amidst the laughter of the gods, the former land of integrity became rife with lies.

C: 很少有人用这把烛剪处理蜡烛，却往往把它用在更残酷、更黑暗、更痛苦的地方。剪刀剪断的不是物质，而是生物心中的热量——被称为热情的动力。假如空无烛剪划过你的心脏，你将感受到的不是痛楚，而是冷漠。
E: Few would use this candle wick trimmer on real candles. This is usually reserved for purposes more cruel, dark, and painful. This trimmer does not cut anything material. It cuts the heat within a living organism's heart — the motivation named "passion." If the Void Wick Trimmer trims at your heart, you will feel no pain, only apathy.
