C: 角色故事•仙舟
E: Character Story: Xianzhou

C: 「玲宝玲宝，你到了吗？」女孩的手机传来一声清脆的提示音。 玲可见消息来自那熟悉的头像，也不急着回复，只是对着镜头呵气，胡乱用结满冰碴的手套抹了抹。 镜头状况良好。她举起手机，取景框中是贝洛伯格壁外难得一见的晴朗夜空——无风、无雪、无云，唯有如黑丝绒帷幔般缀着灿烂星光的辽阔天幕。 咔嚓。然后，发送。 信号似乎不太好。空气在高空凝滞。雪地与夜色默不作声。不多时，叮咚叮咚，又一阵铃音响起——原来是女孩刚刚完成的手稿：山峰，夜幕，星空。 玲可微笑，将镜头对准正在微风中如呼吸般起伏的营帐，再次按下快门。咔嚓，发送。 叮咚。屏幕那端很快又有了响应。这次似乎是女孩的工作台，手稿与画笔散乱在昏暗的光线中。 咔嚓。露营椅和玲可最爱的绒毯。 叮咚。一杯温吞的牛奶。 咔嚓。蒸腾着暖意的红茶。 叮咚。一盏铁艺台灯，以及女孩钟爱的画册。 咔嚓。温暖的睡袋。 叮咚。凌乱的被窝。 咔嚓。山顶眺望贝洛伯格所见的金色波浪。 叮咚。公寓窗外微光翕动的行政区街道。 咔嚓。 最后的是那乍现于夜空、跃动不已的璀璨极光。 叮咚。 一枚可爱的表情随之而来——玲可知道，女孩表达羡慕时就会发送它。 于是，她也从图库中精心挑选作为回应—— 「这样就足够了。」她们心照不宣。
E: "Lynxy? You there yet?" The girl's phone chimed a sharp sound from an incoming message. Lynx sees the message coming from a familiar profile picture and is in no hurry to respond. Rather, she releases a steam-laden breath at the camera lens and carelessly uses her frost-coated gloves to rub at the device. The camera remains perfectly operable. She lifts her phone and captures the night sky — clear, cloudless, and almost never seen within the walls of Belobog. Without wind nor snow nor stratocumulus to deny her gaze, only the dark velvet of the void stand companion to the scintillating canopy made up of shimmering stars. Click... and sent. The signal isn't very good. The air congeals with the ascension of altitude. Snow and night make silent bedfellows. Not long after, the sound of clicking is followed by a series of rings. It turns out the girl just finished her manuscript: The summit, the night, the stars. Lynx smirks and points her lens at her tent, its shape inflating like a lung filling with breath. Again, she pressed down and snapped her shots. Click. Send. Ding. The screen soon lights up again. This time, what is displayed is a woman's workbench, schematics and utensils strewn beneath the darkness of dimmed lights. Click. Camping chairs and Lynx's favorite velvet blanket. Ding. A glass of tepid milk. Click. A cup of black tea steaming with warmth. Ding. An iron table lamp and a girl's favorite picture album. Click. A warm sleeping bag. Ding. Disheveled bedding. Click. A mountain top view towards Belobog, gazing upon the golden waves. Ding. The shimmering streets of the Administrative District outside an apartment window. Click. Last was the resplendent aurora lights dancing in night sky in a sudden instant. Ding. A cute sticker follows. Lynx knows that girl only sends this one when she expresses envy. So, she carefully makes a selection from her photos as a response... "This will be good enough." They have tacit understanding of each other.

C: 「衰颓的老人百无一用，如同褴褛的衣裳挂在木棍上。」  很多年前，我听过这样一首域外的古诗。它们的韵律与仙舟诗不同，我谈不上喜欢，可唯独这句始终盘旋在我心中，像魂灵挥之不去。  我见识过异邦人如何衰老。皮肤和肌肉变得松弛、大脑发生不可逆的退化、骨骼变得脆弱、眼球变得浑浊…  我理解他们为何羡慕我们。我曾经同他们一样，以为我们不会衰老，以为我们会永远保持不变的模样。  每次出征前夕，我都会向战友承诺：「你只管握紧武器，我会把你带回仙舟的。」  但我食言了。那场战斗后，只有我一人拖着残躯回到了天舶司。  我回不去了。我再明白不过。  自此，我便埋头专注于公务，不再作回归天际的空想。  我老了。
E: "Old decrepits are useless, like torn strips of clothes hanging on a wooden stick." Years ago, I heard an old poem not from here. Its structure, rhyme, and form were different from Xianzhou poems. I don't like it, but this particular sentence stayed with me, like a ghost I could not chase away. I've witnessed how outworlders age, how their skin sag, their muscles shrink, how their brains degenerate irreversibly, how their bones weaken, and their eyes cloud over... I can understand their envy towards us. I used to think the same way, that we will never grow old, that we will maintain the same appearance of youth. Every time we head out for a battle, I always promise my comrades, "You just worry about holding onto your weapon. I'll bring you back to Xianzhou." But I broke my promise. After that fateful battle, only I returned to the Sky-Faring Commission, dragging my own damaged body. I can never return. I understood that then. From then on, I tunnel-visioned on official documents, abandoning any dream of returning to the sky. I grew old.

C: 「不好意思不好意思，路上遇到有人受伤，耽误了点时间…啊，小桂子你还在唱啊，那我闭嘴。」 「哎！裳裳来了！给大家介绍一下，这是咱们今天的惊喜嘉宾！云骑军的天才新人——素裳姑娘！来，家人们，把『欢迎素裳姑娘』打在公屏上～」 「大…大家好，我是素裳…什么『天才新人』啦！不要擅自给我加戏，这要让我们领导知道了，非挤兑死我不可。」 「裳裳先稍微等一下啊，我这数来宝还差最后一段。你来的正好，这段刚巧是关于你的～」 …… 再后来遇到了恶汉对我别具心肠，幸而有女侠出手对他一顿棍棒。 那位问：哪位女侠有如此的胆量，那正是我后来知心的挚友李素裳。 自此后罗浮之上我不必独来独往，多了位女侠做我的狐朋狗党。 更何况有列位观众满堂，时时盼着我吹拉弹唱， 只演一段列位绝不买账，山呼海啸地要我返场。 但小桂子的故事实在又臭又长，不讲个一年半载我可退不了场， 今天这段不如现在到此收场，欲知后事如何，咱们来日再讲。 …… 「好听好听，家人们快给小桂子鼓鼓掌！就是这个英雄事迹我怎么没有印象了？」 「西衍先生说，大家比较喜欢这样英雄救美式的邂逅，所以我才这么写的。你要是不喜欢…感谢『撸猫令使8190』刷的谛听风暴！老板大气！」 「老板大气！…怎么写都没关系啦！反正你写的东西都挺有意思的。」 「好的，那裳裳现在也终于『裳裳来迟』，可以给家人们展示我们准备已久的双人共演了～来，裳裳，坠子琴递给我一下，小桂子来唱一段《腾骁斩大蛇》！」 「这段可不好演啊。」 「是呀，懂行的人肯定知道啊，这《腾骁斩大蛇》，有弹有唱有打斗，一个人可演不了。」 「所以才叫我过来嘛！那要怎么演呢？」 「很简单呀～我呢，今天就演这位前代罗浮将军腾骁，定国安邦、英武非凡。」 「那我呢？」 「你来演这个被斩的大蛇——小小蛇妖哪里跑，吃～我～一～剑～」 「唉哟疼…桂乃芬！我跟你拼了！」
E: "Sorry, sorry! I ran into someone who was injured, so I got here later than I thought — Ah. Little Gui, you're still singing? Then I'll shut up." "Yo! Shangshang is here! Fam, lemme introduce her to y'all. She's our surprise guest tonight! The Cloud Knights' genius newcomer — Ms. Sushang! C'mon fam, post in the chat 'welcome Ms. Sushang'~" "H—Hello everyone. I'm Sushang... Stop with the 'genius newcomer' thing! Don't make me seem more than what I am. My boss is gonna give me an earful if they hear about it." "Just gimme a sec here, Shangshang. My doggerel is just missing its last bit. You're here right on time since it's all about you~" ... Then a thug crossed my path, a timely heroine dealt with his wrath. You may ask, which heroine could it be? And I answer, Li Sushang, you see. Ever since then, I'm no longer alone. With a heroine like her, I have a much livelier tone. And I have fans in a throng, enjoying my awesome song. My fans whom I adore, always ask for more. But my story runs too long, I can't go on and on. Let's wrap it up for now, if you allow, I'll save it for another wow. ... "Nice! Nice! Let's all give it up for Little Gui, everyone! But... I don't quite remember this heroic feat?" "Mr. Xiyan told me that stories featuring damsel-in-distress scenarios are popular, hence my decision to write it this way. If it's not to your liking.... Thank you CatEmanator8190 for the Diting Storm gift! Thanks so much!" "Thank you so much! ...It doesn't matter how you write it! The stuff you do are all fun anyways." "Alrighty. Now that Shang-Shang is here, let's do the Show-Show! We can now finally present the duo skit we've been practicing for a long time~ Here, Shangshang, gimme the chordophone. I, Little Gui, is now gonna sing Teng Xiao Slaying the Serpent!" "This section isn't easy to perform." "True. Any expert here would know that Teng Xiao Slaying the Serpent has singing, music, and fight scenes. One person can't do it all." "And that is why I'm here! So how do you want to do this?" "Simple~ Today I'm gonna play the role of Teng Xiao, the previous Luofu general. I'll bring peace to the nation and all shall bow before my majesty." "And me?" "You'll play the serpent getting slain! Where are you going, puny snake? Eat~ My~ Sword~" "Ahh! It hurts... Guinaifen! I've had enough of you!"

C: 「药王慈怀…听话，咽下去，你的病会好，不仅会和长生种一模一样…还会活得很久，很久……」 他试图吞咽药物，却不敢呼吸。 这样的痛苦，他不知还要经历几回。浓稠的液体流过食管，有如吞针一般。强烈的呕吐欲挤压着他的胸腔。 「咽下去，不能吐，这是药……」他的身体也在这么同他说道：咽下去。咽下去。咽下去。 咽下去。就不用面临野兽的威胁，不再会陷入难以逃离血盆大口的恐惧。 咽下去。手脚不再无力，不再会眼睁睁看着同伴死亡。 咽下去。 药物开始被器官和血肉吞食，陌生的力量在体内横冲直撞，他想大口喘气，从腹部细密蔓延至四肢的咬噬和撕扯感却让他感到窒息。 「忍过去，跟之前一样，只要忍过去……」他已发不出声，只有身体在同他说话。 忍过去。他不再是被村子丢弃、遗落荒野的孤儿。 忍过去。他说的每一句话都将被回应，不再孤苦伶仃。 忍过去。 「貊泽？感觉怎么样… 「很好，你再次撑过来了。 「再坚持下，不要害怕，你的病症将被尽数消除。 「到时候…猎杀野兽，保护同伴，长命百岁…你想做什么都可以。 「而身体痊愈之时…你将获得完整的生命…也将成为我们真正的家人。 「到时，我们应彼此承继意志。」 原来需要熬过这么多的痛，才能唤来家人。 「痛……」 他终于坚持不住，痛苦从牙缝里挤出了声音。但身边人只同他说： 「莳者一心，同登仙道，安度此劫，胜即是生。 「药王慈怀。」 他说的话无人在意，于是他逐渐习惯了不说话。
E: "Merciful of Sanctus Medicus... Now, listen to us. Swallow this — not only will your illness be cured, but you shall become no different to a long-life species... You shall live a long, long life..." He tries to swallow the medicine, but does not dare inhale. He has no idea how many more times he would have to endure this suffering. The thick liquid passes through his esophagus like he is swallowing needles. A powerful urge to vomit crushes his entire chest. "Swallow it. Don't spit it out. This is medicine..."His body is also echoing this sentiment: Swallow it. Swallow it. Swallow it. Swallow it, and you will never have to face the threat of wild beasts, never again will you fall into the gaping, bloody jaws of fear. Swallow it, and your body shall no longer be powerless, never again will you have to stand by and watch your companions die. Swallow it. As his organs and flesh begin to consume the medicine, a strange power begins to course through him. He yearns to gasp for air, but the sensation of being devoured and torn that spreads from his abdomen down his limbs makes him feel suffocated. "Endure it. Just like before... If you can just endure it..."He can no longer make a sound. Only his body is conversing with him. Endure it. He will then no longer be the orphan abandoned by his village in the wilderness. Endure it. Then, every word he speaks will be answered, and he will no longer be alone. Endure it. "Moze? How do you feel?" "Very good. Seems like you withstood it once again." "Keep holding on. Don't be afraid. All of your ailments will be eliminated." "When that time comes... You can do whatever you please. Hunt the beasts of the wild, protect your companions, live a long and healthy life..." "When your body is completely healed... you will obtain a whole life... you will become our true family." "When that time comes, we must carry on each other's wills." Who knew that one has to bear so much pain to finally find their family. "It hurts..." He can no longer take it. The sound of agony finds its way through the cracks in his gritted teeth. However, the person by his side simply says: "Unity of Discipuli Medicus, the Immortality's true path. Pass this trial in safety, and victory would mean life." "The mercy of Sanctus Medicus." No one cares what he has to say, so he slowly grows accustomed to not talking.

C: 银河忍法帖之缭乱破魔传•试炼节点：最初的和未来的 >>系统初始化>> >>用户缭乱•忍侠接入完成>> >>忍者等级验证中>> >>欢迎进入属于你自己的忍者•游戏！>> 试炼系统：瓦修！限时任务！ 试炼系统：你惊讶地发现自己掉入了宇宙的奇洞，进入了一段特殊的幻想故事线——「如果我不曾是忍侠」。 试炼系统：年幼的你不用再吞服蕴含过量忍•力的密药，不用遭受雷遁忍法的折磨，心智不再受缚于模因病毒。 试炼系统：假若你不是忍侠，会想成为什么样的人，会拥有怎样不同的人生？ 缭乱•忍侠：「不知道，我从来没想过这个问题。」 试炼系统：果然，狩猎邪忍，弘扬忍道——这项行动原则简直是被刻进了你的所有肌骨。所以，还是由我来为你提供选择吧： 选择：        1、热血漫画家。         试炼系统：绘画是你自幼时便兴起的爱好，你阅览了各式各样的漫画绘本，逐渐被那些绚烂的色彩和精彩的故事吸引，你想创造同样令人热血沸腾的角色与人生。你成为了倍受欢迎的热血漫画家。        2、金链子歌手。         试炼系统：你生活在遍地学究的研究所，他们张口闭口皆是生僻术语，或矫饰过头的辞藻。他们矜持不苟，严明语法，谄媚权威…这使你厌烦了虚假庸常的言语。你将自己的真言吟诵成曲，成为了叛逆的歌手。        3、武道馆教练。        试炼系统：你天生拥有超于常人的身体素质，专注于身体运动带来的精神刺激…你成为了武道馆教练和宇宙空手道大师。 试炼系统：面对这些人生原本应有的不同可能，你茫然无措。它们没有仇恨伴行，也无使命束缚，不用辨明复杂的善恶，拥抱自己抉择的人生。如果有这样的选择和可能，你还想成为忍者吗？ 系统消息：忍者在此关中有足够时间进行选择。 >>游戏暂停中>> 她摘下了脸上的目镜，低头若有所思。 「流晄忆町的超•幻境真是提出了一个有趣的问题，若在下未踏上缭乱忍道……」 那假绘的蓝图让她陷入短暂的遐想，但她马上就将这个问题抛到了脑后—— 「但除非天下邪祟除尽，否则此番假想也只是无根泡影。」 天际的流星已然升起，在忍侠的狩猎完成之前，必须心无旁骛，其余皆为一瞬杂念。 缭乱•忍侠压低帽檐，没有任何犹豫，向真正的试炼之处跃去。 >>游戏保存中>> 系统消息：用户【缭乱•忍侠】已暂离游戏。
E: Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions, Tale of Dazzling Evilbreaker – Trial Node: The Beginning and the Future >>Initializing system...>> >>User Dazzling Ninja Hero has logged in!>> >>Verifying ninja level...>> >>Welcome to your unique ninja game!>> Trial system: Voila! Limited-time Quest! Trial System: To your surprise, you find yourself in a singularity of the universe, experiencing another life in a parallel world..."If I were not a Ninja Hero." Trial System: When you were young, you did not consume the secret pill containing excessive ninja power or suffer from the Lightning Release Ninjutsu, and now your mind is no longer restrained by the memetic virus. Trial System: If you weren't the Ninja Hero, who would you become? And what different life would you have? Dazzling Ninja Hero: "I don't know. I've never thought about this." Trial System: Sure enough, eradicating evil and promoting the way of the ninja have been etched into your flesh and become your breath. Therefore, I'll offer you some choices. Your Decision: 1. Shounen manga artist. Trial System: Drawing has been a hobby of yours since childhood. As you read various manga, you became attracted to the brilliant colors and exciting stories. You wanted to create characters and stories that were equally thrilling. Fueled by your passion, you became a popular manga artist. 2. Rebellious rapper. Trial System: You lived in an institute full of pedants who spoke in archaic terms and overly pretentious rhetoric. Their reserved, grammatically rigorous style and their fawning on authority bored you with their language full of falsehoods. You composed your own truth into songs and became a rebellious singer. 3. Martial arts instructor. Trial System: You were born with superior physical qualities and focused on the mental stimulation brought about by physical exercise... You became a martial arts instructor, a master of cosmic karate. Trial System: You are at a loss when faced with these various possibilities of what your life could have been. In these possibilities, you are not driven by hatred or responsibility, and you no longer need to distinguish good from evil. All you need to do is embrace the life of your choice. If there were such choices and possibilities, would you still want to be a ninja? System Message: In this stage, the ninja will have enough time to make a choice. >>Game Paused>> She removes her goggles and looks down, lost in thought. "That question posed to me in the Garden of Zencollection's super illusory realm is indeed interesting. If I hadn't embarked on my dazzling way of the ninja..." The fake blueprint sends her into a brief reverie, but she quickly snaps out of it — "But unless all the evil is eliminated from the world, that grand vision will remain nothing but a rootless imagination." The stars rise in the sky, and the Ninja Hero must not allow any distractions until the hunt is complete. Compared to the hunt, everything else is insignificant. The Dazzling Ninja Hero lowers her hat and leaps toward her final trial, without a trace of hesitation. >>Saving Game>> System Message: User "Dazzling Ninja Hero" has temporarily left the game.

C: 许多年之后，当她无意间找到少女时代织就的衣物，温柔自绸缎流淌而下，令她久无波动的心为之一颤。 世代供奉「墨涅塔」的家族中，人人从小学习一项「美」的技艺，大师们的画像悬于私人浴池的名誉墙上，无时无刻不审视着他们的子孙。 谁到了这里不是噤若寒蝉，可偏偏她在那大师目光的重压下轻盈走动。 「绘画失之于虚假，音乐失之于抽象，雕塑失之于笨重，戏剧失之于流俗……」 长辈一脸无奈，稚嫩的声音却让人无法反驳。 「小雅，还能有什么比它们更美？」 她踏出浴池，踮脚舞蹈至镜前，淡金色的长发如瀑般流淌而下。 「不。」 水晕弥漫的镜面上，金色的双眸牵引着万缕千丝的视线—— 「我一定会找到——那更美的存在。」 「就是为了这样单纯的理由，后来啊……」衣物的温暖触着指尖，泛起回忆。 她在树庭中淘气攀爬，浴池中沉思想象，只为了拾一枚金叶，一捧灵感的浪花。 她在屋顶跳跃奔跑，在原野逗留张望，为了用丝线重现微风的自由与弥远的花香。 时间流淌，织机不停，她的作品源源不断，于奥赫玛中掀起风潮，一次又一次。 她穿着最为得意的织物拜访神殿，但她仍怀有疑问：「这是美吗？」 那「墨涅塔」的祭司已至暮年，虽难以清晰视物，但女孩的光彩仍刺破了她眼前的昏暗。 「小雅，当你接过『金织』的职责时，你一定能创造出令诸神嫉妒的作品。 「这件衣物，以及穿着这件衣物的你，都是如此美丽…但这并不是『美』。」 「可…美和美丽…不是一个意思吗？」 「你呀，还不懂…不懂是好事，好事啊……」
E: Years later, when she unexpectedly discovers a garment she had woven in her youth, tenderness pours from the silk, gently shaking her long-stilled heart. In the family devoted to Mnestia throughout the generations, each member is taught a "beautiful" art from a young age. Portraits of the great masters hang on the honor wall of the private bath, ever watching over their progeny. While many are left speechless by the intense scrutiny of these masters, she moves with an effortless grace beneath their heavy gaze. "Painting succumbs to pretense, music to abstraction, sculpture to bulkiness, and drama to the mundane..." The elders show clear signs of defeat, but her voice, young and resolute, silences any objections. "Little Agy, surely there is nothing more beautiful than these." Stepping out of the bath, she dances on tiptoes to the mirror, her pale golden hair cascading like a waterfall. "No." In the steam-clouded mirror, her golden eyes pull countless strands of attention along — "I will find it — the existence that surpasses all others in beauty." "It was for such a simple reason that, later on..." The warmth of the garment touches her fingertips, awakening memories. She mischievously climbs in the Grove and mused in the baths, all for a golden leaf, a handful of inspirational spray. She dashed across rooftops and paused in meadows, all to weave the freedom of the breeze and the far-off fragrance of flowers into her threads. Time flowed on. The loom never stilled. Her creations spark trends in Okhema, again and again. Dressed in her finest fabric, she visits the temple, yet she still wonders, "Is this beauty?" The priest of Mnestia had reached her twilight years, her eyesight diminished, yet the girl's brilliance still cut through the gloom before her. "Little Agy, when you assume the mantle of the 'Goldweaver,' you're destined to craft works that even the gods would envy." "This garment, and you in this garment, are indeed beautiful... yet this isn't 'beauty'." "But... aren't 'beauty' and 'beautiful' the same?" "You still don't understand... and not understanding, that's a good thing, truly a good thing..."

C: 女人的协助者从暗处走到了台前，这个外貌年幼的少女似乎已经从空间站的数据库里抓住了自己想要的信息。\n目标是回廊深处的房间。\n「星核就在里面？」「它能告诉我们星核在哪里。」
E: The woman's helper emerges from the darkness and steps forward. This young-looking girl seems to have found the information she was looking for in the space station's database.\nThe target is the room in the depths of the corridor.\n"Is that where the Stellaron is?" "It can tell us where the Stellaron is."

C: 随着「建木」苏生，巨大的根须如虬龙般穿彻各处，向外蔓生。靠的越近的洞天，越容易遭殃及。\n工造司中，一座巨大的炉鼎被「建木」根系紧紧缠住，托举而起，通往彼处的桥梁已在巨变中被毁。
E: As the Ambrosial Arbor is reborn, its massive root system spreads outward, roaming everywhere like writhing dragons. Delves situated closer to the Arbor are far more likely to be breached.\nThe roots of the Ambrosial Arbor tightly wrap around a giant furnace in the Artisanship Commission, lifting it off the ground, and the bridge leading to that location has already been destroyed.

C: 仪式结束，景元邀请你们前往神策府一叙。在那里，他代表罗浮送出对列车团的赠礼——一枚结盟玉兆。凭此信物，云骑将不畏遥远，赶赴盟友的身边。而此次仙舟的开拓之行，终于抵达了尾声。在离开前，你想也许可以和与此行结识的人们一一告别。
E: Jing Yuan invites you to have a chat at the Seat of Divine Foresight when the ceremony ends. Once there, he presents Luofu's gift to the Express Crew — a jade abacus of allying oath. With this token in hand, the Cloud Knights swear to come to the aid of their allies, no matter the distance they must cross. Your current trailblazing journey on the Xianzhou has finally come to an end. Before you leave, you might be able to bid farewell to the people you got to know on this journey.

C: 武者声称自己叫作「黄泉」，是一名巡海游侠。\n继续跟上她的步伐，离开这座陌生的梦吧。
E: The warrior calls herself "Acheron," a Galaxy Ranger.\nContinue to follow in her footsteps and leave this strange dream.

C: 猎犬家系的治安官为你们解了围，你这才了解到自己救下的少女是鸢尾花家系的艺者「流萤」。\n为了报答你的恩情，她决定担任你的一日导游，还决定请你品尝美梦美食——你选好了想要的食品，现在该轮到她为自己的莽撞买单了。
E: As the Security Officer of the Bloodhound Family comes to your aid, you realize that the person you saved is Firefly, an artist from the Iris Family.\nTo repay your kindness, she offers to be your guide for the day and treats you to delicious food. You have ordered your food, and now it is time for her to settle the bill and pay for her recklessness.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n向筑梦边境深处进发吧——身为无名客，偷偷溜进工地只是小菜一碟，对吧？
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nHead deep into the Dream's Edge... As a Nameless, sneaking into a construction site is a piece of cake, right?

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n你们终于抵达了黑天鹅所说的区域。接下来，忆者为你们复现了出与流萤相关的记忆——试着从中梳理出凶案的真相吧。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nYou finally reach the area that Black Swan was talking about. From there, the Memokeeper reproduces the memories related to Firefly — Try to iron out the truth behind this murder.

C: 黑天鹅为你答疑解惑，并承诺护送你抵达了忆域的出口——希望她这次不会再耍什么花招…还是说，你其实还挺乐意她做点小恶作剧的？
E: Black Swan answers your questions and promises to escort you to the exit of the Memory Zone. Hopefully, she isn't up to any mischief this time... Or, do you secretly enjoy the little tricks she pulls?

C: 流萤向你解释了此前她种种不寻常举动背后的深层原因，并指引你下潜至家族宣扬的「噩梦」——美梦之外的原初忆域——「流梦礁」。而这一举动也揭露了「死亡」的部分真相：不过是协助有心之人往返美梦的驯化迷因，而「闭上眼睛」则是唤来它的奇妙咒语。\n短暂的不适后，你发现自己已经抵达了一座荒废的旧镇。与众人交流过、准备停当后，就开始此次废弃车站下车之旅吧。
E: Firefly explains to you the deeper reasons behind her various inexplicable behaviors, and guides you to dive deeper into a place declared as a "nightmare" by The Family... The primitive Memory Zone outside the sweet dream: "Dreamflux Reef." This move also exposes some of the truths behind "Death" — It is nothing but a tamed memetic entity that assists specific people who wish to travel between dreams. "Closing your eyes" is merely a strange invocation used to summon them.\nAfter a brief moment of discomfort, you realize that you have arrived at an abandoned old town. Once you have spoken with everyone and prepared yourself, alight and begin your adventure at this abandoned station.

C: 流萤听取了慈玉女士的建议，亲眼见证了典当行的顾客们实现愿望的过程。\n但她仍未理解何为「典当」的本质，也不清楚人们究竟为了实现愿望究竟付出了多少代价。\n她必须回到慈玉女士那里，并指望对方能为自己解释这一切的意义。
E: Firefly listened to Lady Bonajade's suggestion and saw for herself the wishes of the pawn shoppers coming true.\nBut she still could not understand the nature of "pawning," nor could she fathom the true cost of what people are willing to pay to realize their wishes.\nShe has to return to Lady Bonajade and hope that she can explain the meaning behind everything.

C: 谐乐大典开幕式不出意外地出意外了：那位爱笑的女孩费心布局，四处分发按钮，显然就是为了这一刻。\n<unbreak>999</unbreak>枚虚数中子弹…说真的，她到底是从哪儿搞来这么多大规模杀伤性武器的？但无论如何，身为无名客的你必须挺身而出，守护美梦——按图索骥，火速解决危机吧。
E: As expected, something unexpected happened during the opening of the Charmony Festival: That laughter-worshiping girl had painstakingly laid out buttons everywhere obviously for precisely this moment.\n<unbreak>999</unbreak> imaginary neutron bombs... seriously, how on earth did she get her hands on so many weapons of mass destruction? But in any case, as one of the Nameless, you are duty-bound to stand up and protect the Dreamjoy: Follow the clues and overcome the crisis as soon as possible.

C: 名为遐蝶与万敌的黄金裔为我们扫清沿途阻碍，我们即将与白厄一同直面「天谴之矛」尼卡多利，成就英雄之名。
E: The Chrysos Heirs named Castorice and Mydei cleared the obstacles in our path. Now, alongside Phainon, we will face Nikador, Lance of Fury, and become heroes.

C: 阿格莱雅对奥赫玛的掌控程度远超我们想象，此前的风波已然传到她的耳中。这位黄金裔的领袖展现出她铁血冷酷的一面，以极端手段再度确认我们的来意。历经如此险境，我们需要重新思索翁法罗斯之旅的可行性。
E: Aglaea's control over Okhema runs far deeper than we anticipated, and the previous incident has already reached her ears. This leader of the Chrysos Heirs revealed a cold and unyielding side, going to great lengths to reassess our intentions. After such perilous moments, we must reconsider the viability of our expedition in Amphoreus.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 觐见的过程看似顺利，但是…黑塔听到的天外之声，似乎有些不对劲？
E: The audience appears to be proceeding smoothly, but... the voice from beyond the sky that Herta hears doesn't seem quite right.

C: 黑潮的造物在树庭四处游荡…这并不是个好消息，临此浩劫，树庭恐怕凶多吉少。向阿格莱雅报告后，{NICKNAME}他们继续向树庭深处前进调查。
E: Black tide creations roaming throughout the Grove... this doesn't bode well. In this calamity, the Grove's fate looks grim. After reporting to Aglaea, {NICKNAME}'s group continues deeper into the Grove to investigate.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n未流淌着黄金血的异乡旅者也接受了泰坦的试炼，希望{NICKNAME}和迷迷一切顺利。\n「那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。」我想起了初次见到阿格莱雅时听到的这句话。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nEven as an outland traveler, whose veins carry no golden blood, has accepted the Titan's trial. Wishing {NICKNAME} and Mem the best of luck.\n"I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance." I remembered hearing this the first time I met Aglaea.

C: 前去友爱之馆前，查看沿途是否有遗漏的资料。\n黑潮怪物袭击了此处的学者，慌乱之中，不少资料也遗落此处。\n希望能有塞纳托斯相关的情报。
E: Before heading to the Library of Philia, look for any documents left behind along the way.\nMany documents were scattered when scholars fled from the black tide creatures.\nThere might be information about Thanatos.

C: 来到翁法罗斯后，伴随着相遇与离别，一次次经历目不暇接，让人有些惆怅。就连一向豁达的{NICKNAME}，此时也身处创世涡心，浸泡在往事中。
E: Since arriving in Amphoreus, each meeting and parting has come in dazzling succession, leaving behind a faint melancholy. Even the ever-spirited {NICKNAME} now stands within the Vortex of Genesis, immersed in memories.

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 探索中，我们无意间瞥见了天空之民的往昔，带着肃杀氛围，似乎难以用和平来形容。一位奇兽在我们面前现身，它与那位英雄塞涅俄丝关系匪浅，我们决定跟上它的振翅，一同前行。
E: During our exploration, we caught glimpses of the Skyfolk's past, filled with a solemn atmosphere that could hardly be described as peaceful. Then, a mythical beast appeared before us, one deeply connected to the hero Seliose. We decided to follow its fluttering wings and continue forward together.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 圣城陷入永夜，混乱令人不安，而距火种尽数归还也仅剩一步，危机下，完成「再创世」恐怕是我们唯一的选择。取回刻法勒的火种后，我们将立刻赶往创世涡心。
E: Evernight has descended upon the holy city, bringing disturbing chaos in its wake. With just one final Coreflame to return, completing the "Era Nova" may be our only choice in this crisis. After retrieving Kephale's Coreflame, we will immediately head to the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 螺丝咕姆先生的现身无疑是一个转机，我们对翁法罗斯的状况有了新的认知。\n应他的请求，{NICKNAME}将留在翁法罗斯临机应变，而我会按照原定计划返回列车，与列车组的其他成员汇合后，商讨下一步的计划。
E: Mr. Screwllum's arrival marks a definite turning point, giving us fresh insights into Amphoreus's condition.\nFollowing his request, {NICKNAME} will stay behind in Amphoreus to adapt to changing circumstances, while I'll return to the Express as planned to regroup with the other Crew members and formulate our next course of action.

C: 哀丽秘榭深处存在着一处「迷境」，{NICKNAME}跟随着二人一同前往，在那里见到了许多…形似迷迷的「妖精」住民？
E: Deep in the Aedes Elysiae lies a "Maze." {NICKNAME} follows the two there and encounters many... fairy-like residents that resemble Mem?

C:
你还记得她吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
遐蝶，所有的叹息都从她的指尖涌出；所有的慰语都因她的手被阻隔；所有的死亡都为她拥入怀中；所有的恸哭都被她吞咽在掌心。
说啊，倘若刻法勒永志不忘：你已为她磔碎多少对翼，熄灭多少鲜花，把蝴蝶扑入死灰？
芬芳的月色流成冥河，如何被你酿成金色的毒酒，为你徒劳救世的欢宴设奠？
倒是你，披着羊皮的救世主，最该成祭神的牺牲！
丑陋的野兽，伪善的眼睑盖不住喷薄的毒火，那矛似的犄角生来更为弑杀友亲。
就将尸骨当作美餐饱腹，鲜甜会说服你：「我毕竟对屠刀一无所知」。
E:
Do you still remember her, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Castorice, with every sigh flowing from her fingertips and her hands blocking all words of comfort, she held each death close to her heart and swallowed every cry of grief in her palms.
Tell me, if Kephale never forgets, how many pairs of wings have you shattered for her? How many blossoms have you snuffed out? How many butterflies have you cast into the ashes?
The moonlight's fragrance once streamed like the River of Souls. How did you turn it into golden poison and make it libations for your banquet of futile deliverance?
And yet it is you, so-called Deliverer in sheep's clothing, who ought to be the sacrifice upon the altar to the gods!
Ugly beast — your seemingly pious gaze cannot hide the seething venom beneath. And that spear-like horn of yours was born to slay your kin.
So feast upon bones and call it grace. The sweetness will surely convince you: "I never truly knew anything about the blade of slaughter."

C: 没有出口的回廊，很经典的设计对不对？
E: A corridor with no exits — classic design, right?

C: 众所周知，击溃同谐最好的方法，就是让他们四分五裂。
E: As all wise souls know — the best way to vanquish Harmony is to split them apart.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 探索遇到阻碍，十四行代数式屏障将空间隔离。螺丝咕姆提议骇入独立信源终端，通过逆转算力来攻击屏障，开启权杖内核层的封印。
E: Exploration hit a snag. A barrier of quatorzain algebraic expressions has isolated this space. Screwllum suggests hacking into the independent signal terminal and using reverse computation to break through the barrier, unlocking the seal on the Scepter's kernel.

C: 绝望，是救世主执念的另一部分。唯有同时卸下沉重的愿望与滚烫的绝望，白厄自己的心愿才能够得到解放。
E: Despair is another part of the Deliverer's obsession. Only by letting go of both the heavy wishes and burning despair can Phainon's own heart be set free.

C: 我追上了德谬歌的记忆，踏入一处静谧的花园——这是一页永恒的美好记忆。
E: I caught up with the Demiurge's memories and stepped into a tranquil garden... This is an eternal page of beautiful memories.

C: 我追上了德谬歌的记忆，踏入一处静谧的花园——这是一页永恒的美好记忆。
E: I caught up with the Demiurge's memories and stepped into a tranquil garden... This is an eternal page of beautiful memories.

C: 怎么回事？智械哥不在「神话之外」。保持警惕，螺丝，把这个装腔作势的管理员揪出来。
E: What's going on? Old Intellitron isn't in Exomyth. Stay alert, Screwy, let's drag this stuck-up administrator out.

C: 在第一可疑藏匿点蹲守失败后，拉明娜继续履行承诺，帮助你寻访「水魈」踪迹。在她的带领下，你结结实实地一脚踩入了水魈布设的圈套。所幸拉明娜随身携带治愈药剂，怪物突袭终成了一场虚妄的陷阱。\n经历连环挫败，你与拉明娜改换策略，重审「宓堂传语」，前往密信所指地点，这一次，绝不失手。
E: You have gained nothing at the first of the suspected hiding places. Lamina keeps her promise and helps you look for the Xenohydro. Under her guidance, you step into the trap set by the Xenohydro. Thankfully, Lamina brought some healing potions with her. The surprise monster attack turns out to be a fabricated pitfall.\nAfter a series of failures, you decide to change your strategy and re-examine the Letter From Locus Silentii. You head to the place the letter points out, and you won't miss again this time.

C: 就在你打算将《剧本》与《告罪书》交还给希拉的关头，却发现古恩抢先一步接管希拉的治疗，封锁了医疗舱。
E: You decide to give the character script and the confession letter to Sheila, but Gunn seals off the Medical Cabin and is now in charge of Sheila's treatment.

C: 一位神秘人将你拉进了空间站的匿名群聊，群聊中一则艾丝妲「中饱私囊」的流言正在发酵。\n正义的你想要挺身而出，但扑朔迷离的流言又该从何查起？\n为此苦恼的你忽然灵机一动——为什么不问问万能的姬子呢？
E: A mysterious person gets you into the anonymous group chat for the space station, where a rumor about Asta misappropriating public funds is gaining popularity.\nRighteous as you are, you want to step up and challenge this rumor, but where will you start your investigation?\nAs you puzzle over this, a sudden thought comes to you — why not ask the omnipotent Himeko?

C: 姬子建议你直接找出谣言制造者，在她的帮助下，你得知有位外号为「瓜农」的科员或许会知道谣言制造者的真实身份。\n你决定前往「瓜农」常去的地方找她。
E: Himeko recommends you to find the person making the rumor. With her help, you learn that a researcher nicknamed "Gossipmonger" may know the true identity of the one who created the rumor.\nYou decide to look for Gossipmonger at the place she frequents.

C: 调查完三位可疑人员后，你将他们的异常表现一一记录在脑海中，向艾丝妲复命。但回想起先前的细节，你不禁怀疑——这样真的能确定谁是感染者吗？
E: After investigating the three suspects, you make note of their unusual behavior in your mind and return to Asta. But looking back, you can't help but wonder if you can confirm who is the infected one.

C: 空间站尚未从先前的混乱中彻底恢复过来，缺乏崭新机组设备支持的终端机，算力严重不足，但好在第二天就会有足够的算力。现在，新的一天又开始了……
E: The space station hasn't recovered from the previous accident. Without the support of new equipment, the terminal's computing power is severely lacking. The computing power should pick up the next day though. Now a new day begins...

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 一艘飞船…与星穹列车发生了追尾？\n情况似乎比你们想得更加复杂……
E: A spaceship... has somehow rear-ended the Astral Express!?\nThings are starting to become trickier than you thought...

C: 你收到了尤利安的群发信息，他声称虎克遇到了什么麻烦。去找找他，看看情况如何吧。
E: You receive Julian's group message saying that Hook is in trouble. Find Julian and see what's going on.

C: 你收到了桑博的求救信息，看来他遇上了什么不得了的麻烦。\n换做平时，你肯定理都不想理这个家伙。不过那家伙提到了「性命攸关」这几个字，充满正义感的你还是决定前去看看情况……
E: You receive Sampo's message for help. It looks like he's in some big trouble.\nUsually, you would ignore him. But he mentions that his life is at stake. Due to your strong sense of moral duty, you decide to go investigate...

C: 你与朗道姐弟抵达了矿区中一处被围困的临时阵地，并吩咐矿民掩护没有战斗能力的幼童及老人立刻向矿区大桥撤离。\n在成功为此处阵地解围后，你们立刻继续向前搜索落单的难民——阵地中矿民提及的几人应当就在附近，仔细寻找吧。
E: You and the siblings arrive at a temporary base in the besieged mining area. You inform the vagrants to immediately retreat to the mining bridge with the children and the elderly.\nAfter successfully solving the issue for this base, you keep moving forward and look for miners who have been separated from the others. The few people who the miners mentioned should be around here. Look for them carefully.

C: 短信、短信、无穷无尽的短信——这位推销员不像是请求帮助之人，反而更像是他口中那位领导。\n无论如何，你获得了贝洛伯格冰封时期的重要史料…希望这能让推销员消停些吧。\n喔，当然，别忘了——你还应该将相关资料汇总后提交给列车组哦。
E: Text messages... endless darn messages — This salesperson doesn't sound like someone who's asking for help, but more like that boss they mentioned.\nAnyways, you got the important historical records regarding Belobog's icebound years... Hopefully this'll get the salesperson off your back.\nOh, don't forget to fill the Crew in on all the relevant details.

C: 原来，诺尔伯特从始至终一直在受代号「寒腿叔叔」的神秘人物煽动，展品盗窃案的真正策划者现在仍然逍遥法外。\n你找到了「寒腿叔叔」窝藏的房间，现在与他只有一门之隔。\n记住佩拉告诉你的暗号，准备敲门吧。
E: The truth is Norbert was spurred on by a mysterious person with the code name "Mr. Cold Feet." The true mastermind behind the artifact thefts is still free.\nYou found the room where Mr. Cold Feet is hiding, and only a door stands between you and them.\nRemember the secret signal Pela told you and get ready to knock on the door.

C: 神策府的策士长竟会亲自来到这小小的公廨当中，看来事情非同小可。和她谈谈吧，毕竟事情越大，报酬越多。
E: It must be a major issue if the Seat of Divine Foresight's chief counselor is at this small chancery. Go talk with her. After all, the bigger the problem, the bigger the reward would be.

C: 小女孩独自跑去了危险的地方。她年龄那么小，还是个天缺者，丹枢心急如焚，甚至要和你一起深入危险地带。快点动身吧，救人要紧，时间不等人。
E: The little girl went to a dangerous place on her own. With her being so young and an Incomplete One, Dan Shu was worried enough to come with you to the danger zone. Quick, get to it. There's human life at stake, and time waits for no one.

C: 陶德向你发消息，极力邀请你来分享他的喜悦，当你如约而至，却发现他竟然……
E: Todd sends you a message, eagerly inviting you to share in his joy. But when you arrive, you find out that he actually...

C: 仙舟之上乱象频生，连猫猫狗狗都不安分了起来。那一日你入得星槎海，却见港口一只小狗孤零零无家可归，吠狺狺似有所求。招猫逗狗非你所愿，但万一这小狗是要带你去挖出哪儿埋藏的宝藏呢？万一呢？
E: Chaos reigned on the Xianzhou ship, even cats and dogs have become restless. You arrive at the Starskiff Haven to find a homeless little dog whimpering as if asking for help. Playing with homeless animals isn't your favorite pastime, but what if this little dog wants you to dig out a treasure buried somewhere? What if that's the case?

C: 很可惜这谛听叫的声你一句也听不真，你说的话它一句也听不懂。偌大仙舟，难不成还找不见一个通解犬吠的翻译人才不成？巧了，说到能听懂狗语的人，你身边正有一个……
E: Unfortunately, you don't understand a single thing said by the Diting, and vice versa. Can't you find anyone on the huge Xianzhou ship who could understand dog barks? Hey, speaking of understanding dog barks, you might just know someone...

C: 说到贝洛伯格，人们总会想到风雪与酷寒。可真正留在三月七记忆中的，却是歌德旅馆气派的大堂。\n按三月七本人的说法，那是因为第二天她就沦为了通缉犯。但也许…也许在无尽的冬日中冒险时，反而是那一小堆篝火最让人印象深刻——无论那场冒险有多么壮绝。
E: People usually think about blizzards and freezing temperatures when it comes to Belobog, but the most profound memory March 7th have of that place is the impressive lobby of the Goethe Hotel.\nShe claims it is because she became a wanted criminal the day after she checked into the hotel. However... perhaps it is because a bright yet brief campfire is more memorable than even an epic in the dead of winter, no matter how magnificent the journey was.

C: 小聪要在短时间内再去表白一次，他知道自己的前世正是静斋的爱人，便有了底气。再去见证一次吧，这就是最后一次了。\n按道理来说，这种场合根本不需要你的存在。但是，谁知道呢，事情将会如何走向哪里？\n你应该看到最后。
E: Cong wants to confess his love again shortly. He knows that he was Jingzhai's lover in his previous life, and this gives him added confidence. Go and witness it again, this should be the last time.\nLogically speaking, this occasion does not require your presence at all. But, who knows how and where things will pan out?\nYou should see it through to the end.

C: 这都什么年代了，还在讲那些陈旧的格式，你必须动手告诉它，什么才是自由派诗歌。\n或许，你这一球棒挥过去，应该叫「野兽派诗歌」！
E: What era are we living in? You're still talking about those old forms? You have to show it what liberal poetry is like.\nMaybe you can swing this bat around, I think that's called "Brutalist Poetry"!

C: 鳞渊境中，故旧重聚。正如景元所说「旧事重提犹如搅乱一潭浑水，徒然惹引不快」。但关于一个时代的过往恩怨，理当有人为之画上句点。
E: Past friends reunite in the Scalegorge Waterscape. It is as Jing Yuan said, "Raising old nets only darkens the water — an exercise in unhappiness." But someone ought to end the grudges lingering from an era past.

C: 被拖入铜镜中，又自铜镜中脱出，真是一个善始善终的灵异故事啊。可惜，甫一离开幻境你们就察觉到，现实中的绥园已然堕入岁阳的掌控，而判官们正在竭力拖延即将到来的全面溃败。
E: Being dragged into a mirror and then spat out again makes a perfect beginning and end for a supernatural story. Unfortunately, as soon as you leave the illusory maze, you realize that the real Fyxestroll Garden has fallen under the control of the heliobi, and the Judges are doing their best to prolong the impending utter rout.

C: 在此之前，神策府中，将军们谈论起了演武仪典的安危……
E: A while ago at the Seat of Divine Foresight, the generals were discussing the Wardance's security...

C: 为了应对呼雷垂死一击，天击将军不得不全力应对那轮高悬于天的「赤月」，她仿佛堕入旧日的战场，展开永无尽头的厮杀。欲解除疯狂，唯一的良方仅有「拖延」二字。
E: In response to Hoolay's dying blow, the Merlin's Claw has no choice but to use everything in her power to confront the Crimson Moon hanging in the sky. As though she had returned to the battlefields of yore, she initiates a bloody massacre that has no end in sight. There is only one way to bring her out of madness: Stall for time.

C: 蒂索克二世为何要封存自己身为皇帝时的记忆？难道那段记忆真的如此不堪，以至于她再也不愿想起吗？
E: Why did Tizocic II seal the memories of her time as the Emperor? Were the memories so horrific that she never wanted to recall them?

C: 我应该从来没亲手杀过人。\n母亲死前对我说，宫廷斗争是一场零和游戏，想要自己活下去，就必须要让别人活不下去。但是——她补充道——绝对不要亲自动手杀人，那会使你感受到生命的重量，而那重量是你承受不住的。\n当我发现自己只要说上几句话，就能让一个人从世界上消失以后，事情对我来说就变得越来越简单了。
E: I don't think I've ever killed anyone with my own hands.\nBefore my mother died, she told me — the battles of the court are zero-sum games. If you want to survive, you have to ensure others cannot. However, she emphasized that you should never kill anyone with your own hands. You will bear the weight of the life you took, and it will be more than you could ever bear.\nOnce I realized that I could erase someone's existence from the world with just a few words, things became much easier for me.

C: 虚数脉冲起爆后，为了逃离公司的魔掌，查德威克开始了流亡。\n完成螺丝咕姆的拼图，让查德威克与他重聚。
E: Following the Imaginary Pulse's detonation, Chadwick went into hiding to evade the IPC's clutches.\nComplete Screwllum's puzzle to reunite Chadwick with him.

C: 你通过钟表把戏进入了查德威克的心绪空间。\n跟随旧日的影子，见证这位天才的一段段过去。
E: You have entered Chadwick's Emoscape through your Clockwork.\nFollow the shadows of his past and witness a fragment of this genius's life.

C: 钟表小子发现了些不对劲的地方，去听听它想说什么吧。
E: Clockie found something odd. Go and listen to what he has to say.

C: 三月提出与彦卿一起送别其他仙舟的客人。\n拍张纪念合照，不知道摆什么动作的时候，记得单手手指插兜…好吧，你用不着如此拘谨。
E: March suggests going with Yanqing to bid farewell to all of the guests from the other Xianzhou ships.\nWhen taking a commemorative picture, if you don't know what pose to do, then you can put one hand in your pocket... Scratch that. There's no need to be so formal.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

C: 记忆的舞台从纷争的剑下来到了负世的座下，危险与灾厄暂且远离了这段往事，你接下来或许可以欣赏一段没那么沉重的故事。但你要知道，以厮杀与苦难作为进场歌的戏剧，往往也以此作为退场——现在演员倒了，快用你无敌的岁月之力吧！顺便一提，过去也有和你一样的人伸出援手，你只是在记忆里取代了那个人的位置…他是谁？不重要，就当他是命运吧。\n「如果这是你们想要的，我就把你们融合在一起，这样你们两个就变成一个人了。」
E: The stage of this memory has transitioned from under Strife's blade to beneath Worldbearing's seat. The threat and disaster have subsided for now, and maybe you might even be able to immerse yourself in a slightly less heavy story. But you must be aware that any play that begins with slaughter and suffering often meets a similar end... The actor has now fallen. Now it's the moment to use your invincible power of time! By the way, there was someone just like you in the past who lent a helping hand in this story, and you have simply taken their place in this memory... Who were they? That doesn't matter. Let's just call them fate.\n"If this is what you desire, then I shall fuse you together and allow you to become one."

C: 夜梦已开始喧嚣。
E: The night's dream has begun to rumble.

C: 你想要唾骂杜撰神谕的祭司们，只可惜，他们已经先你一步，去往了塞纳托斯的国度。
E: You want nothing more than to curse the priests who fabricated the prophecy. Unfortunately, they have already moved ahead of you and passed to the realm of Thanatos.

C: 一只满载着孩子们梦想的「信鸽」正在磐岩镇飞翔，在别人之前找到它，带给阿丽娜吧。
E: A pigeon that carries the dreams of children is flying around above Boulder Town. Bring it back to Alina before others find it.

C: 前往上层区的公告板处，看看「正当权益会社」是否有新的委托吧。
E: Go to the noticeboard in the Overworld and see whether the Rightful Rights Society has any new commissions.

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知拉雯妮发布了委托，想要行使她的正当权益。帮帮拉雯妮！
E: You see that Lavonne has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise her rightful rights. Go help Lavonne!

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 仿佛从匹诺康尼来的金丝人台，先前你就对它有些在意。至于它究竟是什么…答案或许不言自明？
E: A golden thread mannequin that looks as if it came from Penacony, you have been curious about this for a while. As for what exactly it is... perhaps you already know the answer?

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 医疗科的科员提供了专业建议，赶紧将医嘱告知帕姆吧。
E: A medical staff member offered some professional advice, go ahead and pass the message to Pom-Pom.

C: 帕姆认为你好像把地板弄脏了，请你去检查下地板，看看是不是真的有脚印吧。
E: Pom-Pom thought you dirtied the floor. Go check the floor and see if there are footprints all over it.

C: 你再次加入了铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n杰帕德也加入了这次演练，只要战胜他就可以直接宣告演练结束。
E: Once again, you join a joint training exercise in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nGepard is joining this training too. Defeat him to immediately conclude the training.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 偌大的云石天宫，一定有办法调查到宁芙的下落。
E: There must be a way to find Nympha in a place as big as the Marmoreal Palace

C: 沿着站岗守卫的指引，你来到了抵抗黑潮的前线，却发现这里刚刚遭遇过怪物入侵。\n调查一下倒地的卫兵们是否还活着吧。
E: Following the stationed guards' directions, you arrive at the front line of the battle against black tide, only to find the area has just been overrun by monsters.\nCheck on the guards lying prone on the ground and see if any are still alive.

C: 你刚在台子上走了一圈，就被人硬塞了一瓶…蜜酿？你自己做的？什么时候？奇奇怪怪，还是找人问问吧。
E: You barely make a round on the stage when someone shoves a bottle of... honey brew into your hands? Did you make this yourself? When? This is weird... It'd be better to ask around.

C: 想要进一步了解驭空的过去，果然还是应该去司辰宫找找看。陪晴霓到处找找吧，她在这里见证的过去，也许会改变她的人生。
E: To know more about Yukong's past, you would have to go to the Palace of Astrum sooner or later. Look around with Qingni. The past she will witness here may change her life.

C: 「选择」真的存在吗？在卡芙卡看来，一切选择都是虚假的，只是命中注定的可能性之一；自由意志根本不存在，你身在此处这一点就是明证。她的想法多少有些悲观和虚无了，而你可以接受，也可以否认。
E: Does "choice" really exist? From Kafka's perspective, all choices are illusions and merely represent predetermined possibilities. Free will does not exist, and your presence here is clear proof of that. Her ideas are somewhat pessimistic and nihilistic, and you can either accept or reject them.

C: 温世玲将本次实验需要的材料整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给她吧！
E: Wen Shiling compiled a list of required materials for her current experiment. Collect them and hand them over to her!

C: 雷金似乎需要一些帮助，前往歌德宾馆问问看具体情况吧。
E: Regin seems to need some help. Go to the Goethe Hotel and ask about the details.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是磐岩镇中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from Boulder Town...

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是铆钉镇中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from Rivet Town...

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是支援舱段中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the Supply Zone...

C: 谈判将近，先确认一下手上的谈判材料吧。\n与小秘书一起确认材料，争取在接下的言语交锋中取得优势。
E: The time of negotiations is drawing near. You should go over your negotiation materials first.\nConfirm your negotiation materials with Miss Secretary and strive to claim the advantage in the upcoming clash of words.

C: 金人巷应该有了新的进展，要回去看看吗？\n常回金人巷看看。
E: There should be new developments at Aurum Alley. Would you like to go back and check it out?\nVisit Aurum Alley regularly

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「寿考堂」与商会建立合作关系。但「寿考堂」的老板小天此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Longevity Hall to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietress Little Tian has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 阿克赛挖掘出了最后的古代遗迹，似乎比之前都要危险…为你的探宝之旅画上句号吧！
E: Aksay has excavated the last of the ancient ruins, and it seems more dangerous than ever... Complete your treasure hunting journey!

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n就让这些倒霉蛋化作艺术的一部分吧。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?\nSuppose you best incorporate your unfortunate adversaries into this artistic expression.

C: 最熟悉岁阳的脾气秉性的自然是同样处在洪炉之中的岁阳。既有将军许下的对局，那么浮烟就是目前最好利用的情报来源，向它打听一下这个太卜司岁阳是什么来头。
E: The entities most familiar with the temperament and habits of heliobi are none other than other heliobi also confined within the furnace. As the duel promised by the general still stands, it makes Cirrus currently the ideal source of information. Ask it about the heliobus in the Divination Commission.

C: 你们追入屋内，才察觉自己坠入岁阳的迷障中。一如绥园当时的迷离变化，此处成了毫无空间感可言的「鬼打墙」迷宫。你们只能硬着头皮一路追逐。
E: You only realize that you have fallen into the heliobus' illusions when you chased it into the residence. Now, just like how Fyxestroll Garden became a shifting haze, this place has also been transformed in a never-ending labyrinth with no sense of ordinary three-dimensional space. You have no choice but to press forward.

C: 你应这古怪岁阳的邀请参战，但这根本不是棋局嘛——「寻径指津」怎么能算棋局？
E: You accept the challenge from the bizarre heliobus, but this is not a chess game — how can a Pathfinder challenge count as chess?

C: 卡芙卡的通缉令固然好看，但是不应该出现在这里，既然出现在凶宅中，必然有其诡异之处。调查它看看吧。
E: Sure, Kafka's wanted poster is pretty, but it shouldn't be here. Its appearance in the haunted residence is definitely an anomaly. Investigate it to see what is going on.

C: 桂乃芬探访闹鬼的绥园，机缘巧合下受命经营罗浮杂俎，后来的事你也知道了。\n绥园对她来说也是个特别的地方，跟着她的安排走吧。
E: When Guinaifen visited the haunted Fyxestroll Garden, she ended up by chance to be charged with running Ghostly Grove. You know the rest.\nFyxestroll Garden is also a special place for her. Go with her according to her plans.

C: 监狱的狱警们破坏了球笼航道，你必须手动调整路线将它们修复，不然就永远没法跟伙伴们汇合了。
E: The prison wardens have destroyed the Spheroid lane. You have to manually reroute the course to repair the lanes, or you'll never be able to reunite with your companions.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n黑桃砸坏了司令的收音机，但它们都不认为自己做错了，分别听听它们有什么想说的吧。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offers you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nSpade smashed Mr. Bigwig's radio, but neither thought they were at fault. Listen to what each of them has to say.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n营业结束了，可淑女和忧郁派还留在酒吧里，去看看它们究竟在做什么吧。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nIt's time to close for business, but Lady and Melancholy are still lingering in the lounge. Go and find out what they're up to.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n小星星向你提出了问题，你的回答是……
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nStarlet has asked you a question. Your answer is...

C: 可恶的石头老板制造了刀枪不入的钢铁鳄鱼，想想办法打倒它吧！\n哈努飞弹不能伤到钢铁鳄鱼，但威力巨大的烟花说不定能扭转战局……
E: The despicable Boss Stone created a steel crocodile impervious to weapons. Find a way to defeat it!\nThe Hanu Rocket cannot hurt the steel crocodile, but a powerful firework might turn the tables...

C: 鸢尾花家系的米莫萨想要阻止拿走胶卷，去看看她的心底藏着什么秘密吧。\n与钟表小子不对付的家伙，就尝尝「钟表把戏」的厉害！
E: Mimosa of the Iris Family wants to stop you from taking the film. Go and see what secret she is hiding in her heart.\nAnyone who stands against Clockie can taste the power of clockwork!

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n片场准备好了，快去进行拍摄吧。
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nThe location has been set up. Head there to film.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 前方传来隐隐的喧闹，准备前往舞台吧。
E: There is a faint noise ahead. Prepare to head to the stage.

C: 前往终点，前方或许就有答案。
E: Head to the finish line. Answers may lie ahead.

C: 请闭上眼，侧耳倾听，那些名字背后的旋律。
E: Please, close your eyes and listen to the melody behind those names.

C: 十五日约定的时间已经到了，无论是凭剑艺一决胜负，还是向多日相处的同伴求助，三月七总该去面对嚣张跋扈的斯科特了。\n想必你们已经想好该怎么收拾他了吧？
E: The promised time of fifteen days had already passed. March 7th needs to face the arrogant and domineering Skott, whether dueling him with her sword skills or seeking help from friends with whom she had spent a long time.\nYou must have figured out how to deal with him, right?

C: 协助见习医生伦道夫进行拍摄，以方便让他定位，去捕获这些离散忆质。
E: Aid the Trainee Healer Randolph with the filming, thus helping him to position and capture these scattered memoria.

C: 新闻发布会是体育比赛的特色，不能不品尝。\n准备好应付捕风捉影的、各怀鬼胎的、唯恐天下不乱的媒体朋友们了吗？\n是时候和他们斗智斗勇了。
E: Press conferences are a specialty of sporting events. You've gotta experience it.\nAre you prepared to face the cunning, plotting, devious, and conniving friends working in the media industry?\nIt's time to have a battle of wits against them.

C: 青雀，仙舟最闲的大忙人。\n任何时间，任何地点，超级青雀，认真摸鱼。
E: Qingque, the Xianzhou's most slackerly busybody.\nAnytime, anywhere, super Qingque is guaranteed to be serious slacking.

C: 紧张刺激的比赛暂告一段落，可以暂时休息一下了…但卢卡都被淘汰了，你们也没什么「休息」的雅兴。
E: The tense and exciting match draws to a temporary close. It's time to have a quick breather... But with Luka eliminated, you don't really have the desire to "rest."

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到折纸小鸟的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the origami birds' beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到佩佩的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of Peppy's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 桑博从匹诺康尼回到了贝洛伯格。他似乎有什么生意要拉你入伙……
E: Sampo has returned to Belobog from Penacony. He seems to have a business proposal for which he wants to partner up with you...

C: 舒适的睡眠环境，可以保障高质量的睡眠。
E: A comfortable sleeping environment guarantees high-quality sleep.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「扎格列斯之手」。只有完成它的试炼才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogea is protected by a seal, and this one is controlled by the "Hand of Zagreus." You will need to complete its trial before you can continue any further.

C: 波提欧这车性能不错，攻击性极强，这多少能抚慰你不知为何被报名参赛的心理阴影…你决定用它参加海选赛的第一轮比赛，但愿巡海游侠的威名能吓退对手。
E: Boothill's car has great performance and a strong offense, I suppose this can somewhat soothe the unsettling feeling of having been strangely signed up for this competition... You decide to participate in the first round of qualifiers with it, and hope that the Galaxy Ranger's notorious reputation can scare off your opponents.

C: 凝视着浪涛的奔马，听那如雷的战车与对你名字的呼唤，然后，去往下一片属于英雄的大海。
E: Gaze upon the horses in the waves. Listen to the thunderous chariot and the beckoning of your name. Then, head to the next ocean that belongs to heroes.

C: 美食评审顺利通过，餐馆获得了迷其林星级！在休息前，去和昔涟简单聊聊吧。
E: You passed the food review, and the restaurant earned a Memchelin star! Go have a quick chat with Cyrene before you rest.

C: 原来喝下「特调配方」是这种感觉…你对此前的客人们顿生感激之情。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人吧，又或者，你也许还有兴趣让花火替你再调制一杯？
E: So this is how it feels to drink the "Special Mix Recipe"... You suddenly feel grateful for all your previous guests.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the temporary bar to serve the next customer. Or, perhaps, you'd like Sparkle to mix you another glass of it?

C: 机缘巧合之下，你成了这只小小的大地兽的监护人。而且，你还听说，它身上似乎有着能够成长为传奇生物的潜质…？总之，在这段时间里，就按照你的方式培养它，让它恢复健康，并茁壮成长吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you've become the guardian of this tiny dromas. And word has it that it might have the potential to evolve into a legendary creature...? For now, raise it in your own way, help it recover, and watch it grow strong.

E: Time to First Sword Trial

C: 手眼身法
E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 手眼身法
E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 秘本奇谭
E: Codex Mystique

C: 银狼的协助效果提升大幅提升，同时将所有训练的心情消耗降低<unbreak>50%</unbreak>
E: Greatly increases Silver Wolf's assist effects, and additionally reduces Mood consumption by <unbreak>50%</unbreak> in all training

C: 三月七烦恼着击败机甲的方法，也许工造司中会有灵感……
E: March 7th is frustrated about how to defeat the mech, but the Artisanship Commission might offer her some inspiration...

C: 坐下等吧。记得闭上眼睛，这样可以减轻些眩晕感。
E: For now, just sit and wait. Remember to close your eyes — it helps with the dizziness.

C: 十分舒适的沙发…坐上去就会感到昏昏欲睡。
E: A very comfortable sofa... Feels like you'll fall right to sleep after sitting on it.

C: 姬子这话的意思是…
E: So you're saying...

C: 等到你真正站在那一方土地上，才会意识到自己的渺小无助。
E: ...but when you set foot on the planet itself, you realize how small and helpless you really are — just like them.

C: 瓦尔特说影响是星核造成的。
E: Welt says it was caused by a Stellaron.

C: 老实说，我可不希望这是我的家乡啊！看上去就很冷的样子，美少女可是很不抗冻的！
E: To be honest, I think I'd be kind of annoyed if I found out this was my homeworld. It looks freezing... Pretty girls aren't frost-resistant!

C: 乘客下车后，请注意在发车时间之前回到列车。
E: Make sure you return before the Express departs...

C: …这也是件麻烦的事。如果她所说属实，而我们又置若罔闻，「罗浮」上的人就会遭遇危险。
E: ...This is a difficult matter. If she is telling the truth and we turn a deaf ear, then those on the Luofu will be in great danger.

C: 我只看过几次，但，依旧这么壮丽……
E: I've only glimpsed it a few times, but... it's as magnificent as I remember...

C: 你到底是什么情况啊，看你一副怀念又寂寞的样子？
E: You okay there? What's with all the lonely nostalgia vibes?

C: 还是智能信号吗？
E: Still the automated signal?

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ还能回到以前吗？
E: Can Jarilo-VI go back to what it was like before the Stellaron?

C: 有你在的话，旅程会轻松许多。
E: This mission would've been much easier if you were there.

C: 姬子和我不同，她从始至终都表现得十分冷静，还不断劝我要相信年轻人的决断。
E: Himeko was calm from the very beginning. She kept telling me to trust you youngsters' decisions.

C: 当然，就算不小心受了伤也不用慌张，全都交给医生就好了。
E: Of course, even if you get injured by accident, no need to panic. Just leave it to the doctor.

C: 你怎么突然眉头紧皱？是想到了什么不好的事情吗？
E: Why are you suddenly frowning? Do you have something bad on your mind?

C: 这是一种原始色素体生物。
E: This is a primitive chromosomal-based organism.

C: 至少会记得你。
E: ...They'll remember you.

C: 我是。
E: Yes.

C: 阿兰也在监控室。他受了点伤，但没生命危险。
E: Arlan is in the control room. He's been injured, but not fatally.

C: 这么麻烦？
E: Why? It's so far away.

C: 分拣分析室已经紧急封闭了，那条路走不通。
E: The Sorting and Analysis Room has been sealed off. We can't go this way.

C: 珍贵的实验报告被丢得到处都是……
E: So many precious lab reports scattered about. What a mess...

C: 我有权保持沉默。
E: I have the right to remain silent.

C: 你还好吗？
E: How're you feeling?

C: 还是有个别科员遭遇了不幸…
E: There were a few researchers who didn't make it...

C: 还好灾难发生的时候，它已经躲进自己的小睡眠舱了。
E: Luckily, he'd already hidden in his little sleeping pod when the disaster struck.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着阮·梅：「<unbreak>47</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Ruan Mei: "<unbreak>47</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着花火：「<unbreak>55</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The rating pistol's eyes look at Sparkle: "<unbreak>55</unbreak> points!" It announces.

C: 杨叔？杨叔也来了？他不是留在车上了吗？
E: Mr. Yang? Mr. Yang's here too? Didn't he stay on the Express?

C: 关于「黑塔」…
E: About Herta...

C: 你愿意在这儿当个普通科员的话，可以问问艾丝妲，她同意我就没意见。
E: If you wanna be a researcher here, you can just ask Asta. If she's fine with it, I have no complaints.

C: 时间过得真快啊。
E: Oh how time flies.

C: 这么惊险的情况毕竟是少数啦，我也差点吓坏了。
E: Crazy stuff like that? Not too often. It sure freaked me out.

C: 呃，你是开玩笑还是认真的……
E: Er, you are kidding, right...?

C: 喂！你、你还真就一点问题都没有想问我的吗？！
E: Hey! Y—You don't have any questions to ask Pom-Pom!?

C: 被褥只有薄薄一层，但看上去柔软暖和。被包围在资料书刊之中，意外地有安全感。
E: There is only one thin quilt, but it looks very warm. Being surrounded by all the books and records provides a surprising sense of security.

C: 你居然还真捏住了啊？！
E: You really got it, huh!

C: 第二步，集中精神，把你的焦虑都集中到捏住的那个点上去。
E: The second step is to focus all your anxiety on that point.

C: 唔，因为你比较特殊…你身体里有颗星核，走在「开拓」命途的同时还被纳努克瞥了一眼。因此你可能更容易被星神承认一些。
E: Well, because you're special... You have a Stellaron in your body. You're living the life of a trailblazer, and even Nanook took a glance at you. So the Aeons may be more willing to accept you.

C: 现任的守护者是可可利亚•兰德大人，城市内的一切重大决策都由她颁布。
E: The current guardian is Madam Cocolia Rand. Every major strategic decision is issued by her.

C: 守护者大人——我带三位「{RUBY_B#星际旅行者}外来者{RUBY_E#}」前来参见。
E: Madam Guardian, I have brought three {RUBY_B#Interstellar Travelers}outsiders{RUBY_E#} to see you.

C: 您刚刚提到了「反物质军团」入侵；它们到来后不久，这颗星球就出现了「寒潮」；而寒潮诞生时，被称为「裂界」的空间侵蚀现象就发生了，是吗？
E: You mentioned invasion by the Antimatter Legion. Soon after their arrival, this planet suffered the Eternal Freeze. At the same time, the phenomenon known as Fragmentum space corrosion began to occur. Correct?

C: 放弃无谓的抵抗，跟我走吧。
E: Resistance will prove futile. You must come with me.

C: 他是个怎样的人？
E: What do you make of him?

C: 很好！那我先给你们做个示范。
E: Great! Then let me give you a demonstration first.

C: 原本是候车广场…但现在已经被封闭了。
E: It used to be a transport hub... but it's been closed down.

C: 是一代又一代的大守护者驱使她做出那些难以理解的决策？不知道，或许可以用这个点子写一首歌。
E: Is she being compelled by previous generations of guardians to make such baffling decisions? Who knows... but this might make for good songwriting material.

C: 唉…算了，我的确不该侵犯你的私人空间。公务在身，我先走了。
E: *sigh* Never mind. This is your space, and I shouldn't intrude. I've got business to take care of. Bye for now.

C: 走，我们去铁卫禁区。只要抢先一步找到「星核」，可可利亚就拿你们没办法了。
E: Come on, let's go to the restricted zone. If we can get ahead of the curve and find the Stellaron, Cocolia will be out of options.

C: 嘿，看来你和佩拉很有共同语言啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: Hey, looks like you and Pela have a lot in common, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我捡到一副…肖像画。
E: I found a... portrait.

C: 谢谢你的提醒，我会好好考虑的。
E: I'll keep that in mind, thanks.

C: 是吗？那你们都听说什么了？是只用三发子弹就解决了失控徘徊者的那回，还是连续六天不吃不喝，死守被怪物围攻哨站的那回？
E: Oh? Which ones might they be? The time I finished off that rampaging prowler with just three bullets? Or when I defended the outpost from monsters for six days straight without food or water?

C: 咱俩谁跟谁呀，有什么好准备的～敞开肚子喝就是啦。
E: Ready? My stomach's always ready for food and drink!

C: 哦？{NICKNAME}你来得正好！已经有消息了吗？
E: Huh? {NICKNAME}, you're just in time! Any news yet?

C: 我就知道……
E: *sigh* I knew it...

C: 我和布洛妮娅的对话，你们都听到了？
E: I assume you heard our conversation just now?

C: 这些转动的齿轮会不会在给什么供能？比如说，也许机械屋会站起来，变成巨大机器人？
E: Could these spinning gears be powering something? For example, maybe the workshop will stand up and turn into a giant robot?

C: 拿走左边的信封。
E: Take the envelope on the left.

C: 你收起信封。
E: You take the envelope.

C: 放着许多工具/机械的柜子。
E: A cabinet with many tools/machines.

C: 车身冒着微微的热气，它的主人似乎刚离开不久。
E: Steam can still be seen coming from the car body. Seems like its owner has just left.

C: 你看见菜单上写着：「哞哞特种奶，每日新鲜奶！——2元/瓶。」
E: You see on the menu: "Fresh daily Moo Milk! 2 shield per bottle."

C: …其它口味呢？
E: ... What about the other flavors?

C: …这一刻还是来了。
E: ...And it's happening again.

C: 你伸出手，手指轻抚桶身。手指传来极度舒适的触感，轻柔、丝滑、无拘无束…
E: You stretch your hand out and gently stroke the trashcan. A soft, tender, smooth, unconstrained, and tactile sensation travels up your fingertips...

C: …他们会痛苦，会牺牲，会因我的命令而死。
E: ...They will suffer, sacrifice, and die because of my order.

C: 呵呵，这可是个热门问题，要找他「算账」的人多着呢，所以他从不把行踪告诉任何人。
E: Hehe, I hear that question a lot — seems like he owes everyone something. That's why he never discloses his whereabouts.

C: 哼，大人的搏击还是没有鼹鼠党的有意思，虎克根本不在乎。
E: Hmph, grown-up fights are less fun than ours. So what if I can't see!

C: 小姐姐，这事你也别见谁跟谁说啊，奥列格才是头儿，希儿小姐不懂这些的。
E: Ahaha — ahem! I would recommend you not recite your story to everyone you meet. Miss Seele won't understand it anyway, so let's save it for the chief, huh?

C: 但人多了，免不了混进去些喜欢挑事的杂碎。结果就是：流浪者三天两头跟矿工干仗，还经常偷抢矿民的物资——这还算小打小闹。
E: But with such a large group, it's inevitable that troublemakers will find their way in. They've been stealing from the miners and picking fights. And that's not the worst of it.

C: 人类的行为永远偏离理性的计算，克拉拉——
E: Human behavior will always deviate from rational calculation, Clara...

C: 首次「开拓」之旅，还习惯吗？
E: How are you finding your first Trailblazing expedition?

C: 那个奥列格，起码看上去还挺诚恳的——你们说呢？
E: That Oleg... he seems sincere. What do you guys think?

C: 以身作则吧——丹恒？
E: How about you set us a good example, Dan Heng?

C: 正是，我们缺少「星核」的具体坐标和方位……
E: Exactly. We don't even have the Stellaron's coordinates and location.

C: 呃…那个很麻烦的，又麻烦又危险，我说真的，不如走「炉心」来得方便。
E: That would be... problematic, and dangerous. Trust me, we should go through the Furnace Core.

C: 你先说来听听。
E: I'm all ears.

C: 找娜塔莎要零花钱怎么样？
E: Why not ask Natasha for some money?

C: 绝对没说，虎克大人。
E: Absolutely not, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great.

C: 宝、宝石！是很值钱的意思吗？
E: G—Gems!? Does that mean he's worth a lot of money?

C: 嗐，我只有赚钱这一个爱好。
E: Hey, I only have a hobby of making money.

C: 史考特说我不用排队…
E: Scott said I don't have to queue...

C: 你就是史考特选的人？
E: So you're the one Scott picked?

C: 妈妈也不知道呀…上层区和这里不一样，他们的时尚品味一直在变。不知道现在流行的是什么风格……
E: Mommy doesn't know either, sweety — the Overworld is different from here. Their fashion is always changing, I don't know what's popular these days...

C: 杰帕德…刚才的那番话，是你真实的想法吗？
E: What you said back there... did you really mean it?

C: 我坦白了，我没看过。
E: I confess I haven't read it.

C: 我没见过脸皮这么厚的大人。你还是去看看《冒险鼹鼠队》吧。
E: Hmph, you are such a cheeky grownup. You should do better and read The Adventurous Moles.

C: …你问我，我也不清楚，你自己去找找就知道了。
E: ...Don't even try to ask me more. I wouldn't know. You probably should go there to take a look for yourself, and you'll find out soon enough.

C: 哼！小孩子就是没有耐心，这是世间的常识。
E: Hum! Everyone knows that kids are all impatient.

C: 你是在阻止我吗？
E: Are you trying to stop me?

C: 你离开了它。你走得很坚决，但即使相距甚远，你仍感到那沉重的历史积淀感，从垃圾箱长者向外扩散，在土地的深处回荡——回荡——
E: You leave it alone. You walk away resolutely, but even with the distance you have put between you, you still feel the heft of its history emanating outward from the dumpster, echoing in the depths of the earth.

C: 真的？哇，这可真的是非常邪恶的恶作剧，崇高道德会对此表达它的鄙夷。通俗地说，你必须消耗一份崇高道德的赞许才能抵消它，可以吗？
E: Are you serious? Oh my, this is a truly evil trick. High Morals would despise such behavior. You have to consume a Praise of High Morals to recompense for it. Are you willing to?

C: 欢迎收看今天的星际和平播报节目。首先为您介绍今天节目的主要内容。
E: Welcome to a new episode of Interastral Peace Broadcast. We are here to bring you the latest news from across the galaxy.

C: 当地目击者称，他们在巡海游侠到来前普遍产生了难以抑制的负面情绪，或看见离奇的黑洞、裂痕现象。
E: Local witnesses reported experiencing inexplicable dark emotions and seeing strange occurrences like black holes and fissures shortly before the Galaxy Rangers made their appearance.

C: 星际和平公司坚信，「虚无」绝非不可对抗的敌人。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation holds the conviction that the Nihility is not an insurmountable adversary.

C: 你早将星核猎手交到我手里，眼下也没这烦恼。
E: If you'd brought me that Blade earlier, none of this would've been necessary.

C: 哎，但愿如此吧。
E: *sigh* I certainly hope so.

C: 就你话多！
E: Don't start!

C: 不知道呢～那位大人行事端看占算结果，人情世故理会得少些。
E: Who knows? She tends to make decisions based on the results of her divinations as opposed to what others might be thinking.

C: 我们所有人都是未来的变量，藉由选择将现实固化。未来并不是什么了不起的事情，它只是一团等待我们决定的迷雾。
E: All of us are future variables, our choices solidifying reality. The future is nothing incredible either — just a fog waiting for us to make a decision.

C: 「重击麻醉」…我们有吗？
E: "Assertive sedation techniques..." Does she mean beating people up?

C: 据我所知，每艘仙舟虽然独立行事，但云骑军却是由元帅统一指挥的，故而各支云骑之间常有兵将调遣，也不奇怪。
E: Every Xianzhou ship operates individually, but the Cloud Knights are all commanded by the Marshal. Therefore, it's normal for Knights to transfer between ships.

C: 不生气。
E: Not at all.

C: …多谢。
E: ...Many thanks.

C: 稍等。
E: Not yet.

C: 无论脚印还是气味，只要锁定特征，它就能嗅探出目标留下的痕迹，一路追查到底。
E: Be it tracks or scent, as long as he uncovers a trace, he'll follow it all the way to the end.

C: 请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐路过？
E: Have you seen this lady?

C: 哪儿的话。经商讲究的是个「喜怒不形于色」嘛。再说联盟经历的风浪多了，今日之乱，也不算什么大事。
E: I wouldn't say that — a good businesswoman doesn't wear her heart on her sleeve. Besides, the alliance has weathered plenty of challenges. We can handle this situation.

C: 「仙人…快乐…茶」？
E: "Immortal's... Delight"?

C: 这是一个阴谋颠覆联盟的隐秘组织。他们常年潜伏在暗处，这次星核作祟，终于忍不住露了行踪。并且，这一场灾乱与他们也有非同寻常的关系。
E: It is a clandestine organization that seeks to overthrow the Alliance. Before the Stellaron disaster, the Disciples had remained veiled in shadow for years. Their emergence reflects their intricate connection to this calamity.

C: 愿他安息。
E: May he rest in peace.

C: 只可恨妖弓毁掉了一切，颠倒黑白，抹去了药王的一切功绩…不过要不了多久，咱们就能重归神降时代的繁华！
E: But that Devilish Archer ruined everything! They twisted right and wrong and erased Sanctus Medicus's achievements... But soon... soon we will return to the glory of the {RUBY_B#Theophany Era}befall era{RUBY_E#}!

C: 数百年，上千年过去，长生种能感受的情绪阈值不断提升，记忆也在天长日久的磨蚀下稀薄和厌倦，只留下了最极端、鲜明的沉淀。那几乎必定是痛苦和悔恨的回忆残渣……
E: After centuries and millennia, a long-life species' emotional threshold becomes higher and higher. Simultaneously, their memories fade and become dull under the erosion of time, leaving behind only the most extreme and vivid recollections, which are almost guaranteed to be memories full of anguish and regret...

C: 实力对比如此悬殊，可他们却结束了潜伏，举事叛乱了。这不正常，这些人在等候什么转机……
E: There is a gulf in strength between us, yet still they emerged into the open and rebelled. Something isn't right. They must be waiting for some shift in fortune...

C: 走吧，你的朋友们在等着你呢。
E: Go, your friends are waiting for you.

C: 星核猎手确有图谋不假，哈哈，她把各位送来，故意把事态扩大，好让各位与仙舟并肩作战。事到如今，诸位的诚意已无可置疑…罗浮欠诸位一份感激，本不该再有索求。
E: Nevertheless, it is true that the motives of the Stellaron Hunters were not what they appeared, haha. In order that the Express and the Xianzhou fight side by side, Kafka lured you here and broadened the scope of the crisis... In doing so, she succeeded in making clear that your sincerity is beyond doubt. The Luofu is in your debt, and I have no right to seek further assistance from you.

C: {NICKNAME}、三月一路上都在嚷嚷，要是你也在就好了。
E: *sigh* Those two haven't exactly been on their best behavior... It would've been good to have you here earlier.

C: 这是什么？
E: What is this?

C: 你盯着它片刻，这些纹路在你脑海中舒展开来，有了意义。
E: You gaze at it for a moment, and the lines unfold in your mind, giving them meaning.

C: 原来如此，这种矛盾的对立统一，「丰饶」与「毁灭」的碰撞，亦有毁灭之美……
E: I see now... this diametric unity of opposites, this collision of Abundance and Destruction, is yet another form of destructive beauty...

C: 这一剑…真眼熟啊。
E: ...So familiar.

C: 丹恒…接下来，交给你了。
E: Dan Heng... you take it from here.

C: 我吩咐随军医士做了尽可能周全的应急治疗。丹鼎司牵连「药王秘传」的阴谋，眼下要找个信得过的人为将军医治，也颇费一番功夫。
E: I ordered a military doctor to provide the most comprehensive emergency treatment they could. The Alchemy Commission was caught up in the Sanctus Medicus conspiracy — it took a lot of work to find someone trustworthy enough to heal the general.

C: 我一心离开，却阴差阳错，又回了这里。
E: I left so determined... Who would have thought that circumstances would draw me back once more?

C: 很快就走。景元养病，云骑没人再能照拂我。六御会如何处置我，还不清楚。
E: I'll be gone very soon. Jing Yuan is still recovering, and the Cloud Knights won't protect me anymore... It remains to be seen how the Six Charioteers will react to my presence.

C: 停云小姐分不开身，所以这份礼物只能由我们送来了。
E: Miss Tingyun couldn't tear herself away from work, so we've had to gift this on her behalf today.

C: 送完礼，心情也轻松了不少…连伤都不太痛了。此时此刻，本想念两句诗助兴遣怀…不过我不像符卿饱学，还是算了吧。
E: This issuing of gifts brings with it a sense of relief... Even my wound is feeling much improved. The occasion calls for a line or two of poetry... though I feel my efforts would be overshadowed by the erudition of Lady Fu. Another time, perhaps.

C: 按照列车智库的记载，匹诺康尼原本是公司用来流放罪犯的监狱星，至少在记录它的时代是如此。
E: The Express' records show that Penacony was a prison planet used by the IPC to exile criminals... At least, it was at the time of recording.

C: 你说你会想我的？
E: What's that? You're gonna miss me?

C: 能与各位相遇也是我的荣幸。
E: It is an honor to meet everyone.

C: 记得不错——但这邀请函还有下文。
E: You recall correctly, but there was more to this invite.

C: 你怀疑家族并非邀请函的发出者，并且——对我们有所隐瞒？
E: Are you saying... you suspect that The Family did not send the invite, and... is hiding something from us?

C: 有本银河球棒侠在，都不成问题！
E: Ain't no biggie when Galactic Baseballer is in the house!

C: 等我们办完手续就可以了。
E: You'll have to wait for us to finish checking in first.

C: 我也这么想，这应该是匹诺康尼或家族的某种规矩吧。
E: I thought so too. It's most likely some rule of Penacony's, or The Family's.

C: 哇！好大的浴缸……
E: Woah! What a big bathtub...

C: 您不需要付钱！爱德华医生承诺，每位新客都可以免费体验一枚梦泡！
E: None! Dr. Edward promises to let every new customer enjoy their first dream bubble for free.

C: 再想想其他人…
E: Let me see who else...

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: （另一个性别的您？有点难度——但没关系，爱德华医生总会满足您！）
E: (Your voice in a different gender? That's slightly challenging... but no matter! Dr. Edward will make it happen!)

C: 太好了，我正缺一个导游。
E: That's awesome! I happen to need a tour guide.

C: 你或许意识到了，也可能没有，但我刚才一直在带你绕远路，去各种各样的地方，这是因为……
E: I'm not sure whether you have realized it or not, but I took you through a very long, scenic route and visited all kinds of places just now because...

C: 我不会在做梦吧…
E: I can't be dreaming, can I...

C: 试试就试试。
E: Couldn't hurt, I guess...

C: 不懂了吧，流萤小姐。{M#他}{F#她}刚才被吸入了这台电视，和这位哈努兄弟交换了身体——稍等，再让我仔细看看……
E: You don't get it, do you? Well, {M#he}{F#she} was sucked into the TV just now and swapped bodies with Hanu. Hold on, let me take a closer look...

C: 谢谢你……
E: Thanks...

C: 哦，这话当真？你从来没和公司的人交过朋友？
E: Really? You've never been friends with anyone from the IPC?

C: 呜呜…呜呜呜……
是什么愿望？
E: What's your wish?

C: 那就请你不要挡我们的道了。
E: Well, please stop blocking our way.

C: 你要回去了吗？时间过得真快呀。
E: Do you have to go back already? Time really flies.

C: 滴答…滴答…滴答…
E: Tick tock... tick tock... tick tock...

C: 米哈伊尔！我找到你啦！
E: Mikhail! I've found you!

C: 为什么要特地来这里？
E: Why did you come here specifically?

C: 不要离开…
E: Don't leave...

C: 我答应你，米哈伊尔…
E: I promise you, Mikhail...

C: （…他们不是说垃圾之王在这儿等我吗？）
E: (...Didn't they say the Garbage King would wait for me here?)

C: 这个垃圾桶看起来很安静。他的桶盖已经掉漆发白。他正一粒一粒地数着路边的垃圾，时而叹气、时而挠头，似乎正尽力记住一个天文数字。
E: This particular trashcan stands quietly. Its lid has chipped and faded paint. It is meticulously counting the roadside trash, occasionally sighing or scratching its head, as if struggling to memorize an astronomical number.

C: 请问流光忆庭又是出于什么理由，选择和星穹列车合作呢？
E: For what reason has the Garden of Recollection chosen to work with the Astral Express?

C: 引领你归还…清醒的世界。
E: Guiding you back... to the waking world.

C: 小三月，别紧张，这只是一种可能性。可如果这行密文不是单纯的恶作剧，而是什么人有意邀请「开拓」入场，我们就更没有理由坐视不管。
E: March, calm down. It's just a possibility. But if this encrypted message isn't some harmless prank, but done so to invite the Trailblaze into the fray, we cannot remain uninvolved.

C: …然后收到了这个。{NICKNAME}，我发给你了，打开看看吧。
E: ...And this is what I received. {NICKNAME}, I've sent it to you. Open it and take a look.

C: 这是一封威胁信。银狼口中的隐藏地图想必就是封锁中的梦境酒店。为后续考虑，我们确实有必要拜访一下现场。
E: This message is a threat. The hidden map that Silver Wolf mentioned is probably the sealed dreamscape Hotel. For the sake of what's to come, a visit seems necessary.

C: 她盯着这些屏幕，是在照镜子吗…「再来一次」是什么意思？
E: She stares at the screens. Is she looking at herself in the mirror? ...What does she mean by "try again"?

C: 嗯，还是考虑一下砂金的提议吧。
E: Yes, I better think about Aventurine's proposal.

C: 拜{RUBY_B#星核}万界之癌{RUBY_E#}所赐，这东西早成了一笔坏账，公司几次想坐下来谈谈，可家族连门都不给开。
E: This has all become a bad debt thanks to the {RUBY_B#Stellaron}Cancer of All Worlds{RUBY_E#}. The IPC has tried sitting down for negotiations time and again, but The Family wouldn't even take our calls.

C: 这样就行了，一件小小的临别礼物。倘若有一日，你不幸沉沦于忆域的深海，又没有忆者相伴——它会代我为你指引出路。
E: There you go, a small parting gift. If one day, you unfortunately fall into the deep waters of the Memory Zone and there's no Memokeeper to join you — hopefully it can guide you on my behalf.

C: 「…诡计永不败露。」
E: "...and your schemes forever concealed."

C: 我生来便没有「做梦」的机能。我为冰冷的现实而活，为一点光亮，燃烧…不断燃烧，直到化作死灰。
E: I was born without the ability to "dream." I live for this cold harsh reality, for a little light, and to burn... to keep on burning, until I turn to ash.

C: 数系统时前 朝露公馆
E: System hours ago — Dewlight Pavilion

C: 况且这是家族的地界，与他们合作，应当能为后续的事行不少方便。
E: Plus, this is The Family's turf. Teaming up with them should make things easier for us in the future.
"...Who are you?"

C: 卡卡瓦夏，你去哪儿了…你受伤了？！
E: Kakavasha, where did you go... Are you injured!?

C: 如果踏进这扇门就能迎来凯旋的机会，哪怕概率无限趋近于零，我也没有犹豫的理由，不是么？
E: If the chance of winning is just beyond this door, even if that chance is close to zero, well... you can't win if you don't play, right?

C: 匹诺康尼也不都是坏事，对吧？我会把这段有趣经历当作牌桌上的谈资的。
E: Penacony isn't all bad, right? I'll use this interesting experience as a talking point at the poker table.

C: 就是它了…愉快的独处时光总是转瞬即逝。
E: That's it... Pleasant moments of solitude are always fleeting.

C: …没关系，就按他们要求的做，尽量避免和家族起冲突…采取任何行动前先和我汇报。嗯。嗯，好。
E: ...It's fine. Do as they ask, and try to avoid any conflicts with The Family... Report to me before taking any action. Mhm. Yes, alright.

C: 我在那里遇到一位苍老的妇人，她在港口盼着多年前离开的爱人归来，在停滞的时间里等待了无数的时间。
E: I ran into a wizened lady there. She was at the dock waiting for her long-departed lover to return, waiting for countless hours within time that stood still.

C: 朋友…你看起来不太好啊。如果需要帮助，我可以联系酒店帮你强制唤醒。
E: You don't look good, my friend... If you need assistance, I can contact the hotel and have them wake you up forcefully.

C: 前几天有个鸢尾花家系的演员来砸场子，和舒翁起了点争执…估计是那时候落下的。
E: A few days ago, an actor from the Iris Family came — caused a ruckus with Siobhan... Those chips must have gotten scattered during all the chaos.

C: 每种饮料的风味各不相同，基底的味道通常决定了第一印象和回味的余韵——<color=#dbc291ff>你想选择哪种材料作为基底</color>？
E: Each drink has its own unique flavor, and the base ingredient sets the tone for the initial taste and the lingering aftertaste. So, <color=#dbc291ff>which one would you like to use as the base</color>?

C: 比苏萨水更甜，比美梦糖浆更苦。{RUBY_B#苏乐达}「瓶中美梦」{RUBY_E#}——匹诺康尼的形象代言。
