E: Sweeter than Sousa Juice and more bitter than Dream Syrup. {RUBY_B#Soulglad}"Dream in a Bottle"{RUBY_E#} — that's a metaphor for Penacony itself.

C: 用这杯「到坟场的车票」向你致意，无名客——
E: Here's to you, the Nameless, with this glass of "A Ticket to the Boneyard"...

C: …你我都能得到想要的答案。
E: ...We will find the answers we are seeking.

C: 告诉我，它叫什么名字？
E: Tell me, what's its name?

C: 哼…那我就亲自让你回忆一下。「砂金」是幸运与诡计之石…你拿到这块石头的时候，她是这么说的，对吧？
E: Ugh, must I do all the work? Aventurine is the stone of luck and trickery... That's what she said when you received the stone, wasn't it?

C: 怎么样，这分数不低吧？
E: How's that? Not a bad score, eh?

C: 她给了我一个足以颠覆一切的答案。
E: She gave me an answer that could turn everything upside down.

C: 你…要回去了吗？
E: You're... going back?

C: 我的能量可没那么大…
E: I ain't that powerful...

C: 我也未曾料想，自己意外得知的某件事，会成为串联一切的关键。
E: I never imagined that something I learned about unexpectedly would become the key to connecting everything.

C: 但你看起来还是很紧张……
E: But you still seem nervous...

C: 本台快讯：匹诺康尼「谐乐大典」已进入倒计时阶段。伴随着钟表小子的嘀嗒声，<unbreak>12</unbreak>个系统时后，这场庆典即将迎来盛大的开幕……
E: Newsflash: Penacony's Charmony Festival has entered its countdown phase. Accompanied by Clockie's tick-tocks, after <unbreak>12</unbreak> system hours, this grand celebration will commence with much fanfare...

C: 匹诺康尼的「梦主」。
E: Penacony's Dreammaster.

C: 我敢发誓，那绝对不是拍电影！那么多筹码从空中掉下来，我还抓到了一枚，可转眼间它就消失得无影无踪了！
E: I swear that was no movie shoot! So many chips fell from the sky, and I even caught one of them, but it vanished in an instant before my very eyes!

C: 我可以留在这里。但请记住，宾客来到匹诺康尼是为了享受梦境，不希望被牵扯进家族和公司的纠葛，别再让多余的事发生了。
E: I could stay here. But keep in mind, guests come to Penacony to enjoy the Dreamscapes. They do not wish to be entangled in a conflict between The Family and the IPC so, let's not have any more unnecessary incidents.

C: 刚才就看到了…
E: Yep, I saw him right away...

C: 从描述来看，那只迷因毫无疑问就是「死亡」。虽然被家族视作梦魇，但在这边的居民眼中…事实似乎截然不同。
E: Based on the description, that meme is indisputably "Death." A nightmare for The Family, but for the people who live here... that couldn't be further from the truth.

C: 我是梦境测绘员科玫，专业是忆质动力学，正在钻研自己的毕生课题。
E: I'm Kaimee, a dreamscape surveyor specializing in memoria dynamics, and this is my life's work that I'm researching.

C: 通过不断改进拉扎莉娜女士的忆质测量法，我终于得到了准确结果——
E: By constantly improving upon Madam Razalina's memoria measurement method, I've finally obtained accurate results—

C: 我们对这种美丽的风景屡见不鲜，以为那是它们与生俱来的本领…可惜，那流星般的光彩，是它们同大自然斗争了数百个琥珀纪的结果。
E: We've seen this spectacle so many times that we think it's just something they can naturally do... but that's not the truth. Their radiant display is the result of countless struggles against nature over generations.

C: 理解万岁，那咱们就能敞开聊了。想必各位一定很想知道，我为何要大费周章地布置一场遗产争夺战，向这么多派系发出邀请，把匹诺康尼搅得鸡犬不宁……
E: Thank you for your understanding! Now, let's get down to business. I'm sure you're all wondering why I went through the trouble of setting up this battle for the legacy, inviting different factions, and stirring up a ruckus all over Penacony...

C: 星核？匹诺康尼畅通无阻，是四通八达的星际枢纽，看起来也不存在任何遭受污染的迹象，怎会和星核有关？
E: The Stellaron? But how is that possible? Penacony is a free-flowing interstellar hub. There are no signs of contamination whatsoever.

C: 匹诺康尼第一位、也是最后一位无名客——
E: The first and last Nameless of Penacony...

C: 话说回来，我们此行来到匹诺康尼，还从未与梦主有过接触。五大家系的家主我都略有耳闻，却极少听到有关这位「梦主」的消息。
E: Y'know, since arriving in Penacony, we haven't had any contact with this Dreammaster himself. I'd heard of the heads of the five major lineages, but the Dreammaster is a mystery to me.

C: 妹妹，你在读书吗？在读什么？
E: Are you reading, sister? What are you reading?

C: 星神在上，若我所言不实，或食言背约，则依照律令承受诅咒。
E: With the Aeon as my witness, if I do not deliver on my words, or if I renege on my vows, may I be cursed in accordance with divine law.

C: 正有此意。但在此之前请容我先做个介绍，我叫黑天鹅，是流光忆庭的忆者。而关于那位黄泉女士的故事……
E: That's precisely what I intend to do. But before that, please allow me to introduce myself. My name is Black Swan, and I serve the Garden of Recollection as a Memokeeper. As for Acheron's story...

C: 丹恒先生，我曾与你的同伴短暂同行，也知晓他们身在何方。请相信各位无名客仍平安无事，但也同样需要我们的帮助。
E: I've briefly traveled with your companions and know their whereabouts, Dan Heng. Please rest assured, your Nameless companions are safe, but they need our help.

C: 我是银河球棒侠，她是赵相机。
E: Hello everyone, I'm the Galactic Baseballer, and she's Say~Cheese~.

C: 「美梦小镇有危险！你不明白吗？」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "Dreamville is in danger! Don't you understand?" You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

C: 亲爱的朋友，欢迎光临「钟表匠」构造的美妙世界！在前方等待你们的，是钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟！
E: Dear friends, welcome to the enchanting universe created by the Watchmaker! Awaiting you is the morally dubious yet ever-charming character from the animated Clockie series — Hanu!

C: 欢迎来到由苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场热砂盛典第三关——「巨星巅峰战」！
E: Welcome to the thirty-third Scorchsand Festival's third stage in the twentieth season, sponsored by SoulGlad™ Enterprises — Superstar Showdown!

C: 一下子切断连接，还有点不适应……
E: Disconnecting from that thing so suddenly has left me feeling slightly disoriented.

C: 噢！这突如其来的畅快感……
E: Wow! This sudden surge of joy...

C: 我们约定，等到它能依靠自己的力量展翅翱翔时，再将它放回天空。可遗憾的是，我们万万没有想到，这只鸟儿的命运早在那之前就已经注定——
E: We decided that when it regained its strength enough to spread its wings, we would release it back into the wild. The tragic part — something that we'd never considered — was that this bird's fate had already been determined long before this moment...

C: 奇怪，可我明明记得…钟表小子最后抵达了新大陆……
E: Weird... I clearly remember... Clockie arrived in the New World in the end...

C: 而在流梦礁，不知各位是否有注意到，列车组以外的其他人…都微妙地没有和它发生过任何对话。
E: And when we were in Dreamflux Reef, you may have noticed that for some reason, nobody outside of the Crew... had ever talked with Clockie.

C: 为了让我不要忘记一些事。钟表小子，你还记得自己的名字是怎么来的么？
E: So I won't forget it. Do you remember how you got your name, Clockie?

C: 我也好想拥有这么一块怀表啊，然后，我的梦里就出现了你。
E: I wanted to have a pocket watch like that too, and that's when you appeared in my dreams.

C: 最糟糕的样子，那不就是……
E: The most terrible form? Does that mean...?

C: 这就是你在为她感到悲伤的证明。
E: That's proof that you're grieving for her.

C: 不，正因为时间紧迫……
E: Time is running out...

C: 看，又是一个画框……
E: Look, another frame...

C: 「<color=#dbc291ff>镇定</color>者方能避免潜藏的教唆者的毒害。」新至的主人如是说。
E: "Only the <color=#dbc291ff>calmed</color> ones can evade the insidious influence of the hidden instigator," proclaimed the new master.

C: 「过去的主人早已不在，我为何仍在畏惧众人构造的残影？」
E: "My former master has long departed, but why do I still fear the remnants of his creation?"

C: 「恭送您离开，旧日的君王。」
E: "Farewell, former king."

C: 大剧院完全变样了…这就是「秩序」的力量吗？
E: This Grand Theater looks totally different... Is this the power of the Order?

C: 不是这张牌吗？
E: It's not this card?

C: 但…那并不是它最本质的功能。
E: But... this is not its most intrinsic function.

C: 最后一个是黑天鹅提供的<color=#dbc291ff>「琉璃光带」帕特雷维尼齐亚</color>。那是一条因为绝灭大君「焚风」完全玻璃化的巨大行星带…现如今似乎是悲悼伶人的剧团知名分部之一帕。
E: The last choice, courtesy of Black Swan, is <color=#dbc291ff>the "Glass Belt" Patrevia</color>, a massive belt of asteroids that was turned to glass by the Lord Ravager Zephyro... These days it's apparently known to house one of the branches of the Mourning Actors troupe.

C: 黑天鹅
E: Black Swan

C: 是我交还给你的「遗物」。
E: It's the relic I returned to you.

C: 我不会感到害怕。
E: I feel no fear.

C: 真正的幸福应当是所有在「虚无」面前依旧挺立的事物，那才是一个人真正的活法！
E: True happiness and the meaning of life lie in defying the Nihility and embracing all that life offers!

C: 醒醒…醒醒……
E: Wake up... Wake up...

C: 再讲讲匹诺康尼的现状…
E: Tell me more about the current state of Penacony...

C: 好啊，我会留意的。「奥帝购物中心」有许多选择，你觉得她会喜欢漂亮的小装饰吗，比如…发饰和胸针？
E: Sure, I'll keep an eye out. There's tons of options at Oti Mall. Do you think she'll like trinkets like... hair accessories or brooches?

C: 嚯，这排场，家族的表面功夫做得可够足的。
E: Huh, quite a spectacle. The Family really knows how to make things look impressive.

C: 哼…哼哼！哼唧！
E: Oink... Oink, oink! Oink!

C: 看样子，您应该是公司「战略投资部」的代表吧？当然可以，乐意为您服务。
E: I assume you are the ambassador of the IPC Strategic Investment Department? It's my honor to assist you.

C: 雅利洛那一单，我的处理方式是通过了高层决议的。项目日志和通话记录都很齐全，你们不会自己去查吗？
E: The way I handled the Jarilo case was approved by senior management, and all of the project logs and call are complete. Can't you check them yourselves?

C: <unbreak>30%</unbreak>，谁能保证你们的胃口不会越变越大？
E: <unbreak>30%</unbreak> equity, you say? Who can guarantee you won't want more in the future?

C: （那是…{NICKNAME}？）
E: (Is that... {NICKNAME}?)

C: 你的宝箱就归我了！
E: Your chest is mine!

C: …喂，{NICKNAME}！别睡啦，太阳晒屁股啦——
E: ...Hey, {NICKNAME}! Wake up! The sun's frying your butt!

C: 「慈玉女士」连眼睛都没眨一下。你猜她可能没什么幽默感。
E: Lady Bonajade doesn't even blink. You're guessing she doesn't have any sense of humor.

C: 不会吧，这就要大结局了？
E: No way. This is the endgame already?

C: 是呀，只是没来得及搭话。离谐乐大典开幕还有些时间，想聊聊吗？
E: Yes, it's just I didn't get the chance to say hello. There's still some time before Charmony Festival starts. Do you want to chat?

C: 我当然很想活下去，但…命运亏欠了我，我想要的是偿还，而不是转嫁。不应该有第三者被卷入其中，因为这是我个人和命运的恩怨。
E: Of course I want to live on, but... what fate owes me, I want it paid back, not passed on. No one else should be involved, because this is a grudge between me and fate.

C: 再小的谎言也会铸成如尖刀般锐利的背叛…对不起，{NICKNAME}。
E: Even the smallest of lies can turn into a betrayal as sharp as a blade... I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}.

C: 很高兴同各位欢聚一堂，共同迎接匹诺康尼在本琥珀纪最隆重的典礼，谐乐大典。首先，我谨代表匹诺康尼家族分家暨五大家系……
E: It's a pleasure to join you all in celebrating the grandest ceremony of the Amber Era, the Charmony Festival. Firstly, on behalf of the Penacony Family's five major lineages...

C: 我很诚实，所以我会回答你：不是。
E: I'll be honest and tell you: It's not.

C: （时间不多了…希望还来得及。）
E: (Not much time left... I hope I make it.)

C: 至少我们在匹诺康尼的这段同行是真的，而他对这片土地的忠诚和热爱…也一定是真实的，对吧？
E: At least our journey together in Penacony was real enough, and his loyalty and love for this land... must have been real too, right?

C: （什么鬼动静？）
E: (What is that ruckus?)

C: 我们到啦。{NICKNAME}，你怎么每次跃迁都要犯瞌睡？叫都叫不醒的。
E: We've arrived. {NICKNAME}, why do you always fall asleep when we're warping? I couldn't even wake you up.

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 别，我们走吧。
E: No thanks. Let's get going.

C: 无情、无泪、无慈悲的<color=#dbc291ff>「御猿•邪忍」</color>。
E: The emotionless, soulless, and merciless <color=#dbc291ff>Evil Ninja Osaru</color>.

C: 猴子、忍者…听着不像是匹诺康尼发生的事，更像一个梦泡。
E: Monkeys and a ninja... That doesn't sound like something that happened in Penacony. Seems more like a dream bubble.

C: 哦，这位同学也是睡蕉小猴的*蕉粉*吗？
E: Oh, are you Slumbernana Monkey's Ripe Banana too?

C: 导演当然要在试镜前熟读演员的履历，这很正常。
E: It's only natural for a director to familiarize himself with a performer's resume before an audition.

C: 只是芮克先生再三表态，外加他自己也是谐乐学院的客座讲师，我不好推辞。
E: It's because Mr. Reca insisted. He's also a guest lecturer at Charmony Academy. It didn't feel right to refuse.

C: 算了算了，狂欢的日子不提这种伤心事。请拿好写真集，祝你们玩的愉快！
E: Forget it. Let's not talk about such depressing topics in the middle of festivities. Here's your photobook. Have fun!

C: 因果何其奥妙，在下竟与诸位无名•忍者重逢。飞龙•忍者不认得在下，但一定记得我的同僚——身披银甲，豪迈潇洒，善使枪弹忍法，口中常念甘言美语的忍侠……
E: Cause and effect is a wondrous thing. It allowed me to reunite with you, the Nameless Ninjas. Ninja Hiryū may not recognize me, but he must remember my colleague: A Ninja Hero clad in silver armor. He has a bold, easy confidence, is proficient in the use of bullet ninjutsu, and frequently spouts sweet and melodious words...

C: 很快就好了，先准备好社员证吧，看起来倒也不用排队。
E: It won't take long. You should get your membership card first. It doesn't look like there's a queue right now.

C: 知更鸟姐姐，是这样唱吗？
E: Miss Robin, am I singing it right?

C: 唉，临时抱佛脚可没用啊。
E: Last-minute cramming isn't going to help, you know.

C: 您说……
E: ...What can I do for you?

C: 走了，姐们，去看看搞事儿的到底几颗牙。
E: Let's go, pardner. Time to see what those troublemakers are capable of.

C: 可惜，没有后半句。
E: I wish... But no, nothing of the sort.

C: 蒙塔娜！等等等等…小心啊！
E: Montana! W—Wait up... Watch out!

C: 构成梦境的物质与现实完全不同，筑梦亦是同理。大家手中的是由忆质制成的「模因染料」。
E: The materials that form the Dreamscape are completely different from those in reality, and the same theories apply to dreamweaving. What you're holding is memetic dye, which is made from memoria.

C: 如果总在追求得不到的东西，不就是在朝幸福的反方向前进吗？放弃吧，放弃吧蕉！
E: Pursuing something she can never reach is straying farther from happiness. That's why it's only right to give up, bana!

C: 我刚提的新猴啊！
E: I didn't even get to play with it!

C: 我看好你。
E: I have faith in you.

C: 话语、音乐、视频…这些东西都是传播媒介，人类天然对未知的事物带有好奇心，而模因病毒便会趁虚而入。
E: Words, songs, videos... these are all mediums of transmission. Humans naturally have a curiosity for the unknown, and memetic viruses take advantage of this.

C: 你想说，人类也是一样？
E: Are you saying that humans will suffer the same fate?

C: 在下亦有同感。飞龙•忍者果真心思缜密。
E: I concur with you. Ninja Hiryū is a punctilious ninja indeed.

C: 不然呢，真把哥们当哥们了？
E: Awful chummy with someone you just met, ain'tcha friendo?

C: 他香蕉的，这玩意还有盗版？
E: Holy bananas... There are rip-offs of this thing?

C: 你…你……
E: Y—You...

C: 带我成为高级社员。
E: Help me become a high-ranking member.

C: 但现在，这边的课程也结束了。
E: And with that, the class here has come to an end.

C: 夜雾下的城郊，街道无色，有色之物乃是遍布街头的霓虹看板、缭乱•忍符的异彩，以及缭乱•忍者的身姿。
E: In the suburban night fog, the streets are colorless, save for the neon signs scattered about, the splendid hues of Dazzling Ninja Seals, and the swift silhouette of the Dazzling Ninja herself.
Urk...

C: 是吗？博士…真的会在意我们这些凡人吗？
E: Is that so? Would Doctor... really notice ordinary mortals like us?

C: 够了——战斗猿们，清理门户！
E: Enough! Combat Apes, take care of them!
...Yes.

C: 没事了蕉。
E: It's nothing, bana.

C: 哟，琉璃•忍者！哟，银枪•修罗殿下！
E: Yo, Ninja Ruri! Yo, Silvergun Shura!

C: 让他交代御猿•邪忍的去向。
E: Make him tell us where Evil Ninja Osaru is.

C: （看来恰丽卡学姐好像找到自己的「忍符」了……）
E: (It seems like Chaletka has also found her own way of the ninja...)

C: 缭乱•忍法•正觉彩墨绽！
E: Dazzling Ninjutsu: Brilliant Enlightenment!

C: 我等要做的，只是唤醒这些失意的百姓，令波涛汹涌的邪祟浪潮重归平息。
E: All we need to do is bring those disillusioned fans back to their senses to quell the rogue waves of fiendlings.

C: 让我们延续之前的课题吧：香蕉是无性繁殖的植物。一个块茎可以滋生无数香蕉树，从而诞生出一大片香蕉林，解决一整个星系乃至宇宙的饥荒。
E: Let us continue from where the previous lecture left off: Bananas are plants that propagate asexually. Each rhizome can bear several buds that will grow into a sea of banana trees, thus eliminating hunger problems plaguing planets and perhaps even the entire universe.

C: 此处是在下与{NICKNAME}曾经相遇之地。看来壮绝狩猎的起点亦是终点，实属巧妙•因缘——
E: This is the place where I met {NICKNAME} before. It seems like the starting point of this formidable hunt will also be where it shall be concluded. How ingenious fate is...

C: 副导演
E: Assistant Director

C: 终于……
E: At long last...

C: …荒唐透顶。我认得这奥赫玛人，他是个磊落的战士，却被「纷争」捏造成了这般扭曲模样。
E: ...Absurd. I know this Okheman. Strife contorted an honorable warrior into this perverse and twisted being.

C: 羞辱我，不必——滚出去，滚出奥赫玛！
E: Humiliate me, you shall not. Leave. Get out of Okhema!

C: 缇安只是什么？缇安只是很生气！
E: Trianne is just what? Trianne is super mad, that's what!

C: 你应该能理解我们的谨慎源自何处，阿格莱雅女士。
E: I'm sure you can understand where our misgivings come from, Lady Aglaea.

C: 说明人家正在成长哦！有没有可能，等我拥有了戳羊毛毡的记忆，就会长出和小蝶一样漂亮的手……
E: This shows that I'm learning new things! Once I obtain the memory of poking wool felt, will I grow hands that are as pretty as Cas' hands?

C: 好胆识！那么，有多「开拓」？
E: Courageous! Then, how "Trailblazing"?

C: …很遗憾，看起来它拒绝了你的决斗邀请。
E: ...Alas, it seems to have declined your challenge for a duel.

C: 一般一般，世界第三。
E: I'm just so-so, only third best, ya know?

C: （奉上隐隐燃烧的「金枝誓言」。）
E: (Offer the faintly burning Golden Bough of Vows.)

C: 「黑色」的「利剑」和「斗篷」……
E: The black sword and cloak...

C: 大家，跟缇安走！从奥赫玛，飞呀飞！
E: Everybody, follow Trianne! Fly, fly, fly away from Okhema!

C: 不可思议……
E: How incredible...

C: 孩子们，别在这里嬉戏打闹。
E: You shouldn't run around in here, kids.
No...

C: 流亡的岁月，他们与我同生共死。那十年时光，颠沛流离，但也值得怀念。每个夜晚，我们都会在营火边围坐，畅饮蜜酿，纵情高歌……
E: We faced life and death together during our days in exile. Those ten years were arduous, yet filled with moments worth treasuring. Each night, we would gather by the campfire, savoring honey brews and singing our hearts out...

C: …啊，是遐蝶女士？莫非是我工作上出了什么差错，阿格莱雅大人派你来敲打我？
E: ...Wait, Lady Castorice? Did Lady Aglaea send you because of some mistake I made at work?

C: 我等黄金裔的使命，在你眼中就是这般儿戏？
E: Does the mission we Chrysos Heirs bear seem like child's play to you?

C: 并非裹血力战，而是以奇制胜——很聪明的做法。
E: It's very clever, using the element of surprise instead of brute strength.

C: 拜托啦，感受到大家热烈的目光了吗？这么重大的场合，可不能让他们失望呀！
E: Aw, come on! Can't you feel their fervent gazes? This is a big deal! We can't let everyone down!

C: 现在…「纷争」的力量在我胸中翻涌。我的筋骨化作钢铁，血液在沸腾燃烧。历代悬锋的王者只能仰望这股力量，但我——已经与它融为一体。
E: The power of Strife is stirring a tempest within me as we speak... My bones have turned into steel, and my blood is seething and ablaze. Past rulers of Kremnos could only aspire to this might, yet I have merged with it.

C: 没错，你实现了每一位悬锋先王的野心。
E: Indeed. You've realized the aspirations of every former king of Kremnos.

C: …可惜，我并无此意。
E: ...Unfortunately, I harbor no such desire.

C: 为何要我做你的传声筒，为何你不去亲口向他们解释这一切？
E: Why task me with being your messenger? Why not explain all this to them yourself?

C: 但我戒不掉沐浴带来的宽畅享受。
E: But I cannot forgo the delightful experience a bath offers.

C: 原来克拉特鲁斯提到的医师是你，难怪他能取回一命。多谢。
E: So you are the physician Krateros spoke of. It's no wonder then that he was pulled back from the brink of death. You have my gratitude.

C: 我会铭记在心。
E: I will keep that in mind.

C: 如今，我只剩下一个身份……
E: And now, I too am left with but one role...

C: 缇宁和风堇赶到的时候，那人已经和尸体无异了。他承受千刀万剐，又跳下万丈深崖，硬是将缇安的身躯带离了黑衣剑士的魔爪。
E: He was no better than a corpse when Trinnon and Hyacine arrived. He had suffered more cuts than could be counted and leaped off a cliff from a great height, all to free Trianne's body from the clutches of the black-robed swordmaster.

C: 克拉特鲁斯。
E: It's Krateros.

C: 那刻夏不在，是你授意的吗，白厄？
E: I do not see Anaxa around. Was this under your instructions, Phainon?

C: 这很鲁莽，他身上毕竟还携带着一颗火种。
E: A rash decision. After all, he still bears a Coreflame with him.

C: 我要如何遥望世界崩毁，却独善其身？
E: And how can I alone remain safe and secure, while watching the entire world crumble before my eyes?

C: 这里有好多箱子……
E: There are so many boxes here...

C: 可惜，妈妈离开后，*我们*才发现…原来这些卷轴里写的东西，一点都不有趣。
E: Unfortunately, only after Mother was gone did we realize that what was written in the scrolls was far from engaging.

C: 那里呀，是西风的尽头，黑潮的彼岸，受众神赐福护佑的、熠熠生辉的花海。
E: It's the end of the west wind, the black tide's other shore, a radiant sea of flowers blessed and protected by the gods.

C: 就像这样。
E: Just like this.

C: 哎唷，别拿这种眼神看我，这次我可真没拿。
E: Come on, don't give me that look! I promise, it wasn't me this time!

C: 愿我们…愿一切世人……
E: May we... May the world...

C: 令你困惑的那个问题……
E: The question that has been puzzling you...

C: 嗯，缇安也会这么说的。
E: Yeah, that's what Trianne would say as well.

C: 你误会了…虽然在折纸大学中选修过历史，不过我显然不是参与科研的合适人选。
E: Oh, you've got the wrong idea... I may have taken some history electives back at Paperfold University, but I'm hardly the right person for scientific research.

C: 我希望宇宙和平！
E: I wish for peace across the universe!

C: 由苜蓿草家系全力筹办的第一届匹诺康尼「圣杯战争」正在进行时，我们将全程追溯参战御主们的踪迹，并为各位带来最新鲜的一手报道。
E: The Alfalfa Family proudly presents the First Penaconian Holy Grail War! We'll be following the Masters every step of the way, bringing you the freshest, most exclusive coverage.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，好不容易迎来了第二次人生，该把脆弱的自尊心收收了，老朋友。
E: Hohohoho! You got a chance at a second life. It's best to let go of fragile pride, old friend.

C: 按照御主的吩咐，我的宝具早已瞄准了那些您邀请的对象。我可以将他们的动向随时呈现在两位面前的。
E: Following my Master's command, my Noble Phantasm has already been trained on those you invited. I can show their movements to you both in real time.

C: 擦…擦不干净？到底是谁搞的恶作剧帕？
E: Ugh... it won't come off!? Who's behind this prank?

C: 再见了，召唤不出从者的御主。
E: Farewell, Master-with-no-Servant.

C: 他宝贝儿的腿，两个外地人召唤了两个外地人，这「圣杯战争」怎么也沾上了地域歧视？
E: Forkin' hell. So two outsiders summoned two more outsiders? The Holy Grail War allergic to local talent now or somethin'?

C: 这也正是我在考虑的事情……如今加入圣杯战争的人选中，至少有两位是我信得过的朋友。我已经向其中一位发出了邀请，打算和{F#她}{M#他}开诚布公地聊一聊目前的情况。
E: I know. I was just thinking the same thing. Out of everyone in this war, there are at least two people I can trust. I've already invited one of them, and I plan to lay everything on the table for {M#him.}{F#her.}

C: …两份天环翅堡，两瓶苏萨水。音符小姐，这样可以吗？
E: Two Halovian Winged Burgers, two bottles of Sousa Juice. Miss Note, is that okay?

C: 以我对奥帝的了解，他无论如何都不会停止这场游戏。
E: From what I know of Old Oti, he won't stop this game no matter what.

C: 这是…波提欧先生发的短信吗？
E: Is this... a text from Mr. Boothill?

C: 是吗…难怪，御主的性格有些随心所欲啊，是因为没有过去的束缚吗？
E: Really? ...No wonder your personality is so carefree. Is it because you don't have a past holding you back, Master?

C: 我为所有人安排了一出，属于你们的，平庸而幸福的人生——你也不例外，{NICKNAME}。
E: I've prepared a simple and happy life for all of you in this show — Including you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不过…我也不是不能理解。我听说列车本来邀请你和他们一起上路的，可是你拒绝了。怎么，现在后悔啦？
E: Well... I can't say I blame you. I heard the Express did invite you to join them, but you turned them down. Are you regretting that choice now?

C: 根据心情分类整理。
E: Sort by mood.

C: 你一度以为自己此生再也不会有握起它的机会。
E: You once believed you'd never hold it again in this lifetime.

C: 葛瑞迪…呃，不，也许此刻我该称呼你为芮克先生才对？作品剪辑完成了吗？…这么重要的工作，还得看你啊。
E: Grady, or perhaps I should now address you as Mr. Reca, is the editing of the footage complete? ...That is such an important task, after all.

C: 我猜，你的回答肯定是「不好奇」。嗐，{F#姐们}{M#兄弟}，你不好奇，观众们还期待着呢。
E: I'm thinking you'll probably say "no." Owww, come on, {M#bro!}{F#sis!} You might not be curious, but the audience is still on the edge of their seats!

C: 警惕黑色高级飞车。
E: Be on guard for any black luxury speedster.

C: 我会尽己所能保护各位，请不要离我太远。不过敌暗我明，再谨慎也无法保证万无一失。
E: I'll protect everyone to the best of my ability. Please don't stray too far from me. But with the enemy in the shadows and us out in the open, even the greatest caution can't guarantee our safety.

C: 确实是这样…是敌人所谓的「宝具」导致的吗？
E: That's true... Could it be the enemy's so-called Noble Phantasm?

C: 年轻人，我收回刚才对你的赞美，我会把你的尖叫放在<color=#dbc291ff>葛瑞迪影业</color>最显眼的位置循环播放。
E: Kid, I take back every compliment I said about you. Your screams will be played on loop in the most conspicuous spot at <color=#dbc291ff>Grady Films</color>.

C: 御主，你也听到了。选一个吧，是锯掉你的左腿呢？还是右腿呢？说实话，如果能买一送一，我比较想锯掉有令咒的那条胳膊。
E: Master, you heard him. Pick a leg, left or right? Honestly, if I could get a bonus, I'd rather go for the arm with the Command Spells.

C: 那你得走到我的面前才行！由于你们的鲁莽，「酒店的电锯恶灵已经被响声唤醒了」。主角，轮到你登场了！
E: Then you'd better reach me first! Thanks to your recklessness, "the hotel's chainsaw spirit has been awakened by the noise." Protagonist, take the stage!

C: 在短暂的休憩后，你们互相交流了情报。
E: After a brief pause, you exchange the information you've gathered with one another.

C: 「要杀掉{F#她}{M#他}么？」在你醒来前，我曾<unbreak>12</unbreak>次推翻这个问题的答案。如果我要出手，你不会有机会睁开眼睛。
E: "Should I kill {F#her}{M#him}?" I turned that question over twelve times before you woke up. If I had decided to act, you wouldn't even get the chance to open your eyes.

C: 梦回不要笑挑战。
E: This kinda reminds me of the try-not-to-laugh challenge.

C: 啧，算我错看了你。看来，得多花几颗子弹摆平这家伙了。
E: Tch, totally misjudged you. Guess I'll need to use a few extra fudgin' bullets on this guy.

C: 但身为你的从者，我会贯彻你的意志的。
E: But as your Servant, I'll follow your commands.

C: 唉，你感受不到{RUBY_B#我们}观众{RUBY_E#}耐心的极限…只是用无休无止、烂俗到爆、没有声音、连内容都不再刺激的血浆片情节浪费大家的时间。
E: *sigh* You can't feel the limits of {RUBY_B#our}the audience's{RUBY_E#} patience... It's just an endless, cliché-ridden, silent series of utterly unexciting gore. What a waste of everyone's time.

C: 呵，偏偏是在这种地方被人承认了，不甘心啊。
E: Heh. I'd rather not be recognized for THOSE achievements.

C: 瞧见我手里的电锯了吗？在Assassin的力量加持下，这两把沾满毒药的电锯，能在瞬间发动三次无敌的斩击！两把电锯就是六次！
E: You see these chainsaws in my hands? With Assassin's power, these two poisoned saws can cut three times in the blink of an eye! That's six cuts in one go!

C: 离开空间站后，列车一路风尘仆仆，几乎没有停下来整顿的时间。就把这阵子当作假期的尾声，好好利用吧。
E: The Express has been on the go almost the whole time since we left the space station. We've barely had any time to catch our breath. Let's take this as an opportunity to wrap up our vacation instead, and make the most out of this break.

C: 可关于那位家主，我还知道另一种说法……
E: I've heard another theory about that family head, though...

C: 你可真会惹是生非。那么多条路，偏偏往猎犬眼皮子底下钻。
E: You sure have a knack for stirring up trouble. Of all the routes available, you had to take the one that Bloodhound's keeping watch over.

C: 列车受人所托，要送一位搭车客返回故乡，我们只是在匹诺康尼短暂歇脚……
E: The Express has been commissioned to send a passenger back home. We're just resting up in Penacony for a while before we depart.

C: 挑战大失败。
E: We failed the challenge. Terribly.

C: 好像还是没商量出什么来啊……
E: Tsk, looks like they still haven't decided on anything yet...

C: 那…可有印象深刻之处？
E: Was there anything particularly memorable?

C: 想到这里，小女子才释然了许多，也总算明白了该如何向二位开口。
E: That thought has brought me great comfort, and now I know how to speak to you properly.

C: 别想了，不卖。
E: Hard pass.

C: 也不全是坏处，现在和驭空大人掰掰腕子，兴许赢的会是我？
E: Also, it's not all bad. I might even beat you at arm wrestling now.

C: 要知道，策杖独行、蚯蚓降龙…能让将帅无计可施的，总是些无名的小卒子。
E: Remember, it's often the unassuming pawns — the lone traveler or the worm that subdues the dragon — that leave even the best strategists helpless.

C: 原来是一位筑梦师，感谢你们的辛苦付出，梦境才能从危机中恢复过来。
E: Oh, you're a Dreamweaver. Thank you for all your hard work. You all are the reason the Dreamscape has been able to recover from this crisis.

C: 我吗？
E: Me?

C: 总之，我的观点和杨叔不同……
E: In any case, I'm gonna have to disagree with Mr. Yang...

C: 送去公司手里吧！
E: Send him back to the IPC, then!

C: 呃…怎么了，黑塔女士？
E: Er... What's wrong, Madam Herta?

C: 「蛮不讲理模块」…也关闭了？这个更不合理，我前几天才检查过一遍，确保所有人偶都开着它……
E: And the "Utterly Absurd Module"... has also been disabled? Something's definitely wrong here. I checked a couple days ago to make sure every puppet has it switched on...

C: 嘻…我有些头绪了，有趣。
E: Heh... I think I know what this is about now. This is interesting.

C: …无妨，请给我们看看吧。
E: ...We may as well take a look at it.

C: 你口中的「进退两难」——要不展开说说吧，杨先生？
E: Elaborate a little on this "rock and a hard place" you're caught between?

C: 我们上。
E: Let's do this.

C: 我也在分析各种可能，但…还没想通。或许这里和雅利洛-Ⅵ一样，在很久以前接入过银轨？可如果是这样，智库里不可能没有记录……
E: I've been trying to come up with possible theories for that, though the answer still eludes me. Perhaps like Jarilo-VI, Amphoreus was served by the silver rail eons ago? But the data bank would at least have some record on the planet if it were true...

C: 哎呀，别把气氛弄得这么沉重嘛。总之，{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}圣城{RUBY_E#}是绝对安全的，到那里就没事啦。
E: Hey now, don't be so serious. You're bringing the mood down. Anyway, in short, {RUBY_B#Okhema}the holy city{RUBY_E#} is absolutely safe. Everything will be fine once we get there.

C: 还有那座城门，也记录下来吧。
E: Don't forget the city gate, too.

C: 淌着黄金血的人，总有异于凡众之处，在我身上便是「感官」。无需再借由光明丈量世界，风儿会顺着金线为我捎来讯息，将千丝万缕送往指尖。
E: Those with golden blood always have something extraordinary about them. For me, it's perception. I don't need light to measure the world — the wind carries messages along golden threads, delivering countless sensations to my fingertips.

C: 聆听浴场精灵的故事
E: Listen to the bath sprite's tale

C: 「所以，大家明白了嘛？一定要吃饱喝好、坚持锻炼，这样长大后才有可能成为大英雄，为翁法罗斯献出自己的力量——」
E: "So, here's the takeaway: Eat well and train well, so you can grow up into a powerful hero and do your part for Amphoreus!"

C: 比起这个，沟通之谜才是更大的问题。
E: That's nowhere near as puzzling as how we have a common tongue.

C: 太对了，哥。
E: Well said, my friend!

C: …来了，你的客人。
E: ...Here, your guests are.

C: 放在地上？
E: On the ground?

C: 没错——就在此处！
E: That's right — right here, right now!

C: …两位朋友，你们不愿透露实情，背后一定有自己的苦衷，我不会刁难。
E: ...My dear friends, I know that you must have your own reasons to hide the truth. I shall not make things difficult for you.

C: 比起他的安危，二位还是先考虑下流言的影响吧。虽然没人相信达米亚诺斯口中的天外之界，但粉霞天女已经传得到处都是了。
E: Instead of worrying about his safety, perhaps you guys should worry about the impact of the rumors. Although no one believes what Damionis said about a world beyond the sky, the Rosy Celestial Maiden has already spread everywhere.

C: 钟表小子没有反应。
E: Clockie doesn't react.

C: 这边的浴池水温…很低。
E: The water in this bath... is very cold.

C: 你的消息似乎很灵通。
E: It seems like you're very well-informed.

C: 缇宝老师，你上网吗？
E: Tribbie, do you surf the web?

C: 这下乐不思车了。
E: I don't want to go back to the Astral Express anymore.

C: 为了圣城，我愿拾起世间所有被人嫌恶的特质，用尽冰冷但有效的手腕。
E: For the holy city, I am willing to bear all the traits that others despise and use every heartless yet effective trick in the book.

C: 请…放松。
E: Please... relax.

C: …啊，是我有些兴奋了，抱歉，你们在翁法罗斯的第一天已经够漫长了。
E: Ah, my apologies. I got a bit carried away. It's been a long first day for you here on Amphoreus.

C: …差点就忘了，幸好你还记得这事。
E: ...I almost forgot. Good thing you still remembered that.

C: 那救世的神谕浑浊不清。它撺掇我们挑战众神，却从未告知预言中的「明天」是何模样。
E: The prophecy of deliverance is nothing if not ambiguous. It urges us to defy the gods yet refrains from providing a clear glimpse of what lies ahead.

C: 英雄们，请安静。
E: Heroes, your attention please.

C: 黄金裔等待已久的时刻终于到来。前路已经明朗：战胜狂暴的「天谴之矛」{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，将「纷争」的火种带回奥赫玛，为神谕中的奇迹添薪。
E: The awaited moment has finally arrived for the Chrysos Heirs. Our path forward is now clear: Vanquish {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the violent Lance of Fury, and bring the Coreflame of Strife back to Okhema to fuel the prophesized miracle.

C: …我明白了。
E: ...I understand.

C: 不过这也有个出口，不知道通往什么地方……
E: But there's another exit here. I wonder where it leads.

C: 赶路要紧，先不问了。
E: Let's get a move on. I'll stop with the questions.

C: 别忘了，我们会站在此处是因为你的坚持。那就拿出那该死的觉悟。
E: Remember, you insisted that we come here. Now, show us that cursed resolve!

C: 「嗯…稍微需要些想象力。」
E: "Hmm... This requires a bit of imagination."

C: 缇安老师，请你回去休息吧。也许很快又会需要你的帮助。
E: Go get some rest, Trianne. We might need your help again before you know it.

C: 借用跟统一阵线终归是两回事。假如那位泰坦不愿与我们合作…武力是最后的解决方式。
E: It's one thing to use their powers and another to be aligned with us in war. If that Titan refuses to be on our side... we'll have to resort to a fight.

C: 接下来的每一步都至关重要。这不止关系到万敌…还有圣城的全体公民。
E: Important decisions will be waiting for us every step of the way. What we're about to do will not only determine Mydei's fate... but also that of every single resident in Okhema.

C: 「神迹」…居然是一种强迫泰坦服从的方式吗？
E: Are we... actually forcing the Titans to do our bidding with these miracles?

C: 我放弃！直接让我过关吧！
E: I give up! Just let me pass!

C: 这一切都不合逻辑…
E: All of this does not make sense...

C: 迷迷…称呼，暂时。
E: Mem... Address. Temporarily.

C: 胜利，胜利！
E: Victory, victory!

C: 发生什么了吗？我…我也不知道该不该这样问你。我只是…想表达一些关心，对同伴的关心。
E: What happened? I... I don't actually know whether I should ask you this question. But... I just wanted to express my concern, for my companion.

C: 啊…「天外之界的神明，难以用肉眼直视的奇迹」…对吗？
E: Ahh... A god from the worlds beyond the sky. A miracle that is hard to see with the naked eye... Right?

C: 收集记忆，重现过去…该怎么做？我们不剩多少时间了。
E: Collect the memories and recreate the past... How can we do that? We don't have much time left.

C: 悬锋城最上等的石料，拿来。纷争泰坦的黄金血，找来。剑皿，我会锻造。
E: The finest stones in Kremnos, give me. The golden blood of Strife Titan, find me. The Sword Vessel, I shall craft.

C: 看这意思，你答应下来了？
E: Does that mean we have a deal?

C: 那…小白他们提到的「渗透」，你有头绪了吗？
E: So, about the "infiltration" Snowy mentioned earlier, did you find anything?

C: （渗透…这绝非{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}清醒时会做出的行为。）
E: (Infiltration... {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} would never resort to this if they were in their right mind.)

C: 神有神的耳目，人也有人的应对。待到所谓的「神谕」破灭之时…奥赫玛的命运会重新被公民握在手中。
E: While gods see and hear more extensively, mortals have their own means of dealing with things. When that so-called prophecy crumbles... the destiny of Okhema shall once again rest in the grasp of its people.

C: 看来此时的悬锋城正在举办祭典，胜出的战士可以觐见城主，获得荣耀。和达米亚诺斯先生说的一样。
E: Kremnos seems to be hosting a festival, where its victor can go on to have an audience with the ruler and be bestowed with honor. It's just as Mr. Damionis described.

C: 遐蝶小心翼翼地接过武器，放在手中仔细端详了片刻……
E: Castorice carefully takes the weapon in her hand and examines it closely for a moment...

C: 看来这种野蛮的方式奏效了。
E: This barbaric method of theirs clearly proved to be effective.

C: 咳…咳，咳……
E: *cough* *cough* *cough*

C: 「坚韧。」
E: "Tenacity."

C: 我能听到…我听到了。
E: I can hear... I hear it.

C: 嗯…只剩下这最后一步了。
E: Yes... There is just one last thing to do.

C: 去典籍那里回收「奇迹」吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: Let's recover the miracle from the tome, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 不回去吗，遐蝶？
E: Aren't you coming with us, Castorice?

C: 当你身处奇异的睡梦时，奥赫玛的另一处……
E: While you were having the strange dream, somewhere else in Okhema...

C: 击溃…我内心的恐惧？
E: Vanquish... the fears in my heart?

C: 我认可他的力量，但恐惧——再利的剑也斩不断恐惧。
E: I acknowledge his strength, but... fear is something not even the sharpest of swords can cut through.

C: 看来也没有别的选择。
E: Looks like there's no other way.

C: 她的遗物里有诗歌、词典，最多的还是悲喜剧的剧本，涉及神话的书上会有划线和笔记，她的字迹很优雅。
E: Among the things she left behind are poems, dictionaries, and many tragicomedy scripts. She even clearly underlined and took notes in books that covered myths with her elegant handwriting.

C: 接受泰坦试炼的感觉很奇妙…我词穷，没法准确形容，你只能自行体会了。
E: Accepting a Titan's trial is a very peculiar experience... I'm afraid that I'm not able to accurately describe it. You can only go and experience it for yourself.

C: …解脱…解脱？
E: ...Freedom... Freedom?

C: 你或缺之物……
E: What you lack...

C: （立刻回头，吓遐蝶一跳…）
E: (Spin around immediately, and give Castorice a scare...)

C: （看来没别的事了，回去和丹恒聊聊吧。）
E: (I don't think there's anything else to do here. Time to go back and talk to Dan Heng.)

C: 呵呵，见风使舵也不失为一种辩论的智慧哪……
E: Hehe, being an opportunist could very well be a facet of wisdom...

C: 我说了，走，走远点！别像个疯人自言自语，妨碍我冥想！
E: Didn't you hear me? I asked you to leave! Go as far away from here as possible! Don't mutter to yourself like some sort of madman and disturb my meditation!

C: 黄金裔们呼唤战争，我们就回应以战争。冲突必将发生：既然阿格莱雅妄图用金血的力量压制善良的民众，我们就不惮彰显奥赫玛公民应有的权利和气概。
E: Well, since the Chrysos Heirs are calling for war, we will respond in kind. Conflict is inevitable. Since Aglaea endeavors to suppress the virtuous commoners with blood of gold, we will not hesitate to display the rights and mettle that the citizens of Okhema are so entitled to.

C: 以死证道，正合我意。
E: Using death to prove myself fits my intentions perfectly.

C: 她只需要唯命是从的附庸。
E: She just needs vassals who will do her bidding without question.

C: 啊呀…吾可不记得有这样的回忆，只怕是错觉吧？
E: No, I have no such memory. Could you be hallucinating?

C: 哎呀，真是的…早知道要爬这山，吾便拒绝汝等邀请了……
E: Tsk... If I knew we had to climb a mountain, I wouldn't have come along with you...

C: 事已至此，先睡觉吧。
E: There's nothing more we can do for now. Let's get some rest.

C: 阁下依旧这么有活力，我也心安了些。
E: I'm glad to see you're as full of life as ever.

C: 我…别无选择……
E: I... never had a choice...

C: 似乎由于某种力量限制，它无法被修复。
E: Due to some kind of power restriction, it cannot be repaired.

C: 查看右边的黄金短矛。
E: Inspect the right Golden Short Spear.

C: 见到你对待大地兽也如此郑重，她总计十二分的复杂情感立刻转变为十分佩服。
E: Seeing you treat the dromas with such seriousness, all twelve parts of her complex emotions immediately transformed into one of admiration.

C: 钱不需要可以捐给我…
E: If you don't want the money, I'd gladly take it off your hands...

C: 阁下…还好吧？
E: Are you feeling alright?

C: 妈妈说让我们先走，可她一直没有过来。
E: Mommy told us to go ahead first, but she's still not here yet.

C: 一，二，三…已经数不过来天数了。
E: One, two, three... I don't even know how many days have passed since then.

C: 我们得先回到「现在」，才能和他们交流。
E: We must first return to "the present" before we can communicate with them.

C: 而其余的…灵识尽失，日渐腐朽。
E: As for the rest of the scouts... They've completely lost their souls and are decaying by the day.

C: 重复播放了？
E: Is he set to loop on repeat?

C: 他们的神情如此骄傲，以至于让我认为…假若「死亡」真的只是某位神明无心降下的权职，那对他们的尊严是种侮辱。
E: They had such proud expressions... Expressions that made me believe "Death" would be an insult to these mortals if the concept is truly a power that a god had carelessly cast down upon the world.

C: 养迷迷千日，用迷迷一时。
E: One minute of Mem being useful comes from a thousand days of training Mem.

C: 千万次…我已挣脱过死亡的枷锁。此次…也不例外。
E: I have broken free from the chains of death countless times... This time will be no different.

C: 不必担心，长老。您看周围…这里已是亡魂的归处。
E: There's no need to worry, Elder. Take a look around you... You're already at the resting place of the dead.

C: 就像现在这样。
E: Just like what you are doing now.

C: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的生之半身，「赐予死亡」的永生之人…这就是我强加于你的诅咒。
E: The half of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} that represents life, the undying human who "grants death"... That was the curse I forced upon you.

C: 我的人生并没有虚度。对我而言，你不曾做错过什么。
E: I lived my life well. It didn't go to waste. As far as I'm concerned, you did nothing wrong.

C: 「过去的宝箱」被留了下来，可里面的财宝却没有留下……
E: A "Chest of the Past" has been left behind, but none of its treasures remain inside...

C: *观众议论纷纷*
E: *crowd chatter*

C: 你还是这么有活力。
E: You're still as energetic as always.

C: …我同意。
E: ...I agree.

C: 准确地说…是「死亡」和「生命」。
E: For Life and Death, to be more precise.

C: 找回前世记忆？自然不在话下。况且，不还有你么？
E: It goes without saying I'll find a way to retrieve memories of my past life. Besides, I still have you, don't I?

C: 观看您的工作过程令我深受启发，女士。我很难想象，一位像您这样卓越的学者，平日的状态竟如此…松弛。
E: Madam, watching you work has been an enlightening experience for me. It's hard to imagine that an outstanding scholar like you could maintain such a... relaxed manner most of the time.

C: 接下来…该怎么进入翁法罗斯内部呢？
E: Now then... How am I going to get into Amphoreus?

C: 那刻夏老师——
E: Professor Anaxa...

C: …我可不会唱什么泰坦赞歌。
E: ...Titan hymns are beyond me.

C: 「传说的黄金世，快回到人间！」
E: "O legendary Era Chrysea, return to the mortal realm!"

C: 可惜，树庭对{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的研究仍以「敬拜学派」为主，大多是些祭祀的仪式。对更外侧的探讨，在天舟一事后越发式微，连这份卷轴我也是第一次看见。
E: It's a shame that the majority of the Grove's research on {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} was headed by the Venerationists, with sacrificial rituals making up a predominant part of their findings. Discourse about more esoteric subject matters in relation to {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} dwindled even further after the skyship incident, so much so that even this scroll is completely new to me.

C: 依照神话所述，海洋、天空、大地都是泰坦的造物，确凿无疑。
E: As told in the myths, the seas, the skies, and the earth are all, beyond the shadow of a doubt, creations of the Titans.

C: 树庭都成这样了，小小打破一下禁令也没事吧…对不住啦那刻夏老师。
E: With the Grove in this state, I'm sure Anaxa won't be mad even if we sneak into the lab for a short while... Right?

C: 啊！难道说……
E: Ah! I just thought of something...

C: …我同意交换。
E: ...As you wish.

C: 不错，因为我现在是个活死人。但这不重要，重要的是——我听到了一众英雄人物的谈话。
E: Yes — I am but a living dead man now — but that's not important. What truly matters is — I overheard a conversation between heroes.

C: 尽情摇唇鼓舌吧。逐火之旅已是神谕写定的事实，我们不会失败。
E: Wag your tongue as much as you like. Since the Flame-Chase Journey has been preordained by the prophecy, our failure has never been on the cards.

C: …直到？
E: ...Until?

C: 直到什么呢？其实我也不知道。
E: Until...? Actually, I don't know what happened next either.

C: 凡人终有一死。日后，一定会有我无比珍视的人离我而去……
E: Death is inevitable. In the days to come, I am certain that someone whom I cherish deeply will leave me for good...

C: 我们…继续吧。
E: Let's... keep going.

C: 嗯，应该是他们千年前留下的残忆。
E: Yes, those are remnants of their memories from a thousand years ago.

C: 我们是塞涅俄丝大人的虔诚信众…我们绝不会背弃她！反倒是这群鼠辈…他们才是背刺英雄的愚氓！
E: We are devout disciples of Lady Seliose... We would never betray her! It's those rats... they are the fools who backstabbed our hero!

C: 天象画壁对世间气象的掌控早已被切断了，这里发生的一切不会影响到地上…希望如此。
E: The mural's control over the weather was severed long ago. Whatever happens here shouldn't affect the world below... or so I hope.

C: *我首倡，由在座的诸位为逝者送上祝福：我们敬爱的大司铎福罗斯，于早些时候魂归了天父刻法勒的怀抱。愿他安息……*
E: First, let us offer our blessings to the departed. Our beloved Chaplain Phoros has returned to the embrace of Sky Father Kephale. May he rest in peace...

C: 索拉比斯阁下，露奈比斯阁下……
E: Lord Solabis, Lady Lunabis...
Hehe...

C: 很遗憾，串流投影算力不足，我无法对命途能量展开分析。
E: Alas, without sufficient computational power in the stream projection, I am unable to analyze the Path Energy.

C: 哎唷，别跑别跑——我是真的赛飞儿，如假包换！
E: Ah! Don't run! I'm the real Cipher! The real one!

C: 来吧，按照之前说好的，我要买下你这里最值钱的衣服！
E: Come on, as we agreed, I want to buy the most valuable clothes you have!

C: …什么啊，原来你以前见过？我还以为能让你大吃一惊呢。嘁，扫兴。
E: ...Wait, you've seen one before? And here I thought I'd leave you speechless. Ugh, what a letdown.
(Hmph...)

C: 还用我指挥吗？开挖吧。
E: Do I need to give instructions here? Get digging!

C: 就说难不倒我吧，桀桀桀！
E: Told you nothing can stump me, hehe!

C: 欠下的钱，我会还给你…我保证。
E: I will pay back the amount I owe... I promise.

C: 既不回应挑衅，看上去也不打算动武——那他们究竟在等什么？
E: Are not responding to provocations, nor do they seem intent on fighting. What exactly are they waiting for?

C: 伙计，有点帅。
E: Bro, you sound so cool.

C: 那碗燕麦粥的味道…我还记得哦。
E: I still remember the taste of that oatmeal...

C: 此刻，城中的金线已经散去，我却没有看到任何人在为脱离掌控雀跃欢呼。在空荡的市集和浴宫，我只把一种情绪收入眼中：不安。
E: The golden threads that once bound this city have unraveled, yet no one is celebrating their freedom from control. In the empty markets and bath chambers, one feeling lingers: Unease.

C: 可即便如此，警报也没有彻底解除。「清洗者」的领袖，元老凯妮斯——我们至今没能找到她的下落。
E: But they didn't get everybody. To this day, we still haven't found Elder Caenis — the leader of the "Cleaners."

C: 身为「诡计」的半神，恐怕这世界上没有比你更具威力的底牌了——你认为呢，赛飞儿小姐？
E: As the demigod of Trickery, there are no other trump cards in the world that can out-rank you — I'm sure you know the answer to your own question, Miss Cipher.

C: 嘟嘟！嘟！
E: Doot-Doot! Doot!

C: 以及，根据法吉娜祭司们的设计——「入口亦为出口」。待你见完先祖的灵魂，就通过涡心回到这里吧——我和小伊卡会在原地等你。
E: And as Phagousa's priests designed it — "the entrance serves as the exit." You'll need to come back through the vortex once you've met your ancestor's spirit. Little Ica and I will be here waiting.

C: 小姑娘，要学会优先保护好自己，别什么事都太拼命哈。瞧这张脸蛋，还挺可爱的，别叫艾格勒的爪子挠花了……
E: You've gotta look out for yourself, girl! Don't push yourself too hard. I'd hate to see that cute face all scratched up by Aquila's claws...

C: 您还记得…在我刚满八周岁时，您和父亲带我参加人生中第一次天空祭礼时的情境吗？
E: Do you remember that... you and Father took me to my very first Sky Rite when I was eight?

C: 那你一定要仔细聆听，我最亲爱的小蜂鸟。毕竟，这就是最后一次了……
E: Then, listen closely, my dearest hummingbird. After all, this will be the last time...

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了。
E: Ah, there you are, {NICKNAME}.

C: 它急促的呼吸掀起了风暴，将你我都卷入了其中。风堇，你作为旁观者见证了四枚火种的回归……
E: Its hurried gasps have sparked a tempest, sweeping all of us along. Hyacine, as an observer, you've witnessed the return of four Coreflames...

C: 明白！只要找到散落在附近的记忆就行了，对吧？简单，给人家一点时间……
E: Got it! We just need to find the scattered memory nearby, right? That's simple. Give me a little time...

C: 我…还无法确定。大概要接近一些才好判断。
E: I'm... not entirely sure. We might be able to tell if we get closer.

C: *低吼*
E: *roaring*

C: 马呀，你说话了！
E: Hold your horses, you're actually speaking!

C: 我选择相信！一切承诺打破旧世强加于我们的枷锁，带给我们掀开新篇章的预兆…我唯有相信！
E: I choose to believe in that prophecy! I must believe in any sign that promises to break the chains imposed on us by the old era... Any sign that will lead us to a new chapter of the world!

C: 真相如何，也只有在打倒它以后才能获知了。
E: Regardless, we can only know the truth after we've defeated them.

C: 他们退化成了失去理性，同类相残的兽。不…这种说法是对兽性的侮辱。即便在翁法罗斯最荒蛮的山林间，我和索拉比斯亦从未目睹过那般疯狂。
E: They regressed into senseless beasts that devoured their own kin. No... that would be an insult to beasts. Solabis and I have never witnessed such madness, not even in the wildest corners of Amphoreus.

C: 你们履行了自己的职责，卫士…安歇吧。
E: You have fulfilled your duty, guards... Rest now.

C: 静下心来，寻找出路……
E: Deep breaths, and find the way out...

C: 雅辛忒丝…谢谢。
E: Hyacinthia... thank you.

C: 也许吧，但……
E: Perhaps, but...

C: 走…我们必须离开这里——
E: Come on... We have to get out of here.

C: 缇宁老师……
E: Trinnon...

C: 翁法罗斯人总把「宿命」挂在嘴边…那「开拓」的宿命，就是总会把每个世界的存亡与我们自身系在一起。
E: Amphoreans often speak of "destiny"... The destiny of the Trailblaze is to bind the life and death of every world to our own existence.

C: 你和丹恒教会了我何为「开拓」的精神，伙计。我做过最正确的决定，就是跟从了自己的直觉，选择相信你们。
E: Friend, you and Dan Heng taught me the spirit of Trailblazing. The best decision I ever made in my life was when I followed my intuition and chose to trust you.

C: 喂喂，你现在态度可得放尊重点呀，小鬼！因为整个世界都在觊觎的那颗火种……
E: Hey, you'd better watch your tone, brat! That Coreflame that the entire world is after...

C: 哈托努斯说，<color=#dbc291ff>缇宁老师有火种的消息——</color>
E: Chartonus said that <color=#dbc291ff>Trinnon had news of the Coreflame...</color>

C: 逐火小队齐心作战，终于击败了人神合一的「天空」泰坦。众人正欲逃离晨昏之眼，黎明机器却在此时突然熄灭，风堇不得不提前归还火种，并留在天空承载神权、庇佑民众。
E: The Flame-Chasers fight together to defeat the Sky Titan, which has become a combined being of the god and a mortal. As they are trying to escape from the Eye of Twilight, the Dawn Device suddenly goes out, and Hyacine is forced to return the Coreflame early and remain in the sky to bear divine authority, becoming the protector of the people.

C: …不愧为「开拓者」。
E: ...How befitting of a Trailblazer.

C: 不用再多试探了，我心意已决。
E: Enough testing. I've made my decision.

C: 我不求凭只言片语能换取阁下的信任，但请至少相信：从宏观角度而言，你我所行的道路并无区别。
E: I don't expect you to trust me based on words alone. But believe this much: When you look at the bigger picture, we're walking the same path, you and I.

C: 在那创世的终点过后，美丽的新世界里。
E: In that brave new world, beyond the end of Genesis.

C: 你好，我是星核猎手。
E: Greetings. I'm the Stellaron Hunter.

C: 阳光下的谷仓，散发着麦子烂熟的气味。从麦草堆里翻出了松鼠们囤积的各类果实，还有…一个缺胳膊少腿的木头小人。
E: In the sunlit barn, amid the scent of ripened wheat, they found various fruits hoarded by squirrels, and... a wooden figurine missing arms and legs.

C: 等等，这不是当年被皮西厄斯老师没收的那个么？嘿，这下总算又团圆了……
E: Hey, this is the one Mrs. Pythias confiscated! Finally back in my hands...

C: 哇！白厄哥哥小时候的心愿，我要看！
E: Ooh, I wanna see! What did little Phainon wish for?

C: …有点遗憾哪。
E: Kind of disappointing, isn't it...

C: 不如担心一下，自己会不会被小妖精们拒绝吧。毕竟，迷路迷境实行的是「邀请制」，只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入呢。
E: Maybe worry more about whether the fairies will let you in! After all the Membrance Maze has an "invitation-only" rule, only children with pure hearts are welcomed.

C: 你不会也是幕后黑手吧。
E: Don't tell me you're behind all this.

C: 呵呵，放心吧。还记得吗？我说过，只要世上还有人能吟唱歌谣，迷境的孩子就会一直存在——
E: No need to fuss, my child. You haven't forgotten, have you? As long as our songs are sung, the children of the maze will live on—

C: 「侍女」牌，有点轻盈的分量，带着冰凉的安提灵花的香气，就像天上的繁星。
E: This card, the Servant, is surprisingly light, bearing the cool scent of Antila flowers, just like starlight.

C: 这群丑陋的虫豸，不配假借着「人治」的名头再出现在奥赫玛了。
E: These crawling parasites have no place in Okhema, especially not under the deceitful claim of "human rule."

C: 听起来都是很好的心愿，连我也会心中生出向往。
E: Those wishes... are truly wonderful. They even stir something deep inside me...

C: 还真是充满希望的回答…我喜欢。
E: That's... wonderfully optimistic. I like it.

C: 呀！这是……
E: What... what's happening?

C: 他并非漫无目的。在少年心底，始终有一道呼声指引他前进：承应心愿，履险蹈危，只为行力所能及之事，拯救一切应被拯救的人。
E: Yet he did not walk without purpose. Deep in his heart, a voice always guided him forward to fulfill the wishes he had inherited, to brave peril, and to do all that was within his power to save those who needed saving.

C: 「无妨。我的性命本就微不足道。」
E: "No matter. My existence is of no consequence."

C: 因为我也忘不了哀丽秘榭的田野、红叶，树下有我的小秋千，我会在上面做甜甜的梦。还有迷路迷境的小妖精们，想到再也见不到它们，心就会很痛很痛……
E: I am with you because I remember it all too. The fields of Aedes Elysiae, those red leaves, that little swing of mine beneath the tree where I'd dream the sweetest dreams. And those dear fairies in the Lost Maze... It hurts so much knowing they're gone forever...

C: 你刚才去哪儿了？
E: Where did you disappear to?

C: 动身吧，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}已献出它的火种。为了翁法罗斯，我们必须在下一个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}前完成「再创世」！
E: Let's move. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has given their Coreflame. We must complete the Era Nova before the next {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}... for Amphoreus!

C: 然后…再成为照亮新世界的第一缕火光。
E: And then... rise as the first light of a new world.

C: 「再创世」的道路，我已行尽……
E: My journey to the Era Nova... it ends here...

C: 真是寒碜的「再创世」啊，救世小子。
E: Now this is one sorry excuse for an Era Nova, Deliverer boy.

C: 很遗憾，这不是一场规则公平的游戏。我拥有近乎无穷的时光和耐心，可以与你在世界尽头再相遇亿万次、乃至又一个亿万次……
E: How unfortunate. This was never a fair game. I have all the time and patience in the world. I can wait for you at the end of history another billion times... and another billion after that.

C: 再度…开启一切……
E: To once again... start everything...

C: 自此，旧王朝的孑遗，<color=#dbc291ff>「凯撒」刻律德菈</color>向天下号令，召集各邦黄金裔英雄，向泰坦宣战——
E: From that moment, the sole survivor of the old dynasty, <color=#dbc291ff>Imperator Cerydra</color>, issued a call to arms across the lands, summoning heroic Chrysos Heirs to wage war on the Titans—

C: 以免你误会，无名剑士：虽然这一路有说有笑，但我可从没说过你有权利觐见她。
E: To avoid any misunderstandings, nameless swordmaster: Although we spoke and laughed along the way, I never said you were entitled to meet her.

C: 或者，兑现命运的不止他们。只是我已记不清了。
E: Or perhaps, it wasn't just they who fulfilled their fates. I can't quite remember all this.

C: 那道大门…我要穿过它吗？
E: So I just... walk through that gate?

C: 我记不得那三千万个轮回里发生了什么，却记得{NICKNAME}为这个世界做了什么。
E: I can't remember what happened in those thirty million cycles, but I remember what you, {NICKNAME}, did for this world.

C: 这算愿望成真了吗？
E: Then is this my wish coming true?

C: 稍等，很快就好啦。
E: Hold on. I'll be done in a sec!

C: 一个人的性格就是{F#她}{M#他}的命运，当你选择登上那辆列车的时候，属于你的英雄之旅…就已经启程啦。
E: A person's personality is their destiny. Your own Hero's Journey already started... the moment you decided to board that Express.

C: >>>KaLos<unbreak>618</unbreak>，原动力：██，泰坦权能：浪漫，命途：██<<<
E: >>>KaLos<unbreak>618</unbreak>, Primum Mobile: ██████████, Titan Authority: Romance, Path: ██████<<<

C: 「智识」——它曾是造物主的母语，是上帝之笔，也是自由意志最早写下的抒情诗。
E: The Erudition... it was once the mother tongue of the Creator, the pen of divinity, and the first lyrical verse ever written by free will.

C: 那些沉尸水底的元老，就是忤逆凯撒者最好的表率。
E: Those Elders who lie at the bottom of the lake are the best example of what happens when you disobey the Imperator.

C: 气氛还真是凝重啊……
E: Things feel pretty tense here...

C: 那么，祝诸君安好…散会。
E: Then, I bid you all farewell... Meeting adjourned.

C: 哦？「神谕之子」…呵呵，稀客啊。
E: Oh? "Children of the Prophecy"... Hehe, such rare guests.

C: 啊，对了。几位若是还想入浴，就抓紧时间吧……
E: Ah, by the way, if you still want to bathe, hurry up...

C: 呵…以欢宴作为猎杀欢宴之神的序曲，以蜜酿作为祭奠蜜酿之祖的贡品，真是荒诞。
E: Hah... A banquet to prelude the hunt for the god of banquets, and honey brew as a tribute to commemorate the ancestor of honey brew... How absurd.

C: 「专人」…「妥善」…尽是些微妙的词呢。
E: "Looked after appropriately"? "Dedicated staff"? Talk about a vague choice of words...

C: 凯撒？那*我们*不知道哦。
E: The Imperator? No. We haven't.

C: 不许喝！
E: No drinking on the job!

C: 总觉得海瑟音小姐想和我们谈些什么…先配合她吧？
E: I feel like Miss Hysilens wants to talk to us about something... Why don't we go along with her for now?

C: 海瑟音小姐，能答应我一个请求吗？
E: Can you promise me something, Miss Hysilens?

C: …倘若那些文明不像你所说的这般虚弱，倒还有及锋一试的价值。
E: ...If those civilizations are not as feeble as you describe, then they may still have some value in testing the quality of my blade.

C: 来吧，证明你们的实力：让我见识所谓「命途」的力量。我费心尽力将这天外奇珍收入囊中，正是为了这一刻。
E: Come and prove your strength to me. Show me the power of these so-called "Paths." I have spent much time and effort to secure this treasure from beyond the sky just for this moment.

C: …亲爱的{NICKNAME}♭
E: ...My dear {NICKNAME}♭

C: 「…五十年后，来古士再次率军进攻奥赫玛。他单刀直入圣城，摧毁云石天宫，世人称之为『第三次奥赫玛围城战』。」
E: "Fifty years later, Lygus led his forces once again to Okhema. He charged directly into the holy city and razed the Marmoreal Palace. History would name this battle 'The Third Siege of Okhema'."

C: 接下来，{NICKNAME}就要前往斯缇科西亚，找到由「海洋」半神守卫的涡心入口，然后奔向决战的舞台啦。
E: Next, {NICKNAME} will head to Styxia and find the Vortex's entrance guarded by the demigod of Ocean, before charging toward the final battlefield.

C: 游鱼天性趋光，因为海渊昏暗苍茫……
E: Fish are drawn to light by nature, for the deep sea knows only gloom...

C: （过不去…看来得借助旁边的「奇迹宝珠」了。）
E: (Can't get through... looks like I'll need the Miracle Orb nearby.)

C: 最后的半神…我来了。
E: The last demigod... I'm here.

C: 「断锋爵」拉比努斯，生于光历<unbreak>3743</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
E: "Dux Fragoris" Labienus. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3743</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而吕枯耳戈斯，只是其中之一。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>As for Lycurgus, he is only one of these nine vessels.</color>

C: 用天外的话说，我似乎是被称作<color=#dbc291ff>「忆灵」</color>的存在。刚刚好，这样人家就能担当「记忆」的载体，为决战也出一份力啦。
E: Yes. I seem to be something you folks beyond the sky call a <color=#dbc291ff>"memosprite,"</color> but that's fine by me. It suits me perfectly. I can serve as the vessel of memories and do my part for the final battle.

C: 这座空间站很漂亮吧，{NICKNAME}？不过，等你跟着星穹列车再走远点儿——不出两站吧——就会知道这景色也不算什么。
E: Pretty nice space station, huh, {NICKNAME}? But just wait. After a couple more stops on the Astral Express, you'll see sights that'll make this place look ordinary.

C: 回到大守护者和她的贝洛伯格——您看，他们不也找到了和平走向群星的方法么？
E: Coming back to the Supreme Guardian and her Belobog... Didn't they find a peaceful way to enter the interstellar community?

C: 非常好。现在他们一无退路、二无援兵、三无火力支援，我军必能迅速解放神悟树庭。
E: Very good. They now have no way out, no reinforcements, and no artillery support. We will be able to liberate the Grove of Epiphany in the blink of an eye.

C: 「都不是。凯撒只看到水面波光粼粼，像极了恩师首度同自己对弈的那个下午，那面由日影分界的粗粝棋盘——」
E: "It was neither. The Imperator only saw how the surface of the water gleamed like that crude chessboard, dissected by light and shadow, in the afternoon when her teacher played against her for the first time."

C: 时间回到不久前，你归还了「负世」火种以后……
E: Not long ago, after you returned the Coreflame of Worldbearing...

C: 你又如何能确信，这些势力没有怀着自己的目的，企图为「列神之战」抢占先机？
E: How can you be certain that these powers don't have their own end goals, waiting to seize an advantage in the "war among the Aeons"?

C: 我向你承诺，星穹列车一定能在那新世界中重逢。
E: I promise you that the Astral Express Crew will definitely see each other again in that new world.

C: 这些黑色的浮游物，我仿佛在哪里见过……
E: I feel like I've seen these floating black things somewhere before...

C: 却失去了那段记忆。
E: But I've lost that memory.

C: 尚未被忆庭的黑暗面沾染，是你最宝贵的品质。
E: Your most precious quality is how you've yet to be tainted by the Garden's dark side.

C: 她被困住了？
E: Is she stuck?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>访问失败。错误码：γ<unbreak>-13</unbreak>。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Access failed. Error code: γ<unbreak>-13</unbreak></color>

C: 来古士？
E: From Lygus?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>93.998%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>93.998%</unbreak>...</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>错误进程：解析中……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Process error: Analyzing...</color>

C: 你也发现了。她到底在和谁对话？
E: So you noticed it too. Who exactly was she talking to?

C: 交战不可避免。上吧——
E: A fight is unavoidable. Come—

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>HubRis<unbreak>504</unbreak>，已下载。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> HubRis<unbreak>504</unbreak>, downloaded.</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>已…下…载……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Down... loa... ded...</color>

C: 把「三月七」还给我们，停止这场无意义的争端。
E: Return "March 7th" to us and end this pointless conflict.

C: 虽然还远远称不上「完整的三月七」，但用来和你对峙…这些「记忆」足够了。
E: I may still be far from the "complete March 7th"... but these "memories" were more than enough to fight you.

C: 但无论如何，我还是和他们一路走到了现在——
E: But I stuck with them all the way, til where we are now...

C: 看吧，你也很天真啊。总是希望镜子映出最美的一面……
E: You're pretty naive, too. Always hoping that the mirror will show the most beautiful side...

C: {NICKNAME}，跟着我。我们离开这里。
E: {NICKNAME}, come with me... We're getting out of here.

C: 所以旅途才有意义，不是么？即便在注定的「剧本」里，我们也有机会写下可能性，一种自己更喜欢的可能性。
E: And that's why the journey's worth it. Even in a predetermined "script," there's room for us to mold possibilities into shapes we prefer.

C: 在酒店时就察觉到了。
E: I noticed it back at the hotel.

C: 持明蜕生本该遗忘前尘旧事，但龙师们当年从中作梗，让「我」残留在你心识深处……
E: Vidyadhara are supposed to forget the past during hatching rebirth, but the Preceptors interfered back then and allowed "me" to remain deep in your consciousness.

C: 翁法罗斯「大地」的半神。他本该站在我们这边，却受人蛊惑，意图夺取化龙之力。
E: That is Amphoreus's "Earth" demigod. He should be on our side, but he was led astray and intends to seize the power of dragon transmutation.

C: 以天地为横轴，以时光为纵轴，我将找到那唯一的{RUBY_B#沉睡于忆潮的你}一点{RUBY_E#}。
E: With heaven and earth as my map and time as my compass, I will find {RUBY_B#you, asleep among memoria tide}that one singular point{RUBY_E#}.

C: 桀桀桀，这里的所有出口都被我堵上了！本大爷不愧是「添堵大王」！
E: Hehehe, I've blocked all the inlets here! I'm truly the "lord of obstacles"!

C: 那就简单了，我先把你们带走，你们来告诉我该怎么找……
E: That's easy. I'll take you away from here first, then you can tell me how to find your friends...

C: 人有五名……
E: Of five people...

C: 她计划让我遗忘一切…
E: She planned to make me forget everything...

C: 昔涟小姐和我反复提起过你，{NICKNAME}阁下。尽管此世我们未能相逢，但我相信…有一种温度足以跨越时间。
E: Miss Cyrene has spoken of you often to me, {NICKNAME}. Though we never met in this life, I believe... there's a kind of warmth that can transcend time itself.

C: 她只是在用比喻…这番对话好像在哪里见过。
E: She was just speaking metaphorically... This conversation feels familiar somehow.

C: 直到我们所有人，在真正的新世界并肩。
E: Until all of us stand side by side in the true new world.

C: 这些窃忆者企图渗透黑潮的温床，以窃取「铁墓」的记忆。
E: These Memosnatchers attempted to infiltrate the breeding ground of the black tide to steal Irontomb's memories.

C: 此般景象，已无法在我心中激起波澜。
E: Such sights are no longer able to stir anything in my heart.

C: 很遗憾，从未有过。
E: I'm sorry to say, I never was.
Erudition, Destruction, Remembrance...

C: 真是如数家珍啊…我倒宁愿一艘也别来，给我的空间站留点面子。
E: You sure know your stuff... I'd rather none of them show up and let my space station save some face.

C: 但如果仙舟联盟愿意驰援公司在艾普瑟隆等星系的资产，我们就有更多手牌，向董事会重申深度合作的必要性。
E: But if the Xianzhou Alliance is willing to assist with the IPC's assets in Epsilon and other star systems, we'll have more cards to play when reiterating to the board the necessity of deep cooperation.

C: 「我听见了——你们的祈愿——」
E: "I heard... your prayers..."

C: {RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}最初的涟漪{RUBY_E#}，她理应和所有人一起抵达故事的结局。
E: She was the {RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}first ripple{RUBY_E#}. She should have reached the end of the story with everyone else.

C: 而另一位戴了朵花的，肯定是列车组的三月小妹啦？
E: And this one with the flower... gotta be little March from the Express Crew, huh?

C: 相同的躯壳，我在轮回中收殓过无数次。唯有这一具，他的伤痛…深不见底。
E: I've restrained countless vessels like this across endless cycles. But this one... the pain he carried runs deeper than any I've known.

C: 好家伙，比折纸大学的快乐教育严肃多了啊。
E: Whoa, this is way more hardcore than the happy-go-lucky stuff at Paperfold University.

C: 凯撒，要告诉他们吗？
E: Imperator, should we tell them?

C: 我想，您的话不无道理。
E: I suppose you do have a point.

C: 出发吧，迈向决战。
E: Let's go. It's time for the decisive battle.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「浪漫的织者，阿格莱雅——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Aglaea, Weaver of Romance..."</color>

C: 「只需要一点点光，就能将这混沌照亮……」
E: "With just a glimmer of light, we can illuminate this chaos..."

C: 英雄们啊，敬请聆听……
E: Heroes, please harken...

C: 「宇宙在『毁灭』中熄灭，而你和她，从此成为『善见天』的始和终。」
E: "The universe will be snuffed out in the Destruction, and you and she will become the beginning and the end of the Eden of Blessed Insight."

C: 踏上「记忆」的命途！
E: Tread on the Path of Remembrance!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>为「毁灭」灌注负世的「爱」——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Infusing a worldbearing "love" into Destruction—</color>

C: 献上{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}亚德丽芬{RUBY_E#}的花。
E: And offer flowers of {RUBY_B#Destruction}Adlivun{RUBY_E#}.

C: （哼…抓到你了。）
E: (Hmph... Caught you.)

C: 你们…没有与铁墓合并啊。
E: You folks... haven't merged with Irontomb.

C: 她在哪…？
E: Where is she...?

C: 稍微有些夸大其词啦。至少现在，大家无法成为真正的「生命」哦。
E: That's a bit of an exaggeration. None of us can become true "life forms" yet. At least for now.

C: 「它的构成和『忆质』近似，但远比一般的忆泡强韧得多。」
E: "Its composition is similar to 'memoria', but it's far more resilient than ordinary Memory Bubbles."

C: 都到齐了呀…该由谁写下第一笔呢？
E: Everyone's here... Who wants to write the first line?

C: 「愿下一场宴席，永不散场。」
E: "May the next feast be eternal."

C: 「还记得我最喜欢的故事吗？水晶花之所以美丽，是因为它映出了小妖精的眼睛。」
E: "Do you remember my favorite story? That crystal flower was so beautiful because it reflected the eyes of the little fairy."

C: 「…喂喂，别写得那么急啦！」
E: "...Hey, hey, don't rush!"

C: 因为人们明白，道别是为了下一次相遇，哀伤是为了更好地去爱。所以，这是她一年当中最喜欢的一天。
E: Because people understand that parting is for the next reunion, and sorrow is so we may love more deeply. That is why this day is her favorite of the year.

C: 这世界存在多少颗心灵，便有多少种「真我」，多少种「生命的第一因」，它永远不会得到唯一的答案——就连「爱」也不是。
E: For every soul that exists in this world, there is a different "ego," a different "prime mover of life." There will never be just one answer, not even for "love."

C: 「在纯粹的光中，就像在纯粹的暗中，一无所有」。
E: "To be in the purest light is to be in the purest dark: Nothing exists there."

C: 不可思议，那一瞬间，我忘记了所有疼痛，就只是…出神地望着它。
E: It was incredible. I forgot all my pains at that moment and just... stared at it in a trance.

C: 下一位。昔涟。有「空白」？
E: Next. Cyrene. Has "blank space"?

C: 「是不是下一世就能迎来『救世主』，和翁法罗斯的黎明？」
E: "Will I be able to finally welcome the 'Deliverer' and Amphoreus's dawn in the next life?"

C: 我答应你，昔涟。
E: I will, Cyrene.

C: 不说话，我就当默许了。你呢，赞达尔？
E: I'll take that silence as a no. You, Zandar?

C: 是啊。我也不止一次这么回复了……
E: I did hear this many times, and I've responded to you many times in the same way...

C: 早就准备好了。为我们的盟友开道吧。
E: I've been ready for ages. Let's open up a path for our allies.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>博识尊看向了*你*。</color>
E: Nous has cast THEIR glance on you.

C: █博识尊的演算没有停止█决战还没结束█快█回现实去█
E: █ Nous's extrapolation did not stop █ The final battle is still going on █ Quick █ Return to reality █

C: 雅辛忒丝
E: Hyacinthia

C: 「{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核{RUBY_E#}」就在那里？
E: So that's where the {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#} is?

C: 你这么关心我的样子，又让我回想起阿尔弗雷德…如今，我的夙愿终于了结。
E: The way you care so much about me reminds me of Alfred... Now, my wish is finally fulfilled.

C: 唉…要我说，最简单的方法，就是把我们两个都抓起来。
E: *sigh* Can't believe I'm gonna say this, but the easiest way is to arrest both of us.

C: 不愧是我，鱼儿上钩了！
E: Ha! So it worked!

C: 你说呢？你已经分走了我的一点快乐！刚好有个活，你替我办了吧。
E: What do you say? You've already shared some of my joy, so you may as well share some of my chores!

C: 算了，你这么想要「猛料」…哼哼，反正我都备份了，给你看看，也知道我瓜田里猹不是造谣生事的人。
E: You want the scoop? Fine. I've backed it all up anyway. Here, take it. And let it be known that I, Richard_Knowitall, do not spread rumors.

C: 噢你是说在群里爆料的那个？
E: Oh, you mean the guy from the group chat — the one with the scoop?

C: 将三张权限认证卡重合，置于背光条件下，发现它以这种隐秘的方式印刻着「千星██集团」字样。
E: By stacking the three authority authentication cards on top of each other and placing them against the light, the words "Thousands Stars ██ Corporation" can vaguely be seen printed on the cards.

C: 照你这么说，那寰宇趋之若鹜的「星核」，不就是——算了，这个不能说。
E: According to your theory, the "Stellaron" everyone is scrambling for is just a — oh, forget it. I can't tell you this.

C: 嗯，小囡之前也常常这么说，「爸爸，你烫个爆炸头吧，这样我就能从一堆同科室的科员伯伯中把你一眼认出来了」。
E: Well, my daughter used to say to me, "Daddy, you should get a more luscious hairstyle, then I can tell you apart from all the other old guys in your department."

C: 狂野爆炸头将一堆「垃圾」塞进了你的怀里，其中夹杂着一张奇怪的卡片。
E: The person with the luscious hairstyle shoves a pile of garbage into your arms, among them is a strange-looking card.

C: 风趣？不，还是深情一点好。文雅？嗯，俚语是不该写进诗里。
E: Should I make it witty? Nah, maybe sentimental is better. Elegance? Well, I probably shouldn't use idioms in a poem.

C: 为什么破坏纪录？
E: Why did you damage the record?

C: 真没想到，连时间也会对人不公平。
E: Who would've thought that even time can be so unfair.

C: 而且，你也看过那些消息吧？她会关心我，安慰我…难道那些也只是普通的同事情谊吗？
E: You've seen our messages, right? She cares about me and she comforts me... is that how colleagues behave?

C: 对年轻人来说，不论什么糟心事，那都是穿肠过的事。人生还长，这日子也总得过下去。
E: No matter how bad the situation is, young people can put it behind them in a blink of an eye. Life is long, we all have to live our lives.

C: 虽然有些唐突，不过{NICKNAME}，你愿意帮忙吗？
E: Sorry if it seems to come out of nowhere, but {NICKNAME}, would you like to help?

C: 但不能扔下他不管。
E: Still we can't just leave him.

C: 我在这儿困了大半天，缺水，缺食物，缺氧，没力气说话了，得保存体力。
E: I've been trapped here all day. I'm hungry, thirsty, and running out of oxygen. I don't have the strength to speak. I have to reserve energy.

C: 一、二、三……
E: One, two, three...

C: 让合适的老东西去办合适的事——适才适用，嗯，适才适用。
E: Yep, there's an old fart suited to every job.

C: 太可怕了。这些事情我全都不记得，简直就像在倾听他人的人生。
E: That's horrible. I don't remember any of these things. It's like listening to someone else's life.

C: 这附近的晶簇是什么回事？
E: What's wrong with the crystals around here?

C: 乔安你别光在旁边看着。
E: Joanne, don't just stand there.

C: 不对呀，你怎么可能在希拉的录像带里见过古恩呢？
E: What? How could you have seen Gunn in Sheila's videos?

C: 嗯，补上这句显得更有气势了。
E: Yep, it all makes sense now.

C: 老实说，我也大开眼界。难怪之前对希拉进行身体扫描，发现她的各项参数近乎完美——简直就像是精密设定的产物。
E: To be honest, it was an eye-opener for me as well. No wonder her body scan showed that her parameters were almost perfect — it was like a well-calibrated machine.

C: 我感觉…好极了。你好，乔安科员，好久不见。
E: I feel... great. Hello, Researcher Joanne. Long time no see.

C: 她罹难之后，科员们进行了反思——如果我们终其一生只是在讨论纸面上的正义、局部的正义，却对银河中频繁上演的不幸袖手旁观，那真是忝为正义的一方。
E: After her death, the researchers reexamined the question of justice. If we spend our whole life debating justice but choose to stand idly by when there are actual injustices happening all over the cosmos, then what we're really doing is just making a mockery of justice.

C: 好啦，以后的路长着呢，你在外探索的时候，记好啦——无论发生什么事，都不要丢掉自己的喜好与情感。
E: Well, you still have a long way ahead of you. When you are out there exploring, remember — no matter what, don't just throw away your hobbies and your emotions.

C: 然而答案又怎是那样简单的东西？更何况他想要达成那样从心而外的「修行」，更是难上加难……
E: But answers are not easy to give. Besides, he wanted to master a trial of the heart that would thoroughly change him, and that would be even more difficult...

C: 你想都想不到那是多么困难的「修行」，我光是配合他模仿那种说话的方式，就累得够呛！还好他…啊！咳咳，不说了，不说了！
E: You can't even imagine the difficulty of the trial. I was tired merely from the act of imitating that way of talking with him! Thankfully he... Ah! Ahem, no more. No more!

C: 说明阿兰的确来找过卡波特教授，证据确凿。
E: So Arlan did go to see Professor Capote. This is the evidence.

C: 你要进入状态，阿兰队长。
E: Keep your chin up, Captain Arlan.

C: 阿兰…我……
E: Arlan... I...

C: 结合之前你和卡波特模拟的内容，还有你工作周报中提到的：和佩佩一起玩电子飞盘投影……
E: The combination of your simulated conversations with Capote and the entry in your work log about playing holodisc with Peppy...

C: 以前每次黑塔女士回到空间站的时候，都会委托我去做一些…防卫科工作范围之外的工作。
E: Whenever she's back on the space station, Madam Herta assigns me things outside the Security Department remit.

C: 我啊？我知道的也很有限，不过是从亚伯拉罕那里听来的一点风言风语，以及一本书上看来的知识。
E: Me? I don't know much for sure. All I know is the rumors heard from Abraham and some trivia I learnt from a book.

C: 多找两只不嫌多。
E: Check a few more just to be sure. The more the merrier.

C: 哼，也怪我自己没有多长个心眼。
E: Huff, I should've been more careful.

C: 嗯，空间站是它们最好的归宿。
E: Um hum, the space station should be the best place for them.

C: 嘘——准备好。
E: Hush— Get ready.

C: 跟我有什么关系？
E: What does this have to do with me?

C: 奇物才是她的真正目标？
E: She was actually after the curio?

C: 此事因我而起，是我单方面向黑塔提出了终止学术合作的希望。请别误会，我对她和这个项目并无意见。模拟宇宙是项宏伟的实验，黑塔也是一位十足的天才。
E: This all started with me — I was the one that brought up the request to end our academic collaboration. Don't get me wrong, I have nothing against Herta or the project. The Simulated Universe is a great experiment and Herta is a true genius.

C: 记得是她赢了…
E: I recall that she won...

C: 毕竟面对模拟宇宙浩若星海的数据，就算是顶尖的骇客也无法在短时间内找到特定的目标，除非……
E: After all, even the best hacker wouldn't be able to find a specified target in the vast ocean of the Simulated Universe's data. Unless...

C: 我没有问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 我可能会再次进攻空间站。
E: What if I attack the space station again?

C: 抱歉，您做不到。以太编辑不是万能的，并不能毁灭一个宇宙。
E: I'm sorry, but that simply isn't possible. Aether editing isn't capable of destroying an entire universe.

C: 好复杂啊。
E: It's so difficult.

C: 起初我也摸不着头脑，这游戏一般是搭载在那种老式星际驳船的破显示器上的。呃，感觉只有闲得要命的醉酒矿工才会玩。
E: I didn't understand as well, in the beginning. This game was usually installed in old display terminals on those antique interstellar vessels. Ugh... The type of game only an idle drunk miner could love.

C: 掉进了三次元？
E: Have we fallen into... the red dimension!?

C: 享受当下。
E: Enjoy the present moment.

C: 我当时就说：「发誓可以，但你能不能先把我从这洞里拉出来？」——他说不行！你就说这人能不能处？
E: I told him I'd marry her if he liked, as long as he got me out of that stinking cave first... And he refused! I couldn't believe it!

C: 没有异常。除了一簇挑染过——大概是挑染吧？你也没法完全确定——的白发，瓦尔特先生的头发上没有任何瑕疵。
E: All appears to be in order. Except for a small bunch of what is likely highlighted hair — although you can't be completely sure — there's nothing amiss with Mr. Yang's hair.

C: …{NICKNAME}，你在做什么？
E: ...What are you up to, {NICKNAME}?

C: 跳出列车后，我会以长枪刺破巨真蛰虫胃壁，希望能使其产生剧烈痉挛，列车便可冲出虫体。
E: After jumping from the Express, I shall pierce the wall of the Giant Sting's stomach. It should then violently convulse so the Express can escape the confines of its body.

C: 我突然觉得，我们要不是因为意外相识，一定是毫不相关的两类人，完全不会成为朋友。你的人生叫英雄传说，我呢就叫三流小说。
E: It suddenly struck me that if it weren't for this accident, we would never have met, let alone become friends. My life is a third-rate fiction next to your heroic saga, but at least they coincided...

C: 怎么了？
E: Is something wrong?

C: 怎会有这么离奇的事！我居然第二次被山洞给吞了…难道这就是我的命运？……
E: How is this even possible!? I've been swallowed by a "cave" twice now. Is this my destiny?

C: 很抱歉——我突然产生了一个想法，或许能够帮助各位解决危机。在列车准备期间，我希望能获得与{NICKNAME}单独讨论的机会。
E: I've suddenly happened upon an idea that might just help resolve our crisis. While the Express is being prepared, I would like to speak with {NICKNAME} in private.

C: 列车的年度大清洁？我最喜欢整理房间了，一定要趁这次机会好好把各种地方都擦得干干净净的！
E: The annual Express spring cleaning? I love tidying rooms! I'll clean everywhere as best I can!

C: （当前收集的记忆盲点无法唤醒模糊的记忆，请收集更多记忆盲点）
E: (The Cognition Chasms currently collected are insufficient to restore hazy memories. Please collect more Cognition Chasms)

C: …对了，再帮我做件事，那奇物丢了，我不能放着不管。有空帮我找找——你应该能办到。
E: ...Oh, right, I need your help with something else. That Curio's gone missing, and I can't just forget about it. Go find it for me when you have the time. I'm sure you can manage that, can't you?

C: 我在遛狗。
E: ...L—Like I said, we're walking the dog.

C: 是有什么麻烦？
E: Is there a problem?

C: 好像也没毛病…但似乎又不太对。
E: She's not wrong... but that doesn't feel entirely right either.

C: 我想起来了，当时…当时……
E: I remember now. Back then... back then...

C: 一名II级科员，界种科室长口中「界种科最了解奇物的人」。当时他碰巧在协助阿兰调查连续失踪事件。
E: A Level II Researcher. According to the Department of Ecology head, he knows more about Curios than anyone else. He happened to be helping Arlan investigate the disappearances.

C: 好、好的……
E: O—Okay...

C: 还有什么需要我做的么？
E: What else do you need me to do?

C: 最开始我还没在意，毕竟阿德勒平时就常常不见人影。
E: I didn't really notice at first — Adler's difficult to get a hold of at the best of times...

C: 耶佩拉兄弟会，似乎在哪儿见过这个名字……
E: Jepella Brotherhood... I've heard that name somewhere...

C: 将三者串联起来的是……
E: The link between the three is...

C: 我明白了，答案是…是……
E: I understand. So the answer is... is...

C: 这种火焰的火种…想必就是黑塔丢失的奇物。而冥火大公则是火焰的后裔。
E: The kindling of this unique flame... must be the missing Curio that Herta's been searching for. And Duke Inferno is evidently spawned from it.

C: 在那边！
E: Over there!

C: 艾丝妲怎样了？
E: How is Asta?

C: 跟我走走吧。吃完可口的点心后，散步是最合适的消遣。
E: Come and have a walk with me. A stroll is the most appropriate post-dessert activity.

C: 阮•梅皱了眉头
E: Ruan Mei frowns

C: 造物主对造物的爱？亲情？不太像…爱情？更不是那么回事儿了！
E: Love from the creator to her creation? Familial love? Doesn't sound right... romantic love? Definitely not!
*buzz*

C: 正在调取最近联系人数据…调取中…调取成功。
E: Retrieving recent contact data... Retrieving... Data retrieval complete.

C: 总比我这个老头子强吧，唉，这应该是会社的最后一单委托了。
E: You can't be worse than an old crone like me. Ah, I imagine that this will be the Society's last ever assignment.

C: 我在帮别人忙。
E: I'm helping someone out.

C: 我很看好你。
E: I believe in you.

C: 请保持呼吸频率，另外，我要告诉您一件事——在星穹列车到访贝洛伯格的数据中，您过去完成的运送任务成功率是<unbreak>96.7%</unbreak>，运送的医疗物资累计挽救了<unbreak>27</unbreak>位居民的生命。
E: Please maintain that breathing rate. Furthermore, there is something that I must tell you — according to data from the Astral Express' previous visits to Belobog, your previous transport missions' success rate is <unbreak>96.7%</unbreak>. Medical supplies delivered by you have saved the lives of <unbreak>27</unbreak> citizens.

C: 不过，也不排除是有人装神弄鬼——但对方为什么要针对尤利安来呢？
E: But it doesn't rule out the possibility that someone is just playing tricks... But why would they target Julian?

C: 明白了吗？他们并不可怕，他们是我们的先辈，为了保护我们而战斗到最后一刻。
E: Do you understand now? They're not scary. They're our ancestors who fought until their last breath to protect us.

C: 不过我发现一个有趣的现象，大家好像都有「名字」，很有趣，这似乎是某种概念的具象化，这个概念比单纯的利益交换要复杂。
E: But I have discovered an interesting phenomenon. It seems that everyone has "names." This seems to be the manifestation of some kind of concept that is more complex than a simple exchange of benefits.

C: 不！这不是白开水。当你仔细凝视它的时候，仿佛在凝视一片深不见底的海，那是一种亿万年时光才能积累出的深邃和厚重。
E: No! This is not simply boiled water. As you stare at it closely, it begins to resemble a bottomless ocean. An ocean with the kind of depth and vastness that could only have accumulated over hundreds of millions of years.

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}你好聪明，这个点子棒耶！
E: Ah! {NICKNAME}, you're a genius! Great idea!

C: 既然是和你们两位，那我也没什么好遮掩的…老实说，我现在已经没什么精力思考煦日节的事了。
E: There's no need to keep either of you in the dark. To tell the truth, I've too much weighing on my mind right now to even think about the Solwarm Festival.

C: 然后他们就派了托帕过来催债……
E: And that's when they sent Topaz over to collect the debt...

C: 算了，抱怨也没用，忙还是得帮——走，我们去支援希儿他们吧。
E: I guess complaining won't get us anywhere. Let's go lend them a hand.

C: 好嘛，原来你连个小组长都不是？真是高估你了。
E: Team leader? Ha, you're even lower on the pecking order than I thought.

C: 这可就说来话长了……
E: It's a long story...

C: …啊，有人给咱们发消息了！
E: ...Oh! Looks like we've got a message.

C: 说的没错，争分夺秒。
E: Yes, we need to move fast.

C: 不过我可没看到什么机甲或者兵器啊？这四周都是结结实实的山岩，难道说……
E: But I don't see any mech or weapons... This place is completely surrounded by mountains — surely they can't be...

C: 原来如此…佩拉是怎么考虑的呢？
E: Huh, okay... Any particular reason?

C: 明白了，我们会把你的意见记下来的。
E: Thanks for your input. I'll make a note of your opinion.

C: 现在的结果是平票——你的意见很关键，希儿。
E: As it stands, the votes are even. Your opinion will make all the difference.

C: 这是什么意思，姬子？
E: What do you mean, Himeko?

C: {NICKNAME}，你们这一路实在是辛苦，我给你们安排了歌德宾馆的房间，请务必在贝洛伯格好好恢复精神。
E: {NICKNAME}, you all need some rest after everything you've been through. I've arranged rooms for you all at the Goethe Hotel.

C: 不过…你看我这一把年纪，早就经不起折腾了。就算能治好病，也活不长了。这多浪费啊……
E: But at this age, it's rather a lot to bear. Even if they could cure me, I'm sure I wouldn't be around for long. I don't want to waste anyone's time...

C: 他是有一身医生的本事，但却不肯好好用那本事治病救人——我以前去找他看病的时候，他甚至连病症都不问清楚，就给我开了所谓的「特效药」……
E: He may have had the capability, but he didn't use it to help anyone... Whenever I went to see him, he never even asked about my illness! He just prescribed me his so-called "wonder medicine..."
"...Money-maker"?

C: <size=36>{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！</size>
E: <size=36>{NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}!</size>

C: 但既然有了收容舱段这个线索，这里的区域拢共就这么大，不如优先采取枚举法或者排除法。
E: But now we know it's in the Storage Zone, and this area is only so large. Maybe we can take the initiative and make a list of the possible suspects.

C: 听起来是很高级的材料。
E: Sounds like fancy material.

C: 你还在帮他说话。
E: You're still defending him.

C: 更何况，他确实给了我一份能更接近界种科本真研究的工作机会，虽然代价是要兼任他的秘书……
E: Not to mention he did give me a job that lets me get closer to the real research work in the Department of Ecology. Although the price was to work as his secretary...

C: 我的母星资源贫乏，每个家庭只能勉强支撑一个人进行星际旅行。姐姐获得了「黑塔」的遴选资格，但她把这全家独一、毕生唯一的机会，让给了我。
E: My home planet is quite poor in resources, and most families can only barely support one person to go on a space journey. My sister was qualified to come to the space station, but she gave me the only chance in the family and in her life.

C: 我和她是伙伴。
E: She and I are partners.

C: 那是什么？难道是把我干掉…咕噜噜，你好大的口气！我要给你点颜色瞧瞧！
E: What's that? To kill me? *gurgle* You talk big! I'm gonna teach you a lesson!

C: …哎呀，想起「好似凌霄攀援，难免低入尘埃」这句，平仄、韵脚都没押上，我下的功夫还是不够嘛。
E: ...Oops, "Like the risk of falling into the depths when trying to mount the sky." I didn't use any rhymes or enough alliteration for this line. It's still not good enough.

C: ——所以你叫什么名字？一会儿找个地方一起喝点「卡利百」？我现在可是一肚子火！
E: So what's your name? Why don't we find a place to drink Kali-Kapo later? I need to vent!

C: 呃…好，但怎么个重复法？
E: Hmm... okay. But how do we try once more?

C: …怎么，还有你没见识过的怪事？
E: ...Huh? Is there really something out there that even you've never come across before?

C: 对了，我记得上层区有一家花店？不如我们去那边看看吧。
E: Oh, yes! I remember there was a florist in the Overworld. How about we head over that way?

C: 「长夏」…这花店一直都叫这名字吗？看来我小时候还没能领会其中的讽刺意味。
E: Eversummer... Was that always the name? Seems I was too young to get the irony back then.

C: 一束「暖阳花」。
E: A bouquet of Sunshines, please.

C: 太久了…实在过去太久了，妈妈……
E: It's been too long, mom... too long.

C: 商议了为下层区提供药物援助的细节……
E: You discuss the details about the medicine supply work in the Underworld...

C: …什么？瓦赫的信？奥森先生，你确定吗？
E: ...What? Letters from Vache? Are you certain, Mr. Oswell?

C: 出城？娜塔莎小姐，这未免太冒险了……
E: Leave the city? You are taking too much risk, Miss Natasha...

C: 瓦赫…这么多年过去了，你该不会还在那片风雪里……
E: Vache... It's been so many years. Are you still alone in the blizzard...?

C: 结束了呢，{NICKNAME}。
E: It's done, {NICKNAME}.

C: …记得他曾是伤害无辜的加害者，记得他曾经犯下的恶行。瓦赫愧对「医生」这个称呼，这点我再清楚不过。
E: ...They'll remember him as a murderer... as someone whose evil experiments brought great harm to the innocent. Vache doesn't deserve to be remembered as a "doctor." I know that very well.

C: 穿过接待厅就到了「综合馆」，也是历史文化博物馆最大的展区。
E: Past the Reception Hall, you'll find the General Hall — the museum's largest exhibition room.

C: 嘁，这算啥！我爸爸最近也给我买了很贵重的礼物！
E: Hmph, clothes shmothes! My daddy bought me a super rare present!

C: 我向你保证，这份工作相当有趣喔！
E: I can promise you it won't be a boring job!

C: 听着不错。
E: Sounds enticing.

C: 我想先去干会儿别的。
E: I have other matters to attend to first.

C: 克拉拉…会尽力帮助大家的！
E: I'll do my best to help, too!

C: 虽然他没办法把出了故障的小机器人全都召集在一起，但说不定史瓦罗先生能帮我们出出主意……
E: He might not be able to round up the robots, but I'm sure he'll have some good ideas.

C: 什么时候偷拍的？！
E: You did a secret photoshoot of us?

C: 我们可以补拍——
E: No worries. We can just do a reshoot.

C: 我好像记得你，年轻人。怎么，读过防骗教程后有问题想问了吗？
E: I remember you. Do you have any questions after reading the scam prevention guide?

C: 不瞒你们说，我这两天正打算去找人告发这次案件的始作俑者！
E: I'll tell you the truth — I've been preparing to publicly accuse the person responsible for this whole thing for two days now!

C: 一城之主理应熟悉下属的身份和分工，不必惊讶。诺尔伯特的工作的确算是份闲职，难怪他经常和莱姆士汀家的公子来往。
E: The leader of a city should be familiar with the status and division of labor of her subordinates — that's just part of the job. Norbert's position is indeed an idle one, so it's no wonder he has time to socialize with members of the Limestein family.

C: 你们两个，到底是谁？！这次行动从头到尾老大都没露过面，凭几个外人是怎么知道他的名字的？
E: Who are you guys!? This whole operation the boss hasn't shown his face once. How could a couple of outsiders just walk in knowing his name?

C: 啊，放心吧，这次没有东西被偷了。
E: Ah, don't worry, nothing was stolen this time.

C: …就怪了！你个倒霉催的，怎么这个点才来？！
E: *sigh* Anyway, what took you so long?

C: 很明显，你回答错了。寒腿叔叔这下不做声了…糟糕。
E: You obviously answered wrong. Not a peep can be heard from Mr. Cold Feet. Uh-oh....

C: 留在你眼前的选择有，且只有一个……
E: There is only one choice left in front of you...

C: 怎么样？三分之一可是一笔大钱，你仔细考虑考虑！我可从来不敢坑你啊，大客户！
E: How's that sound? One-third is a lot of money — think about it! I would never dare to rip off a valued client such as yourself!

C: 没想到佩拉小姐也知道他…他应该在你出生以前就退休了。
E: I didn't think you'd know him... He retired long before you were even born.

C: 哇哦，这里好宽敞呀！感觉…感觉有好几个诊所那么大！
E: Wow, it's so big in here! It feels... It feels like ten clinics put together!

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}。还有…漆黑的虎克大人？
E: Here we are again, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} and... Pitch-Dark Hook the Great?

C: 哎呀，你不要打断她的思路啦，荣誉队员！要不然克拉拉变得更紧张了怎么办？
E: Don't interrupt her train of thought, honorary member! What if Clara gets even more nervous?

C: 说吧，你肯定比虎克大人清楚！
E: Please share what you know. I'm sure you know more than Hook the Great!

C: 恭喜你，克拉拉队员！我觉得，克拉拉队员完全能够胜任志愿导览员的工作！
E: Congratulations, Clara! I believe you will make a perfect volunteer guide!

C: 应该的。
E: It's no big deal.

C: 看起来意外地正式…
E: It looks surprisingly formal...

C: 您好，希露瓦小姐！我这就把您的简历转交给佩拉小姐过目！
