E: Hello, Miss Serval! I'll pass your resume on to Miss Pela right away!

C: …这么着急的吗？！
E: ...So soon!?

C: 姓名…似乎没什么好说的。来看下一个吧……
E: Name... There's nothing to talk about. Let's check out the next column...

C: 我记得你的舅舅还是大伯就是从铆钉镇逃出来的，他们也是流浪者对吧。你会把他们也赶出去吗？
E: I remember one of your uncles had to flee Rivet Town, which makes him a vagrant too, right? Would you drive him away?

C: 哎呀，你就别瞎操心了，「地火」已经进去啦。
E: Calm down and stop worrying. Wildfire's already gone in.

C: 肯定不是这个世界的科技。看——它外壳上还有星际和平公司的标志。
E: It doesn't seem to be technology from here. Look — it even has an Interastral Peace Corporation logo on it.

C: 这辆行吗？
E: What about this one?

C: 好吧，不要担心，我马上过去。
E: Don't worry, I'll head there right away.

C: 你不是找我有要紧事吗？
E: Don't you have urgent matters for me?

C: 冷静，冷静！大家都是为了讨个生计，咱好好坐下来聊聊不好吗？
E: Calm down, calm down! We're all here to work for a living. Why not sit down and talk it out?

C: 老爹，你受伤了没？
E: Daddy, are you hurt?

C: 我才不是小偷。
E: I'm no thief.

C: 叔叔我啊，就喜欢不还价的顾客，这叫格局！来，想问什么，尽管开口！
E: I like your style! Customers who don't fuss over the price are the best. So what do you wanna know? Ask away!

C: 你只要回答我们几个问题就好！
E: We just need you to answer a few questions!

C: 探测器？没有，我什么都没看到，我什么都不知道……
E: Detector? No, I haven't seen anything, and I don't know anything...

C: 没错，除了推理，我们还有别的办法能够找到真正的小偷。眼前就让我们先分析他们到底说了什么吧。
E: Right, we have other methods besides deductive reasoning to find out who the true thief is. Let's just examine what they've said first to decide.

C: 我看他慌慌张张地跑到外面去了。
E: Beats me! I saw him running out in quite a panic.

C: 有没有搞错啊…你们推理了半天，结果就这？
E: You gotta be kidding me... You thought about it for that long, and came up with this conclusion?

C: 没问题，那我们之后就在诊所碰头。{NICKNAME}，这儿就交给老弟，我们先回镇上去吧！
E: Sure, come find us later at the clinic. {NICKNAME}, let's leave Gepard to his business and head back to town.

C: 那里还有小孩和老人…求求你们，快去救他们吧！
E: There are children and seniors too... Please, save them!

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！我们确实是放心不下她随便和陌生人见面……
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}! We're worried about her meeting strangers...

C: 对不起，是我太敏感了……
E: Sorry. Maybe I was overreacting...

C: 给《奇谭》画的那些漫画不算吗？
E: So all those comics you drew for the Tales series didn't count?

C: …真粗野。
E: ...How boorish.

C: 反正就是小孩子过家家呗？
E: Sounds like kids playing make-believe!

C: 它修缮城镇的动机是什么？
E: Why does he want to repair the town?

C: 铆钉镇，居住，克拉拉，{NICKNAME}！游览，随意，请！
E: Rivet Town, live, Clara, {NICKNAME}! Tour, feel free, please!

C: （…期间，帕斯卡发展出了自我意识。）
E: (Around that time, Pascal became sentient.)

C: 行了行了，计较这个干嘛。我倒想问你：「地火」谁都知道史瓦罗的老巢在哪儿，要你这个向导干嘛？
E: Alright, alright, don't get started. But I wanna ask you something: Everyone in Wildfire knows the location of Svarog's lair. Why do we need you as a guide?

C: 贝洛伯格的夜，谎言灭不了火焰
E: Another Belobog night, a fire the lies can't abide, yeah

C: 回答正确。
E: Correct answer.

C: 不是你，是那边的小姑娘！
E: Not you, the girl over there!

C: 这家伙怪怪的……
E: There's something wrong with this one...

C: 又是那种机器人！难道想见史瓦罗还得通过其它「试炼」吗？
E: It's that same type of robot again! Please don't tell me there's another round of "processing."

C: 必须…保护……
E: Must... protect...

C: 究竟谁在说谎，该你判断了。
E: It's up to you to make your own judgment about who's lying now.

C: 这次你真得感谢桑博了，多亏了他的情报，我们才能在关键时刻赶到。
E: Well, you should really be thanking Sampo. If it weren't for his intel, we wouldn't have made it in time.

C: 与克拉拉相关的记录已经做好了备份，不必担心。
E: I have made a backup of all records pertaining to you, Clara. Do not worry.

C: 竟然敢在虎克大人面前做坏事，你们可真是大胆。看我不用洞洞机收拾你们！
E: You dare steal from a kid in front of Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!? Let's see how brave you are against Diggertron!

C: 这地方的小混混太多了。
E: This place is full of troublemakers.

C: …嗯，虎克当然知道！
E: ...Yeah, of course I do!

C: 刚才…虎克好像看到老巫婆了。不会是错觉吧？
E: Just now... I thought I saw the old witch. Was Hook imagining things?

C: 呜…反正也没买到礼物，只好回去问问老巫婆有什么建议了。
E: Ugh... what does it matter, Hook didn't get the gift. I'll have to go back and ask the old witch for ideas.

C: 我把我的冬城盾都给你。
E: I'll give you my shield, too.

C: 虎克，交给你了。
E: Over to you, Hook.

C: 十遍也有点太多了吧！
E: Ten times!? That's too many!

C: 在领养虎克之前，我从来不知道自己的生日，当然也不办什么生日聚会。
E: I had no idea when my birthday was before I adopted Hook, and I most certainly did not celebrate it.

C: 你没参加拍卖会吗？
E: You didn't attend the auction?

C: 你好，帕金斯！
E: Hey Perkins!

C: 呃，别一上来就卡壳啊…
E: Don't panic. We're only getting started...

C: 对不起，克拉拉自作主张要{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}帮忙一起调查……
E: I know this is asking a lot...

C: 谈话期间，该个体的故障率仍在不断上升——允许进入警戒状态。
E: While we were talking, the robot's failure rate increased. We should activate Alert mode.

C: （而克拉拉认为可以利用程序限制帕斯卡的行为，在保留情感智能的同时防止它造成损害。但这个方法治标不治本，更需要克拉拉付出大量心血……）
E: (Clara thinks she can use programming to control Pascal's behavior and prevent him from causing harm while keeping his emotional intelligence intact. However, this doesn't address the root of the issue, and it also requires Clara to devote much time and effort to Pascal.)

C: 理解。你可以经过充分考虑后再做决定。
E: I understand. You can make a decision after you've thought about it more.

C: 它的情感智能具有研究价值。
E: Pascal's emotional intelligence is important for research purposes.

C: （这个选择恐怕会直接影响此事的结果…慎重考虑后再做决定吧。）
E: (My choice will have a direct impact on the outcome... I should mull it over.)

C: 听说城里最近在通缉捉拿重案犯，甚至调了批铁卫回去。
E: I heard that there's an arrest warrant out in the city for some major criminals — they even recalled some of the Guards.

C: 听了，这次让佩拉做了主唱，吓我一跳。风格完全不一样了。
E: Sure did, Pela was on lead vocals this time, scared me half to death. It's a completely different style.
Argh...

C: …没问题吗？令弟可能也在那里。
E: ...We could have a problem. Your brother may be there.

C: 真没想到，你和杰帕德居然是姐弟？
E: I never would've guessed that Gepard and you were brother and sister.

C: 下次冒险之前，咱可得好好跟姬子姐姐请教下谈判技巧。总靠打架解决问题，也太不符合少女的优雅了吧！
E: Before our next expedition, I need Himeko to teach me some negotiation skills. Beating people up all the time is cramping my elegance!

C: 放心，交给我们吧。
E: We've got this.

C: 我们不会辜负你的信任。
E: We won't disappoint you.

C: 我、我只是怕长官您查到茉莉头上…虽然她是性子急了点，可这次事故和她没半分关系哪…我、我保证！饶了我吧……
E: Well... I was just afraid you'd make Molly a suspect. She can be a bit impatient at times, but I assure you that this incident has nothing to do with her! Please just spare me, Captain...

C: …看来我预想的没错，她碰上麻烦了。
E: ...I guess I was right. She's in trouble.

C: 我们最多也就是抄了你的家，要是惹到了上面的人…那后果你根本不敢想！
E: All we've done so far is just a little "do-over" of your house, but if you ever provoke the ire of those higher-ups... You won't even dare to think about the consequences!

C: 哼，可惜只是来了两个弱不禁风的家伙！我告诉你们，今天就是戍卫官本人来了，也没他的好果子吃！
E: Hmph... Unfortunately, they are only two weaklings! Let me tell you, even if the captain himself were here, I wouldn't be scared off!

C: 我要想办法补救一切。我必须补救，否则……
E: I'm trying to fix everything and make amends, or else...

C: 考虑到我们的所在之处，不冒出些新奇的敌人才是怪事。
E: Considering where we are, it would be surprising if we didn't run into strange enemies here.

C: 反物质军团的爪牙入侵这个世界时，一定没想到自己会被寒潮吞没吧。
E: I bet the Antimatter Legion forces never thought they'd be swallowed up by the Eternal Freeze when they invaded this world.

C: 所以，你懂吗？就算你已经被那边的女人洗脑，把我们之间的约定忘得干干净净了——我也要把你打晕了再带回去！
E: Do you understand? Even if the damage is done — even if you've completely forgotten our promise, then... then I'm just gonna have to knock you out and bring you back myself!

C: …贝洛伯格的未来，在我手中！
E: ...The future of Belobog rests in my hands!

C: 但贝洛伯格面临的危机还远未结束。在布洛妮娅的带领下，上下层区的人们将再次团结起来，继续为了生存而战……
E: But the crisis facing Belobog is far from over. Led by Bronya, the people of the Overworld and the Underworld will once again unite and continue to fight for their survival...

C: ——从现在起，这就是「真相」…你们认为呢？
E: ...From here on out, that's the "truth" the world will hear. What do you think?

C: 没错…但我们无权责难。
E: Yes... But we have no right to judge.

C: 这不是「存护」的真谛…
E: This is not what Preservation would have wanted...

C: 真的吗？谢谢你……
E: Really? Thank you...

C: …这是什么没品的玩笑吗？
E: ...Is this some kind of sick joke?

C: 那我能拿到什么好处？
E: Then what's in it for me, huh?

C: 从左数第一艘。
E: The first one from the left.

C: 好详细啊。
E: This is really detailed.

C: 医典，我的医典来了吗？
E: My medical textbook! Is my textbook here?

C: 这算哪门子机密啊。这些医典对丹士而言只是随手可以翻阅的辞书而已。何况，他们也同意我借阅了。
E: How are these books secrets? They are just references that alchemists can browse at any time. Besides, they agreed to let me borrow it.

C: 那就是没办法了？
E: So it's not going to work?

C: 可规矩不是由我来定。丹鼎司大乱后，所有的往来申请都要被复核了。
E: But I'm not the one who made the rules. After what happened in the Alchemy Commission, every exchange request has to be re-approved.

C: 呃？你就是「鹤运速递」的赔付专员？不过看你这打扮…怎么感觉是个化外民，难道是我认错人了？
E: Um? Are you the claims specialist from Heron Express? But your clothes... Why do I feel like you're an outworlder? Did I get the wrong person?

C: …你要找《要药分剂》？巧了，有一册恰好在我手上。
E: ... You're looking for the Compendium of Remedies? Lucky for you, I do have one of the volumes.

C: 主人让你找一朵蘑菇干什么？
E: Why did my master ask you to find a mushroom?

C: 我出发了。
E: Heading over now.

C: 闲话莫再讲，手底见真章。你到底接不接受，别妨碍我学习。
E: No more small talk, and show your true talent. Take it or leave it. Don't disturb my study.

C: 有鸡鸭鱼肉。
E: I have a good meal that is hard to forget.

C: 「你的婀娜瞬息间，与那纯洁的繁星之舞融为一体，噤声有序的自然。」
E: "When your graceful figure blends in with the pure dance of stars, nature becomes peaceful and orderly."

C: 也许这才是对小聪最好的结局。
E: Perhaps, this is the best ending for Cong.

C: 你的感情既专一，又复杂…
E: You're very faithful to your lover, but your love life is pretty complicated...

C: 你是说他每一次都能找到我？我也觉得很有趣，第一次我觉天缘注定，无比浪漫。第二次嘛，我觉得我跟他再爱个十世也没有问题……
E: Do you mean how he manages to find me after every reincarnation? I find it interesting too. When it happened for the first time, I thought it was very romantic, and we were meant to be together. On the second time, I thought I would have no problem loving him for another ten lifetimes...

C: 可以，你还好吗？
E: Sure. How're you feeling?

C: 我不会放弃的，毕竟我是小聪嘛。
E: I won't give up. After all, I'm Cong.

C: 唉，我有这代理站长的身份在，问什么都不方便，这事情只好拜托你啦。
E: *sigh* As the acting lead researcher, it's inconvenient to bring up even the slightest thing, so I had to ask for your help.

C: 没意思。
E: Tsk, you're no fun.

C: 这就吓着了，心理承受能力还挺低的。
E: She's scared with only this much? What a doormat.

C: 啊？诈骗、逮捕、这都哪儿跟哪儿啊？
E: What, fraud, arrest, what is this?

C: 谢谢你，我也想作为「狐仙黛青」继续这样下去，但是我绝对不会再骗取任何钱财了，我向你保证。
E: Thank you. I also want to continue as the Foxian Beauty Daiqing, but I will not ask people for money anymore, I guarantee you that.

C: 机巧鸟在检货仓里停了一会儿，还带着你的礼物，看来目的地就在这流云渡里。
E: Looks like the cycrane has made its way to the Inspection Warehouse with your gift in tow. Its destination appears to be Cloudford.

C: 要是她真的是来骗钱的，我们也好让温符瑞科员彻底放弃幻想。所以，你理解了吗？
E: If the Foxian Beauty is just scamming people for money, then we should help Wen Furui let go of his delusions for good. You would agree, no?

C: 什么新型推销…你要是再过来，我就要向地衡司报警了。
E: I've had enough of your "innovative" marketing strategies... If you try it again, I'm going to report you to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 有消息说，最近鳞渊境洞天里巨响如雷，是发生什么大事了吗？
E: I heard there has been thunderous noise coming from Scalegorge Waterscape recently. Has something big happened?

C: 帮帮我，{NICKNAME}。老夫想在自己这把老骨头彻底动弹不得前，能继承自己老师的遗志，看看鳞渊境的奇景。
E: Help me, {NICKNAME}. I want to complete what was left unfinished by my teacher and witness the beautiful Scalegorge Waterscape before I am too old to walk.

C: 「精准识别」模式已开启，请及时拍摄、记忆、提取…或已任何现有手段保存信息。
E: Precise Recognition enabled. Please save the information timely by taking pictures, memorizing, extracting, or by any other existing means.

C: 龙女是什么职位？
E: What does a Dragon Lady do exactly?

C: 不知道你听说了没有，有人封闭了与丹鼎司有关的几个洞天。
E: I don't know if you heard — someone locked down the delves connected to the Alchemy Commission.

C: 别急别急，我比你还急，你先听我问完好吧？
E: Hmph, you're not the only one. Can you at least hear me out first?

C: 什么？丹鼎司洞天早已封锁，若不是药王的莳者……
E: What? The Alchemy Commission delves were locked down ages ago. If you aren't a disciple, then...

C: 怎么样？那家伙果然是打算把本小姐抓回丹鼎司的吧，我早就猜到了。
E: What happened? That man wanted to catch me and take me back to the Alchemy Commission, right? I knew it!

C: 虽然这样做触犯了持明族的律条，丹鼎司也一定会惩罚我。但我顾不着那么多了，我不能眼睁睁看着那人送命。所以……
E: I broke many of the Vidyadhara's laws, and the Alchemy Commission is bound to punish me, but I just can't let my beloved die...

C: 我只能出此下策，大人，原谅我……
E: I had no choice but to come up with this plan. Please forgive me...

C: 要问的就这么多了。
E: That's all I wanted to ask.

C: 见着龙女大人，还不下跪。
E: Kneel before the Dragon Lady.

C: 出发。（前往流云渡）
E: Let's go. (Go to Cloudford)

C: 对不住了，本来有根琼实鸟串，不过眼下都被我吃光了。
E: I'm sorry. I had a berrypheasant skewer but I already ate it all up.

C: 那么，最后向你道声谢，{NICKNAME}，自始至终你都从旁见证着我。
E: So finally it's time for me to say thanks to you, {NICKNAME}, for being there for me right from the start.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}，留我一个人静静吧。
E: Go, {NICKNAME}. Leave me be here.

C: 病重的人不该在医馆里吗？
E: Is this really the best place for the sick?

C: 咳咳咳…这里已经被药王秘传盯上了吗？
E: *coughing* ...The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus already had their eye on this place?

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 丑陋吗？你是不是太伤心了，一时难以接受？
E: Hey! I know you're probably in shock, but—

C: 在丹恒到来前，一切风平浪静。他们想赶走丹恒，倒也确实合理。
E: Before Dan Heng arrived, everything was quiet as a windless lake. In that regard, it is understandable that they want to get rid of him.

C: 依然保有那罪人的龙尊之力，谈何新生？
E: ...how then do you still possess the power of the high elder?

C: 不错不错。你不像别的大人，说话老实，还算可信。你要我跟你去鳞渊境里走一遭？
E: Hmm, interesting... You're not like other grown-ups. You say what you think, and you seem trustworthy. So, you want me to go with you to Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 芫梨？是你吗？我还以为你遭遇什么意外了。
E: Yuanli? Is that you? I thought something must have happened to you.

C: 明白。地衡司会立刻封锁流云渡，「牧场行动」即将开始。
E: Got it. The Realm-Keeping Commission will immediately lock down Cloudford, and commence the Herding Operation.

C: 谢谢恩公！谢谢恩公！
E: A thousand thanks, kind stranger!

C: 不错不错，不愧是我神探三月七精挑细选的小助手！
E: Nice work indeed — you're sidekick to a genius detective after all!

C: 看看影像四。
E: Watch footage four.

C: 这毒药有持明「蜕生」一般的功效，竟让渔公返老还童，变成了小孩子。从此以后，幼儿渔公，就一边追查「饮茶会」，一边破解各种奇案。
E: The drug has the same de-aging effect as the Vidyadhara's hatching rebirth — the Angler gets younger and turns back into a child. From there on out, the Angler pursues the Tea Society while solving all kinds of strange cases.

C: 这家伙看起来不太讲道理，咱们怎么办？
E: This guy doesn't seem like the negotiable type. What should we do?

C: （看来这一招行不通啊……）
E: (Looks like this isn't gonna work...)

C: 那是个军用设施，稍有骚动，云骑就会赶来。但为什么会有怪物？
E: Also, the dock is a military installation — the Cloud Knights would be on the scene at the slightest disturbance. How did so many monsters show up without warning?

C: 应该是在…建木生发的前一天。
E: It was... the day before the Ambrosial Arbor came back to life.

C: 应该是个化外民，金发，打扮不像仙舟人士。
E: He's got blonde hair, and judging by the way he's dressed, I'd say he was an outworlder.

C: （他们应该不会在码头上接头…这里太开阔了，感觉很不适合邪恶计划……）
E: (They wouldn't have met up at the dock, it's too open. No good for discussing evil plans...)

C: 藏起我的星槎玩具，把呆在港口数飞船的我拉走，逼着我坐在桌案前读书。虽然我费尽心思最后进了天舶司，结果在她的安排下，我却干起了文职。
E: She hid my starskiff toys, dragged me away from the port when I stayed behind to count ships, forced me to study for ages... I did everything I could to work my way into the Sky-Faring Commission, but she used her authority to assign me a desk job.

C: 真是有够简陋的招待…
E: Wow, the full five-star treatment...

C: 晴霓小姐为什么会执着于这个梦想呢？
E: Why are you so dedicated to that idea, Miss Qingni?

C: 嗯，交给我们吧。
E: Yes, leave it to us.

C: {NICKNAME}，咱们走吧。去星槎海找找晴霓。
E: Let's go, {NICKNAME}. We should head to Starskiff Haven and find Qingni.

C: 你给瓦尔特转述了刚才发生的事。
E: You tell Welt everything that just happened.

C: 如果对于帝弓司命来说，碾碎那些敌人如同呼吸般简单…那么，我们的牺牲又算什么呢？
E: If crushing our enemies was as easy as breathing for the Reignbow Arbiter... then what purpose did our sacrifices serve?

C: 我也想不通，您为什么就是不明白……
E: And I don't understand why you don't understand...

C: 出示卡芙卡的短信
E: Show Kafka's message.

C: 我留下来帮你。
E: I'll stay and help you.

C: 谢谢。在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I'm grateful. On the Xianzhou... you're the only one I can turn to.

C: 也就是说，我告诉你的答案一定有一个是真的，一个是假的。但孰真孰假，就只有提问者自己来判断了……
E: So, one of my answers will be true, the other will be false. As for which is which, that's up to the asker to make the call...

C: 嗯，你做得很好，{NICKNAME}。
E: Well, you're doing a great job, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这是我拼凑出来的情报，具体的阿刃不肯说。
E: That's the information I managed to piece together. Bladie refused to tell me the details.

C: （小声）还是留个假名安全…
E: Best to use a fake name...

C: 不行。这什么时候啦，星槎海根本没人。你的朋友如果没出事的话，肯定也在安全区呢。别担心，你跟我走，到地方就能见到他们啦。
E: No can do, mister — it's way too late. You won't find anyone at Starskiff Haven. If your friends made it out, then they'll already be in the safe zone. No need to worry, you'll see them when we get there.

C: 小心，是没见过的生物……
E: Careful, we've never seen this kind of life form before...

C: 刚才那些被打倒的怪物……
E: Those monsters back there...

C: 小女子身体孱弱，实在无能为力……
E: Oh, I'm afraid I'm not built for hard labor...

C: 这不是丹恒先生吗？
E: Well, if it isn't Dan Heng.

C: 条件是，在受审前她要有一日自由，前往鳞渊境与老朋友们再会一面——而更离谱的是，景元居然答应了！
E: Her surrender came with one condition — that she be allowed a day of freedom before the trial. She wanted to travel to Scalegorge Waterscape and meet with her old friends one last time... I can't believe Jing Yuan actually agreed!

C: 今天过后，她就要离开罗浮了。
E: Today's her last day on the Luofu.

C: 谢谢你的建言，龙女大人，能见你一面，胜过药石百倍。
E: Thank you for your advice, Dragon Lady. Meeting you has provided more healing than any kind of medicine or remedy.

C: 我要问的那人身形高瘦，表情阴沉，一柄残破的剑从不离身。不知龙女大人有没有印象？
E: The person I'm inquiring about is tall, with a serious expression. He also carries a crude sword with him at all times. Have you seen someone like that, Dragon Lady?

C: {NICKNAME}，把信给我吧，事关丹枫的过去，我必须谨慎对待。
E: {NICKNAME}, let me hold on to the letter. Anything related to Dan Feng's past should be handled with care.

C: 将军将我带离幽囚狱，来此问话，显然不是为了那里的安全，而是想单独谈些避人耳目的话题。
E: You removed me from The Shackling Prison and decided to interrogate me here... but not for security purposes. You wish to discuss things that shouldn't be overheard.

C: 大姐姐，你该不会是故意放水，让我先到的吧？
E: You didn't go easy just so I would get here first, did you?

C: 他转变成了长生种？
E: He transformed into a long-life species?

C: 「刃」…是个好名字。在没有尽头的余生里，你只能在杀与被杀间徘徊，求索自己的埋骨之地。若非如此，你便无法消解「应星」的悔恨。
E: Blade... What a fitting name. In the remainder of your infinite life, you will experience only murder and your own death, all the while pleading for a place to rest. This is the only way you are able to relinquish Yingxing's regrets.

C: 大姐姐，你待在此处不要走动，我去去就回。
E: Wait here a moment, miss — I'll be right back.

C: 这一艘行经太卜司与工造司……
E: This one goes past the Divination Commission and the Artisanship Commission...

C: 你方才的自信到哪儿去了？
E: What happened to that confidence of yours?

C: 太久没有动剑，一时兴起，险些勾起魔阴作孽。
E: A long time has passed since I wielded this sword... The heat of combat nearly cast me into the darkness.

C: 这个云骑为什么在这里…
E: What is this Cloud Knight doing here...?

C: 我来处理吧。
E: Let me handle it.

C: 你…你怎么还活着？
E: How... How are you still alive?

C: （这个邮包上面写着，「神策府收，加急」…找到了，这就是药王秘传想要截获的信件。）
E: (What's written on this package? "Seat of Divine Foresight, Urgent..." This is it — the mail the Disciples want to intercept.)

C: 怎么啦？你们不是还有任务在身，要继续前进吗？
E: Hmm? You still have more to do, no? Onward!

C: 你要去哪里？本座还没教完你呢。你要是不熟悉记忆空间的相关机制就擅自到处跑，是很容易出现危险的。
E: Where do you think you're going? I haven't finished instructing you. Running around in the memory space without understanding its basic functions can cause permanent damage.

C: 多喝点茶，对身体好。
E: Drink some tea. It's good for what ails you.

C: 我什么也没说啊。哼…我还是比较喜欢星芋啵啵。
E: Hmph, no comment... I happen to prefer startaro bubble tea.

C: 这就是贝洛伯格吗？这地方一点儿也不冷啊？
E: So this is Belobog? I was expecting it to be cold.

C: 三月七所犯的过错，便是丢失了属于神明的权柄。
E: March 7th's mistake was the loss of the authority of the Aeons.

C: 刚才那个人说自己是流光忆庭的「信使」。流光忆庭…他们为什么要阻挠我？
E: That person said she was a messenger. The Garden of Recollection... Why would they come after me?

C: 这应该是一个光锥吧？在穷观阵里面，那个奇怪的声音不是说，要送给我一个礼物吗…看起来就是这个了吧？
E: Looks like a Light Cone. Didn't that weird voice in the Matrix say something about a parting gift? I guess this is it.

C: （也不知她学得怎么样了，怎么连个人影都见不着？）
E: (I wonder how well she's progressing. Where has she been these days?)

C: 我听彦卿聊起过你，他说你的实力不可小觑，武器形制也很别具一格。
E: Yanqing mentioned you before. He said that you're not to be underestimated and that your weapon has a unique shape.

C: 两位真是贵人多忘事。自我介绍一下，小女子夕葵，是驭空司舵的秘书，之一。
E: Ah, I supposed busy people have short memories. Please let me introduce myself. I'm Xikui, one of the secretaries serving the Helm Master Yukong.

C: 两位好啊。来罗浮仙舟一趟虽然不容易，但这儿的光景确实和故乡大不一样，真是不虚此行。
E: Nice to meet you both. The journey to the Xianzhou Luofu wasn't an easy one, but the scenery here is worth it. It's completely different from my homeland.

C: 终于，全都消停了，多谢你帮忙解围。
E: That was the last of them. Thank you for helping me out.

C: 不过，使团一直称它英雄之剑…
E: But the delegation calls it the "Sword of Heroes"...

C: 是啊。我不想云璃这孩子一生都活在她父亲留下的阴影之中…含光的错误，不该由他的女儿来背负。
E: Yes, I don't want her to spend her whole life trapped under her father's shadow... She doesn't deserve to carry the weight of his mistakes.

C: 你们喝着奶茶、聊着八卦，时间不经意间流逝。到了第二天……
E: Sipping milk tea and gossiping, time slipped away unnoticed. The next day arrived...

C: …确实不像是见财起意。
E: ...Yeah, I don't think it was stolen on a whim.

C: （整理一下思路，得帮助云璃摆脱嫌疑才行…）
E: (Let me gather my thoughts. I need to help Yunli clear her name...)

C: 但老朽也深知，她这般直来直往的性子最易酿成祸端。若她真的一时冲动窃走了孤云剑，我绝不会有一丝偏袒。
E: But I know well that Yunli can be impulsive, so if she did steal the sword on a whim, I won't show her any favors.

C: 你问问银枝，别问我。
E: Ask Argenti, not me.

C: 我要走了。
E: I'm leaving.

C: …可是，你却让银枝将你取出？
E: ...But you allowed Argenti to take you away?

C: 我们接下来，会去往下一个记忆的片段，出发吗？
E: Shall we proceed to the next fragment of my memories?

C: …后来的我斑驳不堪，轻风从剑身上的空洞穿过，还会发出高低不同的音调，去向远方的山野——原来那时的我是乐器，我怀念作为乐器的时光。
E: ...Later, as I became worn and weathered, the gentle wind would pass through the hollows of my body, creating melodic tones that echoed in the distant mountains. I became a musical instrument then. I miss those times.

C: 完成孤云阁下的意愿，正是我抵达仙舟的目的。伊德莉拉在上，无论是铸剑为犁，或是其他，只要能让孤云阁下结束战斗，我都双手赞成！
E: Fulfilling Master Guyun's wishes is the reason I came to the Xianzhou. With Idrila's blessing, you could turn Master Guyun into a plow, but as long as it fulfills his wish to end war, I support it fully!

C: 啊，怀炎将军怎么有空前来观礼？
E: Oh, General Huaiyan! What brings you here?

C: 这金色树苗也会成为仙舟日常风景的一部分，想必也是遂了英雄的心愿。
E: This golden sapling will become a part of the everyday scenery of the Xianzhou. I believe it's what he would have wanted.

C: ——哈哈，开玩笑的！我就爱看你这表情，拿去吧，酒馆地窖的钥匙，在左手边第三个桶里。别说是我给的。
E: ...Haha, just kidding! I love seeing that look on your face. Take this key to the tavern cellar. Third barrel on the left. You never saw me.

C: 证据就是这枚戒指，对么？
E: This ring is a piece of evidence, right?

C: 大艺术家花火反锁上卧室的房门，用红色颜料制造出了「到处都是血」的假象。而那位第一个冲进室内，并证明她已死亡的侦探助手……
E: The great artist Sparkle locked herself away in her bedroom, using red paint to create the semblance of spattered blood everywhere. And that assistant detective who was first on the scene who confirmed her death...

C: 看，这有张证件——「人才激励部，沙马里」…是受害者的东西？
E: Look, an ID card: "Talent Motivation Department: Shamari"... Is this the victim's?

C: 我的个乖乖，这锤子分量可不轻啊…应该就是「花火大人遇害案」的凶器了。
E: Holy moly, this hammer is super heavy... This must be the murder weapon for the Sparkle Murder Case.

C: 为何不拿它来推算星核的所在？
E: Why not use it to calculate the location of the Stellaron?

C: 你们自己去问她吧——想问多久都行。
E: Ask her yourself — take as long as you wish.

C: 所以，接下来我要做一个违背规制的决定。啊，也许还不止一个，哈哈，想想真是痛快。
E: As such, I am about to make a decision that runs counter to those rules and regulations. Oh, uh — decisions, plural. Haha, what a rare pleasure.

C: 统治那片国度的帝皇无法忍受浮生如露，百年后基业为他人所有。于是他倾尽一切打造九艘巨舰，向传闻有神明垂迹的天外星辰进发，妄想求取仙方灵丹，驻颜长生。
E: There was a time when the ruling emperor could not bear his temporary existence, or the thought of his life's achievements being lost to another after his death. He became fixated on acquiring an elixir of immortality, and focused his power on constructing a fleet of nine ships. These ships would voyage into deep space, where traces of gods were rumored to exist...

C: 他…成功了吗？
E: Did he... succeed?

C: 要知道伤心总是难免的…
E: There comes a time when we all feel sorry...

C: 别过来！再往前走，别怪老夫不客气了！
E: Stay away! If you come any further, I'll not spare you!

C: 安保指望不上，就让你们尝尝这机巧的厉害！
E: If the security mechanisms didn't teach you a lesson, these robots will!

C: 等、等等！你们要对老夫有信心！
E: H—Hold on! Have some faith in me!

C: 这样……应该可以了吧。
E: I guess we're done...

C: 哦对了，老夫生平不喜欢欠人恩惠，这些小玩意儿你们拿着，就当是你们为我干了这么多活儿应得的报酬。
E: Agh, I've always hated owing a favor. Take these with you — rewards for your tireless efforts.

C: 谢谢～
E: Thank you~

C: 反…反物质军团？别吹牛了！你反物质军团跑到长乐天来做什么？
E: A—Antimatter Legion? Stop bluffing! Why would the Antimatter Legion be in Exalting Sanctum?

C: 让开点，别在这儿耽误哥儿几个的正事儿！
E: Yeah, get lost! Stop meddling in our business!

C: 很好，希望你能永远记住这一点。永远。
E: Good, I hope you remember this — forever.

C: （唉…去神策府通知一下青镞吧。）
E: (*sigh* ...I'd better report my findings to Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight.)

C: 你们，都闭嘴。我放生的金边苜蓿，被羊吃光了。
E: Shut up, both of you. The gold-fringed alfalfa I released were all eaten by the sheep.

C: 这怎么可能！背弃「丰饶」之道，岂不就是把自己开除出生命的队伍？
E: This is out of the question! Abandoning the way of Abundance will oust me from the team of life!

C: 走吧，该是凭口才说服他们的时候了，咱们挨个找他们聊聊…就像开始时那样。
E: It's time to convince them with our silver tongues. Let's chat with them one by one... just like what we did in the beginning.

C: 那是当然了，这些出自雅萝莉八号星上的奇妙机械生物被它们无情的人类主人奴役着奔向战场，牺牲、破碎、熄灭，代替所有的人类。
E: Of course! These wonderful mechanical creatures from Yaloli-8 are enslaved and sent to the battlefield by their ruthless human masters. They sacrifice themselves and bear all the damage in the humans' stead.

C: 无排泄物…
E: It has no excretion...

C: 植物，生命无价……
E: The life of a plant is priceless...

C: 地上倒着好多冥差！
E: There are so many spiritfarers lying on the floor!

C: …星穹列车乘员，神策府的客人，帮助云骑平息了建木灾厄，是联盟的朋友。
E: ...A passenger on the Astral Express and a guest of the Seat of Divine Foresight. You assisted the Cloud Knights in resolving the Ambrosial Arbor calamity and are a friend of the Alliance.

C: 不能撤，这可是个千载难逢的取材机会！
E: N—No way! This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to get something for my vids!

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 家人，记得配合我一下，咱们走吧。
E: Yo, remember, I'll need your help. Let's go.

C: 封印、封印、封印…呸，我早晚得让你撕了那封印。
E: Bah — trapped for now... Sooner or later I'll find a way to make you break the seal...

C: 好，达成战略合作。
E: Fine. This is just a strategic partnership.

C: （桂乃芬真的被岁阳吃掉了？）
E: (Did Guinaifen really get eaten by heliobi?)

C: （默默离开）
E: (Leave quietly)

C: 浮烟，还不快滚出我的身体？
E: Cirrus, get out of my body. Now.

C: 不过一遇外力刺激，这种平衡也很容易崩溃。这不，「燎原」就在与将军大战后成了咱们。
E: ...but this internal balance is easily broken when exposed to external forces — just like how we were torn apart and reborn after Ignamar fought the general.

C: 那个人偶判官会说出这么恶心的发言吗？
E: Yuck — that judge would never say something so sickly.

C: 寒鸦是吾的妹妹。不过，这不足以判断吾身真伪，再换个问题吧。
E: Hanya is my younger sister, but this alone cannot prove who I am. Ask me something else.

C: 令你尤其在意的是她的声音：清澈、明亮，但藏着一丝疲惫——也许她每天都要对无数个客人重复一样的说辞吧。
E: What particularly captures your attention is her voice: Limpid, bright, but with a hidden tinge of fatigue — perhaps she has to repeat this umpteenth times to umpteenth customers every day.

C: （柯柯娜小姐的状态很不好…为什么会变成这样？）
E: (Miss Cocona doesn't look too good... Why is this happening?)

C: 只要挺过这一段时间就好了……
E: You just have to get through this...

C: 对于一个已经千疮百孔的灵魂来说，这大概就是最好的结局了。
E: To a scarred and battered soul, this is probably the best ending.

C: 当然了，爸爸妈妈…不管你们说什么，做什么……
E: Of course, Father, Mother... No matter what you say or do...

C: 噢，还有一次，你待在老板办公室那么久，有说有笑的…想必又拿到不少优质的客户源吧？
E: Oh, there was another time when you were in the boss' office for a long time, chatting and laughing... I bet you got quite the windfall in customer leads, didn't you?

C: 生活总会触底反弹，柯柯娜。
E: Life has its ups and downs, Cocona.

C: 谢谢你，{F#女士}{M#先生}。谢谢你尊重我的意愿。
E: Thank you. Thank you for respecting my wishes.

C: 说吧，我会尽力满足。
E: Say it, and I'll do my utmost to grant it.

C: 请您放心——家族会确保您在「黄金的时刻」中的购物体验不受影响。
E: Please don't worry. The Family will ensure that your shopping experience at the Golden Hour will not be inconvenienced.

C: …嘀嗒！快过来！快过来！
E: ...Tick tock! Over here! Quickly!

C: 我实在不想扫大家的兴，但现在我恐怕需要一些…空间。
E: I do not wish to rain on your parade, but I think I may need a little... space.

C: 同意。实在不好意思，莱斯利先生。希望您能快点好起来。
E: I agree. I'm so sorry, Mr. Lesley. I hope that you feel better soon!

C: 你的人生，你来决定。
E: It is your life, your decision.

C: 我来帮你。
E: Let me help.

C: 可惜只凭我自己无法改变任何事…我会在这里等您回心转意。
E: It is just a shame that I cannot change anything with my power alone... I shall wait here for your change of heart.

C: 在你面前的是一扇普通的酒店客房房门。但你有强烈的预感，在它背后不会是一间普通的客房。
E: What stands before you is a simple hotel room door. However, you have a strong feeling that what lies behind this door is far from a simple room.

C: 迪恩先生！来来来，给您引荐一下——这位是芙洛拉小姐，我司最有前途的年轻人！从今天开始，她就是您的私人助理了！
E: Mr. Dean! Come, come, let me introduce you! This is Flora, our company's most promising young worker! From today forth, she will be your personal assistant!

C: 请您今晚务必好好休息，迪恩先生。晚安。
E: Please make sure you get some rest this evening, Mr. Dean. Goodnight.

C: 这在我看来是完全不可接受，您初来乍到，就该打响自己的旗号才是。
E: This is, to me, simply unacceptable. You should be flying your own flag that heralds your glorious appointment.

C: 那<color=#dbc291ff>空艇就可以命名为：「飞翔时针号」</color>——继承了钟表小子的意志，听上去就是个了不得的正义组织。
E: Then <color=#dbc291ff>the airship's new name shall henceforth be the Soaring Clock Hand</color> — an inheritance of Clockie's will. It sounds like a high-flying organization of justice.

C: 哈哈，老佩德罗觉得挺好的，这未免也太{F#好看}{M#帅}了…我都想搞一副油画挂家里试试……
E: Haha, I think it's pretty good. This is just too {F#good-looking}{M#handsome}... Even I want a portrait to hang up at home...

C: 客人您好，请问有什么可以为您效劳的吗？
E: Greetings, esteemed guest. How may I assist you today?

C: 虽然听说梦境里发生了一些状况，但这毕竟还是工作日啊…现在大堂经理带头擅离职守了，留下我们怎么办？
E: I heard about something going down in the Dreamscape, but it's a work day so, y'know... Our lobby manager is MIA, too. What are we supposed to do?

C: 那么，回头见！
E: So, then — see you later!

C: …我真是爱死你这张漏风的嘴巴了！
E: Butter my fudge, so nice of you to air my dirty laundry!

C: （看他面相挺老实的，应该没什么大问题吧？）
E: (He looks pretty honest. There shouldn't be any problems, right?)
Yo...

C: 何况那件事我们不是早就复盘过了？给我消息的线人就是你在艾普瑟隆星际证交所的那位老朋友，谁能想到一个干了半辈子股票的人居然是个饭桶？
E: Besides, haven't we already done a retro on that? My source was your old friend at the Epsilon Star Exchange. Who knew that you could work in stocks your whole life, and still be incompetent like that?

C: 我想要出去旅行。推掉所有的巡演、商务和代言工作，来一段只属于我自己的旅程。
E: I want to go on a trip. I've canceled all my concerts, business engagements, and endorsement jobs to have a journey just for myself.

C: （硬闯的话可能会让青雀置身险境…怎么办，有没有什么办法……）
E: (I might put Qingque in danger if I break in by force... Is there any other way to go about this...)

C: 说得有道理…撤了撤了！可恶，下次一定要赢回来……
E: Good point... I'm out! Darn it, I'll win next time...

C: （深度合作…真不知道下次又会遇到战略投资部的哪位鬼才。）
E: (Deep cooperation... I wonder which eccentric from the Strategic Investment Department I'll meet next time?)

C: 因为他建立这个组织的目的便是谋财害人，任何背景或苦衷都不能为其辩解——于我等骑士和游侠的眼中，那便是必被铲除之恶。
E: He made this organization to scam money out of people and harm everyone. So, nothing about his background or any excuses can justify his actions. As a knight and a ranger, we see it as an evil that must be eliminated at all costs.

C: 拜别飞霄将军。
E: Farewell, General Feixiao.

C: …椒丘大夫，其实我们在这里。
E: ...Master Jiaoqiu. We're actually over here.

C: 你可别想在这儿偷懒。
E: Don't even think about slacking off this time.

C: 入职邀请函，跟我师傅有关？
E: A Designer Invite? For my master?

C: 我虽然清楚星槎制造的原理，但从来还没走近瞧瞧那些生产线和生产过程呢。
E: I get the basic principles of starskiff manufacturing, but I've never personally been there to see the production line or the process with my own eyes.

C: 铖杰，还要照相吗？
E: Any more photos, Chengjie?

C: 谢谢你青雀小姐，现在我已经不再想这么多了。我只想马上回去，赶紧完成师傅的手稿。
E: Thank you, Miss Qingque. I'm not overthinking everything anymore. I just want to go back right away and help complete my master's manuscript.

C: 好累，我已经…燃尽了……
E: I'm exhausted... I'm totally... drained...

C: 你这不是挺清楚的吗？
E: I think you can do it better than me.

C: 你有想过是你师傅自己的错吗？
E: Do you think your master might have made a mistake?

C: 我以为公输师傅，根本看不上我……
E: I thought you would look down on me, Master Gongshu...

C: 那就修补漏洞继续制作吧。
E: Well, then you should fix the errors and continue working on the design.

C: 不过…令有缓急，事分轻重。身为十王司的判官，吾有便宜行事的职权，若你们能替太卜带去她所要的活口…吾也不是不能行个方便？
E: However... Things should be done in order of priority, and I can make decisions at my discretion as the judge of the Ten-Lords Commission. If you can bring back the living people the master diviner is looking for, I don't mind helping you guys.

C: 眼前的宙合阵，「察宙合之势」，这是专用来调取「时间」的阵基。
E: This Temporal Terminal that observes the potential of the temporal plane is a base terminal designed to retrieve information related to time.

C: 身为判官，吾身与因果殿相连。勾摄魂魄，裁断业报，若连这些都做不到，算什么判官呢？
E: As a judge, my body is connected to the Hall of Karma. I wouldn't be a proper judge if I was unable to collect souls and decide on karmic consequences.

C: 你不去看看吗，希儿？这可是那小子的卫冕战哪。
E: Aren't you going to go watch the fight, Seele? He's defending his championship title.

C: 年轻人的事，我也不想多掺和了。我有信心，你跟希儿绝对有办法搞清楚。
E: Anyway, I'm too old to be getting involved in this stuff. I'm sure you and Seele can sort this by yourselves.

C: 感觉他有些亢奋…
E: He does seem very excited...

C: 喔，确实！好眼力啊希儿。不管是谁干的，当时肯定着急得很。
E: Oh, you're right! You've got a good eye, Seele! Whoever did it must've been in a hurry.

C: 大奔想家了。大奔想和小飞聊天。大奔想和卡西迪一起玩。
E: Big Ben misses home. Big Ben wants to talk with Little Fay. Big Ben wants to play with Cassidy.

C: 双边选手——请到擂台两侧就位！
E: Competitors, take up positions!

C: 这机器人的系统我已经帮你们重置好了，它现在不会攻击你们了！赶紧把它带走吧，带它回原来的主人那儿！
E: I've reset its systems — it won't attack you anymore! Just get it out of here — take it back to its owner!

C: 「熔锤镇出身的勇士，无敌的磐岩冠军——」
E: "The Moltammerville warrior, the peerless Boulder Champion..."

C: 和小伙伴们一起，把那些吓人的怪物收拾得干干净净！
E: ...I'll go with my friends and clear out all the scary monsters!

C: …我都听不出你是不是在开玩笑了。
E: ...I can't tell if you're joking.

C: 也不是什么了不得的诗情画意啦，只是想到上一回抵达仙舟时的波折和惊悚……
E: Well, it's nothing too poetic. I was just thinking about all the twists and turns we went through when we first arrived at the Xianzhou ship...

C: 那多半是「晖长石号」更大吧！
E: The Radiant Feldspar is bigger, I guess!

C: 是我…抱歉，我们一时看守失察，都是我的责任。
E: It's my fault... we let our guard down for a moment. I take full responsibility.

C: 这位姑娘在星槎海出手帮助镇伏逃跑的步离人囚犯，彦卿先在此谢过。但你离开时…也顺手带走了我的飞剑。
E: She helped me capture the escaped borisin prisoners at the Starskiff Haven. Allow me to express my gratitude for you, but when you left... you took my Flying Sword with you.

C: 你是想要回这把剑吧？可以，但不能是以这种方式。我们朱明的规矩，在战场上失去的剑，要在战场上拿回来。
E: You want your sword back, right? Well, you can't just take it back. On the Zhuming, when you lose your sword on the battlefield, you have to reclaim it on the battlefield.

C: 的确如此。据《仙舟律》港阜卷廿七条所载：「诸官、私物，一入港阜，当受搜检。拒之者以赃论。」
E: Indeed. According to Article 27 of the Xianzhou Legal Code: "All official and private goods, upon entering the port, shall be subject to inspection. Failure to submit to such inspection shall be deemed equivalent to the possession of unlawful items and shall be subject to legal ramifications."

C: …其实吧，学会委托人在场也不是必要条件，我这不是…希望相关的手续更合规齐全嘛。
E: ...You know what? I don't think we really need a member from the Intelligentsia Guild present. I'm just hoping... that all the procedures will be thoroughly followed, you know?

C: 向他表明你广博的人脉
E: Show him your extensive connections.

C: 哈——？说大声点，我听不太清。能不能再说一遍？
E: Huh...? Could you repeat that? I didn't quite hear you. Could you say it again?

C: 我原本以为各位是可以讲理的文明人，但看起来公司只想遵守自己的游戏规则。抱歉了，斯科特先生。
E: I thought you were reasonable and civilized, but now it seems the IPC just wants to play by its own rules. My apologies, Mr. Skott.

C: 来迟了一步。不过好消息是，我来了。
E: I may be a bit late, but the good news is: I'm here now.

C: 别闹啊。岗哨神圣，不可侵犯。
E: Cut it out. I'm carrying out my sacred duty.

C: 怎么在什么地方都能遇到你，你不会是一直跟着我吧？
E: Why do I keep bumping into you? Are you stalking me or something?

C: 你觉得这两位到底谁更厉害一点？别怪我，我是真心好奇。
E: Between these two, who do you think is tougher? Don't get me wrong, I'm just curious.

C: 只要能完成这一夙愿，往后究竟能活多久…我都不在乎。
E: As long as I can fulfill that deep-seated desire... I don't care how long I live.

C: 下绝——地纪——
E: Descend to earth...

C: 是啊，的确是位极有压迫感的将军。
E: I agree. General Feixiao is indeed impressive.

C: {NICKNAME}，不必担忧。无论如何，我会留下作为列车的人证，接受询问。
E: Don't worry, {NICKNAME}. No matter what happens, I'll stay here as a witness and answer any questions she might have.

C: 公司派驻仙舟的商业代表之一。\n论性格是个欺软怕硬的家伙，长久在公司工作的经验让他懂得至少表面上要<color=#dbc291ff>遵守规矩</color>。
E: One of the representatives stationed on Xianzhou by the IPC.\nHe picks on the weak but fears the powerful. His experience in the IPC has taught him that he has to <color=#dbc291ff>abide by the rules</color>, at least on the surface.

C: 来吧，上前一步，用你能想象到的最顺手的方式挥剑攻击！只有了解了你的肢体习惯，我们才知道该从哪儿开始，教你些什么。
E: Come on, step forward and strike with the sword in the most natural way you can think of! It's important for us to grasp your natural movements, so we can decide where to start and what you need to learn.

C: 像模像样啊！
E: Well done!

C: 顺手起来啦！瞧好了这招！
E: Alright, check out this move!

C: 两位师父十分严厉，使我深刻感受到了修习剑术之艰辛。
E: Both masters are super strict, giving me a real taste of how hard sword training can be.

C: 师父们怎么又吵起来了！我明明感到这些天你们的气氛融洽多了……
E: Why are you two arguing again? I thought things had been improving between you lately...

C: 这报菜名，都把我给说饿了。
E: All this talk about food is making me hungry.

C: 若是剂量再多些，浓度再高些，便会放慢代谢，教人血流不凝，乃至五感尽失——虽是老病不侵的长生种服下了也不能免。
E: Increase the dose or the potency, and it'll slow the metabolism, making the blood thin and resulting in the loss of all senses. Even long-life species cannot escape its effects.

C: 彦卿啊彦卿，小小年纪就一把年纪了…说起来你今年到底多大了？
E: Oh, Yanqing, so young, yet so grown-up... By the way, how old are you exactly?

C: 那个云骑…不认识彦卿师父？
E: That Cloud Knight... didn't recognize Master Yanqing?

C: 不错，但不是堂前会审。只是想请两位聊聊，廓清些事实。
E: That's right, but don't worry, this isn't a trial. I just want to have a chat with you and get a better understanding of the facts.

C: 青丘军的斥候回报，步离人又开始蠢蠢欲动了。原本一盘散沙的步离猎群，开始彼此攻伐，互相吞并，结成更大的猎群。在他们的背后，有个叫「蟒古思」的东西在指引他们。
E: The scouts of the Verdant Knights have sent back reports that borisin are making trouble again. The borisin packs that were once divided and scattered have started swallowing each other up, forming larger and larger packs. Moreover, there's an entity named "Mangas" behind it all.

C: 移交呼雷一事，我会派遣下属椒丘、貊泽先行对其囚牢状况进行探视，以便后续展开押解。若无其他疑问，这就开始吧？
E: And as for Hoolay, I'll send my lieutenants Jiaoqiu and Moze to check on his condition in prison and ready him for transport. If there are no more questions, shall we get this started?
Gee...

C: 说起来，这演武仪典到底什么时候开始啊？我瞧着那艘竞锋舰在天空上飘了好些天了，啥时能登上去瞧瞧呢？
E: Seriously, when is this Wardance going to start? The Skysplitter has been hovering there for ages. When can we board and see what's inside?

C: 能办妥这些伪装身份的人想必位高权重…我们去别处瞧瞧。
E: Whoever is providing them with official identities must hold a position of power... Let's search elsewhere.

C: 也对，罗浮人向来宅心仁厚，即使对寄生在丹鼎司的瘤子，也舍不得剜肉疗毒，倒是把想要施救的医者送去了朱明仙舟。
E: But I guess I understand. The people of the Luofu are known for their kindness. Even when faced with the malignant tumor within the Alchemy Commission, they couldn't bring themselves to cut it out. Instead, they exiled the healer who tried to solve the problem to the Xianzhou Zhuming.

C: 你说什么？
E: What did you just say?

C: 恰恰相反，是我该谢你才对。
E: Quite the contrary. I should be the one thanking you.

C: 死在此地的魔阴身…似乎并不是囚牢里逃离的犯人。
E: These mara-struck soldiers... don't appear to be escaped prisoners.

C: 为了混乱。只有混乱才能给他们一线希望，让他们重新攀上权力的巅峰。
E: They aim to spread chaos. They believe that only in chaos can they regain their former power and influence.

C: 一个表情阴冷的狐人若有似无地看向椒丘，那目光的压力太过锐利，似乎警示着椒丘<color=#eb4d3dff>「任何自作聪明的小心思，终将酿成追悔莫及的严重后果」</color>。
E: A foxian with a cold expression gazes at Jiaoqiu. There is sharp pressure to the gaze, carrying as if a warning to the healer that says: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Every clever little thought you bear might lead to severe consequence you will come to regret."</color>

C: 现在，我们来谈谈你侍奉的那位曜青狐人将军。末度说她为我而来，也就意味着她会亲自出马追捕我。
E: Now, let's talk about the foxian general you serve. Mok Tok says she's here for me, which means she'll be hunting me herself.

C: 呼雷人数可不占优啊？
E: But we have the advantage in numbers, right?

C: 在你阖眼之前，你应该知道，是我允许他逃走。你的伙伴会带着云骑找到呼雷的下落。
E: Before you close your eyes, you should know that I allowed him to escape, because he will lead the Cloud Knights to Hoolay's hideout.

C: 我问自己，是什么让他们在伤愈后，又不顾一切地奔赴死地？为什么不珍惜得来不易的生命？这让我感到迷茫、空虚……
E: So I asked myself, why were they so eager to run toward their death after they had recovered from their wounds? Why wouldn't they value their hard-won life? All the doubts left me feeling lost...

C: 三月，想一想你们列车无名客一路旅行经历的大风大浪！你一定见识过比演武对手可怕的多的敌人吧？这么一想是不是轻松多了？
E: March. Think about the great storms that you Nameless of the Express have weathered along your many journeys. There's no doubt that you have faced far more terrifying enemies than your opponents here today, right? Don't you feel a lot more relaxed looking at it that way?

C: 要不要把彦卿师父给叫回来？这当师父的急流勇退…让弟子垫上刀头，这叫哪门子事啊。
E: Why don't we call Master Yanqing back? What kind of master would retire at the height of their career and leave their disciple to fight in their place?

C: 大就是好，多就是美！我看这竞锋舰还是不够大，炮台也不够多！
E: The bigger, the better! If you ask me, the Skysplitter is nowhere near big enough and there are nowhere near enough cannons!

C: 你怎么把自己的弱点告诉我了？
E: Why would you tell me your weakness?

C: 没事，我也经常不忍心看别人冷场而接话，结果导致尴尬的人变成自己。我已经习惯尴尬了，请不必在意。
E: It's alright. I can't bear to watch other people make things awkward, so I always try to keep the conversation going, but then I'm the one who ends up making things awkward. I've gotten used to it by now, so don't worry.

C: 貊泽用冷漠的表情上下打量着你。你能读懂那没有任何表情的表情似乎在说「珍惜生命不好吗？」。
E: Moze sizes you up with a cold, indifferent gaze. You can almost hear the unspoken words in his expressionless face: "Is it not better to cherish your life instead?"

C: 竞锋舰上全体云骑各司其职，不敢怠慢。
E: All Cloud Knights on the Skysplitter have their own responsibilities and wouldn't dare neglect their posts.

C: 至此为止，「猎狼计划」终于顺利收场。
E: The "Wolf-Hunt Mission" has finally come to a smooth end.

C: 这个宇宙中真正有毒的是仙舟人向你灌输的道德，它把狼豢养成了狐狸。
E: The real poison is the morality that the Xianzhou people have tried to instill in you. They've raised a wolf into a fox.

C: 你的名字将被镌刻在仙舟的史册，或是大敌名录里，一切都由你做主。
E: Carve your name into the Xianzhou's history books, or into the List of Archenemies. You have the final say.

C: 身后浓重的黑暗中，传来凶狼的呼喝与走兽的嗥叫。
E: From the dense darkness behind, comes the fierce howls of wolves and the cries of wild beasts.

C: 怎么办？咱们几个是打还是逃？
E: What do we do? Do we fight, or run?

C: 你以为我不知道，你们送信的来意？是景元要你们来试探我的吧？
E: You think I don't know why you're really here? Jing Yuan sent you here to test me, didn't he?

C: 龙女大人切莫惊慌。长老，持明圣地和龙尊不是握在你手中的保命符！
E: Dragon Lady, there's no need to panic. Elder, the Vidyadhara sacred grounds and the high elder are not to be used as pawns in exchange for your life!

C: {F#丫头}{M#小子}，不要和这种人发生冲突。没有必要。
E: There's no need to entangle yourself with such people.

C: {NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}.

C: …看来匹诺康尼的确改变了你，只可惜…算了，先不提这个。
E: ...It looks like Penacony has indeed changed you. It's a pity that... Never mind, I'll drop it for now.

C: 可是，朕杀的人越多，就越害怕。
E: But, the more I slew, the more afraid I grew.

C: 赎罪？你有什么本事赎罪？你以为自己摆出一幅慨然赴死的姿态，那被你屠杀的一千多万人就能安息了吗？你以为罪恶会随着你的死亡消失吗？
E: Atonement? How do you intend to do that? You think the tens of millions you've butchered will find peace just because you've apparently made peace for your sins? You think evil will disappear with your death?

C: （也许她的本性真的不是一个恶魔…）
E: (Perhaps she's not really a devil by nature...)

C: 只是对于大部分有机生命而言，忘记呼吸是一件难事。
E: For most organic lifeforms, forgetting to breathe isn't an easy task.

C: （终于走了…家族的人还真是有耐心。）
E: (She's finally gone... What a patient bunch those Family members are.)

C: 螺丝咕姆怎么也在？
E: How come Screwllum is here too?

C: 卡尔德隆•查德威克毕生最为卓越的成就，是一种名为<color=#dbc291ff>「虚数坍缩脉冲」</color>的武器——
E: The most outstanding achievement of Calderon Chadwick's life is the invention of a weapon called <color=#dbc291ff>Imaginary Implosion Pulse</color>.

C: 查德威克露出一个笑容，你第一次从他的脸上读到由衷的喜悦。
E: Chadwick's face beams with a smile. It is the first time you have seen genuine joy on his face.

C: …我从十五岁开始就在研究虚数理论，能和查德威克博士共事是我毕生的愿望。
E: ...I've been studying Imaginary theories since the age of <unbreak>15</unbreak>. Working with Dr. Chadwick is my lifelong ambition.

C: …您能亲自前来观看试爆，我和我的团队倍感荣幸。这个实验室平时绝不会接待客人…幸好螺丝咕姆先生您的身份特殊，技术研发部不便推辞。
E: ...My team and I are honored to have you here to watch the detonation test. This lab doesn't welcome visitors, but you're special, Mr. Screwllum. The Technology Department wants to stay in your good graces.

C: 检查对撞起爆器状态…<unbreak>30%</unbreak>…<unbreak>50%</unbreak>…<unbreak>75%</unbreak>…完成。
E: Reviewing collider status... <unbreak>30%</unbreak>... <unbreak>50%</unbreak>... <unbreak>75%</unbreak>... Complete.

C: 对力量的畏惧让他们建立起了复杂的规则和律法，极力避免自毁的开关落入疯子或暴徒之手。
E: Out of fear for power, they established complicated laws and regulations in an attempt to prevent these self-unmaking devices from falling into the hands of the insane or the violent.

C: 但银河间多少智识超凡之人，却受尽世俗烦扰。究其原因，到底是天才太过高傲，还是庸人过分嫉妒？没人说得清楚。
E: However, many of those with extraordinary intellect are troubled by secular problems. Is it because the geniuses are too arrogant, or is it because jealousy gets the better of the mundane? No one has an answer for that.

C: 在那之前，希望你能从查德威克那里了解到事件的全貌——也包括在他失联之后发生的事。
E: Until then, I hope you'll learn the full story from Chadwick, including matters that happened before he went missing.

C: 这是我的照片？不对…又好像不一样……
E: This is my photo? No... It seems different...

C: 小鸟又恢复了那副*贱贱*的神情——说真的，它是你见过最不讨喜的卡通形象了，没有之一。
E: The bird regains its *sly* expression — honestly, it's the most unpleasant cartoon character you've ever seen, hands down.

C: 本大爷是银河第一的大发明家，稀世难遇的建筑天才——你可以叫我冯恩大人！
E: I'm the greatest inventor in the cosmos, a once-in-a-millennia architectural genius — you may call me Sir Vaughn!

C: 但他还只是个孩子，本不该经受这些的。
E: But he's still just a child, and should not be subjected to this mess.

C: 我会继续这份意志。现在还看不到什么成果，但或许有一天，筑梦之诗开花结果……
E: I will continue this will. There aren't any fruits of labor yet, but one day, the poem of dreamweaving will come to fruition...

C: …算了，就当是你赢了吧。
E: ...Fine, you win.

C: …奥尔拉？谁？
E: ...Orla? Who?

C: 你刚才为那外邦人撑腰的举动令我印象深刻，善良的灵魂在哪个城邦都很稀缺。
E: Your support for the outlander left a deep impression on me. Kind souls are rare in most cities.

C: 他倒也不是没有支持者——圣城的住房和其他资源都有限，尼卡多利的袭击更是雪上加霜。现在外邦人只能抽签进城。
E: He has his fair share of supporters — the holy city has limited space and resources, and Nikador's assault has only made that distinction more stark. Now, the outlanders have been forced to draw lots for entry.

C: 该从哪里说起呢…就从你开始吧。听说你初入奥赫玛时，尼卡多利的眷属正在城中肆虐。
E: Where should I begin... How about we start with you? I hear that Nikador's brethren were running rampant in the city when you first arrived in Okhema.

C: 吾师，快看！那些东西……
E: Master, look! Those things...

C: 什么话？这明明是我辛辛苦苦偷…我是说搜集来的，你可不能空口污人清白！
E: How could you? I spent all that effort steal... I mean, searching for it. You shouldn't accuse an innocent!

C: 摆盘精美的果蔬、新鲜出炉的浓汤，散发着香气的秘酿…每样都是食物中的上品，并且经过细心烹饪。
E: Lush fruit and vegetables in a platter, aromatic soup fresh from the oven, fine brew emanating intoxicating fragrance... Each and every item is world-class, and made with culinary intricacy.

C: 还不等她把话说完，一个人影便急匆匆跑了过来。母女二人识相地选择了回避。
E: Before she can finish her sentence, a figure runs over in a hurry. The mother and child tactfully excuse themselves.

C: 你撑住啊，他们已经搞到药了，你很快就会好起来的…别睡，别睡！
E: Hang in there. They have the medicine. You'll get well in no time... Don't sleep!

C: 好…好……
E: Okay... Okay...

C: （再后来，我们在重渊遇见了那些需要帮助的外邦人。我为他们购买了<color=#dbc291ff>物美价廉的食物</color>。）
E: (After that, we once again met in the abyss the outsiders who needed aid. There, I bought the outlanders some <color=#dbc291ff>meals that were a good bargain</color>.)

C: 出于这个理由，我认为……
E: In light of this reason, I believe that...

C: 卖给外邦人？那群外邦人穷得叮当响，找你销赃都比找他们靠谱——你为富不仁，但确实富啊。
E: Selling to outlanders? Those outlanders were penniless — he would've done much better fencing the food to you instead. You may have gotten rich unscrupulously, but the fact is that you are rich.

C: 卫兵们押着这位老者远去。他和弟子很快就会收拾行囊、离开圣城…
E: The guards escort the old man away. Both he and his student quickly pack up their belongings and leave the holy city...

C: 求你了，请出手吧！
E: I'm begging you. Please do something!

C: 开裂的箭镞重回炉床，死去的战士埋入坟场，这名为命运的规则理应是这样。
E: As broken arrows are cast in rebirth, and fallen soldiers return to the earth. These are but the rules of fate.

C: 我们可不能拒绝命运赐予生机，就像我们也不能拒绝命运赐予的失败一样——伙计，她这副石铸的身子可不轻，待会就麻烦你搭把手了。
E: We cannot decline an opportunity to live granted to us by fate! Just as we cannot escape a failure fated by destiny... My friend, this stone statue is by no means light. I will need you to help me lift her.

C: 帕里斯上。天谴猎手上。
E: Paris appears, as does the Furiae Archer.

C: 你这人真是……
E: You are exhausting...

C: 是啊，我刚刚还站在她身边…若是撞到我身上，那是不是就直接去见塞纳托斯了？
E: That's right. I was just standing next to her... If she had fallen on me, I'd have been sent straight to Thanatos, would I not?

C: {RUBY_B#泰坦詈语}Hinas{RUBY_E#}！
E: {RUBY_B#Titan curses}Hinas{RUBY_E#}!

C: 听，这城门前正放着悲声：有一些妇女在这里呼唤她们的丈夫，有一些在呼唤她们的年老的母亲，还有一些在呼唤她们的儿女，像飞鸟在悲唤雏儿。
E: Listen! Hear the sound of wailing from the front of the city gate: Wives call for their husbands and their elderly mothers, while others scream for their children. Just hear how they suffer.

C: 你是说让帕里斯跑到城外的战场上，冒着生命危险在一群疯狂的眷属中找她吗？
E: You're saying that Paris should run out onto the battlefield and risk his life among those insane Titankin to look for her?

C: 你等了很久很久，甚至为奥赫玛的戍卫队击退了一波凶险的敌潮，但你没有等来与你远行的旅伴。
E: You wait and wait, and help the Garrison of Okhema fight off a whole wave of assault. But the man you would travel with never comes.

C: 陌生人，你知道是谁在此处呼唤墨涅塔吗？
E: Stranger, do you know who it was that summoned Mnestia to this place?

C: 退场的记忆
E: Receding Memory

C: 帕提维娅。
E: Patavia.

C: 虽然偷窥别人的过去不太礼貌，但仔细想想，类似的事情你干的也不少。
E: Though it's not polite to snoop into others' past, but if you think about it, you've done plenty of that too.

C: 祭司大人，愿欧洛尼斯不会责罚那些被诡计欺骗的好人！
E: O priest, may Oronyx not castigate those kind souls deceived by trickery!

C: 赞美欧洛尼斯！赞美欧洛尼斯！
E: Praise Oronyx! Praise Oronyx!

C: 但这一切都不可能发生，你就是帕西提亚，命运三相殿的圣女。一个没有尊严，没有自由的囚徒。
E: But all this will not come to pass. You are just Pasithea, the Holy Maiden of the Temple of the Three Fates. A prisoner without dignity or freedom.

C: 去做个战士。
E: Go be a warrior.

C: 我将成为圣女。
E: I will become the Holy Maiden.

C: 终于醒了！你迷迷糊糊地就往这边走，可把人家吓坏了。
E: You're finally awake! You were walking this way in a daze, and that scared me!

C: 命运…身为受欧洛尼斯赐福之人，在你的眼中，命运是什么模样？
E: Fate... As one blessed by Oronyx, what do you think fate looks like?

C: 列位，你说那大敌「铁墓」，何等强悍？其本是「遍智天君」造物，为「烬灭祸祖」所掳，暗种毁灭胚芽，一朝萌发，怕是要为银河带来千年难遇的灾异啊。
E: Tell me, my friends, what manner of adversary was this Irontomb? It was the creation of the Wisdomwalker, seized by the Ruin Author, who planted within it the seed of Destruction. When that seed at last sprouted, it threatened to bring upon the cosmos a calamity not seen for a thousand years.

C: 奔涌的虚数能量让她创造了奇迹：以{RUBY_B#记忆}「自我」{RUBY_E#}为摇篮，闭合翁法罗斯的因果，让一个世界从忆域中诞生。
E: The surging Imaginary Energy enabled her to create a miracle. With {RUBY_B#the Remembrance}her self{RUBY_E#} as the cradle, she closed the cycle of causality in Amphoreus, making a world emerge from the Memory Zone.

C: 另外，我在纺锤-Ⅲ发现了形似奇美拉的新物种，此前完全没有记录。
E: Also, I discovered a new species resembling chimeras on Spindle-III. There were no prior records of it.

C: 坚定些，目光要一直看向前方呀♪
E: Stay strong. Eyes forward, always ♪

C: 但一句发自肺腑的「谢谢」，肯定能让你心里的小花绽放吧？
E: ...A heartfelt "thank you" would surely make the little flower in your heart bloom, right?

C: 是迷路吧！
E: It's lost, right?

C: 是的，你没听错。这件事还是交给你这种年轻人来比较好。
E: Yes, you are right. Some things are better left to a youngster like you.

C: 你应该培养点兴趣爱好。
E: You should develop some hobbies.

C: 我觉得可以这样…
E: How about this...

C: 你好，打扰一下…
E: Hello, excuse me...

C: 我之前就让维护科去检修机器人，但他们一直没回应。
E: I've asked maintenance to check on the robots, but they never replied.

C: 哎，我这不正在想怎么修吗！
E: Hey, I'm trying to hypothesize about how to fix it!

C: 定位装置信号弱。
E: Weak signal from positioning device.

C: 没想到维护科效率这么高。
E: I didn't think maintenance would be so efficient.

C: 有没有精简版？
E: Do you have an abridged version?

C: 话是这么说没错…但是这件事确实太古怪了。
E: You are right... but that was just too bizarre.

C: 就是你拿到了幸运签吧？
E: So, you're the one with the fortune leaf.

C: 我会在助手那一栏里补上的！
E: I'll add you in as an assistant!

C: 还是说…你有什么事吗？
E: Is there... anything I can help you with?

C: 那是什么？
E: What is that?

C: 这么普通的颜色…的确有点名过于实。
E: With such ordinary colors... it's definitely over-hyped.

C: 这应该和你有关。
E: This surely has something to do with you.

C: 又一个纸团孤零零地躺在地上，你记忆中的磐岩镇并没有这么杂乱。
E: Another paper ball is lying on the ground. You didn't expect Boulder Town to be this messy.

C: 你这孩子，怎么总鬼鬼祟祟的…
E: How come you are always sneaking around...

C: 用不了多久，有关咱们的英雄事迹就会传遍下层区了…怎么样，是不是很期待？
E: Before long, our legendary story will be told throughout the Underworld. Don't you feel excited!?

C: 没、没打算干什么，不骗你，真的。
E: No, I... I didn't intend on doing anything... and I'm not lying to you now.

C: …下层区？不可能不可能，上下层区都封锁十来年了，这么说没人会信的…
E: ... The Underworld? No way, no way, the passage between the surface and the underground has been blocked for more than ten years. No one will believe it if I say so...

C: 你、你这么有信心？
E: Y—You're that confident?

C: 关于论文…
E: About this thesis...

C: 别，千万别，求你。
E: Please, don't. I beg of you.

C: …怎么样，题面听懂了吧？说吧，偷走莱姆士汀家车轮的人是谁？
E: ...Hmmm? Did you get all of that? Come on then, who stole the wheel at the Limesteins'?

C: 当然了，看在他满腔热情的份上，教育部也提出，愿意为他报名一些入门级别的科学课程…但这被他视为一种羞辱。
E: But on the other hand, seeing how he was brimming with so much enthusiasm, the Ministry of Education offered to pull together some entry-level science courses for him, which he took as an insult.

C: 不过，你可千万别灰心丧气。这是我的真心话。像你这样聪明的年轻人，欠缺的只是正规的教育。
E: However, don't be discouraged. I am being utterly sincere with you. All a bright youngster like you lacks is formal education.

C: 哦…是这事儿啊，怎么样？论文成功递交上去了吗？
E: Oh yes... that's right. And what of it? Has the paper been submitted yet?

C: 这题的答案是「<unbreak>14</unbreak>」。时间还没过多久，那个出题的家伙应该还没跑远吧……
E: The answer for this question is "fourteen." It hasn't been long since you left, so that guy can't have gotten too far...

C: …咳，算了，让我看看答案……
E: ...Ahem, fine, let me see your answer...

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 啊——我明白了，您是带着任务来的，对吗？您是想来验收一下教育部的题库储备，对吧？
E: Ah, I see. You've come on a mission, haven't you? You've come to test the variety of questions in our quiz pool, haven't you?

C: 咳，抱歉，请允许我回避您的这次提问。请问您还有别的事吗？
E: Ahem, sorry. Please allow me to sidestep this question of yours. Is there anything else I can do for you?

C: 如何，您知道答案了吗？这种藻类会在第几天占领蓄水池的一半呢？
E: Do you know the answer? On what day will these algae occupy half of the reservoir?

C: 哎，塔米拉小姐这个人，和我有点话不投机…我们对小说的品味不太一致，之前聊了两句，算是不欢而散吧。
E: *sigh* Tamila and I had a bit of a communication mismatch... We don't have the same taste in novels. We've talked a few times before, but we didn't part on the best terms.

C: 塔米拉小姐？是那位歌剧演员吗？
E: Tamila? You mean the musical actress?

C: 还有别的事…
E: There's more?

C: 嗐，甭管那么多了——今天你不是也得是！是不是「会社」喊我去做义工？老爹，你看，我说什么来着？
E: Oh, who cares — You are helping me whether you like it or not! Is the Society asking me to do volunteer work? Dad, see? I told you!

C: 哎呀，这拍得真不错！看起来就像我年轻了十岁，哈哈哈。
E: Oh, this is a good photo! I look ten years younger in this, hahaha.

C: 不然呢？我正等你开腔呢。
E: Definitely. I was waiting for you to start.

C: 感觉你和平时的状态差别很大。
E: You feel quite different from the usual.

C: 他们正在商业街入口等你。
E: They're waiting for you at the entrance of the shopping street.

C: 这么看来…我岂不是吃不了好吃的了吗？那也太空虚了吧……
E: So... I can't eat tasty food anymore? That's really sad...

C: …咦？{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}…是没拍到我吗？照片里怎么一个人都没有啊。
E: ...Huh? Did you... not take my picture? Why is there no one in it?

C: 哈？可疑？你少看不起人了！不就是看我像个小偷……
E: Huh? Suspicious? You're just looking down on me! You just think I look like a thief...

C: 你…你还敢阴阳怪气我！不就是看我像个小偷……
E: Y—You dare mock me? You just think I look like a thief...

C: 想要复现你的图纸应该不难…如果真能造出来，铁卫全军都会记住你的名字的！哈哈哈……
E: It shouldn't be difficult to build it from your blueprints. If we succeed, you will be a hero to the Guards! Hahaha...

C: 听说有大批怪物正向这里靠近…如果不修好它的话，我们就全完了…！
E: I heard that a large number of monsters are approaching here... If we can't fix it, we're all going to die!

C: （这破漂流瓶一直是自说自话，谁知道是真是假呢？）
E: (These wacky drift bottles are just talking to themselves. Who knows if what they're saying is true?)

C: 我、我我…我只是一个陌生人。我、我不知道什么漂流瓶。
E: I, I... I'm just a stranger. I... I don't know about any drift bottles.

C: 日前，演出已经圆满落幕。现场观众们无不热泪盈眶，说他们这辈子也忘不了激雷乐队。
E: This performance recently came to a satisfying conclusion. The live audiences were deeply moved and said they would never be able to forget Sizzling Thunder.

C: 日前，为祸宇宙的绝灭大君「铁墓」被成功击溃。
E: In recent developments, the Lord Ravager "Irontomb" — once a scourge upon the universe — has been decisively crushed.

C: 「理性」以为年轮脉络，「智慧」内蕴生机盎然。
E: With reason as its rings, and wisdom as its vitality within.

C: 瀑流会涤去谵妄的渣滓，而理性将经由论辩的回火愈加显彰。
E: The falls cleanse away delirious dregs, while reason sharpens through the tempering of debates.

C: 您也听到了，它那可怜的哀嚎！
E: You hear them too, right? Those pitiful screams!

C: 那你和我…倒算是殊途同归。
E: Then you and I... Have taken different routes to reach the same place.

C: 王欧利庞，切莫小看了你眼前这名纤弱的斗士。我名为歌耳戈，此行前来只为摘取那唯一的桂冠。哪怕对手是您，我的长矛也绝不会有半分踌躇！
E: King Eurypon, do not underestimate this frail-looking warrior who stands before you. My name is Gorgo. I have come to claim the one wreath. Even if it is you who stands against me, my spear will not hesitate.

C: 数回合后，二人各自停手，欧利庞大腿遭长矛洞穿，而歌耳戈脖颈上的伤口再深一毫就能要了她的命。
E: After a few rounds of battle, both warriors came to a halt. Eurypon's thigh had been pierced by Gorgo's spear, and the wound on Gorgo's throat threatened to take her life if it grew an inch deeper.

C: 我并非不相信您的武力，只是，歌耳戈王后的身手向来不在您之下，万一发生意外，我们所有殚精竭虑的筹划都将化为泡影。
E: It is not that I do not have faith in your martial prowess. It is just that Queen Gorgo has always been a match for you. If the unexpected were to happen, all of our well-laid plans would vanish into thin air.

C: 硬币的结果是…彻底疯狂！恭喜，你是位暴虐的君主，强大而蛮横无情。尽管遭受了诸多非议与阻拦，你仍然破除所有障碍，登上了宝座。
E: The result is... utter madness! Congratulations! You are a tyrannical ruler — powerful, ruthless, and unyielding. Despite much criticism and resistance, you have overcome all obstacles to claim the throne.

C: …只是，看在我们数十年交情的份上，还是要提醒您一句。
E: ...However, on the basis of our decades-long friendship, I must give you a word of warning.

C: 激活圣烛。
E: Activate the holy candle.

C: 衣匠原来有自我意识吗？
E: Do Garmentmakers have self-awareness?

C: 叠词词，恶熏熏。
E: Please stop.

C: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「吼吼吼…在战胜你的期许得到满足前，我是不会离去的…」)∋
E: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "Hohoho... I won't leave until my desire to defeat you is satisfied..." )∋

C: 我忍不住摇摆起来了…
E: I can't help but follow the rhythm...

C: 本来说看完小组赛就走…
E: I was going to leave after the group stage...

C: 你，你有什么事？这木马是我的东西，没什么事别靠过来，碰坏了怎么办？
E: You — what are you up to? This wooden horse is mine. Don't get too close unless you want to break it.

C: 呼，呼…这就是传说中的黑潮怪物？没想到我居然能干掉一个…莫非我其实有成为黄金裔英雄的潜力？
E: Phew... So this is the legendary black tide monster? I can't believe I actually managed to take one down... Could I have the potential to become a hero among the Chrysos Heirs?

C: 你想起在这里宴饮的时光，金血沉浮，为池水镀上亮色。友人举杯，谈笑间觥筹交错。
E: You remember the feasts held here — the golden blood shimmering in the pool, friends raising their glasses, laughter ringing through the air.

C: 先这样吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 我什么都没看到，现编是吧？
E: I didn't see anything. You're just making this up, aren't you?

C: 在不同文化中冥界的使者有着不同的面貌，而塞纳托斯的使者是蝴蝶…也许这意味着亡者们所奔赴的冥界是一片花海。
E: Different cultures depict nether realm messengers in different ways. For Thanatos, they take the form of butterflies... suggesting that the place where the deceased heads is a sea of flowers.

C: 不错，有几分诡辩的气质。
E: Not bad. It has a touch of sophistry.

C: 我无法认同那刻夏老师「论大地兽优于泰坦」的预设观点，而白卷便是我的立场。
E: I can't agree with your premise that dromas surpasses Titans, and the blank sheet is my stance.

C: 至于另一只的主人，如何处理他的旧物，因故遗失、决心抛舍…或彻底封藏，是他的事情……
E: As for the owner of the other one, how he deals with his old possessions, whether lost by accident, discarded by choice, or sealed away forever — that's his business.

C: 你会选择她，还是你的道路呢？
E: Will you choose her, or your own path?

C: 好啦！最后的告别已经完成，现在，迎来一次真正的「忘却」吧♭
E: Alright! That's the last farewell. Now, welcome a true "Oblivion," will you? ♭

C: 符号的真理，我已解明喀！
E: I have deciphered the truth of this symbol, crrk!

C: 我已经偷偷观察你很久了，和我这种阴暗爬行的生物比起来，你们人类真的好耀眼！
E: I've been your secret admirer for quite some time. Compared to shadecrawlers like us, you humans shine like stars!

C: 再…往上…一步…就…可以…登顶…传说中…的…闪电…终极……
E: Just... one more... step... to reach... the... legendary... ultimate... lightning...

C: 要小心哦~
E: Be careful~

C: （感觉不对…难道是顺序或者方向错了？从头再试试吧。）
E: (Something's not right... Maybe the sequence or direction is wrong? Let me try again from the start.)

C: 我去帮忙了。
E: Will do.

C: 呜哇！帕帕帕姆就知道一定定定有什么古怪！
E: Wahh! P—P—Pom-Pom knew something strange was going on!

C: 「流光忆庭」是追随星神浮黎的组织，作为「记忆」的信使，我们放弃了肉身，以模因的形式穿梭于宇宙，为浮黎搜寻星海间最珍贵的记忆。
E: Garden of Recollection is an organization that worships the Aeon Fuli. As a messenger for the Remembrance, we surrendered our worldly bodies and traverse the universe in the form of memes to search the stars on behalf of Fuli for the most precious memories.

C: 能恢复我失去的记忆吗？
E: Are you able to restore my lost memories?

C: （但{NICKNAME}长这么高，蹲下来会被卡住吧？还是得靠佩佩我啊！）
E: (But {NICKNAME} is so tall. Won't you get stuck if you crouch? Better leave it to Peppy!)

C: 救命，我变成狗了！
E: Help, I've turned into a dog!

C: 吃了…甜甜的……
E: I ate... something sweet...

C: 佩佩朝你摇了摇它的小尾巴。
E: Peppy wags its little tail at you.

C: 门又坏了…
E: The door malfunctioned again...

C: 出去，这里不欢迎你！
E: Get out! You are not welcome here!

C: {NICKNAME}，我有点好奇，以前，你们的旅行是走走停停的吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, I've been wondering, did you used to take breaks during your travels?

C: 吓到人家了。
E: Gah, that sounds terrifying.

C: 不能以貌取人！人家想起来了，是魔术师啦……
E: Hey, don't judge based on appearance! And I just remembered — that one is a magician!

C: 嗨，「主食」。
E: Hey there, "main course."

C: 不过没关系，今天人家一定要先看着{NICKNAME}睡着，这样会好一点吗？
E: But it's okay. Tonight, I'll stay with you until you fall asleep. Will that help a little, {NICKNAME}?

C: （用你的声音发出的*哼*）
E: (Let out a grunt)

C: …路平安！
E: safe travels!

C: 行，那等你有空再来。
E: That's fine. Come back when you have time.

C: 依我看，直接装推进器就好了呀！脚只是装饰而已，那帮蠢货怎么就不懂呢……
E: In my opinion, we can replace their feet with thrusters directly! The feet are just for decoration. Why don't those fools understand...

C: 没事，等你方便了之后再来找我吧。
E: All good. Just come find me when it's convenient for you.

C: 这么简单的活，为何一定要我？
E: This job is so easy, but you come to me each time. Why?

C: 我准备好了，你准备好了吗？
E: I'm ready. Are you ready?

C: 你解开了？一定是哪里出了问题！
E: You figured it out? Something must have gone wrong!

C: 准备好迎接这次的挑战了吗？
E: Are you prepared for this time's challenge?

C: 你不是准备好了吗…真磨叽。
E: Didn't you say you were ready...? Stop wasting time.
Three... two... one...

C: 你在说什么？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 再也不会了。作为棋手，请你让我保持基本的风度。
E: No. Never again. As a fellow chess player, please leave me with some basic dignity.

C: 关键是咱们「寻圈」缺乏意见领袖啊。你看看「帝垣琼玉」，人家有青雀——打工人的学习榜样。
E: But the crux of the problem is that the community lacks an opinion leader. If you look at Celestial Jade, you'll see that Qingque is their role model for the average person working a wage.

C: 再看看「以太战线」，人家有银狼。那可是上了公司通缉令的人物，全银河无人不知无人不晓，虽然不是啥好名声。
E: What about Aetherium Wars? Well, they have Silver Wolf. As someone wanted by the IPC, her name is known across the cosmos — even if it's in infamy.

C: 最强棋手的称号随时等待您摘取。
E: Sure. The title of Grandmaster will always be here for the taking.

C: 不用安慰我！让我闭关修炼一番，咱们下个三百年再战！
E: No need to comfort me! I'll go into seclusion for training. Let's battle again after three hundred years!

C: 宝箱归您了。相信以您的实力，下关挑战也不是问题。
E: The chest is yours. With your capabilities, the next challenge will likely pose no issue either.

C: 以「造型优美的魔方」为契机，最近有许多玩家对「枘凿六合」系列产生了兴趣。
E: Taking the allure of the "beautifully shaped cube" as an opportunity, many gamers have recently become interested in Hexanexus.

C: 滴答…对，没错…理应如此…我会满足你的要求，游客。我会全力以赴。
E: Tick-tock... Yes, that's right... So it shall be... I will fulfill your request, guest. I will do my best.

C: 没活不用硬找的。
E: You don't have to look for work where there's none.

C: 希望你玩得开心！游客！
E: I hope you have lots of fun, guest!

C: 滴答，热诚空气！
E: Tick-tock, warm air!

C: 嗯…有位织者第一次接触到水，各外兴奋。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>浴场的中央水池</color>里泡澡。贵客可以在沐浴之余顺便去看看。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is exhilarated to touch water for the first time. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the central pool of the baths</color>, reveling in the warmth. My esteemed guest, feel free to take a look when you visit.

C: 我怎么知道？
E: How would I know?

C: 听了也是脏耳朵…
E: Just listening to that made my ears feel dirty.

C: 都进库房了， 你就拿这个？
E: If you're already in the warehouse, is that really all you're going to take?

C: 到我嘴里都是肉！
E: If it's up for grabs, I'm taking it!

C: 塞纳托斯于是又说：「巴特鲁斯，巴特鲁斯，您能偷盗世界上一切东西，唯独偷不到一件。瑟希斯的秘果，高悬在树庭之上，您能如何品尝到它呢？」
E: So Thanatos said again: "Bartholos, O Bartholos, you can steal everything beneath the sky, except for one thing: Cerces' secret fruit, perched atop the Grove. How would you even be able to taste it?"

C: 「不要相信奥赫玛人，即便他只是住在奥赫玛城郊。」
E: "Do not trust Okhemans, even if they only live in its outskirts."

C: 扎格列斯老爷在上！
E: By the Great Zagreus!

C: 有缘再见了，愿扎格列斯老祖平等地祝福我们！
E: Until our paths cross again! May the great Zagreus smile upon us both!

C: 心与心同字，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Melding of hearts, eh? Funny, isn't it?

C: 你喝的什么假酒？
E: What kind of bootleg liquor have you been drinking?

C: 桀桀，来这里看看老巴特鲁斯的精彩杰作。
E: Hehehe, behold! A great work of old Bartholos.

C: 假一赔十，豪华版雅努斯密径，轻松使用不必对焦！
E: Guaranteed authentic or your money back tenfold! Deluxe Janus's Hidden Passage — user-friendly, no focusing required!

C: 现在请你猜猜，这位富商的财富究竟去了哪里？
E: Now I ask you: Where did the merchant's riches disappear to?

C: 一个似曾相识的卷轴矗立在你面前。恍惚间，你仿佛置身于希斯拉达恩部落的荒原…不，没有那种事情。这里是翁法罗斯！
E: A familiar scroll stands before you. For a split second, you feel like you are standing in the wilds of the Hithradahn tribe... no, that's not right. This is Amphoreus!

C: 无论拍摄留影，还是动笔记录，人类并非泰坦，不可能保有绝对真实的过去。消逝的细节就像沙粒一样从指缝之间失去……
E: You see, humans aren't Titans. No amount of photography or record-keeping can capture the absolute truth of what happened. All those tiny details just slip through your fingers like sand...

C: 确实如此。
E: Indeed.

C: 哦，你……
E: Oh, you mean...

C: 哦哦，简单来说，就是我认为「黄金替罪羊」里面藏着了不得的秘密——但包括我自己在内的任何人都还不知道那是什么！
E: Basically, I think there's an incredible secret hidden in the Golden Scapegoat, but no one knows what it is, including me!

C: 嗐，你听我解释嘛。
E: Let me explain.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，请收好这件小装置。如果您有空路过树庭，可以在「瑟希斯之心」晶体的下方找到一个小小的插口——刚好符合插入这件装置的规格。
E: {NICKNAME}, please take this little device. If you pass through the Grove, you'll find a small slot under the "Heart of Cerces" crystal. This device should fit perfectly.

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: 我们来看看……
E: Let's see.

C: 啊…你…你是……？
E: Ah... you... you're...?

C: 你是云骑军？…很好，请送吾去地衡司。
E: Are you a Cloud Knight? ...Good. Take me to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 罗刹，闷葫芦，不好意思，可能咱们又得耽搁一下了…这姑娘是属于「{RUBY_B#长生管理机构}十王司{RUBY_E#}」的偃偶判官，我身为云骑，得优先配合她的指示。
E: Luocha, silent but deadly, I'm afraid we have to delay things again... This lady is one of the judges of the {RUBY_B#Long-Life Supervisory Authority}Ten-Lords Commission{RUBY_E#}. As a Cloud Knight, I must prioritize her orders.

C: 嗯，进展不错，你的行为得到了克里珀的回响。「存护」的祝福能让你获得更好的保护。
E: Mmm, it's going well. Your deeds have been recognized by Qlipoth. The Blessings of Preservation will offer you much better protection.

C: 一直盯着我看，我会脸红的。
E: Don't keep staring at me, I'll blush.

C: 我没想到阿哈会出现…看来得启用升级版本了。
E: I never thought Aha would show up... Looks like I'll have to deploy the upgrade version.

C: 你想要的变化来了，现在你可以选择不同的行进路线。下一个区域的内容会显示在门上。
E: The change you wanted is here. Now you can choose a different travel route. The content for the next domain will be displayed on the door.

C: 又加新系统了？
E: Another new system?

C: 祂不会来了…你还是渴望见到祂？向宇宙祈祷吧，三秒之后，或许你可以……
E: THEY won't be coming... but you still long to meet THEM. Make a prayer to the universe, and you might see THEM in three seconds...

C: 「停！我把模拟宇宙暂停了。贪饕的星神居然会在这里出现！」黑塔给你弹了个脑瓜崩，「离远点，别被吞进去了，奥博洛斯可不会绕着你——祂的嘴好大！我得再观赏一下。」
E: "Stop! I have paused the Simulated Universe. I didn't expect the Aeon of Voracity to be here!" Herta flicks your forehead and warns, "Stay away from THEM so that you won't be eaten. Oroboros isn't going to go around you. What a massive mouth THEY have! Let me admire it again."

C: 「你不参与进来吗，假阿基维利？不接受我的点子吗，关于『星穹列车』与『塔伊兹育罗斯』。」祂对你的凝视带着令人毛骨悚然的笑意。
E: "Aren't you gonna join the fun, fake Akivili? Don't you want to listen to my ideas about the Astral Express and Tayzzyronth?" Aha stares at you with a chilling smirk.

C: 「不，斯蒂芬•劳艾德是个小鬼。一个会给自己洗澡用的小黄鸭也起名叫斯蒂芬•劳艾德的怪小鬼。」
E: "No, Stephen Lloyd is just a kid, one who names his Yellow Ducky showering toy the same name as him."

C: 那一刻，惊人的哀嚎于眼泪中迸发，这位支援队的矿工抱着石柜哭了三天三夜，他那么伤心，就像他和它是一对被拆散的苦命鸳鸯。
E: At that moment, a heartrending wail erupts from this miner from the support team, who then clings to the stone cabinet and cries for three days and nights. His grief is so profound that he and the cabinet seem like a pair of bitter lovers forced apart.

C: 但你听不进去！你被骂得很委屈，伤心地哭了起来…
E: But you refuse to hear anything! His reprimands were so harsh that you begin to weep uncontrollably...

C: 他时常因突如其来的记忆断带停下对话，再抬起头努力地将逻辑接上。他将一些写满字的布料递给你…这是一位爱诗的领航员写下的「记录」。
E: He would be interrupted by sudden flashes of his memory, and temporarily stop talking, before raising his head to recollect his train of thought. He hands you a cloth written full of words... This is a memoir written by a Navigator who loves poems.

C: 你又等了一会儿，仍然什么也没法发生…你只好离开。
E: You wait a while longer, but nothing else happens... All that's left to do is to leave.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 「难解的奥秘越来越多了！但这就是研究星神的魅力，不是么？」
E: "More and more hard-to-solve mysteries! But that's the allure in researching Aeons, is it not?"

C: 年轻的柯拉帕乌获得了理想中的机会，毫无疑问，他会大干一场！他很快为公司带来了计划中的盈利和影响力。此后，公司贸易兴盛，出资在寰宇增设大批测量站点，博识学会得到资金支持，建立了银河图书馆「伊斯梅尔」。
E: The young Korapao is given a dream opportunity to succeed, and he undoubtedly makes full use of it! Soon, he rakes in the profits and influences for IPC as planned. IPC, with thriving trades, finances the construction of many measurement stations in the universe and provides funds for the Intelligentsia Guild to build Izmael, the cosmic library.

C: 可瑞希特拉博士在愤怒和绝望中选择了炸毁超距运输船只，造成了法恩莎麾下惑神星最严重的「香料磨难」事故：柯拉帕乌被迫与法恩莎阵营解绑，从此在帝皇战争中陷入孤立无援。
E: Driven by rage and desperation, Prof. Cressitra decided to blow up the long-distance vessel, resulting in the gravest Spice Ordeal incident ever happening on the Planet Temptra at Farnsha's helm. In consequence, Korapao was forced to sever ties with Farnsha's faction and deprive himself of support in the Emperor's War.

C: 「我见过许多可悲而可恨的生灵。」女人擦着刀尖说道，「但你既不可悲，也不可恨。只是一台普通的…老去的『机器』。」
E: "I've met many pathetic yet detestable living beings," the woman says as she wipes the tip of the blade. "But you aren't one of them. You're just an ordinary machine that has aged."

C: 德•维恩平心静气，继续「认知拓宽」——尽管他早就应该中断休息——「<color=#dbc291ff>神秘</color>」些微挪移了他平日习惯的角度，于是一位古老的财富守护者出现了：她竟是一位女性。她的长发一直长到脚趾。
E: De Wayne composed himself and carried on his journey of Broadened Cognition, though he long deserved a break. <color=#dbc291ff>Enigmata</color> slightly shifted his usual position, and an ancient wealth guardian appeared. To his surprise, she was a woman, with long hair that cascaded down to her toes.

C: 我不信任假面愚者…
E: I don't trust the Masked Fools...

C: 你用最后的意识将推进器提升到最大功率，过载的高温，就连与它相伴多年的你，也能感到身体的烧灼。
E: You use the last remnants of your consciousness to boost the thrusters to max power. The overloaded temperature is enough to even scorch someone who's been with the armor for years, like yourself.

C: 微妙的直觉。
E: It was just my intuition.

C: 你可以制造一种藻类，让它们快速消耗其中的温室气体，打造出冰雪的世界。抑或是做出粘滞大气的胶状菌体，让天空下的世界都窒息。
E: You could create a form of algae that quickly devours greenhouse gases to create a land of ice and snow, or perhaps viscous bacteria that affixes to the atmosphere to suffocate the world below.

C: 男子像跨越烈风的鞘翅目昆虫一样闯进你的店里，他身上的独特气味让你联想起一片空无一物的死寂大海。
E: A man charges into your store like a Coleoptera crossing a strong gale. His body carries a unique scent that paints the image of an empty, lifeless ocean in your mind.

C: 你不理解『他们』是谁，但你有一种感觉，很久都见不到导师和小雅了，于是你在心里默默告别。
E: You are not sure who "they" are, but you have a feeling that you will not be able to see the teacher or Xiaoya again for a long time, so you silently bid them farewell.

C: 荒谬的故事。
E: What an absurd story.

C: 学会一如既往地公布了权杖对<unbreak>013</unbreak>次文明精准的预测结果，投资的拍板此起彼伏。<unbreak>014</unbreak>次文明推演开始了。
E: As always, the guild published the Scepter's accurate predictions of Civilization <unbreak>013</unbreak>'s future, as investments poured in. Simulation on Civilization <unbreak>014</unbreak> has already begun.

C: 「我不明白。」阿尔比拉德的语气依然坚定，「根据我们对命途行者的扫描，通过细胞打印复制出生理结构相同的个体是完全可行的。这个新个体也许能够获得和本体并无二致的命途之力，也许是共享，但无论如何……」
E: "I don't understand." Arblad's tone was as firm as always. "According to our scans of the Pathstriders, it is completely possible to create a copy of an individual with the same physiological structure through the process of cell printing. It is possible that this new individual would be able to obtain the same Path power as the original. Though it may be shared, either way..."

C: 「鞭辟入里！我们可以试试与『谜语人』合作……」
E: "An insightful suggestion! Maybe we could try working together with The Riddlers..."

C: 「醒醒，已经散会了。」一道声音闯进卡西洛海滩度假区，把你拽回庇尔波因特的技术研发总部。你揉了两下眼睛，一个男人的脸庞逐渐变得清晰起来。
E: "Wake up. The meeting is over." A voice crashes into your luxurious Casilo beach resort and drags you back into the Pier Point technological research and development department. You rub your eyes for a moment as the face of a man gradually grows clear.

C: 就算无限能源真的实现，公司也绝不会把它当成普惠万民的福利，而是用作垄断财富的工具。
E: Even if an infinite energy source is realized, there is no way that the IPC would regard it as a welfare benefit to all humanity. They would use it as a tool to monopolize wealth.

C: 你奉命将巨帆改造成战争机器，它们能阻挡在行星与恒星之间，制造永久性的月食。
E: You received orders to transform the giant sails into weapons of war. They are able to block the spaces between planets and stars, inflicting permanent eclipses.

C: 完全不认识。
E: Never heard of her name.

C: 百分之一台「权杖」将媲美舰队，十分之一台「权杖」将湮灭星辰，一台「权杖」将超越认知，一千台「权杖」将统括寰宇。
E: One percent of a Scepter will rival a fleet, ten percent of a Scepter will obliterate stars, one Scepter will surpass all that we comprehend, and a thousand Scepters will rule the universe.

C: 「即将向『权杖』提问的时候，你放弃了。」她为什么会知道这个？是来带走自己的死神吗？可惜，无情的宇宙不会允许灵魂的存在。
E: "You gave up just as you were about to pose your question to the 'Scepters.'" How did she know that? Is she death, come to take me away? Unfortunately, the ruthless universe will not allow for the existence of a soul.

C: 看来「不可知域」不仅会干扰外部的观测，还会影响对时间的感知。
E: It seems that not only does the Unknowable Domain interfere with external observation, but it also affects your sense of time.

C: 钢铁监牢-存活率<unbreak>57.02</unbreak>％。
E: Iron Prison - probability of survival: <unbreak>57.02</unbreak>％.

C: 水晶旅店-存活率<unbreak>8.58</unbreak>％。
E: Crystal Hotel - probability of survival: <unbreak>8.58</unbreak>％.

C: 编队功能已经可以自由使用了，一动不动的下载装置，现在只想做条晒太阳的咸鱼。
E: The team lineup function can be used freely now. The Downloader can now lie back and be a freeloader.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 打开祝福商店。
E: Open the Blessing Store.

C: 强化祝福。
E: Enhance Blessing

C: 「虚构史学家，只修改历史。很多时候，你只需要把两个主语出现的顺序互换。改变新伦蒂尼恩王国的过去，就是如此简单。」他说。
E: "History Fictionologists only amend history. More often than not, you can simply change the order of the subjects in a sentence. That was how easily the history of the kingdom of New Londinium was changed." He answers.

C: 「接下来是星际和平公司为我们带来的跨银河产品。」
E: "Next, we'd like to introduce a pan-cosmic product from IPC."

C: 你对于这位邻居感到害怕，你似乎必须在它的两种人格中做出选择。
E: You find your neighbor terrifying. It seems like you have to choose between its two personalities.

C: 某天王摇滚巨星粉丝，向你递出他珍藏已久的原声大碟。里面有数十种不同的声音。
E: One day, a fan of a major rock star hands you a soundtrack album he has kept for a long time. There are dozens of different voices inside.

C: 你遇到了一个机械生命，它似乎对奇物修理颇有理解。
E: You meet a mechanical lifeform. It seems to be skilled in repairing Curios.

C: *黏土玩偶*的头被抓爆了！一些礼花从脑袋里爆开，你目瞪口呆地望着这一诡异的场面。
E: The head of the clay doll explodes! Fireworks burst out from the head, and you watch the bizarre scene with your jaw on the floor.

C: 你看了看手中紧握的地图…你的行进方向被阻塞了！你正准备绕路离开，却发现它的身旁聚拢着一些刚诞育的*孢子*。一些充满勇气的想法从你的心中绽开……
E: You check the map in your hand... and find that your way ahead is blocked! As you are about to take a detour, you notice some newly born *spores* gathering around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. A daring idea blossoms in your mind...

C: 你打量着身边这位新的*访客*。
E: You size up the new *guest* beside you.

C: 骇人的钢铁堡垒在老翁的身后止住脚步，齿轮不断地咬合，发出奇异的声响，似乎在响应老翁的指令。
E: The dreadful steel fortress comes to a halt behind the old man. Its gears grind against each other non-stop, producing an odd noise. It seems to be responding to the old man's commands.

C: 「好了，来拿走属于你的那份惊喜吧。」
E: "Alright, time to retrieve the surprise that belongs to you."

C: 「就这点儿？我库维达星系的姥姥都比你们有追求，」主持人狂热的呼喊几乎让你们融化，「再加注一倍，靠着这艘制霸全赛季的飞船之王，入驻庇尔波因特再也不是梦！」
E: "That's it? Even my grandma from the Kuvida System has more ambitions than you." The host's passionate cries almost liquefy you. "Double the stakes. This season-dominating king of ships will ensure that living Pier Point will no longer be just a dream!"

C: 飞船在前半程中都保持着压倒性的优势，可就在还差三十光秒就能获胜的时候，却突然开始了减速。
E: The ship possessed an overwhelming advantage during the first half of the journey, but when it is <unbreak>30</unbreak> light seconds away from victory, it suddenly begins to slow.

C: 将学会历史上最优秀学者们提取成数据，凝聚成唯一的模型。最好的可能，他们估测，博识学会的第一位完美学者将会诞生。
E: This will be a model created by collecting data from the greatest scholars of the Guild and combining the details together into one. The Intelligentsia Guild estimates that, in the best case scenario, the first perfect scholar of the Intelligentsia Guild will be born.

C: 再也忍受不了笑话的无笑话兽终于爆发，它的胃溃疡卷起滔天的海浪，连人带船一并给你们抛进了太空。
E: The Jokeless Beast can't take these jokes any longer and finally retaliates. Its stomach ulcer stirs up colossal waves and throws you and the ship into outer space.

C: 虽然嘴巴很硬。但你感觉自己的眼球正在与弥奥星的沙漠重叠，与所有的水分子告别。
E: You're stubborn but you can feel your eyes becoming the desert of Planet Mio as they part ways with all water molecules.

C: 你嗅到包厢中飘溢的清香，饭前的开胃小菜，带有三分稚嫩的青春，三分萦绕的香料，和四分余温尚存的植物纤维。
E: You catch the sweet smell of appetizers wafting in the private room, carrying three parts tender youth, three parts lingering spices, and four parts plant fiber that's still warm.

C: 你把画框精心包裹起来，就近卖给了一位口碑不错的妖怪收藏家。
E: You carefully wrap up the painting frame and sell it to a nearby monster collector with a decent reputation.

C: 你将法吉娜的传说咏唱，从诞生的瞬间，到欢宴的如今。歌声中，如痴如醉的眷属们为你敞开了道路，并将沉没在海域中的宝藏作为你的报偿。
E: You sing of Phagousa's legend, from the moment of birth to the revelry of the present. Amid the melody, the intoxicated Titankins open a path for you, presenting treasures sunk to the bottom as your reward.

C: 本该终结的战争。
E: A war that was meant to end.

C: 奇异的故事。
