E: What bizarre stories.

C: 它的智慧足以同瑟希斯论辩，雕塑的技艺让艾格勒也自惭形秽，歌唱令法吉娜也噤声，墨涅塔，还有什么能比你更动人？
E: Their wisdom could rival Cerces in debate, their sculpting shamed Aquila, and their singing silenced Phagousa. Mnestia, what could be more moving than you?

C: 至此，岁月得以流转。
E: Thus, time begins to flow.

C: 遗忘与记忆亦并存。
E: Forgetfulness and remembrance coexist.

C: 「怎么样，是不是很棒？我最喜欢它的尾声，带有一抹小小的奇幻色彩。」少女合上书本，英雄、史诗，都变作其中永恒的一页。
E: "How about that? Isn't it wonderful? I love the ending most. It comes with a little touch of fantasy." The girl closes the book, and the heroes and epics all become a page of eternity.

C: （闭目沉默告别）
E: (Silent bid farewell with eyes closed)

C: 「你湿漉漉的棕黑色的眼睛——我多想干涸在你的眼底，即使要在绝望的告别中目送你远走，直至我化成粉末，消散在风中。」
E: "Your glistening brown-black eyes — how I would like to shrivel away beneath them, even if I have to see you go away in a desperate farewell, until I turn into powder and dissipate in the wind."

C: 神是存在的？神由凡人擢升而成？神并非全知全能，而是各执权柄、各行其路？这实在是太荒唐了！她竟还自称什么「令使」、什么「揽镜人」……
E: Gods really exist, and they are elevated from mortals? Gods aren't almighty, but each holds different authorities and walks different roads? This is too ridiculous! She even claims to be some sort of Emanator and Mirror Holder...

C: 房间里矗立着一个平平无奇的…家用设备。瞧着它格格不入的模样，你怀疑自己是否走错了地方。
E: Standing upright in the middle of the room is an unremarkable... Err, household "object." It looks so out of place that you start to suspect you might have taken a wrong turn somewhere.

C: 什么马桶？这里又不是厕所…等等！这是什么？！
E: Toilet bowl? What toilet bowl? This isn't a restroom... Hang on! What's this!?

C: 一簇紊乱的智能脉冲掠过你硅芯片基板<unbreak>42</unbreak>区，又在<unbreak>56</unbreak>区消失无踪。你很清楚，自己已经对这类陈腔滥调感到*厌烦*了——那道不稳定的脉冲就是证明。
E: A cluster of disordered intelligent pulses passes through Area <unbreak>42</unbreak> of your silicon chip substrate and vanishes in Area <unbreak>56</unbreak>. You know you are SICK OF the cliche — the unstable pulse is proof.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 路上没什么人。你可以短暂地抬头看看云幕投影新闻，看看这座忙不迭的城市又发生了什么。原来是那位联席总理。「好吧。」你咕啾，决定还是专注于路况。
E: The streets are deserted. You look up briefly at the news projected in the sky to find out the latest happenings in this bustling city. The face of the co-prime minister appears on the screen. "Fine," you grumble, deciding to focus on the road ahead.

C: 「工作太累，生活没劲，口袋里的亚伯南安星币不够买一张坐票，」你总是这样宽恕自己，「要是我有钱每天坐浮空计程车，哪儿还有机会干这事？」
E: "Work is hard, life is dull, and I don't even have enough Abelane Coins to buy tickets with a seat." That's what you've always used to excuse yourself. "I wouldn't behave like this if I can afford to take a floating cab everyday!"

C: 可他们竟然不许你践行学派传统，在那骨刺表面轰开大洞，然后带着价值连城的文物扬长而去…你感到恼火，但还是选择妥协——毕竟他们的担忧不无道理。
E: Yet they are holding you back from using your school's tradition. You should be blowing a hole into the surface of this bone spur and carrying off valuable artifacts. The fact that they won't permit it makes you seethe with anger, but you choose to compromise. You recognize that their concerns are not groundless.

C: 我、我不知道这是有人的房间——我这就离开嗡！
E: I—I didn't know this room was occupied — I'll be off right away then!

C: 哈，原来是您啊。还记得我不？先前和您打过照面的……
E: Oh, hello, dear stranger. Do you remember me? We've met before...

C: 已经很久没见到他们了…这多半是「那些东西」捣的鬼！
E: I haven't seen them for a long time... no thanks to those "things"!

C: 我有一双无情铁手。
E: I have two iron hands!

C: 真的吗？你真的是如此无趣的{F#女人}{M#男人}吗？
E: Really? Are you really such a boring {F#woman}{M#man}?

C: 吁…走着瞧。
E: Hmm... We'll see about that.

C: ——优惠！多么美妙的字眼。那就在空格里留下你响亮的大名吧。
E: Discounts! What a beautiful word. Let's write your esteemed name here then.

C: 大功告成！你刚刚完成了世界上最公正的服务评价——绝不带一丝一毫的主观情绪。
E: Your masterpiece is done! You've just completed the single most unbiased service review in the history of the universe — without a hint of any subjective emotion.

C: 两小时过去……
E: Two hours later.

C: 出于好奇，你将耳朵贴上门板，仔细辨认其中的声音……
E: Curiosity gets the better of you. You press your ear to the door and try to figure out what the sound is...

C: 没有人可以将我从这份职责中解放…但如果你能帮我把石头推回去的话就再好不过了喀。
E: There's nobody who can free me from this duty... But it sure would be great if you could help me push the stone back.

C: 你就不怕闹出人命吗？！
E: Aren't you worried about causing casualties!?

C: 他的笑容十分僵硬。
E: His smile is stiff as a board.

C: …总之，桑博把你抬到诊所的时候，你已经奄奄一息了。我还以为是他又干了什么坏事呢……
E: ...The point is, when Sampo brought you to the clinic, you were already on death's door. I thought he was up to no good again...

C: 你说真的？可那只是张毫无遮拦的桌子。站在这里还不如站在广场中间呢！
E: Are you serious? There's nothing blocking someone from seeing you down there. You might as well stand out in the middle of the plaza!

C: 你们迟早也会迎来这一天的…
E: There'll come a day when you...

C: 偷偷告诉你喀，这边的祭司好多都是大坏蛋，经常打着命运泰坦的旗号，用假的神谕骗钱！
E: Between you and me, these priests are mostly con artists! They make up phony prophecies claiming they're from the Fate Titans just to scam money!

C: 已经有一百位挑战者折戟于我的考验…你会是第一百零一个吗？
E: A hundred challengers have already failed my trial... Will you be the hundred and first?

C: 发起进攻。
E: Attack.

C: 我决定把我的天赋带到蝴蝶一族中去嘤！
E: I've decided to bring my talents to the butterfly clan, eep!

C: 闻到这空气中的花香了吗，那种花叫<color=#dbc291ff>安提灵花</color>…这安神的清香，我想我也该离开了嘤。
E: Do you smell the fragrance of flowers in the air? That's the scent of <color=#dbc291ff>Antila flowers</color>... This soothing scent reminds me that it's time to leave, eep.

C: 这里原本有个穿着粗俗的大高个，听见号角呼喊就匆忙走了。或许无论陪伴多久，我们都还是要奔赴属于各自的方向吧……
E: There was a big, burly guy here, dressed uncouth. Took off the second he heard the horn. Maybe no matter how long we travel together, we all have our own paths to follow in the end...

C: 看得见碰不着，飞到里头也没有特别的感觉，好奇怪的玩意嗡……
E: One can see it, but can't touch it. Even flying through it feels like nothing special. What a strange thing...

C: 不，我从小就受人追捧，非要说魅力的话，我和你是平分秋色。
E: I can't be. I have been popular with people since I was young. When it comes to having charm, we would be well-matched with each other.

C: 在这一刻，你明白，你和这一只陌生的机巧鸟建立了一段颠扑不破的情谊。就在下一秒，你们即将分开，而且你很清楚云骑军迟早会追上它。
E: Now, you understand. You and this cycrane you just met forged an unbreakable bond. In just a moment, you will split up. You know all too well that the Cloud Knights will eventually catch the cycrane.

C: 看来是我低估了自己的魅力。
E: Looks like I underestimated my own charm.

C: 怎么了，回答我的提问呀。
E: Come on, answer my question.

C: 我会回到鹤运物流，说到做到。
E: I'll go back to Heron Express. I'm a bird of my word.

C: 真是一个大胆的贼人，如果有人与你同行，那人肯定会阻止你的轻举妄动，并警告你恶龙曾经挑战了一支军队，它的怒火将河流变成了蒸汽……
E: What a bold thief! Had someone been with you, they would surely stop you from acting so rashly, warning you about how the dragon could take down a whole army and turn a river into steam...

C: （不自量力，抢先手攻击恶龙）
E: (You're overwhelmed and launch the first attack on the dragon)

C: 真正的强大又是什么呢？
E: What even is real power?
5 strales!

C: 但我们这里是课后作业题，应该不会这么黑暗吧……
E: But this is just a homework question. I don't think it's supposed to be about the dark side of society...

C: 牢饭也在那里。说些很帅气的话并不能改变你即将成为犯人的事实。
E: That's also where your pathway to prison is. Just because you said something justifiable to you doesn't change the fact that you're about to become a criminal.

C: 你放水，奖励我们三七分成。
E: Throw the contest and split the prize with me, <unbreak>70</unbreak>/<unbreak>30</unbreak>.

C: 吨吨吨…若是喝下这最纯粹的金血，一定就可以成为黄金裔，为吾主分忧了吧？
E: Glug, glug, glug... If I drink this purest golden blood... then maybe I'll ascend as a Chrysos Heir and share my master's burden.

C: 难道这里也要重蹈当年天上诸邦的覆辙了吗？
E: Are we about to repeat the fate of the fallen celestial realms?

C: 测试开始。
E: Test start.

C: 丹鼎司。刚才你好像在神策府吓晕了，青镞连忙联系我赶过去救人呢！
E: The Alchemy Commission. It sounds like you were scared unconscious in the Seat of Divine Foresight, so Qingzu contacted me to rush over to save you!

C: 据说，在广袤的云端之上，生活着一群气球人，它们一生都在上浮，直到炸开。
E: Apparently, there is a group of balloon people that live high above the vast sky. They spend their whole lives floating upwards until they eventually explode.

C: 「生活无望，梦中无趣，想要一场刺激的狂欢？快来试试小罗特的违禁忆泡，都是未经家族审核的狠货，让你爽到醒！」
E: "Life is hopeless and dreams are dull. You want a carnival of excitement? Come and try Li'l Lottie's banned Memory Bubbles! They're all hardcore products, unapproved by The Family. They'll make you feel so good you wake up!"

C: 什么时候开始唱啊？
E: When can I start singing?

C: 以后还是别自己吓自己了。
E: No point in scaring yourself silly.

C: 热烈欢迎开拓者…
E: Welcome, Trailblazer...

C: 你更钟情于哪一方？
E: Which one do you prefer?

C: 我长大了，这些太幼稚。
E: I'm all grown up. These are all so childish.

C: …得细致一些才行。
E: ...Gotta be more meticulous.

C: 这里面就是…
E: Inside this is...

C: 参观朝圣从这里进——
E: This way for the pilgrimage tour—

C: …曾行于我们所行之道。
E: ...Once walked the paths we walk.

C: 冒险必备品
E: Adventuring Essentials

C: 嗯，你说得在理！
E: Mmm, yes, that's reasonable!

C: 如果摔碎了杯子的话…帕姆的表情一定会很精彩吧？
E: If a glass gets broken... Pom-Pom will certainly have a wonderful reaction to it, won't they?

C: 看样子你从悲伤中走出来了。
E: Seems like you're no longer depressed.

C: 停停停！你在做什么！这可是帕姆精心照料的绿植！随便乱摸可是会影响它成长的！
E: Stop, stop, stop! What are you doing!? This is the plant which Pom-Pom carefully tends! Touching it like that will impede its growth!

C: …不过仔细想想，确实也是我培育出来的，叫这个名字也好像很合适？
E: ...If you could think about it though, if I cultivated it, then perhaps it might be appropriate to name it after myself?

C: 我是甜口…
E: I have a sweet tooth...

C: 你刚刚在唱歌吗？
E: Were you singing just now?

C: 随便哼哼而已。
E: I was just humming something off the top of my head.

C: 那之前的清洁工作不就白费了嘛！
E: Wouldn't it be a waste of my previous effort?

C: 那就好，之前星穹列车就停靠在空间站数次，跟他们打交道还挺舒服的。
E: I'm glad to hear that. The Astral Express has stopped at the space station a couple of times before. They were a pleasant bunch.

C: 试试这个「忧郁」配色！
E: Try the "Melancholic" colorway!

C: 果然不是幻觉…帕姆最近的确是胖了！本来还以为是衣服缩水导致的，结果试了新的衣服也是一样。
E: So it's not my illusion... I've gained weight! At first, I thought it was because my shirt shrunk, but I still felt tight after putting on new clothes.

C: 总感觉怪怪的…
E: There's something odd about the method...

C: 你这规矩也太多了吧！
E: You have too many rules!

C: 佩拉。
E: Pela.

C: 这样才能当好鼹鼠党的老大！怎么样，虎克是不是很厉害！一般人可做不到呢！
E: That's how you become the boss of The Moles! Am I amazing or what! Ordinary people can't do it!

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 禁区的铁卫已经布好了阵势，准备迎接你的挑战。
E: The Silvermane Guards have set up position in the restricted zone and are prepared to meet your challenge.

C: 简单来说，他们都深谙<color=#dbc291ff>先下手为强</color>的战术思想。想避免遭到突袭的话，还是尽量<color=#dbc291ff>避开他们的视线吧</color>。
E: Put simply, they're all experts in the tactical art of <color=#dbc291ff>seizing the initiative</color>. If you want to avoid a surprise attack, <color=#dbc291ff>stay out of their line of sight</color> as much as possible.

C: …精彩，实在精彩！果然如邓恩所说，你的实力名不虚传！
E: ...Amazing. Truly amazing! Dunn was right. You really do live up to your reputation!

C: 大门纹丝不动，门后没有任何声响。
E: The door doesn't budge. No sound comes from behind it.

C: 我本来都不指望了——毕竟你之前已经帮了我们那么多，再提要求就有点蛮不讲理的意思了。
E: I didn't think you would come. After all, you have offered us a lot of help. I'd be imposing on you if I ask anything more from you.

C: 不过迟早有一天，我们要把这些残垣断壁全都修整一遍，把那群怪物统统赶出这片城区。
E: I believe we'll repair the ruins and get rid of the monsters one day.

C: 你抬头看，这糟糕透顶的天气…空气里还有一股子裂界的腐败味道……
E: Look at this horrible weather... The stinking smell of the Fragmentum permeates the air...

C: 你只要按照这个方法来做，就能打造出威力巨大的拳套啦！怎么样，是不是很「黑暗拳斗」啊？
E: Just follow its instructions and you can create powerful gauntlets! How's that for a Dark Fist!?

C: 地下擂台的守门人
E: Gatekeeper of the Underground Ring

C: 啊，我真是个不合格的姐姐…竟会让这种事情发生…！
E: Argh, I'm a failure of a big sister... to have let such a thing happen...!

C: 而且，这位迷糊或富有的旅行者还在自己的提箱里留下了某种不得了的物件。如果伛身侧耳仔细倾听，你便能听到这样一种声音……
E: Moreover, this forgetful or rich traveler apparently left something quite extraordinary inside this suitcase. If you press your ears against it and have a listen, you can hear a sound that goes like this...

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 不许问其他那些是谁画的。我不知道。你快走吧，我还有事，再见。
E: Don't ask me who painted the rest. I don't know. Hurry up and move along, I'm busy. Goodbye.

C: 你的右脑开始飞速运转，形成一幅图像。你好像看到了自然焕发的盎然生机，形态各异的动物在天空、陆地和水中迸发着蓬勃的生命力。
E: Your right cerebral hemisphere is now running at full speed, conjuring up a vision where you seem to witness nature's utmost exuberance, with animals of every shape thriving in the air, on the land, and in the water.

C: 并不是叫科学计数法的办法就很科学，你懂得这个道理，但还是决定给自己加点挑战。就这样，数字在你的脑中颠来倒去，妙谛无穷……
E: It's not that scientific notation is scientific per se. You understand this but still decide to give yourself a little challenge. Just like that, the numbers tumble through your brain with their limitless, profound meaning...

C: 拿去吧。
E: Take it.

C: 我的机器人从你这里学会如何说话之后，确实进步飞快。
E: My robot improved in leaps and bounds after learning how to speak from you.

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 你是受害者？姓名，事由，受害金额？
E: Are you the victim? State your name, occupation, and amount in losses.

C: 可你只不过是一名开拓客，是仙舟罗浮上无数来去匆匆的过客之一。你有自己必须走的路，而那位来信者亦如是。身为开拓客的你对此再清楚不过。
E: You're only a Trailblazer, one of the innumerable passers-by on the Xianzhou Luofu. You have your own path to take, and so does this correspondent. As a Trailblazer, this is something you know only too well.

C: 这怪物是准时上工么…
E: ...Are the monsters on a payroll too?

C: 这些孽物似乎受这故障栖木的吸引，聚集在了一起…天舶司已经在调查了。
E: These abominations seem to be attracted by this malfunctioning roost and have gathered around it... The Sky-Faring Commission is already investigating.

C: {NICKNAME}！您又来帮我了！
E: {NICKNAME}, you came to help again!

C: 今天怎么看起来这么和平…
E: Why does it look so peaceful today...?

C: 呵呵，我没有要在这小零件上刁难客人的意思，毕竟小小零件。
E: Hehe, I didn't mean to make things hard on you. After all, it's just a small component.

C: 我换到了一罐「鲛人泪」…
E: I swapped it for a jar of Draconic Tears...

C: 认真的吗？你打开一个集装箱，里面钻出来一个会说话的阴晴伞，而你此时最想问的问题竟然是「法珊泽尔是哪里？」
E: Are you kidding me? You've just opened up a container and found a talking mushroom inside, and the first thing you want to ask me is "Where's Farschanzel"?

C: 不清楚的话，多试几次肯定就明白了。
E: Give it a few more tries and you'll definitely come around to it.

C: 多亏您及时赶到，才让我免去一场无妄之灾。还请允许我向您致以最诚挚的感谢。
E: Thanks to your timely arrival, I've been spared from unexpected calamity. Please allow me to express my sincerest of gratitude to you.

C: 一个隐喻一个伏笔还得创作者下场解释八百遍，这种人看什么电影！
E: Every metaphor or foreshadowing has to be explained eight hundred times by the creator. What kind of movies does this type of person watch!?

C: 哎哟你谁啊！突然冒出来吓我一跳…多大的人了，家里没教过你不要在街上乱搭话吗？
E: Ack, who are you!? Suddenly popping up out of nowhere... You nearly gave me a heart attack! How old are you? Didn't your parents ever teach you not to talk to strangers on the streets?

C: 真的吗？太好了…唉，您不知道，奎茵那孩子，之前就没少因为口无遮拦得罪别人。
E: Really? That's great... *sigh* You have no idea how many people Quinn has offended because she doesn't know how to keep her mouth shut.

C: 唉，果然用言语描述出来还是差了些味道。
E: *sigh* So it seems like you lose some of the magic when you put it into words.

C: （小声）我知道，你能不能别再当着{M#他}{F#她}的面拆我台了？
E: (Whispering) I know. Can you please not undermine me again in front of {M#him}{F#her}?

C: 那天，我们的飞船在一颗沙漠星球补给物资。仓管从当地人手里买来了一头名叫大毛的生物——那是它的名字。至于它究竟是什么物种，我不知道。
E: That day, our spaceship was restocking provisions on a desert planet. The warehouse manager bought a creature named Hairy from the locals — that was its name. I don't know what species it was.

C: 作为最见多识广的成员，我主动接下了与这「怪物」沟通的任务。我们从历史文化聊到星神崇拜，它的知识甚至比我都丰富。
E: As the most experienced crew member, I took charge of communicating with this "monster." We chatted about everything, from history and culture to Aeon worship — and its knowledge was even richer than mine.

C: 不止，他们还缺少对未知事物的敬畏，将美妙的可能性扼杀在了摇篮中。
E: Not only that, they also lack an awe for the unknown — killing the wonder of possibility in the cradle.

C: 可能是分批发货。
E: Maybe your informant is sending them in batches.

C: 你对筑梦边境项目怎么看？
E: What are your thoughts on the Dream's Edge project?

C: 「筑梦边境」？哦…我想起来了，就是那个被内部吹上天的城区拓建计划，对吧？
E: The Dream's Edge? Oh... I remember it. It's the city expansion project that has been lauded to the skies by The Family, right?

C: 我奋斗了大几十年，把奇迹本杰明从一间小工作室带到了前人想都不敢想的高度……
E: With decades of hard work, I've transformed Miracle Benjamin from a small studio to a level that my predecessors could never have imagined...

C: 「梦想之城」？呵…那怎么就没人关心关心我的梦想呢……
E: The City of Dreams? Hmph... How about my dream?

C: 快，给我来一瓶。
E: Come on. Get me a bottle.

C: 虽说苏萨先生因触动了…呃，某些坏家伙的利益而遭到迫害，就连梦乐草都因此惨遭灭绝，但无论是苏乐达，还是他的理念、他的传说——这份传承始终都未曾断绝！
E: Mr. Sousa was later persecuted for, um, undermining the interests of some bad guys, and even the Dreamleaves went extinct. But SoulGlad and his story have passed down from generation to generation ever since.

C: 所以我决定自己偷偷加班完成这份企划，以证明自己的价值，让他对我刮目相看！
E: So, I decided to stay back after work to secretly work on the project. I wanted to prove my worth and impress Feinman!

C: 费曼却突然半路杀出，叫停了我的项目不说，还当着所有人的面将我狠狠斥责了一番。

After all, my dad would never let me leech off the family, otherwise we'll eventually run out of money, regardless of how much wealth we started with.

C: 你挡路了。
E: You are in my way.

C: 保险箱就在这里！嘿！认路的，你也沿着我刚才的路过来吧！
E: Aha, the security safe, there you are! My pathfinding friend, why don't you retrace my steps and join me?

C: （观察一下四周）
E: (Observe the surroundings)

C: 在退休前，我编队云骑阵列，在退休后，我受邀编队阵列。我设计了一套出神入化的飞行编队表演，给竞锋舰的演武仪典献礼！
E: Before I retired, I put together a Cloud Knight display team, and I have been invited to do the same since my retirement. I designed an unbelievable flight formation performance, especially for the Skysplitter Wardance.

C: 我看到了，差不多可以走了吗？
E: I've seen it. Can we go now?

C: 最后，再次感谢你，实现了我俩的心愿。
E: Finally, thank you again for helping to fulfill our wishes.

C: 既然如此，那我进来！
E: If that's the case, I'm coming in!

C: 到去处去。
E: And go to where we will go.

C: 好的，爷爷！请尽情吩咐我们吧，灰毛{F#姑娘}{M#兄弟}！
E: Yes, grandpa! Please give us your orders, gray-haired {F#lady}{M#sir}!

C: 想我未学走路，先学内功。任何招数都伤不到我分毫，从小到大我就不知道伤口是什么意思。爷爷稍等片刻，孙子这就来救你！
E: Before I learned to walk, I learned to channel my inner energy! No attack can harm me, and I have never in my life known the meaning of a wound. Wait for me, grandfather! I'm coming to save you!

C: 那个…外面还有人么，他俩在地上抽搐，要不要叫个医生？
E: Um... Is there anyone else still out there? They're on the ground, twitching. Do you want to call a doctor or something?

C: 什么，还不够圆满吗？你又不用考试！
E: What, not satisfactory enough? You don't even need to take the quiz!

C: 那流畅的线条、精美的画工、跃然纸上的角色…好家伙，原来这老兄还是个同人大佬！
E: Those smooth lines, exquisite penmanship, characters that leap off the page... Good golly, this person is a fanart master!

C: 随着你手掌的贴近，一颗澄亮璀璨的球体逐渐增大，自装置底部缓缓升起。这究竟是什么原理？你对此百思不得其解。
E: As your hand draws close, a pure, bright spheroid expands, rising from the bottom of the device. What principles are at work here? You find yourself utterly befuddled.

C: 在老头激动的讲解下，你这才明白，眼前的圣烛是吉奥里亚的信徒所供，却又因不明原因被废弃。
E: Through the old man's excited explanations, you realize that this holy candle is an offering from Georios' followers, but was eventually abandoned for unknown reasons.

C: 你来回开启圣烛装置，但周遭并无变化。你仔细观察，才发现圣烛底座下加了一行字：「圣烛检修中，部分功能已关闭。」
E: You return to the holy candle, but the surroundings seem unchanged. Upon careful inspection, you find a line of text below the base of the candle: "The holy candle is undergoing repairs. Certain functions have been disabled."

C: 「时尚测验」好了。
E: I'll go with Fashion Quiz.

C: 下回再来。
E: Until next time.

C: 愿此行，终抵群星\n且容我，再睡一会
E: May this journey lead us starward\nLet me sleep a little longer

C: 哼…你很有胆量啊。
E: Hmph... You're very brave.

C: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
E: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

C: 检查题目里是否有错别字。
E: Check for phonetic traps in the question.

C: 万敌头也不回地离开了，你看到他在走远后挠了挠头……
E: Mydei leaves without looking back, and you see him scratching his head as he walks away...

C: 太过*正确*的答案。但你很清楚，这头狮子一定不会这么轻易放过你。
E: An overly correct answer. But you are clear that this lion won't let you off so easily.

C: 没错，你在书上看到过，知识的效用就在于消除偏见——「我知道的，就是我一无所知」。这才是真正的一无所有。
E: That's right. You saw that in a book: The utility of knowledge is to expunge prejudice — "All I know is that I know nothing." This is truly being left with nothing.

C: 唔…只要是交到*我们*手里的东西，无论怎样都会送到收信人那里。
E: Mmm... as long as it's something left in our hands, we'll always deliver it to the receiver's hands.

C: 吼吼，钱款去哪了，很重要吗？重要的是，在本狮这番理论下，只要是债务关系存续期间，这两个人事实上都是一•无•所•有吼！
E: Ho-ho, does it matter where the money has gone? What's important is that in my theory, as long as the debt remains unsettled, both parties are realistically left with nothing!

C: 「门扉时」和「幕匿时」…记得在翁法罗斯的历法中分别代表「清晨」和「晚上」。这东西在早晨搞丢脑袋，晚上还能找回来……
E: The Entry Hour and the Curtain-Fall Hour... I remember these respectively represent "dawn" and "sunset" in the Amphoreus calendar. This thing loses its head in the morning, but can retrieve it at night...

C: 时间。
E: Time.

C: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
E: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

C: 来吧！让你考考我。
E: Alright! Let's do this.

C: 问问阿格莱雅怎么样？
E: How about asking Aglaea?

C: 噢！真遗憾，你一定熟读文物保护法规，或者受过吉奥里亚的赐福，竟然能无视这只石狮子的存在。好在，这回你并没有错过什么。
E: Oh! How unfortunate. You must be versed in cultural artifact preservation rules, or once blessed by Georios — to think that you would ignore this lion's presence. Luckily, you didn't miss anything this time.

C: 看来你的冰箱很受欢迎嘛！
E: Looks like your refrigerator is popular!

C: 布匹上缝着一张色卡，用仙舟文写着「翠缥色」三个字，似乎是理想颜色的标的物。现在布匹的颜色，和色卡上的颜色一模一样。
E: There is a color card sewn onto the fabric with the Xianzhou word for "emerald verde" written on it. It's probably the color that the fabric is supposed to be. Right now, the color of the fabric matches the color card perfectly.

C: 呼呼，这便是我的来历。无数的我化作基石，筑造山脉，构成了大地。
E: *crackle* This is how I came to be. Countless of me laid the foundation, built mountains, and became the land.

C: 我能有什么好处吗？
E: What do I get from this?

C: 呼呼。还能有什么是永恒的？
E: *crackle* What else is eternal?

C: 什么？我的身体都快被苏乐达空瓶堆满了，你居然认为它不受欢迎？你有难了！
E: What? I've got all these empty Solitaire bottles here, and you think someone would loathe it? Go tell that to SoulGlad fans!

C: 踏入此地的人啊，舍弃一切希望吧！
E: Ye who stepped in here, abandon all hope!

C: 你怎么神神叨叨的？
E: What're you murmuring about?

C: 非常多的垃圾。
E: Plenty of trash.

C: 咕，你这是…这是对老夫赤裸裸的侮辱！这是僭越！真是气煞我也！
E: Ugh, this is... nothing but a stark insult to me! A travesty! This is an outrage!

C: 咕，你这小家伙，竟然对一位前大臣如此无理，还有没有王法，有没有天道？
E: Bah, how dare a brat like you treat a former minister with such rudeness! Is there even any law left in this domain?

C: 我觉得你这纯属臆想。
E: I think you're making baseless assumptions.

C: 绝不漏看任何坏事！
E: I won't leave a single misdeed unchecked!

C: （我当年为你做的实际上名为「扫帚」……）
E: (What I made for you back then was actually called a "broom"...)

C: 或许明天就能收到回信，明天再来看看吧。
E: Maybe the reply will arrive tomorrow. Come check again then.

C: 一字不漏，你的记性未免也太好了！
E: Word for word? Your memory is scary good!

C: （家门口的邮箱可能会坏，但电子邮箱永远不会坏……）
E: (Sure, the mailbox outside your door might break, but an email inbox's practically immortal...)

C: 散落的面粉袋拦住去路，板车翻倒在地——想必是某种强大的外力所致。
E: Torn sacks of flour block the road, and a cart lies overturned — clearly the result of some tremendous force.

C: 呀，我可以抓紧你吗…大地兽不会突然跑起来，把人家甩出去吧？
E: Aah! Can I hold on to you...? The dromas won't suddenly jump up and fling me off, will it?

C: 绝灭大君…此前我们在仙舟曾与绝灭大君幻胧对峙，在那之后也从仙舟处了解了一些相关信息。
E: Lord Ravager Phantylia... We confronted her on the Xianzhou, and later gained some relevant information from her.

C: 想听故事吗？我有好多好多，可以一个个讲给你听。条件只有一个——要仔细听，好吗？
E: A story? I have so many I can tell you, but you'll have to listen to each and every one carefully. Alright?

C: 说起来，这里也有一个小稻草人。但因为太平易近人了，没什么威慑力。
E: Speaking of which, there's a small scarecrow here. But it looks too friendly to prove useful, lacks the fear factor.

C: 海风让你的脸颊微微发痒，不知是朝霞还是夕照的柔光使你的心情愈发平静。
E: The ocean breeze caresses your cheeks. A gentle light, possibly the break of dawn or a sunset glow, calms your heart.

C: 是我输了。
E: I lost.

C: 暂时不想做什么。
E: I don't feel like doing anything right now.

C: 兵卒的性命于这场战争而言无关痛痒，但若是手握实权的将领，定能令天秤倾斜。
E: The life of a mere soldier is expendable in a battle like this. It is those of the power-wielding generals that can really tip the scales.

C: 罢了，你是哪个泰坦的追随者都无所谓，塔兰顿衡量万物的价值——你出现在此处，或许能为我提供新的出路。
E: Though it matters not which Titan you follow. Talanton judges the value of all things. You appearing before me may present me with a new path.

C: （什么都不做）
E: (Do nothing)

C: 因此…你再次钻了进去。
E: So... you climb inside once more.

C: 你都不会说话了。
E: You're not even making sense anymore.

C: 至于这是否你能认可的结果…编写这套试题的学者们似乎并不关心。
E: Whether you accept this outcome or not... the scholars behind this exam show little interest in your opinion.

C: 好心的过路人，请你看一看，那边的活火还亮着吗？
E: Kind traveler, please take a look, does the Living Flame over there still burn?

C: 呼呼，请你继续点亮其他火焰吧。我们会继续承载一切…像{RUBY_B#吉奥里亚}大地{RUBY_E#}那样。
E: Huff... Please, keep lighting the other flames. We will continue to bear everything... just like {RUBY_B#Georios} the Earth {RUBY_E#}.

C: 柴…火柴……
E: Matches... Fire matches...

C: 阁下，无论您是谁，我受令护送平民，就只能按命令办事。
E: Your Excellency, no matter who you are, I was ordered to escort civilians, and I will follow my orders accordingly.

C: 小狗看着你，眼神中带有某种期待。
E: The puppy looks up at you with a certain anticipation in its eyes.

C: 如你所见，我已经是一副老骨头了。
E: As you can see, I've got one foot in the grave.

C: 就是我此时此刻的感受！
E: That's exactly how I feel right now!

C: 正因如此，我决定成立拟态保护协会，去保障非人生物的各项权益。
E: For this very reason, I decided to establish the Mimicry Protection Association to protect the rights and interests of non-human creatures.

C: 关你什么事？不爱喝咖啡就不可以喝咖啡了吗？没有这样的规定吧？
E: It's none of your business! Who says I can't drink coffee if I don't like it? Is this against the law?

C: 关于莱斯莉。
E: About Lesley.

C: 想聊课题，你随便抓个科员就行了。这种小事就不用来打扰我的休憩快乐了。
E: If all you want is to talk about research, just grab any researcher. Don't ruin my joy of slacking off.

C: 虽然我也不是那种不服老的人，但平日里的护理保养，我确实一样没落下。
E: Although I'm content with my age, I never skip a single step in my skincare routine.

C: 这次「军团」入侵确实暴露了防卫科人员不足的事实，但是扩招的话涉及资金流动和人员管理，具体还是需要由艾丝妲小姐批准。
E: With this Legion invasion, it's become very apparent that we're short-staffed. But getting more people in will require proper funding and additional administration work. I'd have to get the green light from Lady Asta on these matters.

C: 有你们的帮忙，加上医疗科的技术，除了那些不幸离开的…基本上是没什么大碍了。
E: Sadly, some didn't make it. But thanks to your help and the effort of the Medical Department, most of them are fine now.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 无论何时无论何地，我们永远是阮•梅女士温暖的后盾！
E: We'll always support Miss Ruan Mei at all times and places!

C: 嗯嗯，感谢您的祝福！努力一定会带来好运！
E: Thanks for your wish! I believe good luck comes with hard work!

C: 看吧，连你也不想理我了，呜呜……
E: See? Even you're ignoring me. *sobs*

C: 噢，是你啊，太好咯，总算有个知音人能听我讲讲我的管理规划！
E: Oh, it's you! This is great! I've finally found the right person to share my management plan!

C: 咳…有的客人可能会问了，为什么矛和盾一起碎了呢？
E: Ahem... Some customers may ask, why did the lance and shield break at the same time?

C: 我对这种辩论没有兴趣。
E: I have no interest in this kind of debates.

C: 哎，辩论才是获取真理的方式。不经由讨论便得到的知识，与盲信有什么区别？
E: Ah, but debate is the only method to obtain the truth. Is there any difference between knowledge that has not undergone discussion and blind faith?

C: 这种玩弄文辞的论辩还是少听些为好。渎神的罪名暂且不论，要是因为沉迷驳倒对方，反而损害了思考的能力，就得不偿失了。
E: These debates of rhetorical wordplay are best avoided. Putting aside the matter of blasphemy for now, if you end up damaging your brain trying to refute your opposition's argument, the victory is still not worth the loss.

C: 照你的说法，逻辑学课堂可就一文不值了，但别忘了，你是从那毕业的。
E: If that is true, logic classes would be completely worthless. Let us not forget that this was your major.

C: 假使有位好事的吟游诗人，在诗歌中虚构了某座城邦，并借助自己的名声让所有人都相信，这就是远古曾存在过的地点，只不过现在被摧毁了。
E: What if there were a great bard that created a fictional city in their songs and used their fame to convince everyone that it really existed, and it was just destroyed long ago?

C: 短暂的沉默过后，哈德斯径自离去；波瑟芬妮目送他走远，随即将什么东西藏进了脚下的软垫中。
E: After a lull of silence, Hadez leaves. Possephone watches as he goes, before stashing something inside a small cushion under her feet.

C: 我们很早开始就在调查偷换物资的犯人，但始终没有进展。
E: We started investigating burglaries early on, but never made any progress.

C: 嗯，那回去吧。德墨忒尔婶婶还在等我们。
E: Okay, let's head back then. Aunty Demetria is still waiting for us.

C: 你知道探险队物资那事儿吧，之前闹得沸沸扬扬的，听说就是他搞的鬼。
E: Remember all that fuss which went down about the expedition team? Well, I heard he was behind it all.

C: 您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
E: What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?

C: 真令人难过，当时的宁芙一点也不情愿，她是被八个卫兵抬走的。很抱歉，我们没成功拦下他们……
E: It's so disturbing. Nympha did not want to go at all, but was carried off by eight of their guards. I'm so sorry that we couldn't stop them...

C: 球棒侠。
E: I'm Galactic Baseballer.

C: 他以为你把他当做玩物。
E: He thought you treated him like a boy toy.

C: 没想到去了云石天宫。宁芙，等着我。
E: Who would have thought she'd be at Marmoreal Palace. Nympha, wait for me.

C: 你好呀，这位客人——欢迎光临金织裁缝铺，请问有什么需要的吗？
E: Hey, there! Welcome to Goldweaver tailor! What can I help you with today?

C: …扎格列斯爷爷，我最后一次向你祈祷——请赐我一双飞毛腿吧！
E: ...Granddad Zagreus, I pray to you one last time: Please make my legs lightning fast!

C: 已经又搜索过一轮了，依旧是…无人生还……
E: We've searched again... but still... no survivors...

C: 你说说、你说说，在树庭那种地方，还能把日子过得这么鸡飞狗跳，我怎么就养出这么两个天赋异禀的丫头！
E: Just imagine — making such a mess even in a place like the Grove! How in the world did I raise two daughters with such special talents for mischief!?

C: 义愤与悲悯如同两股相向的气流席卷而来，在你周身掀起一阵飓风，并不剧烈，却令你感到有些呼吸困难。
E: Twin currents of righteous anger and deep compassion clash within you, stirring up an emotional tempest that, while not violent, leaves you struggling for breath.

C: 还好她不在，难得清净会儿。
E: Luckily she isn't here. A rare moment of peace and quiet.

C: …我有点说不出口。
E: ... I'm a little speechless.

C: 您放心吧，每次实验我们都会做好分类工作的。
E: Don't worry. We categorize every experiment we run.

C: 为什么大地兽当不了泰坦？
E: Why couldn't dromases become Titans?

C: 哎呀呀呀，真是对不起。这头大地兽发疯跑了出来，撞倒了您，没什么事吧？
E: Ah, my apologies! This dromas just went mad and dashed out, knocking you down. Are you alright?

C: 好险好险。要是撞到老人就要出大事了，就算踩到奇美拉也很麻烦啊！
E: That was close! If it had collided with an elder, it would've been disastrous. Even if it trampled a chimera, it'd be a huge mess!

C: 不知道原因吗？
E: Don't you know the reason?

C: 行，怎么样都依您！到这个点，它应该返回工坊了，我们先去解决问题吧。
E: Sure, whatever you want! By this time, it should've returned to the workshop. Let's head over and deal with it.

C: 失恋的大地兽突然冲出了围栏，转瞬间就跑了个没影。
E: The heartbroken dromas suddenly bursts out of the pen and vanishes in a flash.

C: 它和他们都还有很长的路要走，长到连{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}都难以给出准确的衡量。因为生活绝非神的权能，而是人的意志。
E: They have a long road ahead of them — so long that not even the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#} could measure it precisely. Because life isn't divine providence — it's human resolve.

C: 你惊奇地发现那头号称「全奥赫玛最美」的大地兽再次出现在了工坊里，而科可波三世则站在它身旁，用充满柔情蜜意的语气轻哼着。
E: You're surprised to find the dromas once hailed as the most beautiful in all Okhema back in the workshop, with Kokopo III standing beside her, humming in a tone filled with tenderness and affection.

C: 好漂亮的广场…周围能看到好多泰坦的符号，我都还认不全呢。
E: What a beautiful plaza... I see so many Titan symbols all around, and I don't recognize them all yet.

C: 刻法勒和你们是什么关系？
E: What's Kephale to you people?

C: 刻法勒…当然是众生的父亲了。
E: Kephale... obviously the father of all living beings.

C: 伟大的刻法勒啊，背负那么大的黎明机器，你一定很累吧……
E: O mighty Kephale, bearing that enormous Dawn Device — surely you must be exhausted...

C: 当黑潮淹没最高的山峰，填平最深的沟壑，能够承载我们最后的希望，开启新的纪元的，唯有它——「最强之盾」！
E: When the black tide swallows the tallest mountains and levels the deepest valleys, only one thing can bear our last hope and herald a new era — the Strongest Shield!

C: 太好了，我们有救了！
E: Thank goodness, we're saved!

C: 锋刃击碎长矛，打破盾牌，最后刺入身体。
E: A blade shatters lances, breaks shields, and finally pierces flesh.

C: 刚才我们的战斗，是我最精彩的一次登场。也多亏了那两位小贩，没有他们，我们守不住圣殿。
E: That battle was my most impressive showing ever. And we also have those two merchants to thank — without them, the temple would have fallen.

C: 放心放心，我再也没干过小偷小摸的事了。
E: Cross my heart! No more sticky fingers, promise!

C: 没问题，我帮你问问守卫。
E: Sure. I'll ask the guard for you.

C: 他有着一张奥赫玛最常见、最普通的面孔，和千千万万个圣城守卫一样。你很难在人群中找到他。
E: He's got that extremely common and very ordinary face for an Okheman, just like all the countless other guards in the holy city. You'll be hard-pressed to find him in a crowd.

C: 天父根本不会庇护我们…
E: The sky father abandoned us...

C: 我不擅长应付这种，找别人吧。
E: I'm not good at this kind of stuff, ask someone else.

C: 听说也劳{NICKNAME}阁下你费了些劲，请容我郑重向你致歉。
E: I heard you went through quite some trouble, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. Please allow me to offer you my sincere apologies.

C: 仿佛这欢宴的蜃景，容不下一颗清醒的石子。
E: ...like this grand revelry was a dream that couldn't bear the weight of a single sobering thought.

C: 你得到了一瓶十分浑浊的蜜酿，味道粗糙苦涩，只应属于街头流民的行囊…凯撒居然喝过这种东西？
E: You obtain a bottle of murky honey brew, rough and bitter. The sort that belongs in the pack of a vagabond... Wait, the Imperator drank this before?

C: 葡萄啪嗒啪嗒作响，一瓶瓶蜜酿被灌装——很可惜，属于你的那瓶还没准备好。
E: The grapes plip and plop as they're pressed, and bottle after bottle is filled. Shame the one meant for you isn't ready just yet.

C: 你好像很了解这些。
E: You seem to know a lot.

C: 那可不行，空间站里还有很多事要忙呢。
E: Sadly, I can't. Too much work on the space station.

C: 真想把望远镜搬过来……
E: I really want to move the telescope here...

C: 你要是有空，记得回空间站看看，大家都挺想你的。
E: If you're ever free to visit the space station, please come check in on us. We all miss you.

C: 哼哼，鼹鼠党的全新路线——星穹列车，开启！
E: Hehe, Hook hereby declares the Astral Express The Moles' newest adventure route!

C: 喜欢！
E: I love it!

C: 嘿嘿，谢谢{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}……
E: Haha, thanks, {NICKNAME}...

C: 感觉有点难…
E: Doesn't sound like an easy task...

C: 是不是要送我星琼了？
E: A gift of Stellar Jade?

C: …看来是那饮料的风味确实不对。以后我还是别碰它了……
E: ...I'm not alone then. I'll be keeping a safe distance.

C: 除开人员识别系统，我还针对第三方电波监测以及紧急防卫反应装置做了一些记录。
E: In addition to visitor recognition systems, I've made a few notes on third-party signal monitoring and emergency response devices.

C: 黑塔有那么厉害吗？
E: Is Herta really that awesome?

C: 站在这儿的只是个全息投影，啥也干不了，跟车厢顶上的虚空鲸没什么区别。你看——
E: What you see in front of you is a hologram, just as harmless as the whale holograms you see floating around the Express. Here, see for yourself...

C: 哦对，我摸不到棋子…什么年代了，还在用实体棋盘，无名客也太怀旧了。
E: Oh yeah, holograms can't move board game pieces... The Nameless must really be a nostalgic group to be using physical board games in this modern age.

C: 看到你们这几个无名客之间的关系，以及星穹列车如此温馨的氛围，勾起了我许多关于「家」的回忆…很令人羡慕啊。
E: The Nameless have a great relationship — it lends a warm atmosphere to the Astral Express... and it brings back memories of my own family. I'd be lying if I said I wasn't a little envious.

C: 感觉列车长很喜欢照顾花草，下次我们可以好好聊聊～
E: The conductor really likes plants, right? That's a great topic for next time~

C: 我是在问貘馍卷啦。
E: I'm asking about tuskpir wraps!

C: 应该可以。
E: I think so.

C: 好哦，以后还有什么和珍稀物种有关的问题，可以随时来找我。
E: Cool. Come find me again if you have questions about rare species.

C: 希拉还好吗？
E: Is Sheila doing well?

C: 或许这就是所说的，由内而外，无法控制吧？
E: Maybe it's just a part of me that's beyond my control.

C: 我没有什么想说的了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 啊…是{NICKNAME}呀。好久不见，有什么我可以帮你…啊，不好意思，一不小心又回到了之前的「秘书」状态。
E: Ah... it's you, {NICKNAME}. Long time no see. What can I help you — Ah, sorry, I sometimes still revert to my old secretary mode.

C: 其实他来找过我，而且态度…有些让我不适应。不是说他做了什么奇怪的事情啦！只是平日里都高高在上的人，一下子对自己低声下气，多少感觉有点…怪怪的。
E: He's actually been to see me, and his attitude was... a bit weird. I'm not saying he did anything funny, just... for someone who's usually so high and mighty to suddenly act so low feels really weird.

C: 不过与其苛责自己做得还不够好，不如先坦率认可自己已经做出了改变吧？我最终选择了这样的方式与自己妥协，也算是与过去彻底告别了。
E: But instead of blaming myself for not having done enough, it's better to just admit that I've changed. I chose to face myself in this way and closed that chapter of my past.

C: 可以说是因祸得福吧？曾经的那些卡波特粉丝后援会成员，有许多都是手里有独立研究项目的资深科员。
E: Maybe a bit of good luck actually came from this. Lots of the previous Capote Fan Club members are senior researchers with independent projects under their care.

C: 是呀，我刚刚也是问了丹恒老师才知道你在观景车厢。
E: Well, I did ask him where you were just now — that's how I knew you were in the Parlor Car.

C: 没错，我刚刚问他的就是这个！
E: That's exactly what I asked him about!

C: 关于你姐姐莱斯莉…
E: About your sister Lesley...

C: 你怎么还是来问我有关她的事情？！啊…不好意思，情绪有点激动啦。我的意思是想说，关于姐姐的事情，你可以问问其他人哦。
E: Why are you still talking to me about her!? Ah... I'm sorry. I got a bit too excited. I mean, you can ask other people about my sister.

C: 这都多亏了你的帮助，现在我有空的时候都会翻出以前的短信温故学习呢！
E: That's all thanks to you. Now I even dig up my old messages from time to time to review and learn from them!

C: 听说你感染了模因病毒？
E: So, you got the "memetic virus"?

C: 毕竟离得太远了。
E: We're too far away.

C: 大家都不喜欢社交…
E: Nobody here likes socializing...

C: 我反正不太习惯。吃饭嘛，就是要敞开肚皮才够劲！
E: I'm not really used to that. Eating is all about eating your fill!

C: 疏忽了，抱歉…
E: You're right. My apologies...

C: 哎呀，我就开个玩笑，你别露出那副表情嘛。
E: Ahh, I'm just messing with you — lighten up!

C: 为了感谢星穹列车一直以来对我们业务的鼎力支持，「战略投资部」决定赠送给各位一样礼物。
E: As a gesture of appreciation for the Astral Express' continuous support for our business, the Strategic Investment Department has prepared a gift for the Crew.

C: 请问吧。
E: Ask away.

C: 呜啊啊啊啊——！救命啊！
E: Ahhhhhhhh! Help me! Help me!

C: 我这个人喜新厌旧。
E: Maybe it's because he's a new face around here.

C: 喵…你们列车上的合成机太爱你了。
E: Holy shirtballs... The Synthesizer on this Express is lit as fudge.

C: 姬子特调，好喝又上头！
E: Himeko's special brew. It's delicious and goes straight to the head!

C: 没有现实就没有梦境。
E: If there's no reality, there can be no Dreamscape.

C: 梦都是反的。
E: Dreams always show the opposite of what will happen.

C: 等等等等，你上哪儿去？别走啊！
E: Wait, hold up, where are you going? Don't leave!

C: 别害怕。在那位忆者小姑娘眼中…你这位在「忘却之庭」打捞记忆的天赋型选手，可帮了忆庭不少忙~
E: Don't be afraid. To that Memokeeper girl... salvaging the memories in the Forgotten Hall is of great help to the Garden.

C: 说来可能会有些令人难以置信。自铸剑起，我便能听到各类兵器的心声。
E: I know it's hard to believe, but ever since I forged this sword, I've been able to hear the thoughts of all sorts of weapons.

C: 开拓者们去往天外，让某个世界平平无奇的资材成了其他星辰令人惊叹的奇货。恩公听说过这个故事么？
E: The Trailblazers ventured beyond the sky and turned the most commonplace materials in one world into precious wonders of another. Have you heard this story before, benefactor?

C: 没想到还能遇到和我脾气一模一样的家伙……
E: Never thought I'd ever meet someone with exactly the same temper as me...

C: 你从漫无边际的想象中猛地醒过来，你所窥见的，仅仅是整座空间站理论成果的冰山一角…想到这里，你对空间站肃然起敬。
E: You snap out of your boundless imagination and realize what you have peeked is merely the tip of the iceberg of the entire space station's theoretical results... The realization leaves you in awe of the space station.

C: 他就是饥不择友而已。
E: He's really desperate to make friends.

C: 你好，华劳斯•凯特博瑞…
E: Hello, Wallace Cambrid...

C: 我的工作就是帮市民解决问题。如果保证不了充足的休息，我就没法高效地帮助市民。
E: My job is to help citizens solve problems. If I can't get enough rest, how can I help others effectively?

C: 我捡到了几封未妥投的信。
E: I found some unsent letters.

C: 官员和民众都爱来我这打听房源，跟我做生意。住房对每个人来说都是刚需，而我努力工作就是为了满足这些需求。
E: People from all walks of life come to me when they need to find properties. Demand for housing has always been high, and my job is to help people find what they need.

C: 你是说城郊楼盘？记得我怎么跟你说的吗——「下一任大守护者布洛妮娅大人是个温和中立派」，现在不就应验了嘛。
E: You mean the real estate at the outskirts of the city? Do you remember what I told you once before? "Lady Bronya, our next Supreme Guardian, is gentle and a centrist." Well, turns out that I was right.

C: 现在还不到松懈的时候，所以我还在为请愿表收集签名。
E: This is not the time to get complacent. I'm still collecting signatures for the petition.

C: 我再重新强调一遍，这个跨时代的理论名叫「大宇宙时间隧道」！
E: Let me remind you: The theory I'm proposing is called big universe time tunnel!

C: 不过…是不是都不重要，黄金歌剧院的音乐剧演员塔米拉随时欢迎采访。
E: But... It doesn't matter either way. Tamila of the Golden Theater is always open to being interviewed.

C: 怎么样，您看中了吗？还是说您想了解下其它种类的花？
E: What do you think? Or do you want to know more about other kinds of flowers?

C: 不过…塔米拉小姐好像是对我不太满意？这让小女子有些困惑呢……
E: It's just that... she seems to be unhappy with me, which I'm a little confused about...

C: 你是说…要我去做自己真正热爱的事吗？
E: So you're saying... I should do what I truly love?

C: 突然感觉桑博怪可怜的…
E: I suddenly feel pity for Sampo.

C: 奇幻小说呀…我会推荐这本哦。这本书讲述的是从世界之外漂流而来的旅行者为寻找血亲踏上旅途的故事，在年轻人当中非常受欢迎…我也很喜欢！
E: Fantasy...? You'll love this one. It's about a traveler from a different world who is on a journey to find their family. It's very popular among young people... I loved it!

C: 你如何评价解除封锁一事？
E: What do you think about the lifting of the blockade?

C: 然后多方位布局，打通地底所有产业，创造属于我的商业帝国……
E: And then link it to all the industries in the Underground to create a business empire...

C: 听说你虐待拳手？
E: I heard you mistreat the boxers.

C: 哼，我怎么说来着，机会难得，跟着我吃香的喝辣的是迟早的事。
E: Hmph, as I said, opportunity doesn't wait. Getting rich is just a matter of time when you are with me.

C: 行了行了，我还有事，可没空一直跟你聊这种无聊的话题……
E: Alright, alright. I've got something I need to do, and I don't have the time to keep blathering with you about all this...

C: 我的最高记录是连续三天不吃东西，这算什么。
E: My record is fasting for three days, so this is nothing.

C: 我脸上有什么东西吗？
E: Do I have something on my face?

C: …怎么会呢。我、我只是，纯粹对你们有点…好奇。
E: ...No, not at all. I'm just... just... a little curious.

C: 到底怎么了？
E: What's really going on?

C: …那最好是。
E: You better not have.

C: 没什么，你继续研究机械吧。
E: Nevermind. You can go back to your mechanical research.

C: 还有位女士，经常在她家人的工作时间过来开个单人间。她总是待在房间里画画，画完就会大哭一场，也不知道是经历了什么……
E: And there was a lady who would always stay in a single room when her family was at work. She was always drawing in her room. And she would cry every time she finished drawing. I wonder what she's been through...

C: 最好是自己开车去，你要是没车…从宾馆一出门就是阿丽萨大道，搭电车或者沿着轨道步行都很方便。
E: It's best to drive there. If you don't have a car... Alisa Avenue is right outside the hotel. You can take a tram or walk there along the track.

C: 您好，欢迎光临歌德宾馆！
E: Hello! Welcome to the Goethe Hotel!

C: 哈哈哈，不麻烦！既然来到我们「歌德大饭店」，那大家就都是朋友了！
E: Hahaha, you're welcome! We are all friends now that you're staying at the Goethe Grand Hotel!

C: 唉…说来话长，我这有份公告，你拿去自己看吧。
E: Well... It's a long story. This is the announcement. Have a look.

C: 搏击俱乐部…据说每天都有职业拳手的搏击表演，甚至还有怪物什么的…晚上总是很热闹。
E: The Fight Club... it's said that there are professional boxers fighting and monsters everyday... it's especially lively at night.

C: 我相信你拥有一双能够发觉细微之美的眼睛，「开拓者」。希望你能在贝洛伯格度过一段美好的时光。
E: I trust you have a meticulous eye for beauty, Trailblazer. I hope you have a great time in Belobog.

C: 她是个值得信任的人。
E: She is a trustworthy person.

C: 其实那不是我的能力……
E: Actually, that wasn't any power of mine...

C: 毕竟我答应了布洛妮娅，要和她一起把守那个秘密——要是我不到半程就掉队，压在她身上的担子可就太重了。
E: After all, I promised Bronya that I would protect that secret with her... If I were to drop out halfway, the burden would be too heavy for her to carry alone.

C: 啊，你是说铁卫禁区那件事吗？老弟他只受了些皮肉伤，没什么大碍，放心吧——他可是铁卫的戍卫官，没那么脆弱。
E: Oh, you mean the thing in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone? He just suffered a few flesh wounds, nothing serious. Don't worry — he's captain of the Silvermane Guards, so he isn't that fragile.

C: 被抓到的那几个家伙只是小人物，那天他们招供完就被移交到铁卫军事法庭了。
E: Those captured are merely small fries. After making their confessions, they were sent to the Silvermane Guard Military Court to be court-martialed.

C: 以前在技术部的时候，茉莉每天不是在和人吵架就是在去吵架的路上，整个人身上充满了消极的能量。
E: Back at the Technology Division, if Molly wasn't already in a quarrel with someone, she'd be on her way to one. She was always so on edge.

C: 城市防务事关重大。其牵涉事项之多，普通居民恐怕难以想象。
E: City defense is an important duty. It is linked to many matters that your average citizens can't fathom.

C: 所以，为了不让大家饿肚子、或者生病…克拉拉和史瓦罗先生必须为大家准备好物资才行。
E: And so, to prevent everyone from starving or falling ill... Clara and Mr. Svarog must always have supplies handy.

C: 竖井上端为贝洛伯格温室效应装置——以大量地髓为能源，在贝洛伯格地表及地下维持温度恒定的装置，现为「贝洛伯格供暖」所有。
E: Atop the well shaft is Belobog's greenhouse effect device. Harnessing high volumes of Geomarrow as an energy source, it maintains constant temperatures between Belobog's surface and the Underground, and is now a property of Belobog Heating Corporation.

C: 鼹鼠党现在的知名队员有——漆黑的虎克大人、千面尤利安、小提米、铁臂卢卡！
E: Our more famous members are: Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, Julian of a Thousand Faces, Little Timmy, and Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 在银鬃铁卫完全重新接管之前，「地火」姑且还要管管这下层区的日常琐事。你们如果有什么需要，尽管开口。
E: Before this place is completely handed over to the Silvermane Guards, Wildfire still has to oversee the Underworld's daily affairs. Feel free to speak up if you need anything.

C: 屋外掠过了，正直的影子
E: Sweeping past outside, an honest shadow — take a look

C: 那么接下来，我将跨越整个银河，调取位于公司总部的数据注入这台终端。
E: Next, I'll access data from the other side of the galaxy and transfer it straight from the IPC's headquarters into your device.

C: 这...呃，我可以告诉你，但你不能跟其他人说。
E: Well... Fine, I can tell you, but this is just between us, alright?

C: ...要不，这玩意你先拿着？多一事不如少一事，咱们就当交个朋友……
E: ...How about you take this thing for now? The fewer complications the better. Just treat this as the beginning of a new friendship...

C: 你应该去参加比赛或做点什么别的，而不是把功夫浪费在跟我说话上。
E: Your time would be more appropriately used by joining a match or something rather than talking with me.

C: 你们能说人话不？
E: Can you please talk sense?

C: 这个「正当权益会社」……
E: This Rightful Rights Society you mentioned...

C: 在行政区有房吗？
E: Have you got a house in the Administrative District?

C: 请让我再见女儿一面吧…我太想她了……
E: Please let me see my daughter again... I miss her so much...

C: 刚才那趟车，不会是……
E: That car just now... could it be...

C: 前方的矿道已经封闭了。
E: The mine passages ahead have been closed off.

C: 鼠肉冻…再来一碟……
E: Rat jelly... I'll have another serving, thanks...

C: 洞螈蛋布丁！好香！
E: Olm Egg Pudding! So fragrant!

C: 我来播报今天的新闻……
E: I'm here with the latest in today's news...

C: 咳咳，我来播报今天的新闻……
E: Ahem, I'm here with the latest in today's news...

C: 哎，世态炎凉！我看这贝洛伯格是要完啊……
E: Ah, the vicissitudes of life! It's the end of the road for Belobog...

C: 这老头……
E: This old geezer...

C: 不，我还是喜欢甜汤的。
E: Hmmm, I prefer the sweet soup.

C: 于是，我就这么做下去，一直做到了校长的位置上，也带出来不少得意门生——他们中的许多人，在如今的冬城也算是赫赫有名的艺术大师了。
E: I gave it all I had, and eventually, I climbed my way up to become the dean of the college. I'm proud of all my students — many of which are famous artists in the Everwinter City.

C: 我先走了。
E: I'm heading off, then.

C: 慢走！好好享受我们的展览吧。
E: Take care! Enjoy our exhibition.

C: 可惜不是虎克老大拯救了世界…
E: Too bad it wasn't Boss Hook who ended up saving the world...

C: 我听雪衣大人说您是值得信任的仙舟盟友，很少听到那位大人的如此评价，我愿意相信您会将幽囚狱的秘密藏在心中。
E: Madam Xueyi has mentioned that you are a trusted ally of the Xianzhou. It is rare to hear her offering such a high remark about anyone, so I am happy to trust that you'll keep mum about the secrets of the Shackling Prison.

C: 这个过程持续了数十年，我低估了这样若有若无的声音对一个人的影响。从此以后，我也算是积累了一些经验……
E: The tapping lasted for decades. I shouldn't have underestimated the damage such faintly perceptible noises could do to a person's psyche. I suppose you can say that I gained some experience after that...

C: 名字嘛，就是包装而已，随便换，随便换。
E: Names are just superficial packaging. They can change anytime.

C: 最近每天都有不少化外民专程赶过来，要尝尝咱这「黑暗菜肴」，还有个「黑暗菜肴评议会」要吸纳咱当会员呢！
E: Recently, I've been getting a lot of attention from Outworlders who come here just to try my "dark dishes." They even formed a "Dark Cuisine Council" and have been asking me to join as a member!

C: 你为什么要做这样的营生？
E: What made you take up this line of business?

C: 你这诗也太烂了…
E: This poem of yours is terrible...

C: 我说：「可我只是一朵蘑菇。」
E: I said, "but I'm just a mushroom."

C: 噢。我好悲伤。
E: Oh, I'm so sad.

C: 我知道{F#女士}{M#先生}您在担忧什么！您在怀疑我们是不是专门坑蒙拐骗外地人对吧？那您是多虑了。
E: I know what you're worried about, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! You're wondering, do these guys specialize in swindling Outworlders? I assure you that you're overthinking!

C: 在我们仙舟，要想取得「成年资格」就得参加一系列考核。我现在在做的志愿公益活动就是考核的一环——如果有效工时不达标的话，我可就成不了年了。
E: Here on Xianzhou, we have to take a series of examinations in order to qualify for our rite of passage. The community service program that I'm volunteering for is a part of this examination — and if I don't clock enough effective on-the-job hours, I won't be considered an adult.

C: 成年人就得自己承担责任啊。
E: Adults have to take responsibility for themselves.

C: 你这话是什么意思？
E: What's that supposed to mean?

C: 这都怪我，要是我带着产品来，你再戴上它，体验一下电流从你的神经上剥离负面情绪的体验，你就根本不需要我这费劲的解释了。
E: That's on me. If only I'd brought it with me, you'd be able to experience for yourself the electric current stripping away all the negative emotions from your soul. You wouldn't need this clumsy explanation of mine at all.

C: 你注意到没？建木停止生长了…
E: Did you notice that the Ambrosial Arbor has stopped growing...

C: 神策府中曾豢养过一头名唤「朔雪」的狮子。景元很是宠爱这头狮子，狮子也终日相伴他左右。
E: There used to be a pet lion kept at the Seat of Divine Foresight called Snowmoon. Jing Yuan adored it and the lion would spend all day following him about.

C: 嗯…机密啊…我想想有什么能和你说的…想到了。
E: Hmm... Classified intelligence, huh... Let's see what I can tell you... Oh, there's one.

C: …我猜你想知道更详细的内容？抱歉，技术细节不能透露。但不妨说个故事，满足你的好奇心。
E: ...I guess you'd like to know more details? Sorry, the technical details are all confidential. All I can say is a story to sate your curiosity.

C: 好的。
E: Sure.

C: 我努力过了，我失败了，现在这样就是我最好的工作状态了。
E: I hustled, and I failed. Now, this is the best effort I can put into work right now.

C: 之前建木生发，罗浮的商业活动几乎完全停摆了…这可苦了我们这些在流云渡上讨生活的人。
E: With the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth, business on the Luofu almost shut down completely before... Which is terrible for those of us trying to earn a living out here in Cloudford.

C: 不过，一切终归还是在朝着好的方向发展。我相信很快，一切都会变好的，而您对此居功至伟。
E: But everything is still moving along in the right direction. I'm sure that things will get better soon, and you can take credit for most of that.

C: 我没有等天舶司的文件。
E: I'm not waiting for documents from the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 我虽然杵在这里，能做的也只是一边查看天舶司的条例，一边焦急地等待，要是老爷你愿意跟我随便聊聊，也算是一种打发时间的方法，如何？
E: So I'm stuck here. All I can do is check up on the Sky-Faring Commission's regulations and pace around anxiously. If you're down for a casual chat with me, it'd be a great way to pass the time — how about it?

C: 老板好！老板您需要帮忙吗？支持各类货运业务代办，现在下单还有折扣哦！
E: Hey boss! Need any help there? We support all kinds of freight needs. We're also having special discounts on orders now!

C: 太卜司的人情世故真是复杂，这检修工作到底什么时候才能做完呐？我好想回工造司去……
E: The Divination Commission has its own social norms with its own complex rules. When on earth are all the maintenance going to be finished? I can't wait to get back to the Artisanship Commission...

C: …好好的检修工作愣是扫兴至极，算了，不提这个了，这种人心莫测的事听多了胃疼。
E: ...All this good maintenance work has somehow become utterly demoralizing. Ah, forget it. I don't wanna talk about this anymore. These mysteries of the human cunning just give me an even bigger headache.

C: 你好像很讨厌太卜司的人？
E: You seem to really hate these people at the Divination Commission, huh?

C: 玉兆算端有时会技术性故障，运气不好的难免会中招。某些卜官就换着法儿来问我，什么「不见某某卜官上报故障，莫不是压根没启动卜算呀」之类的，我哪儿知道啊。
E: A jade abacus calculation terminal can sometimes have technical faults, and if you're unlucky, your terminal of the day would be the one to malfunction. So some managing diviners try to ask me leading questions like "diviner So-and-so hasn't been reporting any faults. Does that mean they never performed their divination at all?" Heck if I know.

C: 我就不明白了，咱们工造司做事都照足流程来，该例行询问记录的我总不能漏吧？跟负责这些事儿的卜官聊几句不是很正常吗？
E: I don't get it. We all do stuff by the book over at the Artisanship Commission, and I can't skip out on routine inspection and records, right? Isn't it normal enough to have a few words with the managing diviner about these documents?

C: 我在太卜司压根就没有认识的人，真搞不懂他们怎么会这么问，简直像十王司的问询一样，恨不得连小时候认识谁都要从你嘴里挖出来……
E: I don't know anybody at the Divination Commission at all. I have no idea why they'd ask me such a question. It's just like an interrogation by the Ten-Lords Commission. They'll even grill you about who you were hanging out with in childhood...

C: 怎么可能，一定是你看错了！
E: No way. You must be mistaken!

C: 听说「建木」重生是因为有人将星核送进了鳞渊境深处…哼，想来持明族中有人也被药王秘传的妖人蛊惑了。要不了多久，神策府也许会对龙师们发难吧？
E: I heard that the Arbor's resurrection was caused by someone plunging a Stellaron deep into the Scalegorge Waterscape waters... Hmph, thinking things through, some Vidyadhara may also have been seduced by those Disciple devils. It won't be long before the Seat of Divine Foresight comes after the Preceptors, will it?

C: 唉，上一世中觉得无比重要的东西，在古海浣洗记忆、结卵新生后，就再也不重要了。这些遗物无一例外，没有哪个持明族在重生后曾来向我讨要。
E: *Sigh* But what was once of utmost importance becomes of zero relevance when this ancient sea cleanses away all memory and hatches new life. Without exception, no Vidyadhara has ever returned post-resurrection to ask for any of these relics back.

C: 那些狱卒早就见怪不怪了，有时候我都在怀疑他们是故意不管我的。
E: Those prison guards have seen everything. Sometimes I suspect they're deliberately leaving me to my own devices.

C: 其实也没么什么秘诀，最关键的就是坚持。有些犯人尝试个一两次就放弃了，而我能为破解一道锁研究好几年。
E: Honestly, I don't have any tricks or anything like that. The key is perseverance. Some convicts give up after just one or two attempts, but I can spend years researching how to break just a single lock.

C: 若月后来也因为各种原因离开了这里，她说自己满足于现在的生活，哎，我不知道这话里有几分真心。
E: Later, Ruoyue left the Commission due to various reasons. She said she was satisfied with her current life, but I'm not sure she meant it.

C: 呃，你好你好，随喜赞叹！
E: Um, hello hello! Praise be to happiness' dedication!

C: 「随喜赞叹」？
E: "Praise be to happiness' dedication"?

C: 多走动、多问、多参与，千万不要窝在酒店和纪念品商店里。还有，最关键的是，尊重当地的文化习惯。出来玩，心态要放开些才是！
E: Walk around more, ask more questions, and join in on the fun. Don't hunker down in hotels and souvenir shops all day. And, most importantly, respect the local culture. A good traveler is always open-minded!

C: …好吧，「燃烧」是指可燃物在达到燃点后与助燃物发生的化学反应。
E: ...All right. "Combustion" refers to the chemical reaction that occurs between a combustible material and an oxidizer when the former reaches its ignition point.

C: 等我有了新的灵感，欢迎客人来小店试一试。
E: You're always welcome to try my inventions when inspiration strikes, dear customer.

C: 好像没有物流规划的环节？
E: Is there no Logistics Planning?

C: 啊——我明白了，老板。就是商铺建立了合作之后的那种事对吧？
E: Ah, I understand. It's that thing we're supposed to do after establishing a relationship with the merchants, right?

C: 只剩下一颗头的我对所有人毫无威胁，你们舒服，我也舒服。
E: With only a head left, I won't pose a threat to anyone. You're happy about it, and so am I.

C: 你当然知道我为什么会站在这里——这不是为了方便你来找到我嘛！
E: You know why I'm standing here — I'm standing here so that you can find me at any time!

C: 我看其他的听众都挺享受其中的，没想到您会如此不堪其扰……
E: All the other audience are immersed in my music. I didn't expect it to distract you so much...

C: 感觉你这店规矩好多…
E: You've set so many rules for your store...

C: 你这都有什么节目？
E: What kind of shows do you have?

C: 问吧问吧～不过别聊太久，手头还有点事没结～
E: Ask away! I can't chat long, though. I still have some matters to take care of.

C: 我该走了。
E: I've got to go.

C: 还真是…造化弄人啊。彦卿从没在剑术上吃过这么多亏，最近一段时日算是一口气吃饱了，哈哈。
E: Life can really be funny sometimes. I've never suffered such a loss in sword fighting before, but lately I've been getting beaten left and right. It's almost like I'm making up for lost time all at once, haha.

C: 危机解除了，你还忙吗？
E: Now that the crisis is over, are you still busy?

C: 我没做什么，都是别人的功劳。
E: I've done nothing much. It's the joint effort of everyone else.

C: 十王司为什么不销毁你们？
E: Why didn't the Ten-Lords Commission destroy you?

C: 说的没错，确实不合适。
E: You're right.

C: 好，汝想聊点什么？
E: I see. What do you wish to talk about?

C: 你老家是个什么样的地方？
E: Where are you from originally?

C: 仙舟上长生种被剥夺了死亡的尊严，十王司便要化身为死亡——这意味着十王司不应该像六司部一样出现在大众视野中。
E: As the Xianzhou's long-life species have been deprived of death's dignity, the Ten-Lords Commission had to become death... That means that the Ten-Lords Commission should not appear before the eyes of the people like the Six Commissions.

C: …雪衣大人已经没事了。
E: ...Madam Xueyi is okay now.

C: 唉…结果现在时过境迁，绥园竟变得如此阴森。当初在那里亲吻的两个人，一个做了十王司的武弁，一个叛逃去做了丰饶民。
E: Ah... Those good old times are now water under the bridge. Fyxestroll Garden has become such an eerie place now. Of the two lovers who kissed under that pavilion, one has become a warden in the Ten-Lords Commission, and the other one defected as a Denizen of Abundance.

C: 好哦，注意安全。
E: Sure. Be careful.

C: 这也多亏了客人海涵。
E: It was all thanks to your kindness.

C: 过了一会儿，他就带着女伴来店里了。我也尽量给每一枚珠宝当物讲了一个传奇故事，把价格抬到了他根本承担不起的程度。
E: After a while, he came in with his lady friend. I tried my best to weave wonderful tales for each and every jewelry piece, and raised their prices beyond what he could afford.

C: 嗨，客官目光敏锐，实在瞒不住您。
E: Well well well! You have a keen eye. I can't hide that from you.

C: 而这位饮茶人，不慌不忙地再倒了一杯茶，并将茶杯举起，像是在邀请铁皮囚犯一般，他的声音清冷，但又引人生畏——
E: Yet this tea drinker poured himself another cup without missing a beat, then raised his cup, as if inviting the iron-skinned prisoner over. His voice was clear and cold, yet intimidating...

C: 哎，客人这是看准了小店现在不忙。那行，客官有什么不清楚的礼节执贽，都可以问问我，我也向您讨教讨教这做生意的本事。
E: Ah, you spotted that we're rather quiet right now. Alright, if there are any aspects of etiquette that you don't understand, ask me, and I'll pick your brains about doing business.

C: 想再多问问你。
E: I want to ask you about something else.

C: 这股强烈的筋肉引力，果然是你，我的肌肉又开始亢奋了。
E: This strong gravitational pull... I knew it had to be you! My muscles are getting pumped up again!

C: 我现在要么被巨量的一手资料淹没，要么就在仙舟上到处调查走访，风里来雨里去，好不容易才能休息这么一会儿。
E: I'm either swamped by primary sources or running around everywhere on Xianzhou for research purposes. With my hectic schedule, it's a miracle that I ever find time like this to rest.

C: 我还有些想问的。
E: There's something else I want to ask.

C: 《檀檀安全》！哎呀，真不错。过段时间等我闲下来，就去天舶司做一下申请吧……
E: Traffic Safety with Tantan! Ah, it's perfect. Once I get some free time, I'll report back to the Sky-Faring Commission and put in a submission for it...

C: 好呀好呀~春分最喜欢和人聊天了！
E: Okay okay~ my favorite thing to do is casual chats with people!

C: 你是怎样变强的？
E: How did you get so strong?

C: 枪炮和刀剑，野兽和毒虫，一路以来，我不断地和星际最强的生物战斗，磨练肉体。
E: Guns and blades, beasts and bugs... I spent ages waging battle after battle against the mightiest creatures in the galaxy, all to hone my body.

C: …再说了这是我们「黑塔」内部的人事调动，跟你没有关系。
E: ...Not to mention it's an internal space station matter and none of your business.

C: 其实我最关注的是驭空大人的秘书，那位叫夕葵的小姐姐。要是有什么办法和她好好聊聊就好了，哎……
E: I'm actually keen on Madam Yukong's secretary, the one named Xikui. If only I could talk to her...

C: 你有向狐人小姐姐表白吗？
E: Have you told any of the foxian ladies how you feel?

C: 谢谢惠顾，恭候您下次光临！
E: Thank you for stopping by. Hope to see you next time!

C: 你为什么来仙舟卖苏乐达？
E: Why are you selling SoulGlad in the Xianzhou?

C: 这都能忘！分手吧！
E: You forgot!? I want to break up!

C: 驭空大人正在调度。
E: Madam Yukong is tweaking it.

C: 师父，街上都没人了…
E: Master, the streets are all empty...

C: 你获得满足感的方式好怪。
E: Your way of deriving satisfaction is weird.

C: 小心，往前会被卷进去哦。
E: Careful, or you'll get rolled up inside.

C: 请问您需要怎样托运服务？
E: Excuse me, what kind of consignment services are you after?

C: 等演武仪典召开…
E: When they hold the Wardance...

C: 你放心，没有人在我的幻境里受到真正的伤害。
E: Don't worry. Nobody actually got hurt in my little fantasia.

C: 唉…我多希望你们是对的。
E: *Sigh*... Oh, how I wish you humans are correct.

C: 那种感觉…打个你们人类能懂的比方，就是和一个有暴力倾向的精神失常者一起被反锁在一个五平米的单间里。
E: That feeling... to use an analogy you humans might understand, it was like being locked inside a five-by-five single cell with a mentally disturbed person with violent tendencies.

C: 看起来仙舟人不适合你们…
E: Looks like Xianzhou humans aren't you heliobi's type....

C: 小虫子，别来骚扰我！
E: Gnat! Quit bugging me!

C: 好的，宝贝～别说你想问什么，就是想做什么也都可以哦～
E: Sure thing, my dear! Ask me anything, or even better, do everything to me!

C: 核心发力！就是这感觉！
E: Exert your strength from your core! That's it, feel it!

C: 治安没出问题吧？
E: Any problems with public security?

C: …我说，我还得算算。
E: ...I said, let me conduct my divination.

C: 未料有此劫…
E: But this disaster is unpredicted...

C: 我在学宫里修习了二百七十年的宇航格物学，算得上当世泰斗了。
E: I've studied astrophysics at the academy for <unbreak>270</unbreak> years, and I am regarded as a leading modern authority on the matter.

C: 「下等根器少年饱受欺辱，机缘偶得玉镯一枚，藏有武经万卷，同门纳头便拜…」
E: "A talentless youth who is sick of being bullied happened upon a splendid jade bracelet with miraculous properties. Everyone bowed down in worship..."

C: 要是不想离婚，只是想让我们来帮忙劝和，你就眨眨眼，给我个暗号。
E: If you don't want to get divorced and just need some couples therapy from us, then just blink twice.

C: 哦，帝弓在上，我好像明白了。
E: Oh, Reignbow above. I think I get it now.

C: 我猜是因为工作性质不同吧…我也是听说的……
E: I guess it's because we work different jobs... It's just what I heard...

C: 趁热吃，别烫嘴。
E: Enjoy them while they are hot, but don't burn your tongue.

C: 我不懂茶，这都不是茶吧？
E: I know little about tea, but none of these is tea, right?

C: 它会载着你的哀思…
E: It will carry your thoughts and affection...

C: 若是说话难听，几句话罢了，你也别往心里去，就当是过堂风，一阵就过了。
E: If the comments are too harsh, don't take them to heart. You'll soon be over it.

C: 求求你了大姐，你就说说吧？就透露一点儿行不？
E: I'm begging you, ma'am — can you tell us more? Just a little bit?

C: 芙缇尼和海瑟音记住了我骄纵任性的样貌，黄金裔和公民们目睹我冷静持重的样貌，而索芙洛尼娅和吾师则能看见我柔软之处。
E: Futini and Hysilens remember my spoiled and willful side, the Chrysos Heirs and citizens witness my calm and composed side, while Sophronia and my master can see my gentle side.

C: 当然啦！每次缇安偷偷吃酸酸的东西，我都能感受到。
E: Of course! I can feel it every time Trianne sneaks some sour snacks!

C: 呵…不必了。爱臣私语的话所，君王应保持沉默。我借走了他们的人生，也该让他们好好放个长假了。
E: Heh... no need. Rulers should stay silent in places where their subjects hold private conversations. I've borrowed their lives, so it's only fair to let them take a nice, long vacation.

C: 老友，这小奇美拉是…？
E: Hey buddy, what's up with this little chimera?

C: 老友，听你说起这些事情，好像回到了从前结伴征战的岁月里。不过，现在的翁法罗斯，再也不需要战争啦！
E: Old friend, hearing you talk about these things brings me back to the days when we fought side by side. But now, Amphoreus has no need for war anymore!

C: 咳咳，灰子，看破不说破，你明不明白这个道理？
E: Ahem. Gray Mystery, you know the drill, if you see through something, keep it to yourself, got it?

C: 不怪别人，是缇安，自己！
E: No one else is to blame, it was Trianne!

C: 祝你和大地兽幸福！
E: May you and the dromas be happy together!

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 可你光冒犯了，没见艺术。
E: But you're just offending others. There's no art to speak of.

C: 早安。
E: Good morning.

C: 「药王慈怀，建木生发。莳者同心，同登极乐。」
E: "Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth. Unity of Discipuli Medicus, the Enlightenment's true path."

C: 「说是语时……」
E: "As they spoke the words..."

C: 那还不错啊，她可是很少夸人。
E: That's good to hear. That particular master rarely praises people.

C: 那还真是速成。
E: That's definitely a crash course.

C: 与选手零距离。
E: Up-close experience with competitors.

C: 那…能长高么？
E: Can I grow taller with it?

C: 我现在不太想和你说话。
E: I don't want to talk to you right now.

C: 听不懂但我大受震撼！
E: I don't get it, but it sounds impressive!

C: 碑中的歌者。
E: Singer in the stone.

C: 漂流的究极生物。
E: The ultimate drifter.

C: *大声地咆哮*哑哑！
E: *howl loudly* Ahh-ahhhhh!

C: 竞锋舰虽然吨位较小，但是天才的工造司设计师却在它的身上实现了主流的大吨位配置——大口径主炮，数量众多的速射副炮，看啊！这就是超强火力给云骑军的自信。
E: The Skysplitter may be smaller in tonnage, but the genius designers at the Artisanship Commission managed to equip it with features that are available on larger ships — a large-caliber main gun and numerous rapid-fire auxiliary guns. Behold! This overwhelming firepower is what gives the Cloud Knights their confidence.

C: 「你吃了什么不干净的东西？你为什么在不停打颤？」你无声发问。
E: "Did you eat things that had gone bad? Why are you trembling?" You ask in your mind.

C: 怎么会有人不吃不喝不睡觉一直躲在那种地方啊？
E: Why would someone hide in such a place without food, drink, or sleep?

C: 广告中画着一只极具科技感的玉制手镯——当然，也可能是其他仙舟特产生物复合材料。仙舟科技总能给你带来惊喜。
E: A futuristic-looking jade bracelet is drawn on the billboard. Of course, it might also be a biological composite unique to the Xianzhou. Xianzhou technology never fails to spring surprises on us.

C: 每座仙舟的帝垣琼玉规则各有不同，但顶级赛事大多以曜青为准——据说在帝垣琼玉传入塔拉萨后，也在那里诞生了全新的规则。
E: The game has different rules on different Xianzhou ships, but the rules in the Yaoqing are applied in most professional competitions. It is said that when the game was introduced in Thalassa, new rules were also created there.

C: 这些精美的星槎静静停靠在出港口。未来，它们可能因为醉驾、追尾、路怒等各种交通意外报废——你不禁为星槎未知的命运捏了一把汗。
E: These exquisite starskiffs parked by the dock might be reduced into a pile of metal scraps in the future due to accidents caused by drunk driving, tailgating, and road rage. At that thought, you can't help feeling apprehensive about their destiny.

C: 这台金人比你亲手粉碎的那些要稳重些——至少它们不会随意招惹你。
E: This aurumaton is more sensible than the one you destroyed; at least it won't mess with you for no reason.

C: 「随着反物质军团在宇宙中的肆虐，造翼者的根据地一度遭受极其惨重的破坏。穹桑被伐倒，而造翼者也成了丰饶之民中少见的雇佣兵种族……」
E: "After the Antimatter Legion took over the universe, the wingweavers' base of operations suffered severe damage. Muldrasil was cut down, and the wingweavers became a minority mercenary race among the Denizens of Abundance..."

C: 尽管有些时候，你会像移动卡尺的游标一样灵活挪动这条准则所在的高度…但绝不是今天！
E: Despite sometimes placing your fingers on the scale to adjust your morals... Today is not that day!

C: 一只被打开的快递盒，就这么搁在路边。半掩的箱盖下有一叠厚厚的纸在风里微微晃动。
E: There is a courier package left open on the roadside. Under the half-opened lid is a thick stack of papers that flips gently in the breeze.

C: 持明一族世代供奉的龙尊造像，曾有化外民自称在此聆听到某位星神的低语：「爬上去试试」。
E: The high elder statue worshiped by the Vidyadhara for generations. An outworlder once claimed to have heard the whisper of an Aeon here, saying: "Climb up and have a look."

C: 你就此被贬斥他乡，孤苦如异类，唯有丹鼎司中一个女孩在你蜕生前给了你一丝温暖的安慰。
E: Just like that, you are banished to a faraway land, left alone and shunned by others. Only a girl from the Alchemy Commission warms your heart with her comforting words before you go through hatching rebirth.

C: 「杜氏茶庄的烈焰浓茶，是可以被点燃的茶。」
E: "The Flaming Potent Tea in Du's Teahouse is a tea that can actually be set on fire."

C: 这情况还是头一次见。
E: It's the first time I'm seeing such a situation.

C: 念纸条上的字。
E: Read the note.

C: 「也许你想说上面这些猜想全部都是我自作多情。对于这一点，我只想问一个问题：为什么你会知道我现在的住址？……」
E: "Perhaps you're going to say that all of this is my self-indulgent imagination, but then I'd like to ask you one thing: Why do you know my current address...?"

C: 念念看吧…
E: Read it...

C: 忘了爱吧，带小狗远走。
E: Love is transient, but dogs are humanity's best friend.

C: 当你再次观察这些货物时，发现它们已经不再是一堆零散的货物，而是一块雄伟的丰碑。没人能从这丰碑中带走任何一块瓦砾，因为它已是支撑这座巨舰的柱石。
E: As you inspect these items again, you realize that they are no longer a scattered bunch of boxes but a great monument. No one can remove a single stone from this great monument, as it is now the foundations of a great ship.

C: 原来这是一件艺术品…好险，你差点就闯大祸了。还是赶紧走吧。
E: So, this is an art installation... That was close. You could have made a huge mess. Maybe you should get out of here.

C: 几个云骑落了地…
E: A few Cloud Knights landed...

C: 正在打扫中的房间，很快就会迎来下一位追逐美梦的住客。
E: Cleaning is in progress. The room will soon welcome a new guest.

C: 人们说书是记忆的有形载体。但在充斥着梦泡的酒店中，这一墙书本就显得相形见绌了。
E: People say books are the physical medium of memories, but in the hotel filled with dream bubbles, this wall of books looks puny in comparison.

C: 机警的猎犬注意到了你，留下一道极具威胁意味的视线后便消失了。
E: The vigilant Hound notices your presence, casting a threatening glare before disappearing.

C: 这尊雕像被放置在这里。或许它曾见证过盛会海选最欢乐的模样。
E: Perhaps, this statue has witnessed the most joyful moments in the auditions.

C: 我知道，比起同辈的其他人，我没什么才能，性格又懦弱，不会说话，长得不好看，也不讨人喜欢，但是…但是，我也爱着我的家族，请你们也多看看我！
E: I know that compared to my peers, I lack talent, courage, eloquence, looks, pleasantness, but... But! I love my family too, so please pay more attention to me!

C: 糖浆令人沉醉，夜色惹人着迷。不知是什么让您如此眷恋难忘，迟迟不愿离去？
E: The syrup inebriates the tongue, and the night entrances the eyes. I wonder what prevents your heart from forgetting, to linger?

C: 不用了，谢谢。
E: I don't need anything. Thank you.

C: 啊，把我淹没吧…浪潮般涌来的崭新技术、闪闪发光的全新部件…若是要用有机生命的话语来打比方，那暗金色的润滑油就如流淌的奶与蜜般甘甜……
E: Ah, just drown me... cutting-edge technology that surges forth like a tide, shiny new parts... If I had to compare it in the words of organics, that lustrous golden lubricant is as smooth as silken milk, sweet as honeyed nectar...

C: …皮皮西人是全宇宙最正义……
E: ...The Pepeshi people are the most righteous species in...

C: 顺从心中的欲念。
E: Submit to your heart's desire.

C: 放弃吧，你只不过是犯了任何人在面对这只熊崽时都会犯下的错误。
E: Give up. You're just making the same mistake anyone else would when faced with a bear cub like this.

C: 顺从心中的欲念。
E: Submit to your heart's desire.

C: 你眼睁睁地看着你的梦境护照如同风中的落叶般逐渐飘远，然后……
E: You watch as your Dreamscape Pass drifts away from you like a leaf in the wind. And then...

C: 唉，我以前也这么觉得——新闻不是应该还原真相吗？可现在我有了更深的理解。
E: *sigh* I used to feel the same way — shouldn't the news restore the truth? But I've since come to a deeper understanding.

C: 既然大家只想体会快乐，那我们只报道那些能带来快乐的东西就够了。
E: Seeing as everyone only wants to pursue happiness, we only report on the things that bring people happiness — and that's enough.

C: 再见，愿「黄金的时刻」只有好事发生。
E: Goodbye. May only good things happen in the Golden Hour.

C: 卡什女士面露愁容，她因岁月而稍显浑浊的双眼映射出城市的灯彩，似乎再下一秒就要有泪水留下。
E: Lady Cash wears a troubled expression, and her eyes, slightly dimmed by the passage of time, reflect the city's lights, as if tears are about to fall in the next moment.

C: 经商的客人们总觉得这个动作能招财，所以每次打赏都出手阔绰。
E: The merchants believe her action will bring them plenty of fortune, so they are always very generous when tipping her.

C: 到最后，只有不会说话的道具能听我倾诉……
E: In the end, only these voiceless props will listen to my grumbles...

C: 最开始，我是为了追逐梦想才来到这里的。结果现在呢？我连一开始的梦想是什么都记不起来了。
E: In the beginning, I was here to pursue my dream. But now? I don't even remember what was my dream.

C: 那也是她和我父亲的初次相识，一个标准的英雄救美故事。后来嘛……
E: That was the first time my dad and mom met — a typical damsel in distress story. Thereafter...

C: …嗯，再见。
E: ...Yeah, bye.

C: 它是个机械啊！不再中用的机械……
E: It's a machine! A machine that has exceeded functional years...

C: 广告牌满怀期待地晃了晃。画面上的女子确实气质独特，很有魅力。
E: The billboard sways with anticipation. The young girl on the screen does indeed seem to have a unique quality. She is very charming.

C: 以钟声模拟心跳，齿轮重塑生命的动力，我确实造出了一份足够令自己满意的作品——一颗<color=#dbc291ff>无机生命的心脏</color>。
E: By using the sound of a clock to mimic a heartbeat and gears to reshape the power of life, I did indeed create one work that has made me satisfied and proud... An <color=#dbc291ff>inorganic heart</color>.

C: 等什么呢？还不快抛弃一切烦恼，彻底融入这音乐的狂欢！
E: What are you waiting for? Cast away your worries and immerse yourself in this musical carnival!

C: 注意安全。如果遇到危险，猎犬随时为你效劳。
E: Watch yourself. If you run into danger, the Bloodhounds are at your service.

C: 猎犬也不能饿着肚子干活——艾迪恩代币就是我的精神食粮。抱歉啦，客人。
E: Bloodhounds can't work on an empty stomach. Aideen Tokens are my spiritual food. Sorry about that, honored guest.

C: 真是个干脆的年轻人，我喜欢。
E: A straightforward one, I like you.

C: 开拓者一定喜欢车子吧，我送一辆最新款斯坦威游隼给你怎么样？
E: Trailblazers must love cars. How about I give you the latest Steinway Falcon speedster?

C: 那我们聊聊吧。
E: Then let's discuss.

C: 你是做什么的？
E: What do you do?

C: 说真的我还是喜欢设计建筑的。我喜欢做建筑师，也喜欢做筑梦师。
E: Honestly, I still enjoy designing buildings. I like being an architect and a Dreamweaver.

C: …哦，只看外表还真看不出来…我这就给您更换饮品。
E: Oh... my apologies... Let me prepare a more suitable drink for you.

C: 而您所谓的「八卦」——或者说人们带来的信息与故事——也可以作为调酒的原料被加工、混合。很多时候，它们能带来比枯燥的香料更浓厚的韵味。
E: Therefore, what some may refer to as "gossip," or rather, the information and stories, can be treated as ingredients and mixed, gaining a richer flavor compared to mundane spices.

C: 不过我虽然不是公主，却也并非随便什么阿猫阿狗——我是个来自亚伯南安星的商人，在宇宙富豪榜上排名没有一百也有五千。
E: While I'm not a princess, I'm far from a nobody. I'm a merchant from Abelane, and I'm within the top <unbreak>5,000</unbreak>, or maybe even top <unbreak>100</unbreak> wealthiest individuals in the entire universe.

C: 哎呦，您可算是问对人了！我整日待在这酒店大堂，来来往往的人群看得多了。
E: You've come to the right person! I've been in the lobby, observing the guests all day!

C: 昨晚的比赛怎么样？
E: How was the game last night?

C: 杰诺抬起头，发出了舒服的声音，就像一只宠物猫。
E: Jno lifts the head and purrs contentedly, like a cat getting a good scratch.

C: 这、这样吗？那你刚才……
E: I—Is that so? But you just...

C: 没什么要聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 可我还没说完。
E: But I'm not finished yet.

C: 依我看，这群车就没个正常的。劝你别买它们啊，买了铁定吃亏！
E: If you ask me, none of those cars is good. You might as well pour your money into the sea!

C: 信不信我直接让你熄火？
E: Do you want me to stall your engine?

C: 啧，还真是粗暴呢。好吧好吧，都依你。
E: Tsk, how rude. Fine, fine, whatever you say.

C: 你这家伙，在这和鸟互相瞪着有意思吗？
E: Are you dim? Is there a point to this staring contest between you and the bird?

C: 下次见咯，灰色的朋友！
E: See you next time, my gray friend!

C: 帕姆的眼睛里似乎有什么东西在闪烁——是泪花吗？还没等你看清楚，它就用大耳朵挡住了眼睛，似乎生怕被你发现它伤感的样子。
E: Something is glistening in Pom-Pom's eyes. Are they tears? Before you can look closer, they cover their eyes with their large ears, trying to hide their sorrow from you.

C: 不如去吃钟表披萨！
E: Why not have a Clockie Pizza!?

C: 大部分人的过错都只是些琐事，并没有严重到需要神主亲自赦免的地步——大家只是缺少一个倾诉的对象而已。
E: Most people's mistakes are but trivial, and do not warrant the Great One's personal forgiveness. They mostly just lack a listening ear.

C: 现在我还清晰地记得那天早上的菜单，就像我还记得与他聊过的每一个话题。
E: I can still remember the breakfast menu that morning, as clearly as I can remember every conversation I've had with him.

C: 我要开启歼灭模式，把那些扰乱梦境治安的家伙通通<size=28>轰~杀~成~渣</size>呀！
E: I'll activate the annihilation mode to <size=28>shred</size> into pieces those who disrupt the law and order in the Dreamscape!

C: 他们总说这梦境有多让人流连忘返，但看久了也就是座繁华一点的普通都市而已。
E: They all say how the Dreamscape is so amazing that people never want to leave... But after you've stared at it long enough, it's just another slightly more prosperous city.

C: 汽水先生，我的好朋友，滴答！他又勤劳又机灵，人也特别善良，每次有卖不完的快餐都会留给我，还不要我的钱，滴答！
E: Mr. Soda is my good friend, tick-tock! He is hard-working, intelligent, and really kind. Whenever he has leftovers, he leaves them for me and doesn't ask me for money, tick-tock!

C: 好嘞，多谢惠顾，下次再来啊！
E: Alright, thank you for your patronage, I hope to see you again soon!

C: 软糖酸梦彩梦好，圣代百层薯条佳；\n噼咔汽水兑糖浆，脆筒最配爆米花！
E: Sour Dreams and Dreamlight are good, sundaes with fries are the best.\nPika soda and syrup or crispy cones and popcorn beat all the rest!

C: （进行搭讪）
E: (Chat)

C: 都站到了舞台上，我们是不是应该说点什么？
E: You know, we're on the stage together, shouldn't we talk a little?

C: 想听听你对这家酒吧的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about this lounge.

C: 你诈我？
E: Did you just trick me?

C: 他们把自己的一切恶行标榜为正义，以至于能与「同谐」的愿景几乎混为一谈。
E: They label all of their evil deeds as justice and start believing it is basically the same as Harmony's vision.

C: 爸妈都说我这工作没有前途，可我还能去干什么？白日梦的前台也不招皮皮西呀。
E: My parents told me that my job has no career advancement prospects, but what else can I do? The front desk of The Reverie isn't going to hire a Pepeshi.

C: 我倒是觉得，这梦境并无修缮的必要……
E: I rather think that this Dreamscape does not require any fixing...

C: 当然！各位可是我的大恩人哪。
E: Certainly! You are all benefactors of mine.

C: 哦。
E: Oh.

C: 但现在，看看这乏味到令人昏睡的会场，或许是到了我该离开的时候了。
E: But when I look at this place now, it bores me to death. Maybe the time's come for me to leave.

C: 还未等你有反应，「石剑」突然疯狂挥动起手臂来，于是你的视野里出现了一道绚丽的彩虹。
E: Before you get a chance to react, Stoneblade suddenly swings his arms around wildly. A brilliant rainbow materializes before your very eyes.

C: 介绍下《逐梦客时讯》？
E: Can you tell me more about Dreamchaser Bulletin?

C: 「秩序」的残党？死了那么久的星神，居然还能搞起事来，真是稀奇…呃，咳咳，我可不是在说咱们那位阿基维利。
E: The remnants of "the Order"? It truly amazes me that an Aeon that has been dead for so long could still cause issues... Ahem, I'm not talking about our Akivili, of course.

C: 梦境是虚拟的，但这虚拟的空间却给予了我们跨越距离相遇的机会。
E: The dreamscape may be virtual, but this virtual space has given us the opportunity to traverse distance and come together.

C: 但悲伤和眼泪令幸福与微笑显得如此珍贵，我们用美将哀痛的事实包裹，吞咽下去，而这就是艺术能带给我们的力量。
E: But it is sadness and tears that make smiles and joy all the more precious. We wrap our sadness and suffering in beautiful packaging and swallow them. That is the power that art can bring us.

C: 虽然我还没有得出精确的结论，但是种种迹象都表明，流梦礁正变得越来越危险。
E: While I haven't reached a definitive conclusion yet, all signs suggest that Dreamflux Reef is growing increasingly perilous.

C: 只要付出了自己的全力，也许什么结局我都能接受吧。
E: As long as I did my best, whatever the outcome is, I'll accept it.

C: 讲讲自动乐器们吧。
E: Tell me more about automated instruments.

C: 硬要说的话，既不华丽，也不新奇，就像是小时候妈妈做的那种味道——本店在制作过程中，只讲究一个厚道。
E: If you insist: It's not overly gorgeous or innovative. Rather, it's just like the flavor mom used to bake when you were a child. During the baking process, all we focus on is sincerity.

C: …又怎么了？我现在忙的很，有话快说。
E: ...What is it now? I'm super busy. Well? Spit it out.

C: 折纸小鸟「湛蓝爵士」，或者筑梦师「奥尔拉」。只要别给我添乱，想怎么叫都行。
E: Origami Bird Dr. Blues, or Dreamweaver Orla. You can call me whatever you want as long as you don't cause trouble for me.

C: 嗯…去<color=#dbc291ff>冒热气的下水道附近</color>找找吧，有只奇怪的小鸟最近沉迷蒸桑拿。真是笨，折纸的鸟怎么能蒸桑拿呢？
E: Hmm... Go take a look near the <color=#dbc291ff>sewer that's got hot air steaming out of it</color>. There's a strange bird that's really into saunas these days. Absurd, can origami birds even soak in saunas?

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，<color=#dbc291ff>赛场上时常会出现很精彩的表演</color>，停留在周围的小家伙，一旦入戏太深，就容易忘记回家啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: <color=#dbc291ff>there are always exciting performances at the racetrack</color>. Anyone that stop by will get too engrossed in the show and forget to go home, tweet.

C: 这个嘛，真说起来，和客官您聊上三天三夜也说不完啾。
E: Oh, this? Even three days wouldn't be enough if I went into detail, tweet.

C: 好吧，我来帮你。
E: All right, I'll help you.

C: 喜欢。
E: I do.

C: 嗯，就是这里，盛会之星——匹诺康尼。
E: Yes, this very planet, the Planet of Festivities — Penacony.

C: 所以…我请求「钟表匠」将书写《小小哈努兄弟》故事的任务交给了我，不知道你有没有玩过这个游戏。
E: So... I asked the Watchmaker to entrust me with the task of writing the Lil' Brother Hanu. I don't know whether you've played that game before.

C: 「咦？是那个没精打采的家伙？他在凶险的忆域中经历了数次危难都得以生还，还发现了了不得的异象，当初可真看不出来他有这种本事。」
E: "Huh? That listless fellow? He was the one that experienced countless dangers in the treacherous Memory Zone, managed to survive, and even discovered some extraordinary phenomenon? I couldn't tell that he was capable of such things."

C: 您或许觉得我是在自吹自擂，但即使在这匹诺康尼，善于将食材视为音符，并能将其信手谱为曲调的，也就您眼前这么一个了。
E: Perhaps you'll think that I am merely tooting my own horn. However, in Penacony, the only one who views ingredients as musical notes and is able to weave these notes into a melody is none other than me.

C: 哦，我明白了，这份猝不及防的低落与酸楚，就该这样呈现给客人——
E: I got it! I'll serve my guests with the same striking feeling of forlorn sadness!

C: 你吃顶级牛排的钱这么来的？
E: This is how you got the money to eat top-tier steak?

C: 对了…呃…不要加枫米…蜂、蜂蜜。
E: Ah... um... no h—honey, please.

C: 特别是在我嫁给我老公托马斯之后！哎呀，你是不知道我们婚礼当天现场来了多少媒体…长枪短炮，狂轰滥炸，镁光灯都快把蓝调的时刻打成正午了。
E: Especially after marrying Thomas! You can't imagine the swarm of reporters at our wedding. The cameras and flashes almost made the Blue Hour feel like midday!

C: 婚姻嘛，也是如此。托马斯需要我立这个「花瓶」形象，那我就配合他演这场好戏。他干的那点私活…呵呵，我可是一清二楚～
E: Marriage is no different. Thomas needs a trophy wife, so that's the role I'll fill! If you ask me about his private business, though... Let's just say that I have a bird's eye view on all that's going on.

C: 我承认，还是知更鸟小姐更出名。我唱的都是电子舞曲，上的节目都是真人秀…我们领域不同，没什么可比较的，反正都很有名就是了。
E: I'll admit, Miss Robin is more famous than I am. My niche singing is electronic dance music and all the appearances I make are in reality shows... so it doesn't make much sense to compare us, who work in different fields. We're both famous in our own ways.

C: 太离谱了，我跟你说，在空艇上有些人自称什么名媛贵妇，又是什么明星名流，这里面水分可太大了！
E: It's absolutely shocking! You know, there are folks on the airship pretending to be socialites and celebrities. Turns out, it's all a sham!

C: 萨曼莎当着你的面看了看手机，也不知道她究竟看了些什么，你只见她盯着屏幕笑容不止。
E: Samantha glances at her phone and breaks out into a lasting smile, making you curious about the happy news that she's reading.

C: 再说了，「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」上啥都有，奢华无比，排场十足，带艾丽卡过来享受一下也挺好的，工作生活两不误嘛。这里名流多，我还能替她多接几个通告呢。
