E: Besides, everything can be found on The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand. It'd be nice to bring Erica here, to soak up the grand and beyond luxurious vibe. Who's to say I can't juggle both work and life? Plus, with so many bigwigs here, I might even be able to land her some gigs.

C: …欢迎各位，现任船长{NICKNAME}在此祝愿大家在船上玩得开心！
E: ...Welcome everyone! {NICKNAME}, your current captain, wishes everyone a great time on board the ship!

C: 天天站在这里脚都麻了，手指泡在水里皮都皱了，又冷又痛，还要天天笑脸相迎。我到底是做错了什么要天天来上刑？
E: My feet's numb from standing all day and my fingers get wrinkly from being in contact with water. But hey, I'm supposed to ignore the cold and pain, and greet everyone with a smile on my face. What have I done, really, to be subjected to this torture called work?

C: 罗莎按照你的命令，派人更改了空艇的命名与尾翼的涂装。
E: Rosa sends staff members to rename the airship and change her tail livery as you ordered.

C: 初次见面，星穹列车的开拓者，侍者亚梅塞菈为您服务。结论：您有<unbreak>13%</unbreak>的概率遭遇了「迷路」问题，<unbreak>85%</unbreak>的概率遭遇了「饥饿」问题。
E: Nice to meet you, Trailblazer of the Astral Express. Attendant Amsella at your service. Conclusion: There's a <unbreak>13%</unbreak> chance that you are lost, and an <unbreak>85%</unbreak> chance that you are hungry.

C: 是你自己想聊吧。
E: You're the one who wants to chat.

C: 我们做梦都想看到它与世界见面的那一天，现在，这个时刻近在咫尺。可…比起诞生，我们更不愿意看到它被它所抗争的现实裹挟，成了陪葬品。
E: We even dreamed about the day this album would be released. And now, that moment was just around the corner. But... compared to seeing the album produced, we could not bear to see it being coerced and held hostage by the reality it was fighting against.

C: 你在校园里随便抓个学生问问，谁没在星期五晚上来过我的派对？谁没在失恋时候喝过一杯查德请的麦芽汁？就说我们学院那个学生会主席，我绝对请过他。
E: Just ask anyone on campus! Who hasn't been to one of my Friday night parties? Who hasn't had a cup of malt juice on me after a breakup? Even the student council president of our Academy — I'm pretty sure I bought him a drink at some point!

C: 财富才是匹诺康尼的梦想，你有钱，你拥有一切！
E: Money is Penacony's big dream. With it, you can have it all!

C: 我要永不散场的派对，无论你是极乐或忧愁，来我的派对。因为人人生来便有分离焦虑，我们本是宇宙母亲诞下的同一个灵魂，被抛进不同的躯体。
E: Join my party, where the fun never wanes, whether you're flying high or feeling some strains. The fear of being apart is something we all know. From one cosmic mother, in diverse bodies we grow.

C: 想法很好，但按我的理解…钱，买不来，爱情。
E: That's a novel idea, but from how I see it... money isn't going to buy anyone love.

C: 我没…！…这是商业机密，想打听得付钱。
E: I don't—! ...That's a trade secret that will cost you money.

C: 我被选为谐乐学院的球笼车手，参加预选赛时，这群人就找上我了。
E: It was when I was chosen to become the Charmony Academy Spheroid driver and took part in qualifying that they came to me.

C: 那个惹了你的「家伙」是？
E: Who is this "guy" that made you so mad?

C: ——财富学院的学生会主席，尚恩。那家伙就是个行走的投资机器。
E: ...Chairman of the Fortune Academy student council — Shawn. That guy is a walking investment machine.

C: 死亡使者…
E: The Envoy of Death...

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: …嗯…你是…是你…我怎么了…？
E: ...Hm? You're... It's you... What's going on...?

C: 至于那些梦泡的评价，我不建议你去看。不管是好评还是差评，我觉得都不够客观…但没办法，哈，屁股决定脑袋…人生来如此。
E: As for comments on the dream bubbles, I would advise against reading them. Be it good comments or bad ones, I don't think they're objective enough... Can't be helped though. Your perspective defines your logic... That's just how life is.

C: 哈，屁股决定脑袋，自己还要靠家里养呢，当然不会理解喜剧人的吃饭问题了。
E: Ah. Your perspective defines your logic. What would a kid that still lives off their parents know about the struggles a comedian faces to feed themselves?

C: 哼，说什么商业化发展，我觉得只是社团走投无路的借口！
E: Hmph, what's this talk about commercialization and development? I think it's just an excuse from a club that has run out of options!

C: 哎，我也说不清楚。只是…演出结束后，再去那些派对都觉得没劲了。
E: *sigh* I can't really put it into words. It's just that... after the performance, going to all those parties feels dull.

C: 什么忍符的绘制技巧，忍•真言的吟诵韵律，超•忍•动态视力的磨练…比我在健身房上的私教课还要累，我是想做忍侠，不是来受罪的呀。
E: What's all this nonsense about ninja talisman drawing techniques, ninja mantra chant cadence, super ninja dynamic vision training... They're even more tiring than my private gym lessons! I want to become a Ninja Hero! Not to feel like dying all the time!

C: 我…不想走他们规定的道路，我有自己对世界、对未来的理解和感悟。
E: I... don't want to walk on the path they dictated for me. I have my own views and perceptions of the future.

C: 你知道吗，学员中流传着一份名为「我最讨厌的老师」的共享文档。
E: Do you know that there is a shared file named "Teachers I Hate Most" that's making its rounds among students?

C: 但既然学生都喜欢，观众也表示认可，那行吧，姑且表扬下你们也不是不可以。
E: But if the students like it and the audience also approves, then that's fine. I'm not above giving you a compliment or two.

C: 随着年纪增加，这记性是越来越差了，刚抄过的曲子，过不了多久就忘了。哎。
E: As one gets older, the memory starts to fade. Melodies copied not long ago are forgotten soon after. *sigh*

C: 唉…之前「谐乐蕉师」说我根本没有表演天赋，该不会是真的吧……
E: *sigh* ...The Charmony BananAdvisor said that I am devoid of performing talent. That can't really be true, can it...

C: 我真的很喜欢她的话，无论是不是电影台词，都很让我震撼…我、我可以的，我一定可以成为像你和她一样耀眼的「忍者」。
E: I really love what she says. Everything just resonates with me, even if they're just movie lines... I—I can do it. I will definitely become a radiant ninja like you and her.

C: 不懂欣赏的门外汉，总有一天我会拿到匹诺康尼的最佳新人奖，让大街小巷都是我的海报——他到时候去哪都会看到我的脸，气死他！
E: Bah, a pleb who doesn't know art even if it hit him in the face. I'll win Penacony's Best New Artist award one day, and the streets will be plastered with my posters — he'll have to see my face everywhere he goes. That'll teach him!

C: 答案当然是：「完全没有！」
E: The answer is of course: Nothing!

C: 然后，「寰宇蝗灾」就结束了。
E: Then, the Swarm Disaster ended.

C: 或许今后，我们还有机会踏上「同谐」的其他属地。当然，我会尽可能回避，以免引来麻烦。
E: Perhaps we'll visit more domains of the Harmony someday. I'll make sure to excuse myself to avoid any complications.

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 《<unbreak>420</unbreak>岁废弃智械转生成哈努兄弟拯救美梦小镇》、《黑帮的自我修养》、《狼人老大爱上我》…天啊，哈努兄弟为什么会有这种同人作品？
E: The 420-Year-old Abandoned Intellitron Reincarnated as Brother Hanu Saves Dreamville, Self-Cultivation of a Gangster, The Werewolf's Love... Why are there these kinds of Brother Hanu fan fiction?

C: 只有四下空无一人的时候，哈努兄弟才会展现出些许疲惫。花儿把这些画面放进心里，静静地守望。
E: Brother Hanu will only show a hint of fatigue when no one is around. The flower carves this image into its memory as it quietly watches Hanu.

C: 累了的话我会飞过来休息的，谢谢你的关心啾。
E: I'll fly over to rest when I'm tired. Thanks for your concern, tweet~

C: 在你的双手触及时，「身份已识别，正在为您加载。」一道冰冷的电子音从球体中传来，这究竟是个什么玩意，你感到好奇。
E: As your hands come into contact with it, you hear a cold electric voice, "Identity confirmed. Loading data." What exactly is this? You can't help but wonder.

C: 抱歉，我下次注意。
E: Sorry, I'll be mindful in the future.

C: 哎呀，船长，您太客气了！泳池打滑，您走起来比较急也是情理之中。我也只是为您的人身安全考虑，打扰了！
E: Ahh, captain, you're too kind! The floor around the swimming pool is slippery, so it's understandable that you're walking quicker than usual. I'm only worried about your personal safety. Sorry!

C: 在你完成了船长职位的交接手续后，你总算获得了这间船长室的实际控制权。
E: After completing the handover procedure for the captain's position, you finally obtain actual control over the Captain's Quarters.

C: 困死了……
E: So tired...

C: 有，但这个不卖。
E: Yes, but it's not for sale.

C: 点数不够了，上哪充值？
E: Not enough credits left... Where do I recharge?

C: 三个惊梦剧团。
E: Triple Dreamjolt Troupe.

C: 欢迎光临，进来看看？
E: Welcome! Come on in and take a look?

C: 就不能带我去一次嘛…
E: Can't we just try it once? Please...

C: 下一个打卡什么地方？
E: Where do we head to next?

C: 请你一杯？
E: May I buy you a drink?

C: 听说这东西不健康…
E: Heard it's not the healthiest thing...

C: 没有驾照能开球笼吗？
E: Do I need a license to drive a Spheroid?

C: 它们都说我们两个酒瓶在一起挺奇怪的……
E: They all say it is weird for us two bottles to stay together...

C: 算了，还是聊点开心的吧。修缮完成后你想去哪里？
E: Forget about it. Let's talk about something happy. Where do you want to go once it's all fixed up?

C: 孩子，不要恐慌。
E: Don't panic, my child.

C: 还是躺在家里舒服…
E: Lying down at home is the best...

C: 好…好。
E: Oh... Okay.

C: 我想我坠入爱河了…
E: I think I'm in love...

C: 别着急，猎犬正在盘查，还有三百四十个人就排到你了。
E: Don't worry, the Bloodhounds are on it. There are only three hundred and forty people until your turn.

C: 上头有紧急命令，调查结束前，任何人都不得进出。
E: The higher-ups have emergency orders that no one is allowed to enter or exit the premises before investigations are concluded.

C: 很久以前，热砂的时刻是一片危险的荒漠……
E: Long ago, the Moment of Scorchsand was a dangerous desert...

C: 各位观众，这里是热砂的时刻，让我为您带来达乐苏盛会海选的现场报道…
E: Dear viewers, this is the Moment of Scorchsand. Let me bring you the official on-site details from the SoulGlad Festivity Auditions...

C: …明白明白，我会仔细检查的，请您放心。
E: ...I got it. I got it. I'll check more carefully. Don't you worry.

C: 我听那些猎犬说，「按钮」都蔓延到我们「晖长石号」上来了？
E: I heard those Hounds say that the "buttons" have even crept onto our Radiant Feldspar?

C: …除此以外，「晖长石号」上还有个神秘地点，我听说是最近才出现的。
E: ...Also, there's a mystery location on the Radiant Feldspar. I hear that it only appeared recently.

C: 感觉还有很多故事…
E: Sounds like there's more than meets the eye...

C: 姐姐没那么紧张了…
E: I'm not as anxious anymore...

C: 你们有潜水服务吗？
E: Do you have diving services?

C: 去和她打个招呼吧…
E: Go talk to her...

C: 就没个皮皮西专用款？
E: Are there no Pepeshi-only designs?

C: 啊啊啊我的宝物！我的限量典藏版《银河球棒侠》卡带——
E: Ahhh my treasure! My limited-edition collectible, the Galactic Baseballer cartridge...

C: 看上去应该是无害的涂鸦，但不论是什么图案，校方往往都会认为其中含有危害校园的元素。
E: They look like harmless graffiti, but no matter what their designs are, the school will always assume there are elements within that carry harmful messages.

C: 非常棒的空间感，使我开始晕3D——评语来自折纸大学。
E: Such excellent use of spaces that I got nauseous from it — A comment from Paperfold University.

C: 多么复杂的设计图，网传存在着一张「只要一直盯着就会让人昏昏欲睡的图片」，或许就是它了。
E: What a complicated design. The net has a rumored "drawing that makes you sleepy if you stare at it for too long" image — this could be it.

C: 「开拓」之旅永远不会结束，你找到自己的下一站了吗，钟表小子？
E: The Trailblazing expedition will never end. Have you found your next stop, Clockie?

C: 折纸大学的吹奏部也和电视剧里的一样不务正业吗？你对此感到好奇，却无从考据。
E: Is Paperfold University's Band Club just as slack as the one in the drama? You are very curious, but there's no way to verify.

C: 你们定期开展交流会，产出会议论文，组织学术讲座…渐渐地，你开始习惯在学校里的生活，这里安宁而美好，不需要面对任何未知的风险。
E: You regularly hold discussions, write discourse theses, organize academic seminars... Slowly, you start to get accustomed to school life — it is peaceful and beautiful here, no need to face any unknown threats.

C: 小鸟，你可以唱歌。
E: No, you can keep singing.

C: 噫！没、没什么大事…就是合唱时候站错了地方，唱跑调了而已！真的！
E: Me? N—Nothing much... I just stood in the wrong position during choir practice and sang a few notes out of tune. Honest!

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: 从它电子屏荧光的频闪里，你竟看出一丝真挚的惊讶。
E: From the flickering glow of its electronic screen, you can detect a hint of genuine surprise.

C: 坊间传言，公司会招募这款游戏的高阶玩家，这传言害得不少人将青春消耗在了这款游戏上。
E: Rumor has it that IPC will recruit high-level players from this game, a rumor that has caused many to waste their youth on it.

C: 《狐中之狼•极》
E: Wolf Among Foxes: Extreme

C: 看来需要为它制定一个健康饮食计划了。
E: Looks like you need to create a healthy diet plan for it.

C: 嘘…别那么大声，隔墙有耳。
E: Shh... Keep your voice down. You never know who might be listening.

C: 羊排肉肥瘦相间，鲜嫩无比，却没有丝毫膻气。你将自己埋进盘子里，吃相堪比一只饿了三天的浣熊。
E: The lamb steak is tender, juicy, and incredibly flavorful without the gamey flavor. You devour it eagerly like a hungry raccoon after three days without food.

C: 哈哈，没关系，欢迎下次光临。
E: No worries! Looking forward to your next visit.

C: 衣…匠…？
E: Garmentmaker...

C: 即便这是一杯没有任何附加效果的秘酿，也有一个祝福「始终保持着期待」送给你。
E: Even if this is just an ordinary ambrosia with no extra effects, there's still a blessing of "always keep hope alive" for you.

C: 根据你的经验，这样的声音是能够转化成波形图的，你开始屏息凝神想象一个画面——
E: Based on your experience, this sound could be transformed into a waveform. You begin to focus, imagining a picture in your mind —

C: 没事，你们这样的大人都过得很辛苦的，我理解。
E: It's fine. You adults have it tough, I understand.

C: 今天的橄榄也不错，你可以尝尝…说起来，赫卡特的探险小队昨天又出城了。
E: These olives today taste pretty good. You should try some... By the way, Hecate's expedition squad set off on another adventure yesterday.

C: 你看看手中紫红色的梨形果实，轻松地撕开薄如蝉翼的果皮，露出其中的鲜红嫩肉。
E: Examining the pear-shaped purplish fruit in your hand, you easily peel back the extraordinarily thin skin and expose the vibrant red flesh inside.

C: …偶尔有东西来。有坏东西，也有人。我做饭的时候，更多。
E: ...Trouble comes sometimes. Bad things, bad people. More bad things when I cook.

C: 只是在奥赫玛，天文学…你懂的。虽说《艾格勒曲线论》本身是纯数学的著作，但顶着这个名号，恐怕没什么人愿意和它扯上关系，更不要说资助我出版了。
E: It's just that... astronomy in Okhema... you know how it is. While On Aquila Curves is a book in pure mathematics, its title might deter people from exploring it, let alone securing a sponsor for publication.

C: 哎呀，忙碌的年轻人，要注意劳逸结合哦。早睡早起、按时吃饭、少喝凉水，啊——遇到不顺心的事就先停下来深吸一口气，慢就是快，磨刀可不误砍柴工啊。
E: Ah, a busy bee, I see, but remember to balance work and play. Early to bed, early to rise, eat well, and skip those icy drinks... When trouble comes knocking, take a breather, because rushing leads to blunders.

C: 寻求那末世之中的乐土吧\n彼处尚存日光、清泉和丰壤
E: In the end times, seek the promised land.\nSunlight, clear waters, fertile soil, where peace will stand.

C: 「城邦覆没、众人流离 ；阿多尼娅恪守诺言，独留空城翘首以盼。」
E: "The city crumbled, its people scattered wide. Adonia waited, faithful, till the final tide."

C: 悬锋陷落，灾殃骤起，与英雄共赴——
E: Amidst rising plague and crumbling Kremnos. The outlander joins heroes, dispelling great woes.

C: 比如说，我和缇宁平时不大爱出门，而缇安很喜欢到处游玩。看到漂亮景色的时候，缇安就会分享给*我们*。
E: For instance, Tribbie and Trinnon are the indoorsy type, but Trianne is the opposite. When Trianne sees a beautiful landscape, she shares it with us through telepathy.

C: 好呀好呀，明天见可是个特别、特别好的祝福呢。小灰明天见！
E: Okay, sure! "See you tomorrow" is such a wonderful blessing! See you tomorrow, Gray Hair!

C: 有时候我真希望能像那些山之民一样。他们似乎从不被噩梦困扰，也许吉奥里亚给了他们特殊的祝福吧。
E: Sometimes I wish I could be like the Mountain Dwellers. They never seem to be disturbed by nightmares. Perhaps Georios has given them some kind of special blessing?

C: 这样啊…
E: I see...

C: …喜欢吗？算是吧。不过这种闹市也只有离得很远才会好看。一旦靠近，你就会想起来，过日子的每一件事原来都是那么让人提不起劲。
E: ...Do I like it? I suppose so. But a city this bustling only looks good from a distance. Once you draw closer, you'll realize that everything there is to life is actually insipidly boring.

C: 可能是到了青春期吧，但它们本性还是很温柔的，绝不会乱攻击人。工坊里有个新来的同事，最近总喜挠它们下巴，有时又会骑上去摸摸头，可它们也没有出现抵触情绪啊。
E: Perhaps it's because they've reached puberty, but they're still very gentle by nature and would never harm a fly. We've got a new coworker at the workshop who likes to tickle their chins and who sometimes rides them to pet their heads — but they never show the slightest resistance.

C: 可以跟我讲讲你的研究吗？
E: Could you please tell me about your research?

C: 例如「总穿着铠甲下池子的异邦战士」，「不去上层却喜欢呆在冷水池角落的黄金裔」，「自称塞纳托斯信徒的人」。大多面孔只出现过一次，也有些许成了常客。
E: For example, "the foreign warrior who always wore armor to soak in the baths," "the Chrysos Heir that always stayed in the corner of the cold pool rather than going upstairs," "the person that referred to themself as a disciple of Thanatos..." Most faces we only see once, though some also become regulars.

C: 到时候就这么说吧：「我是赫克鲁斯。我以荣耀发誓，宁死也不抛弃同伴！」
E: I know. I'll say: "I am Herklas. I vow upon my honor that I won't abandon my friends, even in death!"

C: 你醒着说话比醉了还难懂。
E: You speak less sense sober than when you're drunk.

C: 沙场中、血海里，横渡生死者，才有…静默的战吼。
E: Cross the battlefield, through seas of blood, one shall. Only then, silent war cries, find you will.

C: …谢谢。哈托努斯，自豪的作品，随意看。
E: ...Thank you. Chartonus' proud creations, you may look at as you please.

C: 你可是来对地方了——欢迎选购「翻飞之手」！
E: You've come to the right place — welcome to the "Whimsy Hand"!

C: 什么秘酿？
E: What ambrosia?

C: 丹恒话语中的有所保留，无疑留给你巨大的想象的空间……
E: Dan Heng's words are measured, indubitably leaving enormous room for your imagination to go into overdrive...

C: 放轻松就好，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: Just relax, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}.

C: 雅努萨波利斯…是我的家乡，仅此而已。
E: Janusopolis... is my home. That is all.

C: 啊，「异乡人」阁下。来得正好，我达米亚诺斯最近又有了伟大的发现。
E: Ah, esteemed outlander. Your timing is impeccable. I, Damionis, have recently made yet another significant discovery.

C: 数学是阐述必然性的知识，哪怕悬锋城的战士全部改信墨涅塔，圆依旧是圆，不会变成方形。但「阿卡索斯」的存在，必须依赖现实历史。
E: Mathematics explains absolute and certain truth. If all the warriors of Castrum Kremnos were to suddenly follow Mnestia, a circle would still be a circle. It would not change shape. However, the existence of "Icatus" absolutely relies on real history.

C: （质疑：论点有误。）
E: (Question: Your theory is flawed.)

C: 她的话让我以不同的方式看待这个世界，反而能更直观地感受到身边的情感波动。
E: Her words shifted my perspective on the world, enabling me to perceive emotional fluctuations more directly.

C: ——一颗超新星在你的嘴里爆发，最终坍缩成黑洞，将一切知觉全部吸入。
E: —A supernova ignites in your mouth, only to collapse into a black hole, pulling in every sensation and swallowing all perception.

C: 怎么样，在奥赫玛的生活还习惯吗？有没有稳定的收入？千里迢迢来到圣城，可别一不小心把自己饿死了！
E: How are you finding life in Okhema? Do you have a stable income? It'd be a real shame if you came all this way to the holy city only to end up starving!

C: 我是不是在哪听过这种段子。
E: Haven't I heard this joke before?

C: 每次踏入浴场，我就如同在锻炼时那样，能感到露出我这细胳膊细腿时的恐慌。
E: Every time I step into the bath, it feels like stepping into the gym again — I can sense the anxiety of exposing my skinny arms and legs.

C: 这可不是一时的风尚，也不是奥赫玛的专属，而是翁法罗斯所有城邦的通病，只是不同地方的狂热程度有高有低。
E: This is not just a passing trend, nor is it exclusive to Okhema. It is a common affliction in all the city-states of Amphoreus, though the level of fanaticism varies from place to place.

C: 哈哈~别紧张，朋友。我没别的意思，只是些感慨罢了。
E: Haha, don't be nervous, friend. I don't mean anything. Just feeling a bit emotional.

C: …讨论会就快结束了，要不要再多吃点？
E: ...The discussion will be wrapping up soon. Want to have some more to eat?

C: 难得有随便享用浴场餐品的机会，不能浪费，得值回我为那几篇论文花费的心血！
E: It's rare to have the chance to enjoy the baths' food. Can't waste it, and gotta make sure it's worth the effort I put into those papers!

C: 最后，是缇宝大人她们动用权能，把遗邦的识本全部搜集了来，在公民大会过了个表决，这地方被冠了个「学识枢纽」名头…而我这些老伙计，自然跟着不愁营生了。
E: Finally, Lady Tribbie and the others used their powers to gather all the knowledge from the fallen nations. After a vote in the citizens' assembly, this place was given the title of 'Knowledge Hub'... and my old companions no longer had to worry about our livelihoods.

C: 「知识」也能推销吗？
E: "Knowledge" can be sold too?

C: 这东西能活络身心，补血化瘀。不管有伤没伤，每天来上一杯准没错。待会儿等你参与完试炼，我也帮你准备一杯——如果你能活着出来的话，哈哈！
E: This stuff invigorates both body and mind, enriches your blood and improves its circulation. Wounds or no, you can't go wrong with a cup a day. When you're done with the trial, I'll help you prep a cup too — if you make it out alive, that is. Haha!

C: 你吃下了那碗粥，味道不算好，油脂很重，但饱腹感强——想来非常适合重体力劳动的士兵。
E: You finish the porridge. It doesn't taste great. The oil's too heavy, but it's filling — perfect for a soldier engaged in heavy labor, when you think about it.

C: 不过科学的春天已经到了，在我的带领下，贝洛伯格马上就能迎来技术爆炸。
E: But the renaissance of science is upon us. Under my leadership, Belobog is on the verge of a technological revolution.

C: 真、真的吗？谢谢您，祭司大人！
E: Re—Really? Thank you, Sir Priest!

C: 站住！此乃祭祀重地，你一身奇装异服，鬼鬼祟祟到处晃悠，有什么目的？圣女卫队呢，我卫队哪儿去了！
E: Stop right there! This is a sacred place! A place meant to deliver offerings unto the divine. What is your purpose here, sneaking around in those strange clothes? Where are the Holy Maiden's guards!?

C: 我…唯有雅努斯圣女才能传递神谕，我等祭司只需保护圣女、应她所需定期开启仪式即可。
E: I... Only the Holy Maiden is able to pass on prophecies. Priests like myself need only protect the Holy Maiden and carry out ceremonies when required.

C: 也许等些时间再来找他，就能得到有趣的答案了。
E: Perhaps if you give him some time, he will have an interesting answer waiting for you.

C: 好在我们对现任圣女管束较为严苛，大部分平民都只知有圣女，未见过圣女样貌。
E: Fortunately, we have imposed harsher restrictions on the current Holy Maiden. The majority of citizens only know of the Holy Maiden's existence. They have never actually seen what she looks like.

C: 据说在很久以前，命运三泰坦会在此现身，回应人们的祈祷。不过那都是很久远的事了，现在基本都由祭司们和圣女大人负责传达它们的神谕。
E: Legend has it that, centuries ago, the Three Titans of Fate would manifest here to respond to the prayers of the people. But those days are long gone. It's primarily the priests and the Holy Maiden who relay their prophecies now.

C: 没事，我只是路过。
E: It's nothing. I was just passing through.

C: 拗不过这位热情的卫兵，你只好简单描述了番记忆中的圣女模样……
E: Unable to resist the guard's enthusiasm, you briefly describe the Holy Maiden as you remember her...

C: …还是算了吧。辜负了阁下好意…请恕罪，我绝没有消遣的意思，只是刚才那瞬间，我回想起了神谕。
E: ...Forget it. I shouldn't have misinterpreted your kindness... Please forgive me. I had no intention of being disrespectful. It's just that... at that moment... I recalled the prophecy.

C: 诶？问我对阁下的初印象吗？说来可笑，当时看到阁下与白厄站在一块儿，我还以为奥赫玛又迎来一位板正的救世主了呢。
E: Oh? What was my first impression of you? Funny story — when I first saw you standing with Phainon, I thought Okhema had welcomed yet another upright Deliverer.

C: *我们*吗？*我们*记得自己离开雅努萨波利斯的时候，手里还拿着家乡的纺锤。
E: We? We remember that when we left Janusopolis, we still held the spindle of our homeland in our hands.

C: 据说在艾格勒将被击败的时候，天空也即将与泰坦一同坠落。为了防止世间万物被苍穹碾碎，塞涅俄丝不得不支撑起天空……
E: It's said that when Aquila was on the verge of defeat, the sky itself was also about to fall with the Titan. To prevent the world from being crushed by the heavens, Seliose had no choice but to hold up the sky...

C: 呀，灰宝！今天阳光特别不错，谢谢刻法勒，你也是来晒太阳的吧。
E: Ah, Grayie! What a gorgeous sunny day, thank Kephale. You're here to soak up some sun too, aren't you?

C: 咦，灰宝居然也对医术感兴趣吗？看来你果然很适合加入我们呢！
E: Oh? Grayie, you're actually interested in the art of medicine too? Seems like you really are a great fit for us!

C: 逃难的人需要大地兽搬运行李，我会提供大地兽；有人需要食物和取暖，我会提供营帐和食物…我提供各式各样的帮助，只不过它们并不是无偿的。
E: When refugees needed dromases to haul their belongings, I provided dromases. When they required food and warmth, I offered tents and supplies. I provide all kinds of aid — just not for free.

C: 奥赫玛想要进步，就需要更先进、更实际的社会架构与管理方式。我有心成为这个伟大变革的推动者，奈何我只是个「平民」。
E: If Okhema wants progress, it needs a better, more practical system of governance. I'd love to spearhead that change, but alas, I'm just a "civilian."

C: 我的理想是独立于奥赫玛管理者之外，拆解官僚机构，削减多余监管法规和浪费的开支，让陈腐的管理者早点滚出黎明云崖。
E: My ambition is to create an administration independent of Okhema's rulers — one that dismantles the bureaucracy, slashes excessive regulations, and cuts wasteful spending. It's time to send those antiquated officials packing from Dawncloud.

C: …故乡覆灭时，我正在奥赫玛巡演，无家可归的我，自那以后就定居在了奥赫玛。现在想来，我生活于此的时光早已超过了故乡「米里奥斯」。
E: ...When my homeland fell, I was touring Okhema. Left without a home, I've lived here ever since. Now, I've spent more years in Okhema than I ever did in Milios.

C: 你在创作以故乡为原型的戏剧？
E: You're writing a play inspired by your homeland?

C: 哈哈哈——你可以不必那么委婉。我非常自恋！自恋到令人讨厌。
E: Bahaha! You can be frank about it. Yes, I am very narcissistic! So much that it annoys people.

C: 当然，那么你对怎样的墓志铭更感兴趣呢？
E: Of course. What kind of epitaphs are you more interested in?

C: 你回去之后，坚持每日敬拜泰坦，对你绝对有好处。记住，唯有虔诚的信徒，才配得上神明的眷顾。
E: When you return, make sure to venerate the Titan daily. It will surely benefit you. Remember, only the devout are worthy of divine favor.

C: 嗯…有位织者不甘沉沦。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云崖的一处瀑布中央</color>，与激流搏斗呢。
E: Hmm... A weaver refuses to give up. The golden thread brings news that it is battling the rapids in <color=#dbc291ff>a waterfall on Dawncloud</color>.

C: 若要分辨亡语蝶和创生若虫，我有一个小技巧——所有的若虫都有触角，那些没有的就是亡语蝶啦。
E: To distinguish between Eulogistic Butterflies and Creation Nymphs, here's a tip — all nymphs have antennae, while those without are Eulogistic Butterflies.

C: 看样子贵客注意到了，有何吩咐？
E: It seems you've noticed that. What do you need?

C: 可曾听闻圣山之上，最后的城邦\n不朽神明岿然背负，永恒的太阳
E: Have you heard of the last city, on the Holy Mountain high?\nWhere the immortal deity carries the sun across the eternal sky?

C: …你们在说什么？
E: ...What are you guys talking about?

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you alright?

C: 周围的大地兽发出了呜嗡声，听起来像是在肯定这位勤恳寻土人的想法。
E: The surrounding dromases hum in agreement, as if they are in agreement with this diligent Earth Scout's thoughts.

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...

C: 多谢你，贵客…现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「晨昏之瞳有四重，前路之阻亦有四重。凡人唯能窥见其一，其三需问与天外。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"The Twilight Iris holds four layers, and so do the trials ahead. Mortals may only glimpse one — the other three lie beyond the sky."</color>

C: 咦…你俩整天形影不离的，现在反倒来问我？哼哼，果然——村里和白厄哥关系最好的，还得是我！
E: Huh? You two are glued together most days, and now you're asking me? Heh! Knew it — no one in this village is tighter with Mr. Phainon than me!

C: 行李…我收拾好了。
E: I've... packed my bags.

C: 哈，你不说我都忘了！臭小子，手脚麻利，就说随我，你妈还不信……
E: Ha! I almost forgot! Kid, you're quick on your feet, just like me. Your mom still doesn't believe it...

C: 这个声音，好像在吸溜白白芋面迷。
E: That sound... it's like someone slurping creamy taro noodles, mem.

C: 唔，一时没什么想法呢…有了，不如随性一些，四处看看找点灵感吧？
E: Hmm, I'm drawing a blank right now... Oh, I know! How about we take a walk and look for some inspiration?

C: 暂时不想做什么……
E: I don't feel like doing anything right now...

C: 想做些有意义的事。
E: I want to do something meaningful.

C: 你以为我不想吗？军中事务处理完一桩还有十桩，甚至连宴会期间都有琐事，哪有时间回家……
E: You think I don't want to? There are ten more military matters waiting, after each one's done. Even during the banquet, there are trivial issues. How can I find time to go home...

C: 干脆把我的眼睛伸到后面去看看吧嘤！
E: I'll extend my eyes behind it to take a look, eep!

C: 为什么会这样呢…第一次抢到了优惠券，有了学生才能享受的六点九折折扣。两件快乐的事情交织在一起，本该给我带来更大的优惠。
E: Why did it turn out like this... It was my first time getting a coupon, and I also had a <unbreak>31%</unbreak> student discount. Two happy things overlapping should have given me an even better deal.

C: 希望那些美食奥秘，能为餐桌前的你带来些许启迪的灵光迷。
E: May these culinary insights spark a little inspiration at your table, mem.

C: 当然要讲究：热水清洁身体、净化魂灵；温水消除疲劳、放松心情；冷水冷却降温、振奋精神——
E: Of course I'm fussy about it: Hot water detoxes the body and cleanses the soul. Warm water eliminates fatigue and relaxes the mind. Cold water lowers the temperature and perks up the spirit...

C: 唉，羡慕你们。我…没法靠近它们。
E: *sigh* I envy you all. I... can't go near them.

C: 那老话怎么说的来着？家家有尊难伺候的泰坦……
E: How does the saying go? Each family has its own Titanic issue...

C: 老奶奶，糖吃太多了能有什么好处啊？还是得小心预防糖尿病嘛。
E: Come on now, nobody should eat that much candy. You don't want to undermine your health with sweets.

C: 不错的联想。
E: A fine inference.

C: 至终，重新流淌…
E: In the end, flowing once more...

C: 咕咕…噢！有个梦想着变得金光闪闪的孩子，总仰望着折纸树林里<color=#dbc291ff>最闪闪发光的大鸟</color>，寻找它要抬头看咕。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who dreams to become all shiny and dazzling, and it's always dreaming of becoming the <color=#dbc291ff>most radiant, biggest bird</color> in Paperfold Woods. To look for it, one must raise one's head, hoot.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个孩子在准备一场惊喜生日派对，或许你可以在<color=#dbc291ff>飘浮起的礼盒</color>中寻找它的身影咕。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child planning for a surprise birthday party. Maybe you can find them near those <color=#dbc291ff>floating bundles</color>, hoot.

C: 如果您感觉心理难受，我可以帮助您缓解一些压力。这也是我能为空间站做出的微薄贡献。
E: If you are not well mentally, I can help you relieve some stress. This is the least I can do for the space station.

C: 能够解答您心中的困扰，我很荣幸。之后有需要，可以随时来与我联系。
E: It's my honor to answer your questions. Please contact me anytime if you have any further inquiries.

C: 又见到你了…除了星神…我了解的知识并不多……
E: We meet again... I don't know much about anything apart from the Aeons...

C: 安全区？
E: Safe zone?

C: 我们有大量的资料被摧毁，它们不同于实验材料，可以凭借复刻一次实验就得到数据。里面的许多星神秘闻，是很难有机会再次听闻的……
E: A lot of our files were destroyed. Unlike experimental documents, which they can get the data by repeating the experiment, many Aeon mysteries will be lost forever...

C: …已经泡了有很长一段时间了，我现在还没有找到。
E: ...It's been soaking in it for quite a while now, and I still haven't found it.

C: 不过！我不会开口的。我改变不了神悟树庭的现状，我改变不了翁法罗斯…我能改变的，只有我自己，让自己不要轻易依赖别人——
E: But I won't say a word! I can't change the state of the Grove of Epiphany and I can't change Amphoreus... What I can change is only myself, to stop relying on others so easily...

C: 不，我只是在自言自语而已…突如其来的自由，让我有些不知所措。
E: No, I'm just talking to myself... This sudden freedom has me a bit lost.

C: 谢谢你的建议，我明白，停下是为了更好地前进。
E: Thanks for your advice. I get it, sometimes you need to take a step back to move forward.

C: 若虫也这么肉麻？
E: Are nymphs this cheesy too?

C: 我要冷静，不能出岔子…
E: I need to stay calm, don't mess this up...

C: 这只若虫发出奇怪的声音，恍若泰坦的低语——当然，也可能是它出故障了。
E: The nymph let out a strange noise. It almost sounded like a Titan whispering. Or maybe it was just broken.

C: 哟，我还以为这老东西逮到哪个大靠山了呢。好久不见啊，年轻人，来都来了，有没有兴趣当当「一日塔兰顿」啊？
E: And here I thought this antique had found himself a powerful friend. Long time no see, young hero. Since you're here, fancy stepping in as our One-Day Talanton today?

C: …我不该把它拿出来的。
E: ...I shouldn't have taken it out.

C: 都听小大哥的！有了正确的训练法，效果明显多了！我总算能赶上潮流了！
E: I'll follow your lead, big bro! With the right training method, the results are way more obvious! I can finally keep up with the trends!

C: 跟它玩一玩。
E: Play with it.

C: o((•ω‡= )o「别惹我，等狂豹症发作时，我就是另一只海豹了！」)∋
E: o((•ω‡= )o "Don't you dare mess with me. Just wait till my Sealmania kicks in, and you'll see a whole different seal!" )∋

C: 新的挑战是指…
E: "New challenges" meaning...

C: 好主意！我攒下的那些奇珍异宝，足够尝尝当老板的滋味了。
E: Great idea! With all those rare treasures I've saved up, I can finally get a taste of being the boss!

C: 哈哈，拯救世界的任务完成之后，再说出这种话，果然还是有点像热血过头的笨蛋。
E: Haha, saying stuff like that after saving the world, you do sound like an over-enthusiastic goofball.

C: 迈德漠斯，加冕为王！
E: Mydeimos, become king!

C: 要不…你去问问小夏，如果是他的话，一定知道很多奇奇怪怪的东西。
E: Why don't you go ask Naxy? I'm sure he knows all sorts of weird and wonderful things.

C: 至少此刻，我们又见面了，不是吗？
E: At least for this moment, we meet again, don't we?

C: 好宁静的麦田…哀丽秘榭的时光，再也不会被打扰啦。
E: Such a peaceful wheat field... The tranquil moments of Aedes Elysiae will never be disturbed again.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下居然还记得，赛飞儿阁下替我报名的那场扳手腕大赛。
E: {NICKNAME}, you still remember that arm-wrestling tournament Lady Cipher signed me up for.

C: 不过在那之前，我还有必须完成的使命…你愿意协助我，对吗？
E: But before that, there is a duty I must fulfill... You'll lend a hand, right?

C: 「呓语密林」。
E: The Murmuring Woods.

C: 有些事情想要请教。

C: 三月七，你也是参赛选手。

C: 虽然时间很短暂，我好像感觉什么都能看到，什么都能听到，却什么也做不到。
E: While it was just for a short time, I felt like I could see everything, hear everything, but I couldn't do a single thing.

C: 请向我保证，你会好好对待她。
E: Please promise me that you'll treat her well.

C: 这…哈哈哈，斯科特，我喜欢的正是这样的你。
E: Well... Hahaha, alright, that's exactly what I love about you, Skott.

C: 三月七凭剑术获胜之后，斯科特愿赌服输，道歉认错并离开了金人巷。
E: After March 7th achieves victory via her swordsmanship, Skott admits defeat, apologizes, and leaves Aurum Alley.

C: 放过他吧。
E: Spare him.

C: 放过我吧。毕竟，我已经没有还手之力了。
E: Spare me, please. I don't have the strength to fight back.

C: 这是我们帝玉集团的青总！
E: This is the CEO of the Dynasty Corp, Miss Qingque!

C: 斯科特没有办法反驳。
E: Yeah, Skott couldn't come up with a comeback.

C: 那你说说看，公司迄今为止哪一项成就与你有关？
E: Then tell me, which of the IPC's achievements can you personally take credit for?

C: 废话！你知道我们这趟货运的可是博识学会的尖端技术！每一箱货光是造价就高到你们无法想象！这还不重要？
E: Of course they are! We're transporting the top-of-the-line tech from the Intelligentsia Guild, and each container is worth a fortune! How can they not be important?

C: 看向青雀
E: Look at Qingque

C: 之前椒丘先生还说过「赤龙呕血，命殁归阴」，灵砂大人犯不上冒这么大的险……
E: Mr. Jiaoqiu even said before that "when the Crimson Dragon spits blood, its life will return to the gloom." Master Lingsha does not have to take such a huge risk...

C: 我先说好，我已经想清楚了——不需要！
E: Let me say it first, I've already thought it through — I don't need it!

C: 银狼（的投影）和公输师傅离开了……
E: Silver Wolf (holographic projection) and Master Gongshu have left...

C: 青雀迈着轻松愉快的步伐离开了太卜司。
E: Qingque happily leaves the Divination Commission with a skip in her step.

C: 作为书中之人，他的故事早已成书，无法改变。不过幸好这并非命运，只是本书。
E: As the person in the book, his story is already written and cannot be changed. Fortunately, this is not destiny, it is just a book.

C: 很遗憾，仙舟根本没有垃圾桶！
E: I'm sorry to tell you this, but there are no trashcans on the Xianzhou!

C: 那可真是太巧了。看来咱们在此相遇受到了伟大的垃圾之王塔塔洛夫的庇佑。
E: Well, isn't this a coincidence! It seems our encounter has truly been blessed by the great Garbage King Tatalov!

C: 差点…染上…魔阴身。
E: I was almost... stricken... with mara.

C: （进入战斗）
E: (Enter Battle)

C: 我才是要感谢佩拉小姐愿意吃我的安利。刚刚聊到哪儿了，对了，我在和她讨论「友谊魔法」的事呢。
E: I should be the one thanking you for taking my recommendation, Miss Pela. What were we talking about just now? Oh, that's right, we were discussing the Magic of Friendship.

C: 我很荣幸能听到这些…这位优雅的小姐，结识了志同道合的新朋友，又与一位旧友重逢。
E: I was honored that you would share all this with me... This elegant young lady has made a new, like-minded friend and has been able to reunite with an old one, too.

C: 没错，你害怕了吧？
E: That's right. Scared?

C: 大概准备好了！
E: More or less!

C: 我们那是比武！公平公正，我可绝对没做违反道义的事！
E: It was a martial contest! Open and fair! I swear I didn't do anything unjust!

C: 谢谢小哥！真是不好意思…我这是第一次来到别的文明世界……
E: Thanks, little bro! Really sorry for the trouble... It's my first time visiting another civilization...

C: 「巡猎」信徒？那不是和仙舟人一样吗？就算他再怎么危险，也不会在信众兄弟的地盘上做坏事吧？
E: Disciples of The Hunt? So isn't he the same as Xianzhou folks? No matter how dangerous he is, he won't be causing trouble in the land of his fellow disciples, right?

C: 这样吧…如果接下来我的六发子弹都卡壳，就算你赢。但若是子弹没卡壳…啧啧，这擂台的地板可就不好收拾咯～
E: Tell you what... if my next six shots jam, you win. But if they don't... well, this ring's floor is gonna be a real mess, ain't it?

C: 另外，快别提你那宝贝爱的铁拳了，老子看见这公司赞助的破玩意儿就犯恶心！回头我来替你改装！
E: Also, quit yappin' about your forkin' Iron Fist. That IPC-sponsored piece of trash makes me sick! I'll give it a proper overhaul for ya later!

C: 其实…幻觉也…也不是完全没办法的。只要有一个特别擅长帮人解决心理问题、还很好心眼的岁阳能帮忙……
E: Actually... hallucinations... Th—There's a way to deal with them. As long as there's someone who's superb at dealing with matters of the heart, and a kind-hearted heliobus willing to help out...

C: 是啊…可惜难找那么好的岁阳…
E: Yeah... Sad that it's hard to find such compassionate heliobi these days...

C: 老子觉得你败得很体面。不是人人都有胆识，面对黑洞洞的枪口，还冲上去给他一拳的。
E: I thought your defeat was graceful. Not everyone has the guts to charge at a loaded gun and land a punch.

C: 因此我才判断——我们最好在此对决。
E: Hence, my assessment — we should face each other here.

C: 琥珀王在上！这场「铁臂」之间的对决多么壮美啊！
E: By the Amber Lord! What a glorious showdown between the two "iron arms"!

C: 就是这一点让我觉得自己在做梦！
E: That's exactly what makes me feel like I'm dreaming!

C: 你是一等一的拳手，正如我是一等一的剑士。这一点不会因为胜败而改变。
E: You're a top-notch boxer, just like I'm a top-notch swordsman. The outcome of this match isn't going to change that.

C: 伊戈尔，听完你的演讲，我的共情模块闪过了一星悲伤的火焰。连冷却剂都没法熄灭这股伤感的火。
E: Igor, a flicker of sorrow appears fleetingly in my empathy module after listening to your speech. Even the coolant is unable to put out this flame of melancholy.

C: 但是我错了，雅利洛-Ⅵ的悲剧微不足道。它上演在宇宙的每个角落，不在这儿，就在那儿，不在今天，就在明天。人们对一颗微不足道的星星消失不见早就习以为常了。
E: But I was wrong. Jarilo-VI's tragedy is insignificant. Disasters unfold in every corner of the universe, if not here, then there — if not today, then tomorrow. People have grown accustomed to the disappearance of insignificant stars in the sky.

C: ……现状：我持守戒律，我不回答奢摩以外的人的问题。
E: ...Present situation: I adhere to the commandments, and will not answer questions from anyone but Samatha.

C: 我曾检索过赏金猎人的通缉令，结论：尖兵<unbreak>0089</unbreak>的状态显示为——已死亡。
E: I once checked through the bounty hunters' warrants. Conclusion: Elite Soldier <unbreak>0089</unbreak> status became marked as... deceased.

C: 运动员在训练过程中常常会有那种「假想敌训练」。据我所知，有人通过幻想与等身高的螳螂格斗锻炼自己，所以，卢卡在比赛之中看到幻觉不全是坏事。
E: Athletes do plenty of image training in their regiments. As far as I know, some even train by visualizing themselves to fight mantises that are as tall as them. So it's not entirely a bad thing for Luka to see hallucinations during fights.

C: 大家都知道卢卡选手是第一次离开自己的母星「雅利洛•Ⅵ」，到仙舟来参加比赛，难免会有些精神紧张，在这个状态下看到幻觉也不意外。
E: Everyone knows that this is Luka's first time leaving his home planet, Jarilo-VI, to participate in the tournament on the Xianzhou. It's normal for his nerves to get to him, and not surprising for him to be seeing things under duress.

C: 有这样的事情吗？我只是正常比赛而已，可能是对手变弱了吧。
E: Oh? I did such a thing? I was just competing like I always do. Maybe it was the opponent who was too weak.

C: 身着钢铁盔甲、身形高大健壮、浑身散发着难以接近的强者气息…感觉基本上就是萨姆啊？
E: Clad in steel armor, towering and burly, bursting with an aura of absolute domination... That looks exactly like SAM?

C: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和「铁盾」…顿派…顿派菲昌英！
E: The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" and the Iron Shield... Gigantus... Gigantus Shieldus!

C: 很多人误以为这是卢卡选手的失误，但是我相信这是您布置的战术。以不动的方式应对对手的敏捷，让波提欧选手产生疑惑，获得心理博弈上的优势！
E: Many mistook this for Luka's error, but I'm willing to believe this was a tactic that you planned. Deploying a method of immobility against the opponent's agility, to sow the seed of doubt in Boothill, and to gain the upper hand in the psychological battle!

C: 相信记者朋友们一定准备了很多问题，那我们抓紧时间让{NICKNAME}教练选择记者提问，请注意控制发言时长，现在开始。
E: I trust you all must have prepared many questions. Let's not waste time and have Coach {NICKNAME} pick the journalist. Please pay attention to time. We're starting now.

C: 希望对手下手轻点…
E: I hope the opponent pulls their punches...

C: 不过请大家放心，卢卡选手非常积极，而我也已经从阴霾中走了出来……
E: But everyone can rest assured. Luka is very positive, and I've already stepped away from the gloom...

C: {NICKNAME}教练好啊，我是仙舟那啥啥网站特邀记者桂乃芬。我完全不知道你和卢卡选手真能闯进守擂赛啊！出乎我的意料！
E: Hello, Coach {NICKNAME}. I'm Guinaifen, special correspondent from that Xianzhou website, you know? I totally didn't know that you and Luka would really advance to the final stage! I'm completely floored!

C: 前排左手边第三位。
E: Front row, third from the left.

C: 虎克，不许透露我的笔记！
E: Hey, Hook, don't leak my notes like that!

C: 皈依弟子善逝，断离恶业，为生民静默，于此地长眠。愿您能记得它最后的选择。
E: The converted disciple, Sugata, severed evil karma and kept silence for the sake of the people, and now rests here for all eternity. May you remember their final choice.

C: 到此为止了。
E: That's enough.

C: 卢卡，快用那招！他们猜不到的！
E: Luka, quickly use that move! They'll never see it coming!

C: 呃啊…怎么会……
E: Oh no... How can it be...

C: 再次提示——我不会放水。请你小心。
E: Again, I'd like to remind you that I won't make this easy for you. Please be careful.

C: 卢卡哥哥！也不要输哦！
E: Come on Luka, don't lose!

C: 喔！卢卡哥哥要赢了！史瓦罗加油呀！
E: Oh! Luka's about to win! Svarog, don't give up!

C: 看来卢卡选手真是位了不得的战士！
E: Luka's truly a magnificent warrior!

C: 彦卿大人即将使出他最为得意的杀招！
E: Yanqing's about to unleash his signature move!

C: 卢卡选手！你是否能接下这一剑！
E: Luka! Will you be able to take this?

C: 你怎么这么亢奋？
E: Why are you so hyped?

C: 确实过分。
E: It is a little.

C: 话说有一天，老师向小白、小红和小绿提了一个问题：「把你家里最巨大的东西带来学校。」
E: One day, the teacher asked Blanca, Scarlett, and Vernon a question: "Bring the biggest thing in your house to school."

C: 音乐好处都有啥，说对就给他！
E: What are the merits of music? I'll give it to whoever gets it right!

C: 就叫「缭乱乐团」吧！
E: Let's just call ourselves the Dazzling Band!

C: ——前路漫漫，凶险异常。焦急的观众翘首以盼，静候音律忍法来将舞台点燃！
E: The patch before us is long and fraught with danger. The anxious audience awaits with bated breath, ready for the Sound Release ninjutsu to set the stage ablaze!

C: 「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的诸位，请随在下赶赴音律•猎场——
E: Everyone in Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party, please follow me to the Sound Hunting Ground...

C: 噢…噢！
E: Ohh... Ohhhhh!

C: 音乐派对和三个学院的关系？
E: The music party is related to the three academies?

C: 行，我来帮你看看现在的进度。
E: Sure, let me help you look at the progress.

C: 譬如…以前的乐队核心往往都由谐乐学院指定，财富学院则会对演出的规模和时长提出要求，筑梦学院倒是很简单啦，成员的绩点足够就好。
E: For example... back then, the band leader was often appointed by Charmony Academy, while Fortune Academy would set requirements for the scale and duration of the performance. As for Dreamweaver Academy, it was straightforward — members just needed to have a sufficient grade.

C: 啾！鼓手在合影时候手里只能拿着鼓槌，很可怜的啾！
E: Tweet! Drummers can only hold on to their sticks in group photos, poor things, tweet!

C: 所以，你是真的在从事音乐相关的工作吗？
E: So, are you really doing music-related work?

C: 跟上我的节奏，来场琥珀纪末的终极说唱大比拼吧——
E: Keep up with my flow. We're gonna have the ultimate rap showdown that marks the end of the Amber Era!!!

C: 对不起，我还没做好和你们共同登台的觉悟。
E: Sorry, I'm not ready to share the stage with you guys.

C: 乐队正在演奏美梦小镇的庆典进行曲——好梦来啾，要努力跟上我们的节奏啾！
E: The band's playing the Dreamville's marching song — Good Dreams Come, tweet! Do your best to keep up with us, tweet!

C: 她很自信的样子。应该没问题…吧？
E: She looks confident. There shouldn't be a problem... should there?

C: 皮皮西人的一小步。
E: One small step for the Pepeshi people.

C: 好啦，乱破小姐！相信我，我一定会回来的——
E: Okay, Miss Rappa! Believe me. I will definitely come back—

C: 我不是来问这个的！
E: That's not what I came to ask!

C: 喂喂，那个吉他手该不会真跑了吧？仔细想想，她好像确实没说要参加这次演出啊。
E: Hey, that guitarist hasn't run off for real, has she? Come to think of it, she never actually said that she was going to take part in this performance...

C: 还是先回去吧。
E: Let's just head back first.

C: 算你识相。
E: At least you're being reasonable now.

C: 说回正题——我也算是受邀来参加音乐派对的嘉宾，很喜欢先前的演出，所以想问问，贵校决定替换表演乐队的理由是什么呢？
E: Back to the main point — I'm also a guest invited to the music party and I really enjoyed the previous performances. I'd like to ask why your school decided to replace the performing band.

C: 如此甚好。那么，便由在下宣布——「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的最终作战，于此时正式开启！
E: Very well. Then, I shall announce — the final show of Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party will begin now!

C: 就要烦请主公为我等争取更多时限了。
E: Please buy more time for me, Sound Master.

C: 想不到吧，我和那些汽水瓶在盛会海选上有点交情，愿意给我这个面子。
E: Unexpected, right? I made some connections with the soda bottles during the Festivity Auditions, and they were willing to do me this favor.

C: 扑满反复扭动着身子，似乎很欢迎你们的到来。怎么办，要在这里玩一会吗？
E: The trotter wiggles and waggles about, as if welcoming your presence. Now what? Play with it for a while?

C: 哼，哼哼~
E: Hmph, hmph hmph!

C: （加入垃圾桶的示威…？）
E: (Join the trashcans' demonstration...?)

C: 看见我们来到，转身撒腿就跑！
E: We're gonna come, come, come for your domain, till all you can do is cower in shame!

C: 实在太不讲理，立刻停止言语暴力，表示你的歉意，否则别怪我们生气！
E: Ain't so reasonable! Insult questionable! Say sorry and be amiable! Or we're gonna make you destructible!

C: 也别想逃避我们的质疑！
E: And don't think of running away from fury justifiable!

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: 三月七
E: March 7th

C: 特别鸣谢
E: Special Thanks To

C: 你好奇这商品背后的故事？那老桑博可要唠唠了。还记得我的天外朋友么？那其中有位纯美骑士——
E: You're curious about the story behind this product? Let me regale you, then. Remember my friends from beyond the sky? Among them was a Knight of Beauty...

C: 我要走了。
E: I have to go.

C: 很像你会做的事。
E: Sounds very much like something you'd do.

C: 之前很多人在追查他…
E: Many have been asking about him...

C: 筹码加倍，明天继续！
E: Double the stakes! We resume tomorrow!

C: 竟然有这样的决心……
E: Such determination...

C: 仔细想想，咱们家自己就有调饮机器人，何必去买外面的奶茶呢？
E: Come to think of it, we've got a drinksmith robot right here. Why would I need milk tea delivery anyway?

C: 可恶…丹恒，这人这么评论你的科普文章，是我的话，一定狠狠骂他一顿！
E: Dang... Dan Heng, just read this person's scathing comments on your scientific article. If it were me, I'd definitely give him a thorough dressing-down!

C: 嗯，先想办法处理一下吧。
E: Yes, let's think of a solution first.

C: {NICKNAME}的意思应该是——无论对内还是对外，三月都没有任何撒谎的能力。
E: What {NICKNAME} means is: No matter who it is, March has zero ability to tell a lie.

C: 还真是不可小觑。
E: Now that's nothing to scoff at.

C: 你也失眠了？
E: You can't sleep either?

C: 值得庆幸的是，列车组、护法众和孩子们都毫发无伤。
E: Fortunately, the Express crew, Dharma Defenders and the children were all unharmed.

C: 好闲啊。
E: I'm so bored.

C: 「闭嘴」前辈，您才是真正的「天才」！请允许我因之前的冒犯而向您道歉，是我「有眼不识金镶玉」——尽管身为一台餐饮机器人，我很可能「无眼」。
E: Shush, you are a true genius! Please allow me to apologize for my previous discourtesy. It was I who failed to have eyes for such talent. Even if I have no eyes as a catering robot.

C: 别急，我会出手。
E: Calm down. I'll do it.

C: 叫「列车组喜提豪车」吧。
E: How about "Express Limousine"?

C: 「猴子喝了都说好」。
E: "All the Monkeys Say It's Good."

C: 不过，拍张照还是可以的。
E: But it's alright to take a photo of it.

C: 今天的两张照片都完成啦，拍照还真累啊…也辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}！
E: The two photos for today are all done. Photography is so tiring... Good work from you too, {NICKNAME}!

C: 「奇诡镜头的惊魂变身法」。
E: "Bizarre Lens's Form of Fright."

C: 哈努兄弟不耐烦地挪了挪身子——你打扰到它看节目了。
E: Brother Hanu restlessly shifts his posture — you are interrupting his viewing of the show.

C: 它是艾格勒赐下的圣卷，我们一族过去领受了它的恩典，要祖祖辈辈借助此物记录天空下的所见，作为晨昏之眼目光的延伸。
E: They are holy scrolls bestowed by Aquila. Our clan once received their grace, and we have been using this relic to record all that happens in the world for generations, as an extension of the Eye of Twilight's gaze.

C: 速度属性拉得挺高啊。
E: Your SPD is pretty maxed out.

C: 当然，我不是哑巴。
E: Of course not. I'm not mute.

C: 起来！都起来！…允许你们休息了吗！快干活，我不是来看你们偷懒的！
E: Get up! All of you! ...Did I allow you all to take a break!? Get your feet moving. I didn't come here to watch you all slack off!

C: 好吧，作为管理者，和员工进行绩效谈话是你的职责。想想看，到底该说些什么呢？
E: All right, as the administrator, speaking to your staff about their performances is your duty. Think, what should you say?

C: （再吓唬它们）
E: (Scare them a little now)

C: 于是我假意投奔，顺势探探你的虚实，并驱使这个人来挑衅。
E: So I pretended to pledge my loyalty to probe your strengths and weaknesses, and used this person to provoke you.

C: 喏！这是我的领队奇美拉，能力很强，也很好相处。暂时借给你们，肯定能帮上忙！
E: Behold! This is my chimera leader, highly capable and very affable. I'll lend it to you for now, so it'll surely be of help!

C: 哼。败者没有反驳的资格。但这只是我的失败，并非奇美拉整个族群的失败。
E: Hmph. The loser has no right of rebuttal. But the only one defeated was me, not the entire chimera tribe.

C: 哎，这群小家伙对我都没这么热情。掏出你的留影石机，和可爱的奇美拉拍个合照吧。
E: *sigh* These little ones aren't even that cushy with me. All right, take your photostone out and snap a group shot with these cuddly chimeras.

C: 原来是树庭神域。
E: So this is the Grove Art Online.

C: 那么请问是什么样的优惠呢？
E: What kind of promotion are you talking about?

C: 这就到小组赛的最后一轮啦，看来小灰也是两战全胜？恭喜你们呀！
E: This is the final round of the group stage! Looks like you too have won both matches, Little Gray. Congratulations!

C: (:３っ「毕竟豹早已经豹毙了」)∋
E: (:３っ "I'm already seal-ed away anyway" )∋

C: 你怎么悄没声息就来了？
E: How did you make it this far without anyone noticing?

C: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「豹毙了~~但豹又转生成为小海豹了~~」)∋
E: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "My fate was sealed~~ But now, I'm back~ A seal once more~~")∋

C: 别人不知道就算了，泡泡很清楚，你为了胜利付出了更多，这是你应得的。
E: Others may not know this, but I know very well that you have sacrificed so much more for this victory. You deserve it.

C: …太好了！虽然咱们奖杯丢了，仪式感不能丢，还请两位来到赛事委员方这里，让我来宣布比赛结果。
E: ...Great! Even though the trophy is lost, we can't lose out on the sense of ceremony. Both of you, please come in front of the competition committee, and I shall announce the results of the competition.

C: 伴着水漫琴舒缓的节奏，浴场里传来了吟游诗人的歌声…
E: The soothing rhythm of the water lyre blended with the voice of the bard in the bath...

C: 作为黄金裔的贵客，我也希望你能尽情借此深入领略一番奥赫玛的风情。
E: As the esteemed guest of the Chrysos Heirs, I hope you can immerse yourself into the culture of Okhema with this experience.

C: 而你变成那些<color=#eb4d3dff>不会说不会笑、摆在货架上的小海豹</color>，基础概率是<color=#eb4d3dff><unbreak>99.4%</unbreak></color>。
E: However, the base chance of you turning into an <color=#eb4d3dff>inert and passive baby seal for display on the shelves</color> is <color=#eb4d3dff><unbreak>99.4%</unbreak></color>.

C: 闭嘴，「预言之子」！我是黑厄。
E: Silence, Child of Prophecy! I am Pie-non.

C: 在你彻底醒来之前，我还有最后三件事要叮嘱你。
E: Before you go, I have three final reminders for you.

C: 当人们谈论起逐火之旅的时候，会理所当然地想起那十二名伟大的黄金裔，以及一名可爱的小海豹。
E: When people speak of the Flame-Chase Journey, the twelve great Chrysos Heirs naturally come to mind, along with an adorable baby seal.

C: 太好啦！泡泡，你跟着灰宝去参加比赛，肯定能有所收获。
E: That's great! With Grayie, you are sure to learn a lot in the tournament, Bubbles.

C: 啊？我平时一直积德行善啊。
E: What? I've always been a good person.

C: 钱…可不可以？
E: How about... money?

C: 哼哼~有没有想过，为什么游戏里会出现那么多你熟知的形象？说实话，其中有些面孔我也是第一次见。
E: Well, notice all those familiar faces in the game? Truth is, some are new even to me.

C: 咳咳，其实是因为我没钱，机器的算力只能支持一个场景…不过这倒也是大伙喜欢的题材。
E: *ahem* Truth is, I'm short on funds, and the hardware can only process one scene... but people seem to like it.

C: 没错！游戏的主角是一位小小的勇者，追寻着传说中的球棒踏出家乡，前往征服群星的道路……
E: Exactly! The game's protagonist was a teeny hero, who set off from their hometown to find the legendary bat and conquer the stars...

C: 早在《银河球棒侠传说》立项之初，我们就将开发重点放在了游玩体验上，因此在正式版的制作中更注重玩法的打磨，希望能做到「小而精」，而非「量大管饱」。
E: We've focused on the player experience from the very start of Legend of the Galactic Baseballer's development. So we really perfected the gameplay for the official version, aiming for "small but refined," not "big and overwhelming."

C: 那样的话，我在比赛开始之前就投降了好吧。
E: In that case, I'd forfeit before the race even started.

C: 她是黑客，那是远程操控系统…
E: She is a hacker, and that is a remote control system...

C: 哎呀，我本来想的是，拿了冠军就把冠军奖励送给你的。
E: Oops, I originally thought that if I won the championship, I'd give the prize to you.

C: 车你直接开回去就好了，但别说是我送的。我倒是无所谓，但要是让人知道你和我走得太近…总归对你有负面影响。
E: Just drive the car back, but don't say it was from me. I don't really care, but if people find out you're that close with me... it'll only have negative consequences for you.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}！救救，救救——！
E: {F#Sister}{M#Brother} {NICKNAME}! Save me, save meeee!

C: （忍住打招呼的冲动。）
E: (Hold back the urge to greet her.)

C: 咦，这些听起来还有点意思！
E: Huh, now that actually sounds fun!

C: 这么简单的实验，靠观察就能得出结论，还用什么对照。
E: For something this basic, a little observation is enough. Who needs a control group?

C: 总而言之，人偶完全是在胡说。第四面镜一向客观，不信我来问问。
E: In any case, the puppet is clearly talking nonsense. The Fourth Mirror is always objective. Let's ask it and see.

C: 魔镜魔镜告诉我，谁是这世上集美貌与智慧于一身的人？
E: Mirror, mirror, floating there, who holds beauty and wisdom beyond compare?

C: 跟我的球棒去说吧！
E: Let it come. My bat's got a few words for it.

C: 呵呵，年轻人真是精力充沛啊。
E: Heh, youth sure is something else.

C: 这些答案，你更喜欢哪个？
E: Which answer do you prefer?

C: 星核猎手也会缺钱？
E: Even Stellaron Hunters can run out of money?

C: 都不是，是您那本《石膏塑像的美学原理》，实在太精彩了！
E: None of those. It's your book Aesthetic Principles of Gypsum Sculptures, utterly brilliant!

C: 五年以上就算资深？
E: Is five years all it takes to be considered a senior?

C: 哎哟，差点把命丢了……
E: Yikes, I almost died there...

C: 存了些什么数据？
E: What kind of data is stored?

C: 可见，吸引人的故事是有规律可循的。而这东西便是就此应运而生。
E: This shows that there are rules to follow when telling an alluring story. And that's how this thing rose to meet the occasion.

C: 没错。
E: Correct.

C: 这都什么乱七八糟的…
E: What the heck was all that gibberish?

C: 「书中暗表，此菇非凡菇，它介于有无之间，无时无刻不在虚实相生之中…此物名为『生灭灵芝』。」
E: "It is written that this is no mortal mushroom. It sits within a state between existence and non-existence, constantly fluctuating between the real and the imaginary... It is called the 'Life-Death Polypore'."

C: 「那正是丹鼎司所藏最为珍贵的药材——『风雷天根』。{NICKNAME}衔下长势最好的气生根，离开了初代司鼎的幻境。」
E: "This then was the most precious medicinal herb hidden at the Alchemy Commission — the Whirlbolt Pneumatophore. {NICKNAME} harvested the best of the floating roots, and left this fantasia of the first Cauldron Master."

C: 其中有那么几个蜃影执着于歹毒的恨意，屡衅事端，让人们不堪其扰。请你解决掉那些满怀恶意的蜃影，正好当做是对你的试炼了。
E: A few of them still cling to vicious hatred, causing all kinds of ruckus that's really starting to get to people. Please get rid of these ill-willed Mirage Echoes — that's the trial that I have for you.

C: 别捣乱，我忙着寻宝呢。
E: Hey! Don't interupt! I'm trailblazin' here!

C: 回龙尊造像那里找我吧…咱们直接进行下一步就好。
E: Come back to the Statue of the High Elder and find me... We can go straight to the next step.

C: 「{NICKNAME}找到了那颗流光溢彩的持明卵，当中的确正有个生灵要破茧而出。{NICKNAME}小心翼翼地开始为新任龙尊接生。」
E: "{NICKNAME} found the luminescent Vidyadhara egg, and indeed there was a creature about to break free from incubation. And so, {NICKNAME} carefully delivered the new high elder into re-existence."

C: 不一会儿，他便颇为开心似的长叹了一声——这似乎是某种西衍先生写作结束时的习惯性动作——然后便将「主角模板」交还给了你。
E: He soon let out a long, satisfied sigh, which seemed to be a habitual pattern for Mr. Xiyan's writing process, and handed the Protagonist Model over to you.

C: 哦哦哦！您这么一说在下大概就明白了。行的，这个等之后改稿的时候肯定会修正的。
E: Ooh, ooh! When you put it like that, I think I've got it. Okay, this is definitely getting updated when we do our revisions.

C: 关于「我是谁」这样深奥的哲学问题，咱先按下不表。
E: Let's put aside for the time being the profound philosophical concept of "Who Am I?"

C: 算了，{NICKNAME}，别计较了，就当是艺术加工吧。真要长得像绝灭大君那么可怕，拍成幻戏的成本也要提高不少。
E: Forget it, {NICKNAME}. Just forget about that. Treat it as part of the artistic process. The budget for shooting Immersia would shoot through the roof if we really wanted to capture a ferocious and accurate likeness of the Lord Ravager.

C: 好消息是，这些委托其实都不算困难，顶多只是有些麻烦。
E: The good news: This assignment isn't hard at all. It's just a slight hassle at worst.

C: 而坏消息是…我手头上临时又被分配了其他的工作。所以我能提供的协助，到此为止。
E: And the bad news is... I've been tasked with some other urgent work. So this is about all the support I can offer you for now.

C: 您呐，也高低体谅一下我俩的难处，就甭为难咱俩了。
E: Yeah, please understand our concerns and don't make things too difficult for us.

C: 我、我没事…谢谢外来者姐姐！
E: Thanks, Miss March, I—I'm fine.

C: 怎么办怎么办，{NICKNAME}！我们是不是做错什么事了？
E: Ah! What do we do, what do we do, {NICKNAME}! Did we do something wrong?

C: 没事，我们一起慢慢想。
E: No problem, take your time.

C: 欸，真的吗？总觉得有点……
E: Really? Sounds a little...

C: 哈哈，两位<color=#dbc291ff>「冠军候补」</color>也登场了！这场戏可真是越来越热闹了啊。
E: Behold! Two <color=#dbc291ff>championship contenders</color>! It would seem the stage is set for some intense competition!

C: 喂，{NICKNAME}，我们是来挑战冠军候补的，不是来打劫的……
E: Uh... {NICKNAME}, we're here to challenge them, not rob them...

C: 喂，你们俩！对，就是你们俩！
E: Hey, it's those two twerps again!

C: 不过，仙舟联盟居然同意了公司的这种请求——感觉真是难以想象。
E: It's hard to imagine that the Xianzhou Alliance actually agreed to accommodate the IPC's request, don't you think?

C: …你说谁粉毛小矮子呢！
E: ...Who're you calling little miss pink!?

C: 这也太「欢愉」了。
E: Oh wow, I'm sooo "Elated" now...

C: 这是…矿车？
E: A... mine cart?

C: 答案其实很简单：若想要赢得<color=#dbc291ff>「冠军首席」</color>头衔，就必须向其他人展现出应有的<color=#dbc291ff>「实力」</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>「决心」</color>……
E: The answer is actually quite simple: In order to claim the title of <color=#dbc291ff>champion</color>, one must demonstrate the necessary <color=#dbc291ff>strength</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>resolve</color> to surpass others...

C: 仙舟联盟的伙伴——来自星穹列车的开拓者——！
E: The Xianzhou Alliance duo — the Astral Express Trailblazers⁓!

C: 刚才那场比赛可真是激烈呀。在你们打出致胜一击的时刻，瓦尔特先生都激动地从坐席上站起来了。
E: That duel just now was pretty intense. When you dealt the winning blow, not even Mr. Yang could control his excitement. You should've seen him leap out of his chair.

C: …抱歉，聊到这些难免伤感了些。我听说接下来就是总决赛了，祝你们旗开得胜。
E: ...Sorry, getting a bit nostalgic here. I hear the grand final is up next, I hope you knock it out of the park.

C: 我宣布——本届庆典的「冠军首席」是——
E: I hereby proclaim... this year's champion...

C: 总之，我一定尽力而为，不给大家拖后腿！
E: A—Anyway, I'll do my best to carry out my duties!

C: 「白露大人出逃」？这有什么好奇怪的，龙女大人不是三天两头出逃吗？
E: Lady Bailu disappeared? That's nothing new — she sneaks off all the time.

C: 在出发之前，确实应该先做好情报上的准备。
E: Before we head out, let's make sure we have our intel in order.

C: 腾骁身为罗浮的将军，节制云骑；而燎原则是岁阳之首，号令群魔；二者如天覆地载，阴阳相薄，双方龙战实在是合情合理，合乎规矩。
E: Teng Xiao, as general of the Luofu, was commander-in-chief of the Cloud Knights. Ignamar commanded the heliobi. The two were as great as the sky and the earth — equally matched like yin and yang. It is only natural that they were worthy opponents.

C: 你别给我乱说话！
E: Psst, be normal!

C: 我一定要一雪前耻！这次一定要保护好…嗯，还有看管好小桂子！
E: But I'll redeem myself this time! I'll make sure to protect her— uh, and also keep an eye on her...

C: 这台词像是戏里酷劲十足的保镖会说的话。
E: What are you, a mob boss?

C: 你们…完事了吗？
E: Are you done running around yet?

C: 浮烟为何执着于要与将军决斗…
E: Why is Cirrus so obsessed with fighting the general of the Luofu?

C: 生存竞争是很公平的。鸣蜥的鼓囊和眼球会喷出剧毒，防护工作干得不好，许多小伙伴都把命搭了进去。
E: Well, the competition for survival went two ways — shrieking lizards spew out a potent venom, and failure to take proper precautions cost many a hunter their life.

C: 为什么我要按大人的方式来生活呢？
E: Why do I have to live the way grown-ups do?

C: 走着瞧吧！
E: Time will tell!

C: 就像太卜大人无论看到何等残酷的、可怕的选择，只要有利于罗浮众生，她都要选择。
E: Just like the master diviner — no matter what cruel and horrible paths she foresaw, as long as it benefited the Luofu, she had to make a choice.

C: 滚。
E: Take a hike.

C: 这就是你要展示的命中注定？
E: Is this where you show us the true nature of destiny?

C: 世界上又不止一条路！
E: There is more than one path in the universe!

C: 危险的是咱们？
E: It's that we're in danger?

C: 镇定，让小女子来瞧瞧。
E: Hold on, let me take a look at her.

C: 妈呀，第一次听见有人把我网名念出来，鸡皮疙瘩都起来了……
E: Shivers, that's the first time I ever heard someone say my name out loud IRL. Gives me goosebumps...

C: 它真的会害死你的…
E: It will really kill you...

C: 我想您也听说了…文远已经不在了。那么依照我们之前的承诺，我来见您。
E: I think you must have heard... Wenyuan is no longer with us. So in light of our promise, I have come to see you.

C: 不，这儿只是青雀小姐内心的幻象…
E: No, this is the illusion inside Miss Qingque's mind...

C: {NICKNAME}，太卜大人，准备好的话我就要摇动同心火铃咯？
E: {NICKNAME}, master diviner, if you are ready, I shall ring the Harmonic Chime?

C: …看来我的客人等得不耐烦了，你们就接着研发，我要办些私事了。
E: ...It seems that my guests are growing impatient. You get on with research and development, I have private affairs to tend to.

C: 嗯，多半是。
E: Yes, I imagine so.

C: 房东大叔说，他搬走的时候，屋内搬空、房门锁死，房产证应该在某个保险箱里。
E: The owner said that when he was moving out, the house was cleared out and locked shut. The deed should be in a safe somewhere.

C: 我、我我还醒着呢！
E: I, I—I'm awake!

C: 植物，并没有什么奇怪的地方。
E: A plant. There's nothing out of the ordinary.

C: 按照流程，完成了委托，还是得发点东西…那么就拜托你啦，{NICKNAME}。
E: Based on official processes, something should get sent now that an assignment has been completed... I thank you for your efforts, {NICKNAME}.

C: 没错，就是我。
E: That's me.

C: 你准备好驾驶机巧鸟了吗？
E: Are you ready to pilot the cycrane?

C: 接下来，应该只差最后一处了。
E: There should only be one location left.

C: 符箓静静地挂在姬子的衣服表面，没有任何反应。
E: The talisman quietly stays on Himeko's clothes. It doesn't have any reaction.

C: 既然如此…你们是如何掌控那位持明，让他为你们动用这股力量的？
E: If that's the case... how did you and the rest control the Vidyadhara and make him use his power for the Express crew?

C: 不，很平静。就像一颗星星，在天空中它该在的位置那样…平静，自然。
E: No, I feel at peace. Like a star in the sky, it stays where it belongs and exists as itself peacefully.

C: 小家伙说的没错，它不能再大摇大摆地待在仙舟上了。
E: This little fellow is right. It can no longer strut around on the Xianzhou.

C: 目前我也在筹备和规划未来的直播节目，可能会固定在某些时间段播吧，这样方便大家观看。敬请期待！
E: I'm preparing and planning out future live stream segments, which might be played at fixed times so it's easier for everyone to watch. Stay tuned!

C: 但网上的东西本来就有真有假，或许是发帖的存心骗我们，或许是风吹过货仓的门发出的声响被误认为是闹鬼，人家也不是有心骗人，谁知道呢。
E: But there're always problems with what's true and what's fake online. Maybe they're trying to scam us. Maybe a gust blew open the warehouse door, making it creak as though haunted — and they DON'T actually want to scam us. Who knows?

C: 尊敬的用户小桂子Guinevere，请签收。
E: Ms. LilGuiGuinevere, could you please sign for this?

C: 啊？他和您对话了？…这…看来她没有骗我，这只鸟确实…别在意，在下自言自语罢了。
E: Ah? It chatted with you? ...This... looks like she wasn't lying. This bird can actually... Don't mind me. I'm just talking to myself.

C: 但既然你如此好奇，那听听这个故事吧……
E: But seeing as you're so curious, then why don't you give this story a listen...

C: 苏乐达的瓶盖！若是失去了您，整瓶汽水…不，所有快乐都将毫无意义。
E: SoulGlad's bottle cap! Without you, the entire bottle of SoulGlad... No, all joy would lose its meaning.

C: 即使战至最后一人，也仍然斗志激昂，独自在漆黑的荒野中开拓出应当前进的道路。
E: Even when you stand as the sole survivor, you retain the will to forge a path through the darkest wilderness.

C: 我来试试吧……
E: Well, let me give it a try...

C: 「请听好我的问题。」
E: "Riddle me this."

C: 「所谓*正常*，对我们而言只是奴役。」
E: "The so-called *normal life* is nothing more than just slavery for us."

C: （好像听到了黑桃的声音……）
E: (Think I hear Spade's voice...)

C: （我来帮她将全部场景都展现出来吧。）
E: (Let me help her reveal the whole scenario.)

C: （酒吧布置好了，但淑女和铁皮人没有出现。看来记忆回溯还要继续。）
E: (The lounge is all decorated, but Lady and Tin Man haven't appeared. Seems like the Memory Rewind has to continue.)

C: 汪！我很听话的哇！
E: Woof! Sure, I'll be a good boy!

C: 唉，趁还在的时候多喝几杯吧。麻烦给我来杯<color=#dbc291ff>破碎感，特别清爽的饮料，再放个知更鸟小姐的装饰上去</color>，谢谢。
E: Eh, might as well have a few more while I'm here. Please give me a glass of something <color=#dbc291ff>that exudes brokenness and is very refreshing. And add the decoration of Miss Robin to it</color>, thank you.

C: 「黄金的时刻」不行吗？
E: How about in the Golden Hour?

C: 请再给我杯饮料降降温吧，这次想要<color=#dbc291ff>梦幻风格，超级浓郁的类型！还是要多放点冰块，</color>不然人家的电路板要烧坏啦。
E: Give me another drink to cool me down some more. This time, I want something <color=#dbc291ff>dreamy and super thick! And like before, I want more ice,</color> or my circuits are gonna fry.

C: 想清楚点，这件事对你也有好处。你要是让我开心，我就会常来光顾这家酒吧，你也能拿到更多小费。
E: Think about it: It's beneficial for you too. If you make me happy, I'll drop by more often, and you'll make more tips.

C: 唉，你道出了生活的真相。提出问题前，询问者的心中通常都已有了答案。
E: *Sigh* You've spoken truthfully about life. More often than not, the questioner already holds an answer in mind before asking the question.

C: 唉，你道出了生活的真相。提出问题前，询问者的心中通常都已有了答案。
E: *Sigh* You've spoken truthfully about life. More often than not, the questioner already holds an answer in mind before asking the question.

C: 其实，人家过来找您，是听说了件非常有意思的事，想和您分享。
E: Well, I came to see you because I heard something interesting and wanted to share it.

C: 所以你到底是来干嘛的？
E: So, what brings you here?

C: （忧郁派的情绪似乎并没有变好，不过感觉和它的信任加深了。）
E: (Melancholy's mood doesn't seem to be getting any better, but it feels like its trust in me has deepened.)

C: 嘿嘿，您的手指真灵活，有空的话，能麻烦您帮我转下指针嘛？
E: Hey hey, your fingers are really nimble. If you're free, can I trouble you to turn the pointer for me?

C: （看在它对我如此礼貌的份上，还是满足这个需求吧。）
E: (They've been so polite to me. I'll just fulfill this request.)

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: （加油，感觉就快接近它的真实想法了。）
E: (Keep at it. Looks like I'm getting close to what they're really thinking.)

C: 就像你看到的这样，失去理性，胡乱攻击周围的对象，直至…彻底无法恢复。
E: Just as you saw, they'll lose their sanity and start attacking everything around them until... until they're beyond recovery.

C: 至于我…呵，安抚情绪不过是家族的惯用手法，没什么好说的。
E: As for me... Well, soothing emotions is what The Family is used to doing, so there's nothing complex about that.

C: 汪！花费时间和精力去满足别人的要求，你就是在打工哇！
E: Woof! Spending your time and energy to satisfy other people's demands. You're working a job!

C: 谢谢！只要摇几下尾巴，你就会信任我。你还真是好骗哇！
E: Thank you! You'd trust me just with a few wags of my tail! You're so easy to fool.

C: 记录「司令」的情况。
E: Record information about Mr. Bigwig.

C: 怎么说，你全打通了？这才多久啊…我不信！我小时候明明要打上好几个月才能通关……
E: What? You've beaten the entire game already?... No way! It took me months to beat it when I was a kid...

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪  汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof  Woof

C: 汪  汪  汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof  Woof  Woof

C: 现在是「赞歌大合唱」的困难难度。
E: This is the Hard difficulty for Hymn Chorus, tweet.

C: 先来复习一下节奏吧。
E: Let's rehearse the beat first.

C: 请摆放心仪的小鸟
E: Please place your preferred Bird

C: 准备好了吗？好了就赶紧开始，我倒要看看对战的部分能做成什么样……
E: Ready? Then let's get started. I want to see how they designed the combat system...

C: 那句话是怎么说的来着…「大佬，请带带我」——是这样的没错吧？
E: How do they say it again? ...Oh, I remember now. "Carry me, please!" Did I get it right?

C: 咦？当、当然没问题，翡翠女士！
E: Eh? O—Of course, Madam Jade!

C: 再见，{NICKNAME}！谢谢你的邀请，我今天很开心！
E: Goodbye, {NICKNAME}! Thank you for inviting me, I had a lot of fun today!

C: 你看…那不是卢卡吗？
E: Look... isn't that Luka over there?

C: 歪理邪说。
E: That's not true!

C: 难道你不敢在赛场上和我堂堂正正比一场，非得像这样用一些阴损的盘外招吗？
E: Scared to fight me fair and square in the arena? Must you resort to these dirty tricks?

C: 嗯…看完那篇报道之后，我走在路上总能听见别人在讨论我的事…后来不知不觉陷入了幻觉，还在幻觉里和人大打出手……
E: Hmm... after reading that article, I can't stop overhearing people discuss me on the street... Later, I found myself slipping into a hallucination and ended up in a fight...

C: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是风头正劲的明日之星——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: In this match, the two opposing sides are, the rising star — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 失灵的设备，毫无规律的现象，无论对哪个时代的学者都堪称致命的打击。
E: Malfunctioning equipment and phenomena occurring without rhyme or reason are fatal blows to scholars of any era.

C: 解开孤波算法难题时，我得到了一个常数。
E: When I solved the solitary waves theory, I obtained a constant.

C: 可以拒绝吗？
E: Can I pass?

C: 点击格式化！
E: Select "Reformat"!

C: {NICKNAME}，先用这个枕头睡觉吧～还好我的房间有好多枕头！我就说这是生活必需品吧～
E: Here, use this pillow for now, {NICKNAME}. It's a good thing that there's no shortage of pillows in my room! I told you pillows were essentials!

C: 这次绝对不冷！请您务必再给我一个机会！
E: I promise this one won't be bad! Please give me another chance!

C: 依据心情。
E: Based on mood.

C: 不是啦！是说{NICKNAME}自己一个人的庆祝！
E: No, silly! I'm talking about {NICKNAME} celebrating in {M#his}{F#her} own way!

C: 有别的主意。
E: I have other ideas.

C: 听说你正在筹备什么计划？
E: I heard that you're currently working on some kind of plan?

C: 啊？我的意思是，我拿七成，你拿三成。
E: Huh? I'm getting <unbreak>70%</unbreak>. The <unbreak>30%</unbreak> is yours.

C: 我只记得种地和骑大地兽时要拜吉奥里亚，没听说它还能封闭山洞…不过泰坦的弯弯绕，谁又能说清了？
E: I can only recall that people pray to Georios when they're farming or riding dromas. I've never heard of Georios being able to seal off caves before... Yet, when something involves the whims of Titans, who can really tell?

C: 你居然这么信任我？真令人感动……
E: You have so much trust in me? I'm truly touched...

C: 你打开箱子，里面是一些陈年杂物，以及一块蒙尘的刻字石板。这便是萨白尼人最后的遗产。
E: When you open the chest, you find some ancient items inside, as well as a text-inscribed stone slab that's covered in a layer of dust. These items form the final legacy that was left behind by the Sabanians.

C: 保真吗？
E: Wait, for real?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's the matter?

C: 这件事还是等它长大一些，再告诉它吧。
E: Better to wait until it's older before telling it about this.

C: 我也很高兴再见到你，在灰宝那里过得开心吗？
E: I'm happy to see you too! Have you been enjoying your time with Grayie?

C: 呜嗡嗡。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，这人好奇怪啊。还好他不是大地兽，不然太丢兽啦。）
E: Grumphhhh. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, this person is so weird. Good thing he's not a dromas. What an embarrassment that'd be.)

C: 那刻夏老师，你刚刚在门廊站了好久，我还以为……
E: Professor Anaxa, you were standing on the porch for so long. I thought...

C: 我教祷言？真的假的？
E: Me, teaching prayers? Seriously?

C: 呜嗡…（不要啦，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}你又不是大地兽，煮熟了怎么办。）
E: Grumph... (Nuh-uh, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. Unlike me, you could actually get cooked.)

C: 这次直播过后，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大的粉丝想必会多到能占领大地兽工坊吧。
E: After this livestream, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's army of fans could probably take over the Dromas Workshop.

C: 呜嗡嗡。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，这人好奇怪啊。还好他不是大地兽，不然太丢兽啦。）
E: Grumphhhh. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, this person is so weird. Good thing he's not a dromas. What an embarrassment that'd be.)

C: 咳…解释起来很费事。总之，至少今天，请叫我「兽皇」。
E: Ahem... It's a long story. Anyway, just for today, please call me "Beast Emperor."

C: 呜嗡…（哇，好多大地兽。）
E: Grumph... (Wow, so many dromases.)

C: 还有这种好事？
E: Really?

C: 嘿，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，你就是维德提到的「大人物」吧，星穹列车的无名客？
E: Hey {F#miss}{M#dude}, you must be that "big shot" Vader mentioned. A Nameless from the Astral Express, right?

C: 还没来得及搭话，你便注意到艾丝妲身旁的桌上蹲着只你此前从未见过的造物。
E: Before you can even say a word, you notice an unfamiliar creature crouching on the table beside Asta.

C: 「障碍」、「封闭系统」、「干涉与观测」…记得最初的方案上写着这几个关键词，但阮•梅女士也没有向我们透露太多就是。
E: "Obstacles," "closed system," "interference and observation"... I remember these keywords were written in the initial proposal, but Miss Ruan Mei didn't reveal much more to us than that.

C: 我就知道，你肯定和小家伙们很合得来。费用的事就交给我，尽管去尝试吧。
E: I knew you'd get along well with the little ones. Don't worry about the costs, I'll handle that. Just go ahead and give it a try.

C: 嘶嘶。真巧，我们第二次见面了。难道，你这么快就把糕点又用完了？嘶嘶。
E: Zztzzt. Look who's here... we meet again. Don't tell me you've already run out of pastries, again? Zztzzt.

C: 嘶嘶。不对。你想要，就得自己来拿。嘶嘶，按约定好的方式——
E: Zztzzt. No, that's not right. If you want it, come and take it. But of course, by our agreed terms...

C: 呵，跟我的球棒去说吧。
E: Heh, tell that to my bat.

C: 我等仲裁官着眼于宏大的均衡：无论自然生长的植物，还是人为修建的塔楼，在我们眼里都无区别。唯有天平两端值得关注。
E: We Arbitrators focus on the grand Equilibrium: Whether it's naturally growing plants or artificially built towers, we see no difference. Only the two ends of the scale are worth our attention.

C: 首先，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。
E: Firstly, call me Anaxagoras.

C: 等等，还得再加上一条。咱们开店的目的是为妖精提供美食，必须以菜品为核心。
E: Oh, and one more thing. Our mission is to serve the fairies great food. That means our dishes must remain front and center.

C: 不记作旷工，就当她是「因公出差」吧。
E: No need to mark her absent. Let's call it an "official business trip."

C: 作为通过本次美食评审的证明，我将为店长颁发迷其林星级奖章。
E: As proof that you've passed this Food Review, I hereby award the Memchelin Star Award to you.

C: 迷！我们郑重宣布——<color=#dbc291ff>「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」正式收录进迷其林美食名单中，是一星级餐馆了迷！</color>
E: Mem! We hereby announce — <color=#dbc291ff>"The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2" is now officially listed in the Memchelin Gourmet Guide as a 1-star Restaurant, mem!</color>

C: 正好，我和妖精们很熟悉，找些帮手来制作桌椅也方便。
E: Plus, I know the fairies well. It'll be easy to get help making more furniture.

C: 活动期间内，所有菜品必须以「凯撒」的名号作为前缀，所有员工必须以臣子自称，所有顾客在进餐前必先称颂「凯撒」的伟绩。
E: During the event, all dishes must be prefixed with the noble title "Imperator," all staff shall refer to themselves as loyal subjects, and all customers must recite praises of the Imperator's glory before every meal.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈！这何尝不是一种破局的方法呢？
E: Hahahahaha! Well, at least that's one way to shake things up.

C: 缇宝、{NICKNAME}，再加上我…共计是三票。
E: So that's Tribbie, {NICKNAME}, and me... three votes in total.

C: 我出石头！
E: I picked rock!

C: 有，当然有。几位客户，随便挑随便选，库存充足，包你们满意！
E: Oh, I've got plenty. Go ahead, browse all you want. My stock's full to the brim, satisfaction guaranteed!

C: 缇安，要先说！甜甜的菜，需要够甜。所以在饼里，加了好多蜂蜜。
E: Trianne first! Sweet food's gotta be super sweet! So Trianne packed that pancake with a ton of honey.

C: 我就不客气了。
E: Then I won't hold back!

C: 我申请暂停这场美食评审…多出来的这些菜品到底该怎么处理啊……
E: I motion to pause the tasting... What are we even supposed to do with all these extra dishes...

C: 今天的事情都忙完啦，店长也早点去休息吧。
E: That's a wrap for today. You should get some rest too, owner.

C: 恐怕只有农田的产量突然翻上好几倍，才有可能解决这次危机吧。
E: Unless our farmland output magically multiplies overnight, this could get ugly.

C: 哼。剑和菜刀都使得一般，挥起锄头来倒挺厉害。
E: Tch. You swing a hoe better than a sword or a cleaver. I'd give you that.

C: …明白了，那便由我先回答吧。
E: Point taken. I'll go first.

C: 正确答案只有一个，那便是……
E: There's really only one correct answer here...

C: 什么的尾巴？
E: Did you say a FAIRY'S tail?

C: 去田里种地好像也不错？
E: Perhaps field work would suit you better?

C: 呵。捷足爵是对我评定的薪资不满么？
E: Hmph. Is Dux Celeripes unhappy with the compensation I've assigned?

C: 如今，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」的名号响彻整个迷境，孩子们都为品尝到你们制作的美食而欣喜。餐馆举办的活动，也收获了一致好评。
E: Now the name of The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2 echoes across the entire Maze, with children excitedly enjoying your culinary creations. Your special events have earned unanimous praise.

C: 嘻，人家也很期待呢。走吧，我们这就去看看！
E: Hehe, I can't wait either! Let's go check it out!

C: 都是些譬如「生拌刺刺果」、「腌渍蜜蜜花」之类极为简单的食物…妖精虽然热爱美食，花了很多心思在料理研究上，实则连最基本的烹饪方式都不会呢。
E: Just a few super simple things, like Raw Quillorb Salad or Pickled Honey Blossom... They adore good food and put a lot of heart into studying it, but when it comes to actual cooking, they can't grasp even the basics.

C: 呵，不得不说，举办经营活动确实是步好棋，既能吸引客流，也足以展现各位负责人的才能。店长的决策相当出色。
E: Heh. I'll admit, launching a restaurant event is indeed a good move. It brings in traffic and gives each department head a chance to shine. Smart decision, manager.

C: 缇安，跑得很快！
E: Trianne's superfast on her feet!

C: 哼。请便。
E: Hmph. Suit yourself.

E: I saw so many familiar faces...

C: 其中亦有例外——\n男人的宿敌常常疑惑，\n为何自己的每一餐都难以下咽。

C: 「纵是运动健将， 也永远追不上这只龟。」 无人能将他辩倒， 他如愿得到冠军宝位。
E: "Even the best athlete could never catch up to this turtle." None can overturn him in arguments, And he obtains the champion's crown in merriment.

C:
金织的银针悬在半空，
为她编织美丽的装束。
海列屈拉接过不存在的赠礼，
咸涩的水打湿了新衣。
E:
The Goldweaver's silver needles hover in the air,
Weaving beautiful outfits for her.
Helektra accepts the gift that does not exist,
As salty water wets her new attire.

C:
人们说，天上曾有名为太阳的星，
而如今，那星已不见了影。

人们说，是艾格勒带走了光明，
但它还留下了一颗明亮的心，
来照亮这处幸福的梦境。
E:
People say there was once a star called the Sun in the sky,
But now that star is no longer there.

People say that Aquila took away the world's light,
But they still left behind a heart bright,
To illuminate this happy dream in the night.

C: 不久以后，\n将领的伤处恢复如初，\n贵族的忧虑也逐渐祛除。
E: Before long,\nthe general's wounds were healed,\nAnd the noble's worries gently repealed.

C: 「晨昏可以被缝补，」\n「仇怨可以被消融。」
E: "Day and night can be mended,\nAnd so can hatred be undone."

C: 可名为风堇的少女想起伙伴的高呼，\n想起荡尽污浊的金丝最终化为庇护，\n想起烈阳冉冉升起只为将世界担负。
E:
But in memories deep, Hyacine heard their call,
The golden threads that shielded all,
The burning sun, vast and unyielding,
Carrying the weight of all the world had known.

C: 「天空…好黑，好冷。」 记忆的最深处， 名为塞涅俄丝的「少女」抱膝颤抖。
E: "The sky... it's so dark, so cold." In the depths of memory, The "girl" named Seliose pulls her knees to her chest and trembles.

C: 但在圣城的古卷中，\n边陲小村的往事，比明日更晦涩。
E: Yet, within the ancient texts of the holy city,\nthe history of that frontier village remains more obscure than the days to come.

C: 这类言语萦绕在男人耳畔，\n但他知晓，\n荣光绝非旅程的开端。
E: Such words echo in the man's mind,\nYet he knows glory is not where the journey begins.

C: 但在某日，他幡然转意—— 「造物是泰坦的工， 奴役是泰坦的恶。」 「仿拟神明恶行， 不值得倾注理性。」
E: However, one day he suddenly changes his tune — "Creation is the Titans' work, And slavery is the Titans' manacle." "When imitating divine evil, There's no need to invest reason most pinnacle."

C: 可那奇石乃是炼金的神迹，\n坚不可摧，无从刻记。
E: But that stone is a miracle of alchemy,\nTough beyond measure, no chisel could have shaken.

C: 「倘如你已昏盲不堪， 我以我的命运……」 她握住滚烫的火种， 「向你交换能看清一切的眼睛。」
E: "If you no longer have the power to see, Then with my destiny..." She grasps the burning Coreflame. "I'll exchange for eyes that can see everything."

E: If: A Successful Flame-Chase

C: 过去三千万次轮回，每一次相见，你都为我留下了一篇故事。被沉重的命运囚禁，却依然像是童话的故事。
E: Through thirty million cycles, every time we met, you left me a story. Even when bound by the weight of fate, it still felt like something out of a fairy tale.

C: 人们看见「爱」的结局，于是踏上逐火的征程；而逐火的人们，又让花儿在明天诞生。
E: When people see that ending of "love," they then set out on the Flame-Chase Journey. And those who chase the flame let the flower bloom anew tomorrow.
"...5 seconds...4 seconds..."

C: 孩童们学习着与不同的「缇缇」相处的方式，用心记下每一个「缇缇」喜欢的东西、说话的语调。她们也发现，每一个「缇缇」都互相不认识，也不曾知晓对方的存在。
E: The children learned how to interact with different versions of "Trity," carefully remembering each "Trity"'s favorite things and manner of speech. They also discovered that none of the "Trity" knew each other, nor were they aware of each other's existence.

C: 「那，到我了。遐蝶，告诉你一件有趣的事情，万敌连着两周败在我手里，下次帮我带一束黄紫色的风信子，我记得它的花语是失败再重来……」
E: "Alright, my turn. Castorice, here's something fun: Mydei lost to me two weeks in a row. Next time, bring me a bunch of yellow and purple hyacinths. I remember the flower's meaning is 'try again after failure'..."

C:
「海列屈拉」曾对LykoS采取过多次攻击行为，但都收效甚微。

光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，「海列屈拉」成为半神，移动权限卸载，并嵌入「坐标：斯缇科西亚」。

光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年后，「海列屈拉」持续提交内部指令：卸载ID：LykoS思维模块。该指令有违管理员安全协议，不予通过。

不久后，「海列屈拉」运算路径熔断，陷入休眠。

该死循环末期，「海列屈拉」留守忆质动荡的世界，为回归翁法罗斯的丹恒提供指引。
E:
"Helektra" had launched multiple attacks against LykoS, but with minimal success.

In Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, "Helektra" became a demigod. Its mobility permissions were removed, and it was fused into "Coordinate: Styxia."

After Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>, "Helektra" continuously submitted internal commands to uninstall ID: LykoS's cognitive module. These commands violated the Administrator security protocols and were denied.

Not long after, "Helektra's" calculation pathway was overloaded, and it entered dormancy.

In the final phase of that recursive loop, "Helektra" remained in the world turbulent with memoria to guide Dan Heng on his return to Amphoreus.

C:
未知单位「长夜月」检索异常：「坐标：神悟树庭」，命途图谱异常，重点扫描。
推测：未知单位具有违规权限：高规格数据清除。
警告：相关记录违规清除中。已警告ID：LykoS。

【管理员无应答。】
未知单位无法检索。异常数据记录已恢复。
E:
Unknown Unit "Evernight" Retrieval Anomaly: "Coordinate: Grove of Epiphany" Path chart anomalous, initiating Priority Scan.
Hypothesis: Unknown Unit possesses unauthorized access: high-level data erasure.
Warning: Related records undergoing unauthorized deletion. ID: LykoS has been warned.

"Administrator not responding."
Unknown Unit untraceable. Anomalous data record restored.

C: 光历<unbreak>4510</unbreak>年，「雅辛忒丝」成为半神，但拒绝卸载移动权限，「守护」占行动逻辑的最高权重，驱使其留在地面照顾其它人类个体。\n\n光历<unbreak>4602</unbreak>年，翁法罗斯全域普通人类灭绝。「雅辛忒丝」思维模块磨损严重，最终不得不放弃移动权限，嵌入「坐标：晨昏之眼」。
E: In Light Calendar <unbreak>4510</unbreak>, "Hyacinthia" ascended to demigod status but refused to uninstall mobility permissions. "Protection" held the greatest weight in its action logic, compelling it to remain on the ground to care for other human individuals.\n\nAll normal humans in Amphoreus ceased life functions in Light Calendar <unbreak>4602</unbreak>. "Hyacinthia's" cognitive module was severely deteriorated, and it was forced to relinquish its mobility permissions and fuse itself into "Coordinate: Eye of Twilight."

C:
「岁月」的火种已被归还。

欧洛尼斯是岁月与夜幕的泰坦。在艾格勒创造最初的太阳前，世界被纯粹的黑暗笼罩。直到白昼与黑夜被划分，年轻的欧洛尼斯从新生的时间洪流中惊醒，孤身前往翁法罗斯的界外域，化身「永夜天帷」，从此远离世间，静静梳理岁月的脉络。

黄金裔的神话里，欧洛尼斯是最为神秘的泰坦，就像深不见底的黑暗本身。艺术家们对它尤为痴迷，只因那黑夜中的点点星光，能唤醒人们自我深处对未知的渴求。作为司掌时间的泰坦，欧洛尼斯在懵懂中支撑着世间的过去、现在与未来，让万事万物得以流转。它也珍藏着诸多早已风化的记忆，以防记忆遭受遗忘。

欧洛尼斯的祭司们往往能唤起不可思议的奇迹，他们的秘仪能够让过往的事物重现，也能从永夜天帷的回声中获取泰坦对未来的谕示。
E:
The Coreflame of Time has been returned.

Oronyx is the Titan of time and night. Before the first dawn created by Aquila, the world was caged in the purest darkness. When the borders and day and night were separated, the young Oronyx jolted awake from the newborn concept of time, heading toward the outer reaches of Amphoreus alone. There, they materialized as the Evernight Veil and henceforth remained afar from humanity, quietly spending their time managing the fabric of time.

In the myths told by the Chrysos Heirs, Oronyx is the most secretive Titan, akin to the bottomless darkness itself. Artists are thus entranced by the Titan, because the scintillating dots of light in the night's sky can awaken one's deep desire to understand the unknown. As the Titan with mastery over time, Oronyx supports all the past, present, and future of this world, allowing for the circulation of all things. They also collect many eroded memories to prevent them from being forgotten.

Oronyx's priests can evoke incredible miracles, with their secret rituals capable of bringing in the past to the very present, and they also can gain oracles of the future from their Titan through the echoes across the Evernight Veil.
