E: Enemies within the range of the thermal energy field will lose the Ice DMG boost available in snowstorms, and additionally receive Fire Weakness. It will also take extra Fire DMG, giving allies an advantage in combat.

C: 当发现场景里有多片决胜纹样碎片时，开拓者可以通过移动和调整视角，在<color=#f29e38ff>特定角度和位置</color>下，将多片决胜纹样碎片组合成<color=#f29e38ff>完整</color>的决胜纹样。
E: When multiple fragments of a Victory Marking are found in a scene, Trailblazers can piece these fragments together into a <color=#f29e38ff>complete</color> Victory Marking by moving and changing the view to <color=#f29e38ff>a specific angle and position</color>.

C: 某些格外淘气的小鸟并不会直接承认自己的失败，需要你逐一拆穿它们的层层伪装。多加观察，多尝试几次，就能掌握捉住它们的方法。
E: Some particularly playful birds won't directly admit their failure and require you to peel back their disguise little by little. Observe carefully and try many times to figure out the way to capture them.

C: 启动<color=#f29e38ff>「筑梦遥眼」</color>后将切换至<color=#f29e38ff>筑梦师视角</color>。在该视角下，原本被截断的、存在高低落差的<color=#f29e38ff>道路会以不可思议的方式被连通。</color>
E: Activating the <color=#f29e38ff>Dream's Eye</color> allows you to switch to the <color=#f29e38ff>Dreamweaver's View</color>. In this mode, <color=#f29e38ff>disconnected paths or those with height discrepancies will be connected in an incredible way</color>.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>王下一桶</color>出没在世界各个角落，考验着过路的勇士。与其对话则会面对它的考验，通过考验后可获得<color=#f29e38ff>星琼</color>奖励。每位<color=#f29e38ff>王下一桶</color>的挑战只能完成一次，不可重复挑战。

Converse with it to face its trials, and completing their trials will earn you <color=#f29e38ff>Stellar Jade</color> rewards. The trials from each <color=#f29e38ff>Lordly Trashcan</color> can only be completed once and cannot be repeated.

E: Netherwing can consume its own <color=#f29e38ff>HP</color> to <color=#f29e38ff>continuously blast</color> all enemies.\nWhen Netherwing's <color=#f29e38ff>HP is under <unbreak>25%</unbreak></color>, it can continue blasting to trigger <color=#f29e38ff>self-destruct</color>.

E: When Phainon is in the team, <color=#f29e38ff>Technique Point limit</color> increases, and using his Technique <color=#f29e38ff>defeats</color> enemies within a certain range ahead

C: 流星捎来讯息，传说在浩瀚银河的深处，埋藏着所有人梦想中的最强球棒。为了找到这根球棒，我决定离开家乡，遍历诸多星球，踏上漫长的寻宝旅途。
E: A shooting star has sent word that deep in the bowels of the vast Cosmos, there hides an ultimate bat that everyone dreams of having. To find this bat, I decided to leave my home and travel to countless planets, embarking on a prolonged journey to find the treasure.

C: 我在黑暗中走了许久，终于…远处露出了一点光亮，越来越明晰，越来越温暖……

全场每秒收入的金币数量

Gold coins earned per second across the venue

Units of quantity, in ascending order, are K (thousand), M (million), B (billion), T (trillion), then letter combos like AA, BB, CC, and so on.
Each unit is <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> times larger than the previous unit.

C: 切忌冲动行事。
E: Move carefully.

C: 经过这一趟，不，或许在更早之前，小三月就已经是成熟的无名客了，我们也不能再把她当做需要保护的孩子看啦。
E: Since experiencing this trip — or perhaps much earlier — March has become a mature Nameless. We needn't treat her like a helpless child anymore.

C: 近乎无限长的时间，近乎无限广的空间，而我们同时出现在一处。「命运」就是这样，创造奇迹的同时，让你以为只是偶然。
E: All space and time are practically infinite, and yet right here, right now, we find ourselves together. That's the nature of "destiny" — it creates a miracle but convinces you of an accident.

C: 还想…知道更多……
E: But I want... to know more...

C: 身处安全之地，可以好好休息了。
E: We can have a good rest now we're safe.

C: 哈！给得挺多。
E: Hey! Pretty generous.

C: 有必要这么难么…
E: That was unnecessarily difficult...

C: 玲可，站在我身后，别冲太前。
E: Don't run ahead, Lynx.

C: 人是向往自由的动物，如果太久看不到天空，也是会生病的…心里会生病。
E: Humans long for freedom. If they go for too long without seeing the sky, they get ill... Both in body and mind.

C: 还是老样子，希露瓦，记得不要抢拍啊。
E: Remember, Serval — don't rush the beat.

C: 娜塔莎姐姐说克拉拉也是医生呢，是机器伙伴的医生。
E: Natasha said I'm also a doctor — for my robot friends.

C: 咱俩经常见面，我跑他追。老实说，这种猫鼠游戏玩久了也…有点上头，嘿嘿。
E: Ah, we see each other pretty often — usually it's me running away and him running after me. Gotta say, I'm gradually beginning to enjoy the attention, hehe.

C: 你见过他比赛没有？那小子，可是下层区最大的摇钱树啊！可惜这树没长在老桑博的后院里……
E: Have you seen him compete? A lot of Underworlders made a lot of money off that kid! *sigh* Your pal Sampo here wasn't one of them...

C: 你帮我，我当然帮你。
E: One good turn deserves another!

C: 老巫…温柔美丽的娜塔莎姐姐一旦生起气来…呃，依旧美丽，但不怎么温柔了……
E: Old witch... Ahem. Natasha is beautiful and nice, but when she gets angry she, uhh... isn't so nice. B—But still beautiful...

C: 好像是哥哥在追查的通缉犯，但感觉偶尔也会在雪原里见到他…啊！难道他就是传说中的…「贝洛伯格野人」？！
E: He seems to be a wanted criminal that my brother is tracking, but I feel like I see him occasionally in the Snow Plains... Ah! Is HE the legendary Belobog Caveman!?

C: 每日一练？不够，加练！
E: Why train daily when you could train twice daily?

C: 很嚣张嘛！
E: Don't get cocky now!

C: 星穹列车的神秘人物，外形像小动物一样的列车长…嗯，我也听过那种传言。耳听为虚，如果它真有传言中的那么有趣，那我迟早要见上一见！当然最好还能，揉上一揉……
E: The most mysterious character on the Astral Express is that conductor — the one who looks like a little creature... Their reputation precedes them. If they're as interesting as the rumors suggest, I'll definitely have to meet them sooner or later! And hopefully, I'll get to pet them too!

C: 必须提高风险意识……
E: Gotta know the risks...

C: 来吧~
E: Come onnnn~

C: 哇哦~
E: Wow~

C: 魔阴发作时，我就是另一个人了。
E: When the mara strikes... I become something else.

C: 如我所料。
E: As expected.

C: 停云，此事交由你处理可好？
E: Are you capable of handling this situation, Tingyun?

C: 宝剑们，动起来啦！
E: Time for some swordplay!

C: 嘿呀，{NICKNAME}，看我最近的直播了吗，老精彩了！
E: {NICKNAME}, did you check out my latest livestream? It was a show-stopper!

C: 这位医士好像是裳裳的长辈，但行事风格听说竟然比裳裳还…活泼。可能曜青人都这么有活力吧！
E: That healer seems to be a senior colleague of Sushang's... But I heard that he's even more energetic than she is! Maybe everyone from the Yaoqing is that way?

C: 机会难得，给您拜个早年吧！
E: It's never too early... for a Happy New Year!

C: 饮月啊…与你并肩而立，像是很久之前的事了。
E: Imbibitor Lunae... It feels like an age since we stood shoulder to shoulder.

C: 杀不死我！
E: You can't kill me!

C: 这股力量…我本不欲使用。
E: I wish not to use this strength.

C: 你观察过洞天的天空是如何变化的吗？即使明知是虚假的景观，每当经过几日几夜的梦占，走出因果殿，凝望那些明灭闪烁，心里仍会平静许多。
E: Have you ever observed how the sky in the delve changes? Even knowing it's an artificial scenery, whenever you walk out of the Hall of Karma after days and nights of dream divinations and gaze at those bright and flickering stars, you will still feel a great calmness in your heart.

C: 说了很多次啦，这叫医食同源——烹煮即是炼药；炼药即是烹煮。以食疗济愈病患，乃是我的独门绝学。俗话说，不想当医士的厨子当不了好幕僚……
E: No matter how many times I say it, people always forget — cooking is medicine, and making medicine is cooking. Using food to treat the sick is my specialty. As the saying goes, a chef who doesn't want to be a healer isn't worth his salt... or pepper, for that matter.

C: 以火佐攻者明，可以拔营；以水佐攻者强，所以伥固。至于水火齐下，敌军便如这釜中食材一般任人鱼肉了。
E: Attacking with fire will allow you to break camp — an intelligent move. Attacking with water will allow you to consolidate — a strong tactic. With fire and water together, the enemy will be turned to stew, much like the one bubbling in front of us.

C: 要想「搜猎魔剑，尽数断绝」，还远远不够。
E: To finally "hunt down and wipe out all cursed swords" — I still have a long ways to go before then.

C: 我就没见过熔不掉的铁疙瘩。
E: I've yet to find a lump of iron I can't melt.

C: 持有魔剑的人虽然能在剑技上一蹴而就，但说到底只是被魔剑驱遣的行尸走肉而已——胜负在人，而不在剑。
E: A cursed sword may grant a warrior great power in an instant, but in the end, they will just be a walking corpse driven by the sword. Victory is up to the wielder, not the sword.

C: 初次见面，妾身名唤灵砂，自朱明学成归来，忝任罗浮丹鼎司司鼎。若您身体不适，我可以随时为您安排医士。
E: It's a pleasure to meet you. You may call me Lingsha. I have returned to serve as the Head of the Luofu's Alchemy Commission after completing my studies on the Zhuming. If you are feeling unwell, I can arrange a healer for you at any time.

C: 时间不多了。
E: Time is slipping away fast.

C: 再让我见识见识「开拓」的力量吧。
E: Show me some of that Trailblazing strength again.

C: 骑士的磨练……
E: A test...

C: 有趣吗？
E: Enjoying yourself?

C: 这盘赔率可不小。
E: High stakes, high rewards.

C: 全押了，我买单。
E: Going all in. Tab's on me.

C: 我们该启程了。
E: Another journey begins.

C: 再陪你走一段吧。
E: I'll stay with you a little longer.

C: 哥哥或许认为，自己要承担起更重的责任。他总会认真倾听我的烦恼，却很少向我吐露心声…可能在他心中，我仍旧是妹妹吧。
E: My brother seems to believe that he should shoulder more responsibilities. He always listens carefully to my problems, but hardly ever confides in me... Perhaps in his eyes, I'm still his kid sister.

C: 希望世间纷争不再。
E: I hope for an end to strife in the world.

C: 切换预案。
E: Recalibrating.

C: 游历总会有终点，我毫不怀疑此行的意义。
E: Every journey must come to an end, but I have no doubts about the meaning of this one.

C: 总有一处乐园需要人来建成。那誓愿有如天上的太阳，也许我在触及它前便会熔毁、坠落…但有些苦难是必须要经受的。
E: There's always a paradise that needs to be built. That vow is like the sun in the sky —perhaps I'll melt and fall before reaching it... But some hardships I must endure.

C: 你好呀，我叫「翡翠」，应你的欲求而来。若想典贷，须先抵押同等重要之物…尊严、情感、乃至生命。你愿意用什么来和我做交换呢？
E: Hello, my name is Jade. I'm here at your request. If you'd like to take out a loan, you must put something of equal value up as collateral... Your dignity, your feelings, or even your life. What are you willing to exchange?

C: 缭乱•忍法•锦墨绘！
E: Dazzling: Brocade Ink Painting!

C: 赐你天谴！
E: Fury upon you!

C: 彻底疯狂吧！
E: Sink into insanity!

C: 危险已然迫近。
E: Danger approaches.

C: 复仇的渴望一直支撑着我前行，即便心有不安，我也相信漫漫长夜的尽头，是光的方向。
E: The hunger for vengeance has carried me through this journey, but despite my uncertainty, I still believe there's light at the end of the deepest dark.

C: 以旧日余烬，为来世破晓！
E: With the old sun's embers, hail the new world's dawn!

C: 盛典，不醉不归。
E: Feasts, be intoxicated.

C: 扬起旌旗，随我启程！
E: Fly the banners, and set off with me!

C: 别担心，我们还有好多好多时间。
E: Don't worry. We've still got all the time in the world.

C: 我也是遐蝶的忠实读者！呀…不小心暴露了什么？是因为…除了那些美好的幻想，我还能从她的故事里收获十二分的感动！
E: I'm a big fan of Castorice's writings, too! Ahh... Did I say that too loud? You see... Apart from containing wonderful fantasies, her stories also really move me emotionally!

C: 还未到止步的时候。
E: I'm not done yet.

C: 休整完毕。
E: Break's over.

C: 成为英雄的道路并不孤单，搭档。
E: The road to becoming a hero is not a lonely one, partner.

C: 记着点。
E: Remember that.

C: 技能
E: Ability

C: 施放特殊技能
E: Cast Special Ability

C: 致幻人鱼
E: Hallucinogenic Mermaid

E: Chrysos Champion

C: 金币富豪
E: Gold Tycoon

C: 对战高手
E: Combat Master

C: 佐々木未来
E: 佐々木未来

C: 为敌方全体<color=#f29e38ff>添加【共舞者】属性的弱点</color>并使其防御力降低。造成大量火属性伤害，由敌方全体均分。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Applies Weaknesses of Dance Partners' Types</color> to all enemies and reduces their DEF. Deals massive Fire DMG, which is distributed evenly across all enemies.

C: 所有目标生命值可降低至0以下且不会陷入无法战斗状态！
E: All targets' HP can be reduced below 0 without being knocked down!

C: 【巴特鲁斯】逃之夭夭！
E: "Bartholos" has fled!

C: 如果拥抱命运，
E: If embracing fate,

C: 一时的失利，无法改变大局。
E: A single loss will not change the outcome of the war.

C: 凯撒禁卫军
E: Imperator's Imperial Guard

C: 使1只奇美拉随机属性+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: Increases a random stat of 1 chimera by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 同伴被击倒时：自身离场，并使该同伴恢复至<color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>点<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>
E: When a companion is knocked down: This unit departs from the field and restores the companion to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>.

C: 穿戴者被击倒时：以<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>重新加入对战，每场对战生效1次

C: 「『哲学的胎儿』星期日」拥有全属性弱点。「『哲学的胎儿』星期日」在处于【太初有力】状态时，将在我方目标每次行动后立即行动，并免疫来自我方目标造成的行动延后效果，自身受到弱点击破时行动额外延后。且自身每层韧性被击破后，对我方施加【<u>在光明中行</u>】。
E: "Embryo of Philosophy" Sunday has weaknesses of all Types. While "Embryo of Philosophy" Sunday is in the "Im Anfang war die Kraft" state, it will immediately take action after every action taken by targets and becomes immune to action delay effects caused by targets. When it becomes Weakness Broken, its action is additionally delayed. Moreover, after one stack of its Toughness is Broken, it applies <u>Walk in the Light</u> to targets.

E: Gladly accept.

C: 梵婀丝人以其非凡的音乐天赋享有盛誉，曾被评为宇宙最懂音乐种族的前五名。它们使用优美的和弦沟通，拒绝了同谐「家族」的邀请，只为不掺杂质地追求韵律之美。但在接受丰饶赐福后，这种追求开始变得病态。譬如为了还原最完美的人声，梵婀丝人曾用生物技术打造出这种耳机——长在耳麦上的嘴巴会直接以演唱的方式呈现歌曲，绝无音色失真。
E: The Vannesians are renowned for their extraordinary musical talent, having been ranked among the top five most musically-gifted species in the universe. They communicate through beautiful chords and rejected the invitation from the Harmony Family, solely to pursue the pure beauty of rhythm. However, after receiving the Abundance's blessing, this pursuit began to turn pathological. For instance, in their pursuit of flawless vocal reproduction, the Vannesians used biotechnology to create these biological headsets with living mouths integrated into the earpads, which perform the audio directly, eliminating any timbral distortion.

C: 不沉重碑文（破解版）
E: Featherlight Inscription (Decrypted)

E: Sealing Wax Synthesis

E: Occurrence

C:
你见识过多洛斯城外的石阵吗？
鳞次栉比，七扭八弯，仿佛关押米诺陶的监牢。
要是不小心走了进去，没个一天可出不来。
但它并非特定某人的作品。最开始，那里只有一块怪石。
某位无名的旅者经过，心血来潮之下，怪石从一块变成了两块。
而后有人出于玩笑，有人出于好奇，还有人用它绘制密语、传递消息；
越来越多的人为它添砖加瓦，就连半神也加入到这场游戏。
所以，误入的旅者，请先别急着生气。
阻挡你的每块顽石，可都是前人的诡计。
E:
Have you seen the stone formation outside of Dolos City?
Row upon row, twisting and turning, like a labyrinth imprisoning the Minotaur.
If you wander in carelessly, it'll take you a whole day to find your way out.
But it wasn't created by any one person. At first, there was just a single strange stone.
A nameless traveler passed by and, on a whim, turned one stone into two.
Then some added more as a joke, others out of curiosity, and some even used it to write secret messages.
More and more people contributed to it, even demigods joined in the game.
So, lost traveler, hold your horses before getting angry.
Every stubborn stone blocking your path is a trick left by those who came before.

E: Try using tuning to help {NICKNAME} adapt to the memoria, assuming it's not too late for that.

C: 奇怪，这位少女身上的确存在一丝杂音，可那位自称治安官的男人却毫无察觉。\n直接跟上去的话，自己很容易被其他人认出来，打草惊蛇，先使用「调律」进行监视吧。
E: That's strange... there is a definite trace of static noise around this girl, yet that man who calls himself a security officer is completely oblivious.\nIf I follow her directly, I'll be recognized and blow my cover. I'll use "tuning" to keep an eye on her for now.

C: 梦主的禁制被黑天鹅完全烧却了，曾经的默契仍未褪色——尽管这种默契的来源不是那么值得怀念。\n把一切的真相告知黑天鹅吧。
E: The Dreammaster's containment mechanism was completely burned away by Black Swan, yet their old rapport remained intact, though the origin of such rapport wasn't exactly worth reminiscing about.\nIt's time to tell Black Swan the whole truth.

C: 她的长梦值得拥有更美好的结局，当遗憾业已存在，它也将弥补的机会永永远远地交到了你的手中。
E: Her long dream deserves a better ending. While the regret already exists, she has forever placed the chance to make things right in your hands.

C: 出发之前，和这里的同伴们再聊聊吧。
E: Chat with companions here before heading out.

C: 和星期日谈谈
E: Talk to Sunday

C: {NICKNAME}最近总爱开这种玩笑。
E: {NICKNAME}'s just been on a roll with these kinds of jokes lately.

C: 现在不是开玩笑的时候啦……
E: Now's not the time for jokes...

C: 就算{F#她}{M#他}早已忘记？
E: Even if {F#s}he's already forgotten it?

C: 沙发…入梦池…还有……
E: Sofa... Dreampool... and...

C: 别慌，根本没有「人」。果然，你眼里的画面，和我看到的「监控」不太一样。
E: Relax. There's "no one" here. I knew it. What you're seeing isn't quite the same as the "surveillance" I see.

C: 告诉我流萤的后续。
E: Tell me what happened to Firefly.

C: 不对…这声音，我绝对不会认错……
E: No... Wait. I'd recognize that sound anywhere...

C: …不说这个了！我带你去游览城镇…我们走吧！
E: ...We can talk about that another time! Right now, I wanna give you a tour of the town... Here we go!

C: 看来你是挺紧张的，跟我说话都这么端着了。
E: You must be pretty nervous if you're being this formal with me.

C: 挺有感觉的，怎么了？
E: I feel pretty good, why, what's wrong?

C: 是啊，我曾见过这样的情景——在归属的王虫死后，虫群会彻底失去活力，陷入沉寂。
E: Yes, I've seen it happen. When the Swarm King dies, the Swarm completely loses its vitality and falls into silence.

C: 你知道她的名字吗？
E: Do you know her name?

C: 不过，梦主的虚弱，也给我们带来了机会。
E: However, the Dreammaster's weakness has also given us an opportunity.

C: 可黑天鹅仍然在场，不知抱有什么目的。若是她选择颠倒黑白，你不可能说服其他人。在这里，忆者的话终究更可信。
E: But Black Swan is still here, with unknown intentions. If she chooses to twist the truth, you won't be able to convince the others. Here, a Memokeeper's word carries more weight.

C: 为何要「明知故问」呢？
E: Why ask when you already know the answer?

C: 可艾利欧说，我就是最合适的人选。
E: But Elio said I'm the perfect candidate.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>15</unbreak>█神明赐予我们天火，也赐予我们神圣的磨难。便令它们存在吧，你我皆属凡人，生来便要去爱，去受痛苦。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>15</unbreak>█The gods bestowed upon us heavenly fire, and with it divine tribulations. Let them be, for we are all mortals, born to love and to suffer."</color>

C: 这个声音……
E: That voice...

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: 亲爱的，你是受了致命伤，还是得了绝症？不是弥留之际，我不相信你会如此坦诚。
E: Darling, are you fatally wounded, or terminally ill? Unless you're on your deathbed, I don't believe you're actually being this honest.

C: 看吧，即使你已经忘记了曾经的一切，有些痕迹还是就此刻下，成为了本能的一部分。
E: See? Even though you've forgotten everything from before, some traces remain etched in this moment, becoming part of your instincts.

C: 嗯。
E: Mhmm.

C: 须用「强权」
E: You must use "force"

C: 你会赦免我么？米哈伊尔，你会么？
E: Will you forgive me? Will you, Mikhail?
(As expected...)

C: 此前我险些死去，至今无法示以原身，为何重回此地后，会平白获罪？
E: I barely escaped death, and I still can't reveal my true form. Tell me, why have I been branded a criminal upon returning to this place?

C: 这里是梦境和现实的狭间，属于那些从<color=#dbc291ff>太一之梦</color>中清醒的人。
E: This place is the rift between dream and reality. A place reserved only for those who have awakened from <color=#dbc291ff>Ena's dream</color>.

C: 但眼下的美梦极为复杂，黑天鹅女士，接下来的情况，能麻烦你来进行解释吗？我毕竟…记性不太好。
E: But the current sweet dream is extremely complex. Miss Black Swan, could you please explain the rest of it? My memory... isn't the best, after all.

C: 会怎么做？
E: What will she do?

C: 她的梦值得更好的结局。
E: Her dream deserves a better ending.

C: 我为何要相信一名假面愚者的说辞？
E: Why should I trust the words of a Masked Fool?

C: 说不定，这就是你最后一场演出了哦？
E: Maybe this will be your last ever performance.

C: 开拓之旅不会就此结束。
E: The trailblazing expedition won't end here.

C: ——生亦有时。
E: ...and life has its time, too.

C: 末王？
E: Terminus?

C: 而你所见到的，就是其中一只。艾利欧是更加特殊的存在，只有星核猎手知道他的真面目。
E: What you see is one of those cats. As for Elio, he is an even more special existence. Only the Stellaron Hunters know his true identity.

C: …报酬？
E: ...Payment?

C: 最后一个愿望是什么？
E: What's your last wish?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而在真正重逢的那一刻，你会发现，对方比你的一切想象还要美好——可一时之间，你又想不出怎么夸奖对方了。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And when we finally meet again, we realize they're even more beautiful than anything we could have imagined... Yet at that moment, we find ourselves at a loss for words to express just how amazing they really are.</color>

C: 在快要结束的时候，就让我稍微完美主义一下下吧。
E: As we near the end, let me indulge in a bit of perfectionism.

C: 「你的剑术已经大有进步。只要完成最终试炼，圣城卫队长的人选就非你莫属。」剑术教练露出满意的眼神，「对手可是纷争的眷属，会赢吗？」
E: "Your swordplay has improved tremendously. Once you complete the Final Trial, you'll be the undisputed choice for Captain of the Holy City Guards." The sword instructor's eyes gleamed with approval, "Your opponent will be a Kin of Strife. Think you can win?"

C: 塔塔洛夫曾教导过我们，不要轻信陌生人。看来你并不懂得这个道理。
E: Tatalov taught us not to trust strangers. Seems like you haven't learned that lesson.

C: 「同谐」的力量流溢。最单纯的满足温热地上升，填满你的胸膛。再在这里呆下去，你恐怕会幸福得昏厥过去。
E: The power of Harmony overflows. The purest satisfaction rises warmly, filling your chest. If you stay here any longer, you might just pass out from sheer bliss.

C: 虽说是竞赛，但不会有任何奇美拉受到伤害。小灰放心，大家都有分寸的！
E: Although it's a competition, no chimeras will be harmed. Don't worry, Little Gray. Everyone knows their boundaries!

C: 小车厘比斯也能帮我照顾病人，学起知识来可快啦。
E: Krenabis can also help me take care of patients, and they're such quick learners!

C: 谢谢，你还是别说话了。
E: Thanks, but please just stop talking.

C: 努努斯，快对它使用魔术技巧。
E: Nanus, quick, use your magic on it.

C: 优雅的无名客
E: The Elegant Nameless

C: 统治者的回响
